- sau đó registry.

Không tạo output directory ngoài Project trước khi Plan validation hoàn tất nếu không cần.

======================================================================
524. SAFE ID PATH COMPONENT
======================================================================

ID dùng làm path component phải:

- chỉ gồm ký tự an toàn theo ID factory;
- không chứa slash;
- không chứa backslash;
- không chứa `..`;
- không chứa colon;
- không rỗng;
- không vượt length hợp lý.

Nếu ID từ persistence không hợp lệ:

- coi là corrupt;
- không resolve tùy tiện;
- tạo validation/recovery issue.

Không sanitize ID hỏng thành ID khác vì sẽ làm sai identity.

======================================================================
525. GENERATE REQUEST REPOSITORY DETAIL
======================================================================

GenerateRequestRepository phải hỗ trợ:

- create(request)
- get(project_id, request_id)
- try_get(...)
- update(request, expected_revision=None)
- list(project_id, filters, pagination)
- exists(...)
- archive(...)
- validate_file(...)
- migrate_on_read nếu policy cho phép
- rebuild index nếu có

Create:

- reject duplicate request_id;
- atomic write;
- update index sau entity write;
- publish event ngoài repository.

Update:

- chỉ draft mutable fields;
- enforce revision nếu có;
- không sửa materialized Request field không cho phép.

List:

- không đọc full source text;
- dùng summary/index;
- pagination.

======================================================================
526. GENERATE SESSION REPOSITORY DETAIL
======================================================================

GenerateSessionRepository phải hỗ trợ:

- create
- get
- try_get
- update
- checkpoint
- list summaries
- list active
- list recovery candidates
- archive metadata
- validate storage
- read health
- rebuild summary

Không tự transition state.

Repository chỉ persist object đã được service/state machine validation.

Checkpoint phải:

- atomic;
- update updated_at;
- giữ revision;
- không làm mất unknown compatible fields;
- không ghi progress sai nếu caller stale.

======================================================================
527. GENERATE PLAN REPOSITORY DETAIL
======================================================================

GeneratePlanRepository phải:

- create_draft
- write_documents
- write_chapters
- write_units
- validate_complete_draft
- freeze
- get
- validate_checksum
- list Unit theo Chapter
- paginate Unit
- get Unit by ID
- reject update khi frozen

Nếu Plan data shard:

- plan index phải liệt kê shard;
- mỗi shard checksum;
- freeze chỉ khi tất cả shard valid;
- checksum tổng hợp deterministic.

Không lưu Plan chỉ trong Session JSON.

======================================================================
528. GENERATE ATTEMPT REPOSITORY DETAIL
======================================================================

GenerateAttemptRepository phải hỗ trợ:

- create Attempt;
- get;
- update status;
- list by Unit;
- list by Session;
- latest by Unit;
- count attempts;
- detect active Attempt;
- validate sequence;
- recover interrupted.

Không xác định latest chỉ bằng file mtime.

Dùng attempt_number và created_at/ID.

Nếu sequence có lỗ:

- không renumber;
- report inconsistency.

======================================================================
529. GENERATE ARTIFACT REPOSITORY DETAIL
======================================================================

GenerateArtifactRepository hoặc metadata layer tương đương phải:

- register planned Artifact;
- mark writing;
- mark created;
- attach metadata;
- mark validating;
- mark valid;
- mark invalid;
- mark missing;
- mark superseded;
- list by Attempt;
- list by Unit;
- list by Session;
- validate path uniqueness.

Không mark valid nếu chưa có validation report.

======================================================================
530. VALIDATION REPORT REPOSITORY
======================================================================

Validation reports phải persist độc lập nếu có thể lớn.

Repository hỗ trợ:

- create immutable report;
- get report;
- list by entity;
- latest by type;
- summarize.

Không update report cũ sau khi tạo.

Nếu cần thêm annotation, tạo report mới hoặc metadata riêng.

======================================================================
531. REPORT IDENTITY
======================================================================

Mỗi report có stable report_id.

Không dùng timestamp filename làm ID duy nhất.

Có thể filename gồm report_id và type.

Report ID bất biến.

======================================================================
532. GENERATE REGISTRY FILE FORMAT
======================================================================

Generate Registry file cần tối thiểu:

- schema_version
- project_id
- generated_at
- updated_at
- entries
- rebuild_required
- last_rebuild_at
- health
- warnings

Entries nên keyed by session_id hoặc list có index rõ theo convention hiện tại.

Không lưu full Plan.

Không lưu full source text.

Không lưu full error trace.

======================================================================
533. REGISTRY ENTRY REVISION
======================================================================

Registry entry có thể lưu:

- session_revision
- summary_revision
- manifest_checksum
- last_seen_at

Giúp phát hiện stale.

Không dùng file mtime làm revision business duy nhất.

======================================================================
534. REGISTRY UPDATE ORDER
======================================================================

Khi Session thay đổi:

1. Persist Session.
2. Persist related entity nếu operation yêu cầu.
3. Update registry summary.
4. Publish event.

Nếu registry update fail:

- mark rebuild_required qua safe marker nếu có;
- log;
- không rollback Session hợp lệ.

======================================================================
535. REGISTRY LOCKING
======================================================================

Vì nhiều Session có thể update registry:

- dùng lock ngắn;
- load latest registry;
- merge entry;
- atomic write;
- release.

Không giữ registry lock khi xử lý text hoặc inference.

Không write registry từ nhiều thread không lock.

======================================================================
536. REQUEST INDEX
======================================================================

Nếu Request list cần nhanh, có thể có request index riêng.

Không bắt buộc nếu Request ít và repository list nhẹ.

Không gộp Request và Session registry gây schema phức tạp nếu không cần.

======================================================================
537. SESSION STORAGE HEALTH CHECK
======================================================================

Health check nhẹ khi list:

- session.json tồn tại;
- parse được;
- storage path hợp lệ;
- plan reference tồn tại nếu status planned+;
- manifest reference tồn tại nếu finalized;
- không scan Audio.

Deep validation chạy explicit/background.

======================================================================
538. SOURCE MATERIALIZATION OPERATION
======================================================================

GenerateTextSourceService materialize phải nhận:

- project_id
- session_id
- source input
- operation_id
- cancellation context
- progress reporter optional

Kết quả:

- GenerateSourceSnapshot
- extraction report
- warnings
- managed paths
- checksums

Nếu operation bị cancel:

- không finalize Snapshot;
- giữ Request;
- cleanup temp theo policy;
- report cancelled.

======================================================================
539. PASTED TEXT MATERIALIZATION
======================================================================

Pasted text phải:

- verify type string;
- verify size;
- reject null bytes hoặc normalize theo policy;
- preserve line breaks;
- save raw UTF-8;
- checksum bytes/file;
- create metadata.

Không auto strip toàn văn bản.

Có thể reject whitespace-only.

Không lưu pasted text nguyên văn trong Request Registry summary.

======================================================================
540. TXT MATERIALIZATION
======================================================================

TXT flow:

1. Validate path.
2. Validate extension.
3. Validate regular file.
4. Read bytes safely.
5. Detect BOM.
6. Decode.
7. Record encoding.
8. Write managed raw text UTF-8.
9. Compute original checksum.
10. Compute managed raw checksum.
11. Create Snapshot.
12. Create extraction report.
13. Atomic finalize.

Original checksum có thể checksum bytes nguồn.

Managed raw checksum checksum UTF-8 canonical bytes.

Phải phân biệt hai checksum.

======================================================================
541. TXT DECODING FALLBACK
======================================================================

Nếu UTF-8 fail:

- kiểm tra UTF-8 BOM;
- có thể dùng encoding detector hiện có;
- hoặc thử danh sách fallback an toàn được document;
- không dùng system default ngầm.

Nếu decode có replacement character do fallback:

- warning hoặc error tùy severity;
- record count;
- không giả dữ liệu hoàn hảo.

Không cài charset detector mới nếu không cần.

======================================================================
542. DOCX MATERIALIZATION
======================================================================

DOCX flow:

1. Validate file.
2. Validate extension.
3. Compute original checksum.
4. Dùng reader hiện có.
5. Extract paragraphs.
6. Extract headings nếu có.
7. Build raw text.
8. Build structure metadata.
9. Write managed raw text.
10. Write extraction metadata.
11. Snapshot.
12. Report.
13. Atomic finalize.

Không phụ thuộc DOCX sau finalize.

Không lưu python-docx object.

======================================================================
543. DOCX PARAGRAPH ORDER
======================================================================

Phải giữ thứ tự paragraph như document.

Không sort heading.

Không gộp paragraph tùy ý.

Nếu table text extraction hiện có:

- giữ behavior hiện tại;
- document;
- không tự thêm table extraction nếu ngoài scope.

======================================================================
544. DOCX HEADING LEVEL
======================================================================

Nếu reader trả heading level:

- lưu level;
- dùng cho structure detection;
- không flatten mất dữ liệu.

Nếu không có:

- title detection rule fallback.

Không đoán heading từ font nếu reader không hỗ trợ.

======================================================================
545. SOURCE SNAPSHOT FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Snapshot chỉ finalized khi:

- raw file tồn tại;
- metadata valid;
- checksum match;
- paths relative;
- report tồn tại hoặc summary ghi;
- atomic rename thành công.

Session chỉ trỏ source_snapshot_id sau finalize thành công.

======================================================================
546. SOURCE SNAPSHOT IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Sau finalize:

- raw.txt immutable theo service policy;
- không sửa tại chỗ;
- normalized file là derived;
- source metadata immutable trừ health/validation pointer.

Nếu cần source mới:

- Session mới hoặc Snapshot revision rõ.

======================================================================
547. NORMALIZATION INPUT CONTRACT
======================================================================

Normalization nhận:

- source_snapshot_id;
- raw managed path;
- GenerateSettings normalization subset;
- normalization version;
- operation context.

Không nhận arbitrary external path.

Không đọc raw text từ Request field nếu Snapshot đã có.

======================================================================
548. NORMALIZATION OUTPUT CONTRACT
======================================================================

Kết quả:

- normalized text managed file;
- normalized checksum;
- source map;
- normalization report;
- counts;
- warnings;
- effective settings.

Không return chỉ string cho large flow nếu persistence cần.

Có thể return summary + path.

======================================================================
549. NORMALIZATION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Nếu normalized output đã tồn tại và:

- input raw checksum giống;
- settings checksum giống;
- normalization version giống;
- output checksum valid;

thì có thể reuse.

Không normalize lại không cần.

Nếu mismatch:

- không overwrite frozen Session output âm thầm;
- recovery/replan policy.

======================================================================
550. NORMALIZATION SETTINGS CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Checksum chỉ gồm normalization-related settings.

Không cần gồm output format hoặc Job priority.

Canonical serialization deterministic.

======================================================================
551. TRANSFORMATION REPORT
======================================================================

Mỗi transformation summary:

- name
- version
- changed
- replacement_count
- warning_count
- input_length
- output_length

Không lưu full before/after text.

======================================================================
552. CONTROL CHARACTER POLICY
======================================================================

Có thể remove:

- null;
- invalid control characters;
- unsafe non-printing characters;

nhưng phải giữ:

- newline;
- tab nếu normalization xử lý;
- Unicode combining marks;
- Vietnamese characters.

Mọi removal count trong report.

======================================================================
553. LINE ENDING POLICY
======================================================================

Normalize:

- CRLF;
- CR;

thành LF nếu setting bật.

Source raw giữ nguyên extraction text representation theo materialization.

Normalized output dùng canonical LF.

======================================================================
554. WHITESPACE POLICY
======================================================================

Không collapse newline thành space toàn cục.

Paragraph boundary phải giữ.

Có thể:

- trim trailing spaces từng dòng;
- normalize tabs;
- collapse repeated spaces trong line;
- giới hạn blank lines.

Theo settings.

======================================================================
555. QUOTE NORMALIZATION POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu normalize quotes bật:

- deterministic;
- không làm mất Unicode;
- record replacement;
- không biến mọi apostrophe thành quote sai.

Default có thể false nếu risk.

Phải theo source requirements.

======================================================================
556. ELLIPSIS POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu bật:

- normalize nhiều dấu chấm thành canonical form theo rule rõ;
- tránh đổi số thập phân;
- preserve sentence boundary.

Test tiếng Việt.

======================================================================
557. REPEATED PUNCTUATION POLICY
======================================================================

Không tự rút gọn biểu cảm như “!!!” nếu setting mặc định giữ.

Nếu normalize:

- configurable;
- report;
- deterministic.

======================================================================
558. CUSTOM REPLACEMENT SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Custom replacements phải được snapshot trong Session.

Không đọc settings mới khi Resume.

Mỗi replacement:

- order
- from
- to
- mode literal/regex
- enabled

Regex chỉ nếu safe.

======================================================================
559. NORMALIZATION FAILURE
======================================================================

Nếu normalization fail:

- Session status failed hoặc recovery_required theo stage;
- Request vẫn tồn tại;
- raw Snapshot vẫn giữ;
- không tạo Plan;
- report;
- registry summary cập nhật;
- no queue.

======================================================================
560. STRUCTURE SERVICE INPUT
======================================================================

Structure detection nhận:

- normalized text;
- source metadata;
- heading metadata;
- chapter settings;
- sentence settings;
- structure detector version.

Không đọc UI.

Không gọi LLM.

======================================================================
561. STRUCTURE OUTPUT MODEL
======================================================================

Có thể có internal model:

TextStructure

gồm:

- document span;
- chapters;
- paragraphs;
- sentences;
- detector version;
- warnings;
- checksum.

Không nhất thiết persist full duplicate nếu Plan model đã chứa.

Nhưng structure.json phải đủ để debug/replan theo version.

======================================================================
562. SPAN SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Mọi span dùng:

- start inclusive;
- end exclusive;

hoặc convention hiện tại.

Phải thống nhất.

Persist documentation.

Test boundary.

Không trộn byte offset và character offset.

Dùng character offset trên normalized Python string.

======================================================================
563. RAW SPAN VS NORMALIZED SPAN
======================================================================

Raw span có thể approximate.

Normalized span phải exact trong normalized text.

Unit text phải bằng normalized_text[normalized_start:normalized_end] hoặc canonical derived policy đã document.

======================================================================
564. CHAPTER DETECTION PRIORITY
======================================================================

Nếu DOCX heading metadata overlap regex detection:

- heading metadata ưu tiên.
- regex không tạo chapter duplicate.
- title raw giữ.

Nếu heading level khác nhau:

- Sprint này có thể dùng level 1/2 theo config;
- không cần nested chapter hierarchy phức tạp.

Có thể flatten nhưng giữ heading_level metadata.

======================================================================
565. CHAPTER DETECTION CONFIDENCE
======================================================================

Nếu dùng confidence:

- deterministic rule score;
- không phải ML.

Nếu không cần, dùng rule_id.

Không tạo pseudo-AI score không có nghĩa.

======================================================================
566. CHAPTER DETECTION FALSE POSITIVE
======================================================================

Các dòng sau không nên tự động thành chapter chỉ vì ngắn:

- lời thoại;
- ngày tháng;
- một số đơn;
- ký hiệu;
- URL;
- tên nhân vật.

Pattern phải anchored và specific.

======================================================================
567. CHAPTER DETECTION NO MATCH
======================================================================

Tạo một Chapter:

- order_index = first;
- title = null;
- detected_title = null;
- content span toàn document;
- title_source = none;
- warning optional không tìm thấy chương.

Không fail Plan.

======================================================================
568. PRE-CHAPTER CONTENT
======================================================================

Text trước chapter đầu phải thành:

- intro chapter;
- hoặc content prefix của chapter đầu;

theo policy.

Không drop.

Nếu tạo intro chapter:

- title fallback;
- role intro;
- no fabricated source title.

======================================================================
569. POST-CHAPTER CONTENT
======================================================================

Text sau chapter cuối nằm trong content span chapter cuối hoặc outro block.

Không drop.

======================================================================
570. PARAGRAPH BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Paragraph detector phải preserve:

- order;
- text;
- normalized span.

Blank line sequence tạo boundary nhưng không tạo nhiều empty paragraph.

DOCX paragraph metadata có thể ưu tiên.

======================================================================
571. SENTENCE BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Sentence boundary phải giữ punctuation trong sentence.

Không remove punctuation.

Sentence span exact.

Không create overlapping spans.

======================================================================
572. ABBREVIATION LIST
======================================================================

Nếu có abbreviation list:

- central constant/config;
- test;
- không hardcode rải rác;
- có tiếng Việt cơ bản.

Không cần exhaustive.

======================================================================
573. DECIMAL DETECTION
======================================================================

Dấu chấm giữa digits không sentence boundary.

Ví dụ:

1.5

3.14

Không ảnh hưởng chapter number pattern ở đầu line.

======================================================================
574. ELLIPSIS SENTENCE BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Dấu ba chấm có thể là boundary mềm.

Không tạo ba sentence.

Rule deterministic.

======================================================================
575. QUOTED SENTENCE
======================================================================

Sentence kết thúc trong dấu quote phải gồm closing quote nếu span logic hỗ trợ.

Không cần parser ngôn ngữ phức tạp.

Test cơ bản.

======================================================================
576. STRUCTURE REPORT
======================================================================

Report:

- detector_version
- chapter_count
- paragraph_count
- sentence_count
- rules_used
- warnings
- fallback_used
- hard cases count
- checksum.

Không lưu full text.

======================================================================
577. SPLITTER INPUT CONTRACT
======================================================================

Splitter nhận:

- normalized text;
- TextStructure;
- effective split settings;
- optional Engine max;
- splitter version.

Không tự resolve Voice/Reference.

Không tự tạo output path.

Có thể trả Unit draft objects.

======================================================================
578. SPLITTER UNIT DRAFT
======================================================================

Internal Unit draft:

- chapter_order
- unit_order
- normalized span
- source span approximate
- text
- text checksum
- counts
- warnings
- split_reason
- hard_split_used
- role

Planner mới cấp final Unit ID và output path nếu architecture phù hợp.

======================================================================
579. SPLIT REASON
======================================================================

Có thể lưu:

- paragraph_boundary
- sentence_boundary
- max_limit
- long_sentence_fallback
- chapter_title_boundary
- final_unit
- merge_short_unit

Hữu ích debug.

Không bắt buộc UI hiển thị hết.

======================================================================
580. SPLITTER BUFFER ALGORITHM
======================================================================

Buffer phải preserve separator.

Không join sentences bằng một space nếu normalized source có newline có nghĩa mà reconstruction cần.

Có thể slice trực tiếp theo spans để giữ original normalized substring.

Ưu tiên span-based chunking.

======================================================================
581. LONG SENTENCE FALLBACK
======================================================================

Fallback phải tìm boundary gần target nhưng không vượt max nếu có thể.

Search window có kiểm soát.

Không dùng regex quadratic.

Nếu không boundary:

- hard split;
- warning;
- preserve Unicode.

======================================================================
582. SHORT UNIT MERGE
======================================================================

Khi Unit cuối dưới min:

- thử merge Unit trước cùng Chapter;
- không vượt effective_max;
- không merge across Chapter;
- không làm mất role/title policy;
- update span/checksum;
- record merge.

Nếu không merge:

- giữ nếu allow_short_final_unit;
- warning.

Nếu không cho phép:

- Plan validation error hoặc policy fallback rõ.

======================================================================
583. TITLE UNIT SPLITTING
======================================================================

Nếu chapter title rất dài hơn max:

- dùng same long sentence fallback;
- giữ role/title metadata;
- không drop.

Trường hợp hiếm phải test basic.

======================================================================
584. EMPTY UNIT PREVENTION
======================================================================

Sau mỗi split:

- text not empty;
- not whitespace-only;
- span length positive;
- checksum.

Nếu empty do normalization:

- không tạo;
- structure report warning.

======================================================================
585. UNIT TEXT HASH
======================================================================

Checksum dựa UTF-8 normalized text.

Không include Unit ID.

Stable.

======================================================================
586. SPLITTER DETERMINISM
======================================================================

Không dùng unordered set/dict iteration ảnh hưởng order.

Không dùng random.

Không dùng current time trong split.

Entity IDs có thể random nhưng structural output stable.

======================================================================
587. SPLITTER VERSION PINNING
======================================================================

Session Resume không rerun splitter.

Plan chứa Unit.

Nếu cần repair normalized → Plan comparison, dùng version đã lưu.

Không dùng latest splitter để âm thầm rebuild frozen Plan.

======================================================================
588. PLANNER TRANSACTION
======================================================================

Planner operation phải chia stage persist/recovery.

Khuyến nghị:

1. Validate Session state.
2. Create operation marker.
3. Resolve Source Snapshot.
4. Normalize.
5. Detect structure.
6. Split.
7. Resolve selection.
8. Resolve effective settings.
9. Resolve output spec.
10. Build entity drafts.
11. Validate.
12. Persist draft graph.
13. Compute checksums.
14. Freeze Plan.
15. Update Session.
16. Draft Manifest.
17. Update Registry.
18. Clear operation marker.
19. Publish event.

Không update Session planned trước step 14.

======================================================================
589. PLANNER REENTRY
======================================================================

Nếu operation gọi lại sau timeout:

- check operation_id;
- check existing Plan;
- check Session state;
- return existing result hoặc resume stage safe;
- no duplicate.

Không tạo Plan thứ hai trong cùng Session không explicit revision.

======================================================================
590. PLANNER CANCELLATION CHECKPOINTS
======================================================================

Check cancellation giữa:

- source read;
- normalization stages;
- chapters;
- split large chapters;
- entity persistence batches.

Không check mỗi ký tự.

Khi cancel:

- abort before freeze;
- persist cancel report;
- Session status phù hợp.

======================================================================
591. PLANNER PROGRESS
======================================================================

Progress callback phải là domain-neutral.

Ví dụ:

stage_code
current
total
message

Không truyền QWidget.

Job handler map sang Job progress.

UI sync flow map qua signal.

======================================================================
592. SELECTION RESOLVER INPUT
======================================================================

Input:

- project_id
- voice_id
- variant_id optional
- style_profile_id optional
- speaker_reference_id optional
- engine_id
- requested parameters
- Request context

Output:

- GenerateSelectionSnapshot
- requested settings
- effective settings
- validation result
- readiness summary
- checksums.

======================================================================
593. VOICE RESOLUTION
======================================================================

VoiceService lookup by ID.

Validate:

- exists;
- Project scope;
- archived;
- schema;
- Engine compatibility;
- model references if needed.

Do not load model runtime.

======================================================================
594. VARIANT RESOLUTION
======================================================================

Validate:

- exists;
- belongs Voice;
- active/archive policy;
- settings valid;
- engine option namespace.

Snapshot.

======================================================================
595. STYLE PROFILE RESOLUTION
======================================================================

Validate:

- ID;
- Project/Voice scope according schema;
- source assets;
- profile version;
- archived state;
- settings.

No analyzer.

======================================================================
596. SPEAKER REFERENCE RESOLUTION
======================================================================

Validate managed assets.

Do not trust legacy path if asset IDs present.

If legacy only:

- migration/compat path;
- warning;
- no auto import unless policy.

======================================================================
597. ENGINE RESOLUTION DURING PLANNING
======================================================================

EngineManager lookup metadata/capability.

Do not instantiate heavy runtime if capability can be read lightweight.

If capability unavailable without runtime:

- planning can snapshot Engine ID;
- execution readiness unavailable/degraded;
- do not load model.

======================================================================
598. EFFECTIVE SETTINGS CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Checksum of effective Generate parameters and split/output relevant settings.

Use canonical JSON.

Do not include timestamps.

======================================================================
599. SELECTION SNAPSHOT CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Include:

- stable IDs;
- versions;
- asset IDs/checksums;
- effective parameters;
- engine fingerprint non-secret.

Do not include display names if structural reproducibility should ignore rename, hoặc include snapshot checksum policy clearly.

Khuyến nghị checksum reproducibility không phụ thuộc display name.

Display names persist separately.

======================================================================
600. OUTPUT SPEC RESOLVER
======================================================================

Có thể có:

GenerateOutputSpecResolver

Responsibilities:

- merge defaults/request;
- validate format;
- validate naming template;
- resolve root policy;
- calculate planned relative paths;
- collision check;
- derive required artifacts;
- produce checksum.

Không create final files.

======================================================================
601. OUTPUT DIRECTORY NAMING
======================================================================

Session directory identity dùng session_id.

Có thể có human-readable subfolder trong export, nhưng managed root identity vẫn ID.

Ví dụ concept:

generate/sessions/gensess_x/outputs/

Không:

generate/sessions/Ten Truyen/

======================================================================
602. UNIT FILENAME DEFAULT
======================================================================

Default deterministic, ví dụ concept:

chapter_0001_unit_0001_<unit_id_short>.wav

Không bắt buộc đúng format.

Phải:

- sortable;
- collision-resistant;
- safe Windows;
- preserve extension.

======================================================================
603. CHAPTER DIRECTORY DEFAULT
======================================================================

Có thể:

chapter_0001_<sanitized_title>_<chapter_id_short>

Sanitized title optional.

Identity suffix bắt buộc nếu title included.

Không đổi directory khi display title thay đổi sau Plan.

======================================================================
604. OUTPUT PATH SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Expected output path persisted trong Unit/Plan.

Không recompute bằng template mới khi Resume.

Retry dùng same planned destination policy hoặc versioned Attempt temp.

======================================================================
605. OUTPUT COLLISION DURING RETRY
======================================================================

Nếu previous valid Artifact:

- retry normally not allowed.

Nếu previous invalid file:

- replace_invalid two-phase hoặc versioned destination.

Expected logical output path có thể giữ; physical Attempt path riêng.

Manifest biết active Artifact.

======================================================================
606. ARTIFACT LOGICAL ROLE
======================================================================

Artifact fields nên phân biệt:

- logical_role
- physical_path
- format
- attempt.

Logical role:

- unit_primary
- unit_derived
- chapter_primary
- session_primary
- text_sidecar
- metadata_sidecar
- manifest_copy

Không bắt buộc enum tất cả ngay nhưng extensible.

======================================================================
607. OUTPUT RESERVATION
======================================================================

Trước execution, Output Manager reserve logical destination:

- verify no active writer;
- create reservation metadata/lock;
- associate Attempt;
- no final file creation.

Release reservation on failure/cancel.

Recovery handles stale reservation.

Không dùng empty final file làm reservation.

======================================================================
608. OUTPUT RESERVATION LOCK
======================================================================

Lock short/metadata-based.

Không giữ OS file lock suốt inference nếu không cần.

Reservation ID = Attempt ID hoặc separate ID.

======================================================================
609. OUTPUT VALIDATION BASIC
======================================================================

Basic checks:

- path resolves inside root;
- file exists;
- file regular;
- file size;
- extension;
- checksum;
- no temp suffix;
- lineage metadata.

Nếu fail:

- Artifact invalid;
- Attempt invalid_output;
- Unit failed/retryable theo category.

======================================================================
610. OUTPUT VALIDATION PROBE
======================================================================

Probe checks:

- readable container;
- duration > 0;
- stream present;
- channels > 0;
- sample_rate > 0;
- codec expected/supported.

Timeout.

No shell.

======================================================================
611. VALIDATION POLICY BY FORMAT
======================================================================

WAV:

- RIFF/WAVE probe if service;
- PCM/codec metadata.

MP3:

- MPEG audio stream;
- duration.

Không tự parse binary phức tạp nếu FFprobe service đủ.

Basic fallback nếu probe unavailable.

======================================================================
612. ARTIFACT FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Flow:

1. Engine writes temp.
2. Check cancellation state.
3. Basic validate temp.
4. Atomic move/copy final.
5. Register created Artifact.
6. Full validate.
7. Mark valid.
8. Update Attempt.
9. Update Unit.
10. Progress/session/manifest.

Nếu full validation fail sau move:

- keep file;
- Artifact invalid;
- no Unit success;
- retry policy.

======================================================================
613. MANIFEST DRAFT CREATION
======================================================================

Draft manifest ngay sau Plan frozen:

- request/session/source/selection/settings/plan summary;
- no fake Attempts;
- no fake outputs;
- status planned;
- finalized false.

======================================================================
614. MANIFEST INCREMENTAL SUMMARY
======================================================================

Có thể update summary after terminal changes, nhưng source truth repositories.

Nếu update fail:

- mark rebuild needed;
- Session business state vẫn persist.

======================================================================
615. MANIFEST CHECKSUM CANONICALIZATION
======================================================================

Checksum exclude:

- manifest_checksum field itself;
- volatile generated_at nếu rebuilt semantics cần consistency? Quyết định rõ.

Include core content.

Use stable JSON ordering.

======================================================================
616. MANIFEST FINAL COPY
======================================================================

Nếu OutputSpec yêu cầu manifest sidecar ở export:

- copy finalized manifest;
- checksum;
- Artifact role manifest_copy;
- không thay source manifest.

Không bắt buộc trong Sprint nếu no execution/export.

======================================================================
617. RESUME SERVICE DEPENDENCIES
======================================================================

GenerateResumeService cần:

- Session repository;
- Plan repository;
- Attempt repository;
- Artifact repository;
- Job Queue service;
- Selection validation;
- Output validation;
- Readiness;
- State machine;
- Registry;
- Manifest service.

Không cần UI.

======================================================================
618. RESUME INSPECTION REPORT PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Mỗi inspect có thể tạo report.

Không mutate Attempts.

Report trả UI/API.

Nếu inspection lớn:

- pagination summary hoặc background Job.

======================================================================
619. RESUME EXECUTION VALIDATION
======================================================================

Trước execute Resume:

- inspection not stale hoặc rerun;
- Session state allowed;
- no active conflicting operation;
- references valid;
- handler ready;
- output roots safe;
- Job Queue available;
- Resource requirement supported/waitable.

======================================================================
620. RESUME ATTEMPT POLICY
======================================================================

Pending Unit chưa từng chạy:

- create first Attempt.

Interrupted Unit:

- create new Attempt; không reuse running Attempt.

Failed retryable:

- theo resume mode và retry limit.

Invalid output:

- new Attempt.

Waiting resource active Job:

- không create new Attempt nếu Job still active.

======================================================================
621. RESUME SESSION TRANSITION
======================================================================

Allowed:

paused
→ queued

recovery_required
→ paused
→ queued

partially_completed
→ queued

failed
→ queued nếu retryable/incomplete.

Không:

completed → queued.

cancelled → queued mặc định.

archived → queued.

======================================================================
622. RETRY SERVICE DEPENDENCIES
======================================================================

GenerateRetryService tương tự Resume nhưng scope cụ thể.

Phải dùng state machine.

Không update retry_count trước Attempt persist.

======================================================================
623. RETRY UNIT OPERATION
======================================================================

Transaction:

1. Lock Unit/Session state.
2. Reload.
3. Inspect latest Attempt/Artifact.
4. Validate retry.
5. Allocate Attempt ID/number.
6. Persist Attempt.
7. Update Unit latest_attempt_id/retry_count.
8. Create Job idempotent nếu ready.
9. Update Session/Registry.
10. Publish event.
11. Release lock.

Nếu Job creation fail sau Attempt persist:

- Attempt queued/created with queue_failure;
- recovery/resume can continue;
- no data loss.

======================================================================
624. RETRY CHAPTER OPERATION
======================================================================

Inspect Unit list from frozen Plan.

Select eligible Units.

Create operation ID.

For each Unit:

- idempotent Attempt creation;
- batch persistence;
- Job creation.

If partial failure:

- report created IDs;
- Session recovery_required hoặc partially queued;
- do not rollback successful safe entries blindly.

======================================================================
625. RETRY LIMIT SEMANTICS
======================================================================

max_retries nghĩa là số retry sau initial Attempt.

Tổng attempts tối đa = 1 + max_retries.

Hoặc convention khác, nhưng document/test.

Không mơ hồ.

======================================================================
626. RETRY BACKOFF PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Store next_retry_at timezone-aware.

Manual Retry có thể bypass backoff nếu policy cho phép explicit.

Auto retry obey.

Sprint không bắt buộc auto retry execution nếu handler unavailable.

======================================================================
627. RECOVERY SERVICE SCAN SCOPE
======================================================================

Recovery scan:

- active Project sessions;
- sessions referenced by active Jobs;
- registry entries non-terminal;
- operation markers.

Không scan toàn filesystem ngoài roots.

No deep output checksum by default.

======================================================================
628. RECOVERY RECONCILIATION ORDER
======================================================================

1. Load Session.
2. Validate Plan pointer.
3. Load active Attempts.
4. Query Job states.
5. Query Resource Leases.
6. Inspect temp/final outputs.
7. Classify.
8. Persist recovery report.
9. Transition Session if needed.
10. Update registry.
11. No auto execution by default.

======================================================================
629. LOST JOB RECOVERY
======================================================================

Attempt says queued/running but Job missing:

- mark Attempt interrupted hoặc recovery_required;
- Unit interrupted/recovery_required;
- Session recovery_required;
- Resume can create new Attempt;
- keep old job_id history.

Không fabricate Job record.

======================================================================
630. LOST LEASE RECOVERY
======================================================================

Attempt/Job references lease missing/stale:

- Resource Manager handles lease record;
- Generate recovery records warning;
- no direct lease file edit;
- active Attempt reconciled by Job state.

======================================================================
631. TEMP OUTPUT RECOVERY
======================================================================

Temp exists:

- identify Attempt from metadata/name;
- ensure path inside Session;
- inspect operation stage;
- basic validate;
- never auto mark valid final;
- safe finalize only if evidence complete and policy allows;
- otherwise quarantine/retain;
- report.

Default conservative.

======================================================================
632. FINAL OUTPUT WITHOUT METADATA RECOVERY
======================================================================

If final file at expected path but no Artifact:

- checksum/probe;
- compare Attempt operation marker;
- if strong evidence, safe repair may register Artifact with recovered flag;
- otherwise orphan report;
- do not auto attach by filename alone.

======================================================================
633. RECOVERED ARTIFACT FLAG
======================================================================

Artifact metadata may include:

- recovered
- recovered_at
- recovery_report_id
- recovery_method

No fake original timestamps.

======================================================================
634. RECOVERY READINESS
======================================================================

Session recovery_required blocks execution until inspection/recovery action.

UI action:

“Kiểm tra khôi phục”

Không auto queue.

======================================================================
635. JOB HANDLER CONTRACT DETAIL
======================================================================

Generate planning handler:

Input IDs.

Flow:

- load Request/Session;
- validate;
- call Planner;
- update Job progress;
- respect cancel;
- no GPU.

Generate execution handler contract:

- abstract/provider;
- not registered if absent.

Finalization handler:

- aggregate;
- no inference.

======================================================================
636. WORKER CONTEXT
======================================================================

Worker context may provide:

- job_id;
- cancellation token;
- progress reporter;
- logger;
- resource lease;
- attempt number;
- operation ID.

No QWidget.

No raw AppContext if avoidable.

======================================================================
637. ENGINE EXECUTION RESULT
======================================================================

Structured result:

- status
- temp_output_paths
- engine_metadata
- warnings
- metrics
- retryable
- error_code
- error_message

Engine result does not mark domain success directly.

======================================================================
638. ENGINE EXECUTION ERROR MAPPING
======================================================================

Map engine exceptions to:

- runtime unavailable;
- model missing;
- invalid reference;
- out of memory;
- cancelled;
- timeout;
- inference failure;
- unknown.

No traceback to user.

OOM may be retryable with changed resource/policy but no automatic settings mutation.

======================================================================
639. RESOURCE LEASE LINKAGE
======================================================================

Attempt stores lease ID when assigned.

On release:

- historical lease ID remains;
- active_resource_lease_ids updated.

Do not erase lineage.

======================================================================
640. WAITING RESOURCE SESSION SUMMARY
======================================================================

Session summary fields:

- waiting_resource_units
- primary_wait_reason
- last_resource_check
- active_lease_count

Registry card.

No heavy snapshot.

======================================================================
641. RESOURCE PRESSURE EVENT
======================================================================

Generate UI may refresh readiness/wait state on Resource Manager event.

No polling every few milliseconds.

Use existing monitor cadence.

======================================================================
642. APPCONTEXT LAZY PROJECT SERVICES
======================================================================

If AppContext global and Project services contextual:

- Generate repositories created per Project context;
- Query/Application service resolves Project by ID;
- Job worker supports non-current Project.

Do not cache paths of old Project after switch.

======================================================================
643. APPCONTEXT SHUTDOWN ORDER
======================================================================

Suggested:

1. Stop accepting new API/UI operations.
2. Stop Job dispatch.
3. Checkpoint Generate.
4. Job Runner shutdown.
5. Release/cleanup leases via Resource Manager.
6. Flush logs.
7. Dispose UI/event subscriptions.
8. Close repositories/context.

Follow existing lifecycle.

======================================================================
644. EVENT BUS REPLAY LIMITATION
======================================================================

Event Bus not persistence.

After restart UI loads repository.

Do not attempt event replay system.

======================================================================
645. FEATURE READINESS SERVICE INTEGRATION
======================================================================

Register readiness providers, not hardcoded UI booleans.

Provider checks:

Generate planning:

- Project writable;
- source readers available;
- repositories available.

Generate execution:

- planning ready;
- Engine exists;
- production handler registered;
- references valid per Request;
- resource capability.

Generate output validation:

- basic validator;
- FFprobe optional.

======================================================================
646. READINESS CACHE
======================================================================

Readiness can cache lightweight checks.

Invalidate when:

- Project changes;
- Engine registry changes;
- FFprobe availability changes;
- Reference selection changes;
- Resource hardware/policy changes;
- handler registration changes.

Do not cache forever.

======================================================================
647. PROJECT VALIDATION EXTENSION
======================================================================

Project validation should include Generate root if exists:

- registry schema;
- session paths;
- no traversal;
- basic consistency;
- no deep output probe by default.

Do not make Project invalid solely because one historical output missing unless policy.

Report degraded.

======================================================================
648. PROJECT BACKUP ACTIVE OPERATION LOCK
======================================================================

Backup should coordinate with Generate persistence:

- short lock/checkpoint;
- snapshot stable metadata;
- do not hold lock for copy whole media.

Follow backup service pattern.

======================================================================
649. PROJECT PACKAGE MANIFEST EXTENSION
======================================================================

Add Generate section:

- schema_version
- sessions
- source snapshots included
- outputs included
- reports included
- checksums
- omissions
- external artifacts
- import policy

No absolute paths.

======================================================================
650. IMPORT REMAP TABLE
======================================================================

Remap table persisted in import report:

old_project_id → new_project_id

old_session_id → new_session_id

old_document_id → new_document_id

old_chapter_id → new_chapter_id

old_unit_id → new_unit_id

old_attempt_id → new_attempt_id

old_artifact_id → new_artifact_id

old_plan_id → new_plan_id

old_manifest_id → new_manifest_id

Update every reference.

======================================================================
651. IMPORT FROZEN PLAN
======================================================================

Imported Plan remains frozen if checksum valid.

Do not rerun splitter.

If algorithm version unavailable:

- history readable;
- execution may block;
- no silent replan.

======================================================================
652. IMPORT SOURCE SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

If source included:

- validate checksum;
- managed path remap;
- preserve original provenance.

If omitted:

- read-only/degraded;
- no Resume.

======================================================================
653. IMPORT OUTPUT ARTIFACTS
======================================================================

If included:

- checksum;
- path remap;
- validation/health.

If omitted:

- metadata marks unavailable/omitted_by_package;
- no fake missing corruption if omission intentional;
- UI explains.

======================================================================
654. DUPLICATE PROJECT GENERATE POLICY DECISION
======================================================================

Must choose and document after audit.

Recommended default:

- copy Generate settings;
- do not copy active/history Sessions;
- new Generate Registry empty;
- Reference Vault duplicated per existing policy.

Alternative only if product existing behavior demands history duplication.

Test chosen behavior.

======================================================================
655. ARCHIVE PROJECT WITH ACTIVE GENERATE
======================================================================

Before archive:

- validate no active incompatible Jobs;
- prompt/block according existing Project service;
- do not archive while writing without policy.

Could require pause/cancel.

No silent termination.

======================================================================
656. RESTORE PROJECT GENERATE
======================================================================

On restore:

- load registry;
- health check;
- no auto resume;
- preserve status/history.

======================================================================
657. LOCAL API ROUTER REGISTRATION
======================================================================

Router registration must not fail app if Generate execution unavailable.

Planning endpoints still available.

Readiness endpoint shows capability.

Do not conditionally omit entire router based on Engine.

======================================================================
658. API CREATE REQUEST DTO
======================================================================

Fields must match supported input.

Do not accept internal fields:

- request_id override unless API convention permits;
- status;
- created_at;
- materialized_session_id;
- revision;
- managed path.

Server generates identity/state.

======================================================================
659. API PATCH REQUEST DTO
======================================================================

Only draft mutable fields.

Reject frozen/materialized Request update with stable error.

Partial update does not null omitted fields.

Explicit null validation.

======================================================================
660. API MATERIALIZE RESPONSE
======================================================================

Return:

- request_id
- session_id
- session_status
- plan_id if completed
- operation_id
- validation
- readiness
- warnings

If background planning Job:

- job_id
- accepted
- status queued.

Do not claim Plan exists until persisted.

======================================================================
661. API SESSION LIST FILTERS
======================================================================

Filters:

- project_id scoped by endpoint/context;
- status;
- health;
- archived;
- preview;
- updated_from/to optional;
- search;
- limit/cursor.

Validate.

No arbitrary filesystem query.

======================================================================
662. API SESSION DETAIL
======================================================================

Return summaries, not full Unit list.

Links/IDs for plan/units/attempts/artifacts.

No absolute path.

Display snapshots okay.

======================================================================
663. API PLAN RESPONSE
======================================================================

For large Plan:

- summary endpoint;
- paginated Chapters/Units;
- optional include flags bounded.

Do not return whole book text by default.

======================================================================
664. API MANIFEST RESPONSE
======================================================================

Manifest may be large.

Can return summary or full with size guard.

No binary.

No raw logs.

======================================================================
665. API RETRY ENDPOINT
======================================================================

Body:

- operation_id/idempotency key
- reason optional
- policy override allowed subset
- confirmation for replace invalid if required

Server determines eligibility.

Do not accept attempt_number from client.

======================================================================
666. API RESUME ENDPOINT
======================================================================

Body:

- resume_mode
- operation_id
- selected Unit IDs optional if contract supports
- no arbitrary status.

Inspection endpoint optional:

GET/POST inspect-resume.

======================================================================
667. API CANCEL ENDPOINT
======================================================================

Idempotent.

Return current/final transition.

Reason sanitized.

No hard delete.

======================================================================
668. API PAUSE ENDPOINT
======================================================================

Return:

- accepted
- current status
- pending active Jobs
- behavior if current Unit finishes first.

No fake immediate paused if worker still active unless state pausing.

======================================================================
669. API REVALIDATE ENDPOINT
======================================================================

Can run sync light or background deep.

Return report ID and issues.

Does not mutate frozen snapshots.

======================================================================
670. API REBUILD MANIFEST ENDPOINT
======================================================================

Requires safe state/lock.

Idempotent operation.

Does not replan.

Returns new manifest checksum/report.

======================================================================
671. API ERROR HTTP MAPPING
======================================================================

Use framework convention.

Conceptually:

- validation → 400/422;
- not found → 404;
- conflict/state/idempotency → 409;
- unavailable/readiness → 503 or domain response according current API;
- internal persistence → 500 sanitized.

Do not invent inconsistent mapping.

======================================================================
672. API OPERATION POLLING
======================================================================

If long planning background:

- use existing Job endpoint;
- no new operation polling framework if Job API exists.

Response Job ID.

======================================================================
673. UI PAGE ARCHITECTURE
======================================================================

Generate Page should be composed of smaller widgets/view models if current UI style supports:

- SourcePanel
- SelectionPanel
- SettingsPanel
- PlanSummaryPanel
- SessionListPanel
- UnitTable
- OutputPanel
- ActionBar

Không bắt buộc exact classes.

Avoid one giant Page file.

Do not over-fragment trivial labels.

======================================================================
674. UI VIEW MODEL
======================================================================

If project uses view model/controller pattern, follow.

View model holds:

- selected IDs;
- draft input;
- validation summary;
- selected Session ID;
- filters;
- readiness;
- loading state.

No persistence/business logic.

======================================================================
675. UI SOURCE PANEL
======================================================================

Must support mutually exclusive modes:

- File TXT/DOCX.
- Dán văn bản.
- Managed existing source if exposed.

Show:

- filename;
- size;
- validation;
- encoding after materialization;
- checksum short optional.

Do not show full absolute path if privacy/UI convention.

======================================================================
676. UI VOICE SELECTOR
======================================================================

Combo display name but item data = voice_id.

On refresh preserve ID.

If missing selected ID:

- show “Không tìm thấy giọng đã chọn”;
- no fallback.

Filter archived according action context.

======================================================================
677. UI VARIANT SELECTOR
======================================================================

Populate by selected Voice ID.

If Voice changes:

- clear invalid Variant;
- not auto choose unless explicit default policy;
- validation refresh.

Use variant_id data.

======================================================================
678. UI STYLE PROFILE SELECTOR
======================================================================

Optional “Không dùng hồ sơ phong cách”.

Item data = style_profile_id or null explicit.

Do not use index as identity.

======================================================================
679. UI SPEAKER REFERENCE SELECTOR
======================================================================

Show validation badge:

- Hợp lệ.
- Thiếu tệp.
- Hỏng.
- Chưa kiểm tra.

Item data ID.

No external path editing in selector.

Link to Reference management page optional.

======================================================================
680. UI ENGINE SELECTOR
======================================================================

Show:

- name;
- capability;
- readiness.

Do not initialize runtime on dropdown open.

If one Engine only, still use ID.

======================================================================
681. UI PARAMETER CONTROLS
======================================================================

Controls range from service/capability.

Do not hardcode different ranges.

Show unsupported fields disabled with reason.

NaN impossible via widgets but API/service still validates.

======================================================================
682. UI SPLITTING SETTINGS
======================================================================

Fields:

- detect chapters;
- preserve chapter titles;
- target;
- min;
- max.

Client validation:

min ≤ target ≤ max.

Authoritative service.

Provide default reset from settings.

======================================================================
683. UI OUTPUT SETTINGS
======================================================================

Format options based readiness.

If MP3 unavailable:

- disabled or shown unavailable;
- no selectable success path.

Overwrite policy labels Vietnamese.

Naming template validation preview.

======================================================================
684. UI PLAN ACTION
======================================================================

“Lập kế hoạch”:

- validate draft;
- create/materialize Request;
- background if needed;
- show stages;
- disable duplicate click;
- load resulting Session/Plan.

No execution.

======================================================================
685. UI QUEUE ACTION
======================================================================

Enabled only:

- Session planned;
- execution readiness ready;
- no blockers;
- no active queue operation.

On click:

- service action;
- show accepted Job IDs/status;
- refresh.

======================================================================
686. UI PREVIEW ACTION
======================================================================

If only preview planning available, label exactly:

“Xem trước kế hoạch”

If real preview unavailable, no play icon implying Audio.

Do not create fake.

======================================================================
687. UI PAUSE ACTION
======================================================================

Enabled for queued/waiting/running according service.

After click show pausing if not immediate.

No direct Job manipulation from widget.

======================================================================
688. UI RESUME ACTION
======================================================================

Before Resume can show inspection summary:

- pending;
- interrupted;
- failed retryable;
- valid skipped.

User confirms if many Units.

Service revalidates.

======================================================================
689. UI RETRY UNIT ACTION
======================================================================

Unit row action only if eligible.

Show latest error/retry count.

No action on valid Unit.

======================================================================
690. UI RETRY CHAPTER ACTION
======================================================================

Display count of eligible Units.

Confirm.

Does not retry valid.

======================================================================
691. UI CANCEL ACTION
======================================================================

Dialog states partial outputs preserved.

No “delete output” implied.

After cancel refresh.

======================================================================
692. UI SESSION STATUS VIEW
======================================================================

Show separately:

- Lifecycle status.
- Health/integrity.
- Readiness.
- Resource wait.

Avoid one ambiguous text.

======================================================================
693. UI PROGRESS VIEW
======================================================================

Show:

- valid Units / total;
- failed;
- waiting;
- active;
- percent;
- ETA unknown/known.

Do not count Job progress as valid Unit.

======================================================================
694. UI CHAPTER FILTER
======================================================================

Filter Unit table by Chapter ID.

Display title snapshot.

No loading all Units if paginated.

======================================================================
695. UI ERROR FILTER
======================================================================

Filter:

- failed;
- invalid output;
- blocked;
- retryable.

No popup storm.

======================================================================
696. UI OUTPUT LIST
======================================================================

Columns:

- loại;
- định dạng;
- trạng thái;
- dung lượng;
- thời lượng;
- kiểm tra;
- hành động.

Only valid Artifact playable/open.

Missing path action disabled.

======================================================================
697. UI READ-ONLY HISTORY
======================================================================

Imported history:

- fields read-only;
- actions disabled;
- show omission/read-only reason.

No attempt to Resume.

======================================================================
698. UI PROJECT SWITCH
======================================================================

On switch:

- cancel pending UI query;
- unsubscribe old events;
- clear selected Session;
- load new registry;
- preserve global draft only according settings;
- no cross-project row leak.

======================================================================
699. UI EMPTY STATES
======================================================================

Need friendly Vietnamese empty states:

- Chưa có phiên Generate.
- Chưa chọn nguồn văn bản.
- Chưa lập kế hoạch.
- Chưa có đầu ra.
- Chưa có lỗi.
- Tính năng tạo Audio chưa sẵn sàng.

No misleading success.

======================================================================
700. UI LOADING STATES
======================================================================

Show:

- Đang tải phiên.
- Đang đọc văn bản.
- Đang lập kế hoạch.
- Đang kiểm tra.
- Đang khôi phục.

Disable conflicting actions.

No indefinite spinner without operation status where possible.

======================================================================
701. UI ERROR RECOVERY ACTIONS
======================================================================

Map suggested actions to buttons only when safe:

- Kiểm tra lại.
- Mở quản lý tham chiếu.
- Xem tài nguyên.
- Xem hàng đợi.
- Tạo phiên mới.
- Xây dựng lại Manifest.

No force complete.

No delete unknown files.

======================================================================
702. DASHBOARD ACTIVE SESSION SELECTION
======================================================================

If multiple active Sessions:

- show count;
- latest/high priority summary;
- link to list.

Do not assume one global current Session.

======================================================================
703. DASHBOARD FAILED SESSION
======================================================================

Show failed count and latest error summary sanitized.

No raw traceback.

Click opens filtered Generate Page.

======================================================================
704. DASHBOARD RESOURCE WAIT
======================================================================

Show number of Generate Units/Jobs waiting resource.

Use Job/Registry summary.

No own hardware detection.

======================================================================
705. DASHBOARD READINESS REFRESH
======================================================================

Refresh on:

- Engine registry change;
- Project open;
- Resource change;
- handler registration.

Throttle.

======================================================================
706. SETTINGS PAGE INTEGRATION
======================================================================

If Settings page already exists, add read-only or editable Generate defaults according architecture.

Do not duplicate settings in Generate Page and Settings file independently.

Project-level defaults maybe in Project settings panel.

======================================================================
707. SETTINGS VALIDATION UI
======================================================================

Prevent invalid min/target/max.

Engine-specific advanced options can be JSON only if safe UI/schema; otherwise not expose.

No arbitrary CLI field.

======================================================================
708. SETTINGS RESET
======================================================================

Reset to central defaults.

Not reset frozen Session.

======================================================================
709. LOCAL API DOCUMENTATION
======================================================================

Docs include:

- endpoint purpose;
- request example;
- response example;
- state restrictions;
- error codes;
- readiness behavior;
- idempotency;
- no inference guarantee in current Sprint.

======================================================================
710. GENERATE STORAGE DOCUMENTATION
======================================================================

Document:

- managed layout;
- IDs;
- relative paths;
- atomic writes;
- registry;
- source snapshots;
- plan;
- attempts;
- artifacts;
- manifests;
- reports;
- temp/recovery.

No real user path.

======================================================================

Include:

- Session transitions;
- Unit transitions;
- Attempt transitions;
- invalid transitions;
- Job mapping;
- recovery path;
- partially completed semantics.

Diagram textual/Mermaid only if docs support.

No new docs tool requirement.

======================================================================
712. RESUME RETRY DOCUMENTATION
======================================================================

Explain:

- Resume vs Retry.
- valid Units not rerun.
- Attempt history.
- retry limits.
- invalid output.
- engine/reference change blockers.
- idempotency.
- recovery.

======================================================================

Explain:

- temp → final;

- FFprobe degraded state;
- no fake output.

Explain:

- Job types;
- payload IDs;
- dependency;
- mapping;
- handler readiness;
- no production fake handler.

======================================================================
715. RESOURCE INTEGRATION DOCUMENTATION
