Explain:

- planning CPU;
- execution requirements from Engine;
- waiting vs unsupported;
- leases;
- disk pressure;
- no hardcoded GPU.

======================================================================
716. RECOVERY DOCUMENTATION
======================================================================

Explain:

- startup lightweight scan;
- recovery_required;
- lost Job;
- temp output;
- registry/manifest rebuild;
- no guessing;
- no auto resume default.

======================================================================
717. MIGRATION DOCUMENTATION
======================================================================

List legacy fields and mapping.

Unresolved cases.

Backup.

Read-only future schema.

No data loss.

======================================================================
718. ARCHITECTURE DOCUMENT UPDATE
======================================================================

Architecture should add Generate flow:

UI/API
→ GenerateApplicationService
→ Request/Session services
→ Planner/Text/Selection/Output
→ Job Queue
→ Resource Manager
→ Engine execution handler
→ Artifact validation
→ Manifest/finalization

No direct UI → Engine.

======================================================================
719. ROADMAP NEXT SPRINT BOUNDARY
======================================================================

ROADMAP must state next likely work after AVS-014.16:

- real production Generate execution integration;
- Voice DNA Analyzer in AVS-014.17 per roadmap;
- or exact existing sequence.

Do not move analyzer into current Sprint.

======================================================================
720. CHANGELOG LANGUAGE
======================================================================

Use factual language.

Avoid:

“Hoàn thiện tạo Audio AI.”

Prefer:

“Bổ sung nền tảng lập kế hoạch và quản lý phiên Generate; thực thi inference production vẫn được khóa theo readiness.”

======================================================================
721. DECISION — SESSION VS JOB
======================================================================

Record:

Generate Session is persistent business aggregate.

Job is schedulable execution unit.

Session may survive Job deletion/history.

Job completion does not guarantee valid Audio.

======================================================================
722. DECISION — SOURCE SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Record:

Every planned Session uses managed source snapshot to survive external source changes/deletion.

Original path only provenance.

======================================================================
723. DECISION — UNIT ATTEMPT
======================================================================

Record:

Unit immutable execution input under frozen Plan.

Attempt mutable execution history entries.

Retry creates new Attempt.

======================================================================
724. DECISION — OUTPUT VALIDATION
======================================================================

Record:

Artifact validity is authority for Unit success.

Engine/Job success alone insufficient.

======================================================================
725. DECISION — NO FAKE HANDLER
======================================================================

Record:

Production Generate execution remains unavailable until real handler exists.

Tests may register isolated fake.

======================================================================
726. DECISION — PLAN IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Record:

Change input/settings after planning creates new Session rather than mutating frozen Plan.

======================================================================
727. DECISION — MANIFEST REBUILD
======================================================================

Manifest summary can rebuild from repositories.

Not sole source of truth.

======================================================================
728. DECISION — HEALTH SEPARATION
======================================================================

Business lifecycle status separated from current storage/integrity health.

Completed Session can be degraded if output missing.

======================================================================
729. MIGRATION DISCOVERY
======================================================================

Before writing migration, search real persisted examples only read-only.

Do not mutate actual files.

Use fixtures copied into tests if needed, sanitized.

No user content in committed fixtures.

======================================================================
730. LEGACY GENERATE SERVICE WRAPPER
======================================================================

If existing GenerateService public method used:

- preserve method;
- route Plan-only architecture where possible;
- if method historically real inference, do not disable without compatibility decision;
- avoid double execution;
- tests mock adapter.

May mark legacy path and future migration.

======================================================================
731. LEGACY SYNCHRONOUS CALL
======================================================================

If existing synchronous Generate call must remain:

- retain signature;
- call legacy behavior or controlled application service;
- do not block UI more than existing without redesign;
- new UI should use Job pipeline.

Document.

======================================================================
732. LEGACY OUTPUT PATH
======================================================================

Existing output_path field:

- preserve;
- map as provenance/external output preference;
- managed OutputSpec new;
- no silent overwrite.

======================================================================
733. LEGACY REFERENCE PATH
======================================================================

If only path:

- try resolve against Reference Registry by checksum/path mapping;
- unique match required;
- else warning/block;
- no filename match only.

======================================================================
734. LEGACY VOICE NAME
======================================================================

Resolve only exact unique within Project.

Store voice_id.

Keep legacy name snapshot.

Ambiguous blocks.

======================================================================
735. LEGACY STYLE NAME
======================================================================

Same principle.

No fallback first item.

======================================================================
736. LEGACY ENGINE NAME
======================================================================

Map through Engine registry alias if unique.

No arbitrary string execution.

======================================================================
737. TEST MIGRATION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Run migration twice.

Second run no duplicate IDs/files.

Checksums/state stable.

======================================================================
738. TEST FUTURE SCHEMA
======================================================================

Loader sees higher schema:

- no overwrite;
- read-only/degraded or clear error;
- registry survives.

======================================================================
739. TEST UNKNOWN LEGACY FIELD
======================================================================

Ensure policy.

No silent data loss.

======================================================================
740. TEST PROJECT RENAME
======================================================================

After Plan:

- rename Project display;
- paths/IDs still work;
- Session snapshot old display name remains;
- registry display may show current Project according query but lineage ID intact.

======================================================================
741. TEST SESSION RENAME
======================================================================

Session display rename:

- storage path unchanged;
- registry updates;
- Plan/Artifact paths unchanged unless export display only;
- no duplicate.

======================================================================
742. TEST VOICE RENAME
======================================================================

Session snapshot historical name remains.

Voice ID resolves.

New Request sees new display name.

======================================================================
743. TEST STYLE RENAME
======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================
744. TEST REFERENCE EXTERNAL DELETE
======================================================================

After managed import and Session planning:

- delete external source;
- managed asset resolves;
- validation pass.

======================================================================
745. TEST REFERENCE MANAGED DELETE
======================================================================

Simulate missing managed file:

- blocked/degraded;
- no fallback;
- report.

======================================================================
746. TEST SOURCE EXTERNAL CHANGE
======================================================================

Change original TXT after snapshot.

Session normalized checksum unchanged.

No auto update.

======================================================================
747. TEST NORMALIZED TAMPER
======================================================================

Modify normalized file:

- checksum mismatch;
- Plan consistency fail;
- no queue.

======================================================================
748. TEST PLAN TAMPER
======================================================================

Modify Unit text/file:

- checksum fail;
- recovery_required;
- no execution.

======================================================================
749. TEST REGISTRY STALE
======================================================================

Session updated but registry old.

Health check detects.

Rebuild fixes summary.

No Session data change.

======================================================================
750. TEST MANIFEST STALE
======================================================================

Manifest summary old.

Rebuild correct.

Plan/Attempt unchanged.

======================================================================
751. TEST COMPLETED OUTPUT MISSING
======================================================================

Business status remains historical completed or policy-defined.

Health degraded.

Artifact missing.

UI/API warnings.

======================================================================
752. TEST CANCEL PARTIAL OUTPUT
======================================================================

Some valid Units then cancel:

- status cancelled;
- valid artifacts preserved;
- manifest cancelled;
- no fake partially_completed unless policy.

======================================================================
753. TEST PARTIAL COMPLETION
======================================================================

Continue-on-failure with some success/fail:

- partially_completed;
- manifest final;
- Retry allowed.

======================================================================
754. TEST RETRY PARTIAL TO COMPLETE
======================================================================

Retry failed Units with test fake:

- new Attempts;
- valid old unchanged;
- Session completed;
- manifest updated/finalized new version or rebuilt according design.

======================================================================
755. TEST PAUSE RESUME
======================================================================

Queue test Units.

Pause:

- no new dispatch;
- current behavior documented.

Resume:

- no duplicate;
- final completion.

======================================================================
756. TEST DOUBLE RESUME
======================================================================

Two calls same operation ID or concurrent:

- one active Job per Unit;
- same result/conflict.

======================================================================
757. TEST DOUBLE RETRY
======================================================================

One new Attempt.

No duplicate.

======================================================================
758. TEST QUEUE UNAVAILABLE
======================================================================

No production handler:

- Plan succeeds;
- Queue blocked;
- no Job;
- UI disabled;
- API stable error.

======================================================================
759. TEST MP3 UNAVAILABLE
======================================================================

Request MP3 required:

- validation/readiness blocked if no converter.

WAV request planning okay.

No fake MP3.

======================================================================
760. TEST FFPROBE MISSING
======================================================================

Basic validator works/degraded.

Full-required blocks validity.

Readiness reflects.

======================================================================
761. TEST PATH TRAVERSAL TEMPLATE
======================================================================

Template with:

../

absolute drive

backslash traversal

reject.

======================================================================
762. TEST WINDOWS RESERVED NAMES
======================================================================

CON

PRN

AUX

NUL

COM1

LPT1

Sanitize/version safely.

No collision.

======================================================================
763. TEST CASE-INSENSITIVE COLLISION
======================================================================

On logical Windows policy:

File.wav vs file.wav detected.

Test independent of host if helper supports platform mode.

======================================================================
764. TEST LONG PATH
======================================================================

Long chapter title truncates with ID suffix.

Extension preserved.

Inside root.

======================================================================
765. TEST JSON ATOMIC FAILURE
======================================================================

Existing valid Session remains after failed update.

No truncation.

======================================================================
766. TEST REGISTRY CONCURRENT UPDATE
======================================================================

Two Session summaries update.

Both entries retained.

Use lock/mock.

======================================================================
767. TEST UI NO PROJECT
======================================================================

Generate Page:

- no crash;
- controls disabled;
- message open/create Project.

======================================================================
768. TEST UI ARCHIVED PROJECT
======================================================================

History readable.

New Request disabled.

======================================================================
769. TEST UI EXECUTION UNAVAILABLE
======================================================================

Plan button enabled.

Queue disabled with tooltip.

======================================================================
770. TEST UI LARGE UNIT LIST
======================================================================

Use model/pagination.

No thousands widgets.

Smoke performance.

======================================================================
771. TEST API NO ABSOLUTE PATH
======================================================================

Inspect responses.

Paths relative or omitted.

No user home.

======================================================================
772. TEST API MATERIALIZE IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Same operation key returns same Session.

No duplicate directory.

======================================================================
773. TEST API INVALID STATE
======================================================================

Queue draft without Plan:

- conflict/error;
- no Job.

Retry valid Unit:

- reject.

Resume completed:

- reject.

======================================================================
774. TEST API PAGINATION
======================================================================

Stable order.

No duplicate/missing page under static dataset.

======================================================================
775. TEST BACKUP METADATA
======================================================================

Backup includes Session/Plan/Manifest metadata according mode.

No temp by default.

======================================================================
776. TEST EXPORT LIGHTWEIGHT
======================================================================

Outputs omitted listed.

- checksum;

======================================================================

======================================================================

Existing Session ID.

Remap/reject safely.

No overwrite.

======================================================================
779. TEST DUPLICATE PROJECT POLICY
======================================================================

======================================================================
780. TEST ARCHIVE RESTORE PROJECT
======================================================================

Generate Registry persists.

No auto resume.

======================================================================
781. PERFORMANCE — MANIFEST BUILD
======================================================================

Manifest build should iterate repository efficiently.

Avoid repeated load Unit file per Attempt causing N².

Use batch/list APIs.

======================================================================
782. PERFORMANCE — SESSION LIST
======================================================================

Registry only.

No Plan parse per row.

======================================================================
783. PERFORMANCE — UNIT FILTER
======================================================================

If units all in one file, parse once/cache safely.

If sharded, index.

No filesystem scan every filter change.

======================================================================
784. PERFORMANCE — CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Use streaming.

Cache validated immutable files.

Invalidate on size/mtime/health.

======================================================================
785. PERFORMANCE — UI REFRESH
======================================================================

Batch updates.

No full table rebuild every small Job progress event if avoidable.

Use model signals.

======================================================================
786. MEMORY — SOURCE TEXT
======================================================================

Avoid keeping:

- raw;
- normalized;
- all Unit duplicated;

in multiple long-lived service fields.

Services stateless where possible.

Plan persistence can store Unit text once.

======================================================================
787. MEMORY — MANIFEST
======================================================================

Manifest summary no full Unit text.

======================================================================
788. MEMORY — API
======================================================================

Do not serialize all Units by default.

======================================================================
789. THREAD SAFETY — REPOSITORIES
======================================================================

Atomic write alone not enough for read-modify-write.

Use locks per Session/registry.

Lock map lifecycle controlled to avoid leak if many Sessions.

Could use keyed lock manager existing.

No new complex distributed lock.

======================================================================
790. THREAD SAFETY — EVENT HANDLERS
======================================================================

Event subscriber exceptions should not corrupt operation.

Event Bus handles/logs.

Generate service persist first.

======================================================================
791. THREAD SAFETY — UI MODEL
======================================================================

Update on main thread.

======================================================================
792. CANCELLATION TOKEN
======================================================================

Use existing Job cancellation token.

Do not invent incompatible token.

Text services accept optional lightweight protocol.

======================================================================
793. PROGRESS REPORTER PROTOCOL
======================================================================

Use existing Worker context or protocol.

No Qt dependency.

======================================================================
794. LOGGER PROTOCOL
======================================================================

Use standard/project logger.

No print in production service except existing CLI convention.

======================================================================
795. TEST LOGGING
======================================================================

Can assert key error code logged, but avoid brittle full text.

======================================================================
796. ERROR MESSAGE CATALOG
======================================================================

Centralize stable Vietnamese messages where project pattern.

No duplicate inconsistent wording.

======================================================================
797. ERROR SUGGESTED ACTION
======================================================================

Structured field optional.

UI maps.

No action execution code embedded in message.

======================================================================
798. DOMAIN EVENTS PAYLOAD
======================================================================

Payload:

- event_version
- event_id if convention
- occurred_at
- project_id
- session_id optional
- entity_id
- status
- operation_id

No full entity graph.

======================================================================
799. EVENT IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Events may duplicate.

Subscribers refresh by ID.

Do not increment counters blindly without reload.

======================================================================
800. AUDIT EVENT RETENTION
======================================================================

Event Bus not durable audit.

Transition/Attempt/Manifest persistence provides audit.

No new event store.

======================================================================
801. SECURITY — ZIP IMPORT
======================================================================

Project package import must reject:

- absolute entries;
- `../`;
- symlink escape;
- duplicate conflicting entries;
- oversized decompression if existing protection.

No extraction directly final root.

======================================================================
802. SECURITY — OUTPUT TEMPLATE
======================================================================

Whitelist.

No attribute access.

No format spec execution.

No shell.

======================================================================
803. SECURITY — ENGINE OPTIONS
======================================================================

Validate JSON schema/capability.

No raw command.

======================================================================
804. SECURITY — FILE OPEN
======================================================================

Source path selected local:

- validate regular file;
- no device file;
- no directory;
- symlink policy.

On Windows special paths reject.

======================================================================
805. SECURITY — API LOCAL PATH
======================================================================

If API accepts local path, ensure Local API trust model.

Still validate.

No network UNC path if policy disallows.

======================================================================
806. SECURITY — LOG REDACTION
======================================================================

Redact secrets.

Source text snippets only debug if absolutely needed and bounded; default none.

======================================================================
807. SECURITY — ERROR RESPONSE
======================================================================

No traceback.

No full absolute path.

No environment variables.

======================================================================
808. DATA RETENTION — TEMP
======================================================================

Temp retains on failure only according preserve_failed_temp_files.

Default safety may retain within Session with report.

Cleanup explicit.

======================================================================
809. DATA RETENTION — PREVIEW
======================================================================

Preview expiry metadata.

No automatic destructive cleanup in current Sprint unless service safe and tested.

======================================================================
810. DATA RETENTION — REPORTS
======================================================================

Keep.

======================================================================
811. DATA RETENTION — ARCHIVE
======================================================================

Archive no delete.

======================================================================
812. DATA RETENTION — BACKUP
======================================================================

No temp unless full/debug mode explicit.

======================================================================
813. SOURCE FIRST RECHECK PER PHASE
======================================================================

Before each Phase touching subsystem, reread latest relevant files.

Examples:

Before Job integration:

- reread Job model/service/registry.

Before Resource:

- reread Resource requirement/decision/lease.

Before UI:

- reread MainWindow/navigation/shared widgets.

Before API:

- reread router/error/DTO.

No stale assumptions.

======================================================================
814. TARGETED TEST AFTER EACH FILE GROUP
======================================================================

After models:

- model/state tests.

After persistence:

- repository/registry.

After text:

- text pipeline.

After planner:

- planner.

After output:

- artifact/manifest.

After integration:

- Job/Resource/API/UI.

No waiting until end for all errors.

======================================================================
815. COMPILEALL SCOPE
======================================================================

Use actual source package paths.

Do not compile user data.

No generated runtime directories.

======================================================================
816. PYTEST ENVIRONMENT
======================================================================

Use test config.

No real Project/workspace.

Disable real Engine load.

No network.

======================================================================
817. UI SMOKE ENVIRONMENT
======================================================================

Use offscreen if project convention.

Do not require display.

No inference.

Close clean.

======================================================================
818. BOOTSTRAP DATA MUTATION CHECK
======================================================================

Capture temp workspace before/after.

Bootstrap should only create expected minimal config if convention.

No mutation real data.

======================================================================
819. GIT STATUS REVIEW
======================================================================

Read:

- modified source;
- new source;
- docs;
- tests;
- runtime data.

No command altering.

======================================================================
820. FINAL DIFF REVIEW
======================================================================

Review for:

- accidental deletion;
- formatting huge unrelated;
- hardcoded paths;
- fake handler;
- test artifacts;
- user data.

No need stage.

======================================================================

======================================================================

Check public imports/exports `__init__.py`.

Do not break package.

Add exports only if convention.

Avoid import side effects.

======================================================================
822. FINAL API ROUTE REVIEW
======================================================================

No duplicate paths.

Correct prefix.

Dependency injection works.

Tests.

======================================================================

Search.

831. IMPLEMENTATION FALLBACK WHEN SOURCE MINIMAL
======================================================================

Nếu source chưa có Generate UI/service đáng kể:

- implement foundation using current architecture;
- do not build unrelated framework;
- ensure models/services/tests;
- UI minimal usable.

- preserve;

- avoid breaking production;
- tests;
- possibly keep legacy execution while new handler contract readiness mirrors actual.

Do not disable working feature without reason.

- integrate it via execution contract;

- readiness can be ready when runtime prerequisites met;
- no need force unavailable.

Prompt restriction “Không Generate real inference” means implementation/testing must not execute real inference during Sprint; it does not require deleting existing capability.

Must report honestly.
