======================================================================
1000. MASTER CONSISTENCY RULE
======================================================================

Tất cả implementation phải giữ đồng nhất với PART 01 và PART 02:

- cùng canonical terminology;
- cùng PHASE 0–12;
- cùng model responsibilities;
- cùng state semantics;
- cùng no-fake rule;
- cùng source-first rule;
- cùng data-safety rule;
- cùng Job Queue/Resource Manager ownership;
- cùng Reference Vault asset-ID integration;
- cùng Project lifecycle;
- cùng readiness honesty.

Không được hiểu PART 03 là một Sprint mới.

PART 03 chỉ mở rộng chi tiết cho cùng Sprint AVS-014.16.

======================================================================
1001. CONTINUATION RULE
======================================================================

Nếu prompt còn Part tiếp theo:

- tiếp tục số mục từ 1002;
- không lặp lại hoặc sửa các mục trước;
- không đổi PHASE;
- không đổi class canonical;
- không đổi acceptance criteria;
- không tuyên bố kết thúc toàn Master Prompt nếu chưa có marker kết thúc cuối cùng rõ ràng.

===== KẾT THÚC PART 03 =====

# AI VOICE STUDIO
# MASTER IMPLEMENTATION PROMPT
# AVS-014.16 — GENERATE PIPELINE FOUNDATION
# PART 04

======================================================================
1002. PHASE 0 — AUDIT FILE INVENTORY
======================================================================

Trước khi sửa source, phải lập danh sách file liên quan thực tế theo từng nhóm:

- Project.
- Voice.
- Variant.
- Style Profile.
- Speaker Reference.
- Reference Vault.
- Generate cũ.
- Engine.
- Job Queue.
- Resource Manager.
- AppContext.
- Event Bus.
- Local API.
- UI.
- Settings.
- Backup.
- Export/import.
- Migration.
- Tests.
- Documentation.

Không được chỉ dựa vào tên thư mục.

Phải search toàn repository và xác định file thật.

======================================================================
1003. PHASE 0 — AUDIT FILE PRIORITY
======================================================================

Đọc theo thứ tự ưu tiên:

1. AGENTS.md.
2. ROADMAP.md.
3. Architecture.md hoặc docs/Architecture.md.
4. CURRENT_SPRINT.md.
5. DECISIONS.md.
6. CHANGELOG.md.
7. Entry point.
8. AppContext.
9. Project lifecycle.
10. Existing Generate.
11. Job Queue.
12. Resource Manager.
13. Reference Vault.
14. Engine.
15. UI/API.
16. Tests.

Nếu tên hoặc đường dẫn khác, tìm file tương đương.

======================================================================
1004. PHASE 0 — AUDIT SOURCE VERSION
======================================================================

Phải ghi nhận:

- branch hiện tại;
- commit hiện tại nếu được phép đọc;
- worktree status read-only;
- source schema versions;
- test baseline hiện tại.

Không thực hiện Git write.

Không checkout.

Không reset.

======================================================================
1005. PHASE 0 — BASELINE TEST
======================================================================

Nếu an toàn và thời gian cho phép, trước code chạy baseline:

- compileall;
- pytest;
- bootstrap smoke;
- UI smoke hiện có.

Mục tiêu xác định lỗi có sẵn trước Sprint.

Nếu baseline đã fail:

- ghi rõ lỗi trước Sprint;
- phân biệt lỗi mới và lỗi cũ;
- không sửa unrelated failure trừ khi chặn Sprint.

======================================================================
1006. PHASE 0 — EXISTING GENERATE CAPABILITY MATRIX
======================================================================

Lập ma trận:

| Capability | Existing | Entry point | Persistence | Job Queue | Resource | Test | Action |

Capabilities:

- Text input.
- TXT.
- DOCX.
- Voice selection.
- Variant selection.
- Style selection.
- Speaker Reference.
- Preview.
- Single Generate.
- Batch Generate.
- Output WAV.
- Output MP3.
- History.
- Progress.
- Cancel.
- Retry.
- Resume.
- Manifest.
- Engine readiness.
- Output validation.

======================================================================
1007. PHASE 0 — EXISTING ENGINE MATRIX
======================================================================

Mỗi Engine hiện có phải ghi:

- engine_id;
- adapter class;
- runtime class;
- generate method;
- preview method;
- supported languages;
- required reference;
- output formats;
- resource requirements;
- readiness check;
- current tests.

Không load model để audit.

======================================================================
1008. PHASE 0 — EXISTING JOB TYPE MATRIX
======================================================================

Lập bảng:

- job type;
- handler;
- payload;
- status mapping;
- resource requirement;
- persistence;
- pause/cancel support;
- recovery support.

Xác định chính xác extension point cho Generate.

======================================================================
1009. PHASE 0 — EXISTING RESOURCE MATRIX
======================================================================

Lập bảng:

- resource requirement model;
- decision states;
- lease lifecycle;
- GPU detection;
- RAM/disk reserves;
- waiting behavior;
- unsupported behavior;
- API/UI integration.

Không tạo resource logic riêng trong Generate.

======================================================================
1010. PHASE 0 — EXISTING REFERENCE MATRIX
======================================================================

Lập bảng cho:

- Voice.
- Variant.
- Style Profile.
- Speaker Reference.
- ReferenceAsset.
- AudioTextManifest.
- Managed path.
- Checksum.
- Validation.
- Archive.
- Migration.

Xác định field legacy và field mới.

======================================================================
1011. PHASE 0 — EXISTING PROJECT PACKAGE MATRIX
======================================================================

Xác định:

- backup modes;
- export modes;
- import validation;
- path traversal protection;
- checksum manifest;
- ID remap;
- Project duplicate behavior;
- archive/restore behavior.

Generate phải tích hợp vào cơ chế có sẵn.

======================================================================
1012. PHASE 0 — EXISTING UI MATRIX
======================================================================

Xác định:

- trang Generate hiện có;
- sidebar item;
- route key;
- shared form widgets;
- shared table model;
- progress widgets;
- status badges;
- dialog patterns;
- background worker patterns;
- event subscription patterns.

Không xây UI style mới.

======================================================================
1013. PHASE 0 — EXISTING API MATRIX
======================================================================

Xác định:

- framework;
- router registration;
- response envelope;
- error model;
- DTO;
- pagination;
- dependency injection;
- OpenAPI/docs policy;
- tests.

Không tạo API server thứ hai.

======================================================================
1014. PHASE 0 — EXISTING MIGRATION MATRIX
======================================================================

Xác định:

- migration registry;
- schema version;
- auto migration;
- backup before migration;
- report;
- future schema handling;
- test fixtures.

Generate migration phải theo pattern đó.

======================================================================
1015. PHASE 0 — AUDIT OUTPUT
======================================================================

Audit cuối PHASE 0 phải trả lời:

- Cái gì giữ nguyên.
- Cái gì mở rộng.
- Cái gì tạo mới.
- Cái gì legacy.
- Cái gì chưa thể thực thi.
- Cái gì là blocker.
- Cái gì có rủi ro dữ liệu.
- Cái gì cần migration.
- Cái gì cần test hồi quy.

======================================================================
1016. FILE PLAN — DEPENDENCY ORDER
======================================================================

File-by-file Plan phải sắp theo dependency.

Không liệt kê UI trước model.

Không liệt kê API trước service.

Không liệt kê Job handler trước domain contract.

======================================================================
1017. FILE PLAN — SOURCE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Mỗi file phải có owner responsibility duy nhất.

Ví dụ:

- model file không xử lý path;
- repository file không resolve Engine;
- UI file không split text;
- API router không tự transition Session;
- Job handler không tự tính path ngoài Output Manager.

======================================================================
1018. FILE PLAN — COMPATIBILITY NOTE
======================================================================

Mỗi REPLACE liên quan public API phải ghi:

- old call signature;
- new internal route;
- compatibility wrapper;
- deprecation behavior;
- regression test.

======================================================================
1019. FILE PLAN — TEST MAPPING
======================================================================

Mỗi NEW/REPLACE phải chỉ ra ít nhất một test hoặc lý do không cần test riêng.

Không để file critical không có test.

======================================================================
1020. PHASE 1 — VERSION CONSTANTS
======================================================================

Tạo hoặc mở rộng constants theo source convention:

- GENERATE_SCHEMA_VERSION.
- GENERATE_REQUEST_SCHEMA_VERSION.
- GENERATE_SESSION_SCHEMA_VERSION.
- GENERATE_PLAN_SCHEMA_VERSION.
- GENERATE_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION.
- GENERATE_SOURCE_SNAPSHOT_SCHEMA_VERSION.
- GENERATE_NORMALIZATION_VERSION.
- GENERATE_STRUCTURE_VERSION.
- GENERATE_SPLITTER_VERSION.
- GENERATE_PLANNER_VERSION.
- GENERATE_OUTPUT_VALIDATOR_VERSION.
- GENERATE_JOB_PAYLOAD_VERSION.

Không tạo version thừa nếu một version chung đủ.

======================================================================
1021. PHASE 1 — JSON-SAFE TYPE
======================================================================

Nếu source chưa có JSONValue type, có thể định nghĩa type alias phù hợp.

Không dùng `Any` cho toàn bộ metadata nếu tránh được.

Metadata phải JSON-safe.

======================================================================
1022. PHASE 1 — COMMON ID FACTORY
======================================================================

Tái sử dụng ID factory.

Nếu chưa có:

- tạo một factory chung trong utility thích hợp;
- không tạo factory riêng cho từng model;
- dùng UUID/ULID theo convention source;
- prefix nếu convention cho phép;
- test uniqueness/format.

======================================================================
1023. PHASE 1 — IMMUTABLE ID ENFORCEMENT
======================================================================

Model hoặc service phải ngăn thay ID sau create.

Nếu dataclass không frozen vì status mutable:

- ID không có setter;
- repository update xác minh ID;
- service reject payload đổi ID;
- tests.

======================================================================
1024. PHASE 1 — COMMON TIMESTAMP FACTORY
======================================================================

Dùng time utility hiện có.

Không gọi `datetime.now()` rải rác.

Timezone-aware.

Test roundtrip.

======================================================================
1025. PHASE 1 — COMMON REVISION
======================================================================

Nếu repository pattern có revision:

- revision bắt đầu theo convention;
- tăng trên update;
- create không nhận revision từ user;
- stale update conflict.

Nếu không có, không ép thêm toàn hệ thống.

======================================================================
1026. PHASE 1 — GENERATE REQUEST STATUS
======================================================================

GenerateRequestStatus tối thiểu:

- draft
- validating
- valid
- invalid
- materializing
- materialized
- cancelled
- archived

Không dùng Session status cho Request.

======================================================================
1027. PHASE 1 — REQUEST STATUS TRANSITIONS
======================================================================

Hợp lệ:

draft → validating

validating → valid

validating → invalid

valid → materializing

materializing → materialized

materializing → invalid

draft → cancelled

valid → cancelled

invalid → validating

materialized → archived

cancelled → archived

Không:

materialized → draft

archived → materializing

======================================================================
1028. PHASE 1 — DOCUMENT STATUS
======================================================================

GenerateDocumentStatus có thể gồm:

- pending
- processing
- planned
- queued
- running
- partially_completed
- completed
- failed
- cancelled
- blocked

Không cần mọi transition phức tạp nếu computed từ Chapters.

======================================================================
1029. PHASE 1 — CHAPTER STATUS
======================================================================

GenerateChapterStatus:

- pending
- ready
- queued
- waiting_resource
- running
- paused
- partially_completed
- completed hoặc succeeded theo convention đã chọn
- failed
- skipped
- cancelled
- blocked
- recovery_required

Phải thống nhất với PART trước.

Nếu Unit dùng succeeded, Chapter có thể dùng completed nhưng mapping phải rõ.

======================================================================
1030. PHASE 1 — UNIT STATUS FINAL CHOICE
======================================================================

Chọn một bộ nhất quán.

Khuyến nghị giữ như PART trước:

- pending
- ready
- queued
- waiting_dependency
- waiting_resource
- running
- paused
- retry_wait
- succeeded
- failed
- skipped
- cancelled
- blocked
- recovery_required

Không thêm completed cho Unit.

======================================================================
1031. PHASE 1 — ATTEMPT STATUS FINAL CHOICE
======================================================================

- created
- queued
- waiting_resource
- running
- succeeded
- failed
- cancelled
- interrupted
- invalid_output

Không dùng completed cho Attempt.

======================================================================
1032. PHASE 1 — ARTIFACT STATUS FINAL CHOICE
======================================================================

- planned
- reserved
- writing
- created
- validating
- valid
- invalid
- missing
- superseded
- archived

======================================================================
1033. PHASE 1 — SESSION HEALTH STATUS
======================================================================

Nếu source phù hợp, tạo riêng:

- healthy
- degraded
- recovery_required
- corrupt
- read_only
- unknown

Không trộn với business status.

======================================================================
1034. PHASE 1 — REQUEST SOURCE TYPE
======================================================================

GenerateSourceType:

- pasted_text
- txt
- docx
- managed_text_snapshot
- legacy_text_source

PDF/EPUB không đánh dấu supported.

Có thể enum future nhưng readiness unsupported.

======================================================================
1035. PHASE 1 — OUTPUT FORMAT
======================================================================

GenerateOutputFormat:

- wav
- mp3

Chỉ capability thực tế mới ready.

Không tạo format enum quá rộng nếu chưa cần.

======================================================================
1036. PHASE 1 — EXECUTION MODE
======================================================================

Giữ:

- preview
- single
- chapter
- batch
- resume
- retry_unit
- retry_chapter

Không dùng mode để biểu diễn Engine.

======================================================================
1037. PHASE 1 — RESUME MODE
======================================================================

- pending_only
- pending_and_interrupted
- failed_retryable
- invalid_output
- all_incomplete

======================================================================
1038. PHASE 1 — RETRY SCOPE
======================================================================

- unit
- chapter
- session_failed_units

Sprint bắt buộc Unit và Chapter.

======================================================================
1039. PHASE 1 — FAILURE CATEGORY
======================================================================

Dùng bộ category thống nhất đã định nghĩa.

Không tạo string tự do rải rác.

Có stable error code riêng.

======================================================================
1040. PHASE 1 — ENTITY FACTORY METHODS
======================================================================

Mỗi entity có factory hoặc service tạo an toàn.

Ví dụ concept:

GenerateRequest.create(...)

GenerateSession.create(...)

GenerateAttempt.create_initial(...)

GenerateAttempt.create_retry(...)

Không bắt buộc classmethod nếu project không dùng.

Factory phải:

- sinh ID;
- timestamps;
- schema version;
- default status;
- validation cơ bản.

======================================================================
1041. PHASE 1 — DOMAIN MODEL NO SERVICE IMPORT
======================================================================

Model không import:

- repository;
- AppContext;
- UI;
- EngineManager;
- Job Queue;
- Resource service.

Có thể import enum/value object.

======================================================================
1042. PHASE 1 — REQUEST MODEL SOURCE UNION
======================================================================

Request phải xác định một source duy nhất.

Có thể dùng:

- source_type;
- source_path;
- pasted_text;
- source_asset_id.

Validation đảm bảo không conflict.

Không cần union class phức tạp nếu source style đơn giản.

======================================================================
1043. PHASE 1 — REQUEST MODEL PARAMETER SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Request giữ requested values.

Không lưu effective values vào cùng field rồi mất input.

Có thể có:

- requested_parameters;
- requested_output;
- requested_split_settings.

Hoặc fields trực tiếp theo source.

======================================================================
1044. PHASE 1 — SESSION MODEL REQUEST SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Session phải giữ đủ dữ liệu lịch sử nếu Request bị archive/missing.

Không cần copy pasted text.

Giữ:

- request_id;
- request display;
- source snapshot ID;
- requested/effective summary.

======================================================================
1045. PHASE 1 — SESSION STATUS HISTORY
======================================================================

Nếu lưu inline:

- giới hạn entry nhỏ;
- không full log;
- append qua state machine.

Nếu file riêng:

- atomic append/write theo utility.

Không tạo event sourcing phức tạp.

======================================================================
1046. PHASE 1 — DOCUMENT COUNTS
======================================================================

Document counts phải được tính từ normalized/structure output.

Không nhận client-supplied counts.

======================================================================
1047. PHASE 1 — CHAPTER SPAN
======================================================================

Chapter model lưu:

- normalized_start;
- normalized_end;
- raw_start optional;
- raw_end optional;
- span_accuracy.

Không dùng tuple không rõ semantics nếu serialization khó.

======================================================================
1048. PHASE 1 — UNIT SPAN
======================================================================

Unit tương tự.

Phải test bounds.

======================================================================
1049. PHASE 1 — UNIT TEXT STORAGE POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu Unit text lưu trực tiếp:

- UTF-8 JSON;
- kích thước có thể lớn nhưng bounded.

Nếu lưu path:

- Unit giữ text_relative_path/checksum;
- query service load khi cần.

Chọn dựa scale/source convention.

Không duplicate text nhiều nơi không cần.

======================================================================
1050. PHASE 1 — ATTEMPT NUMBER
======================================================================

Attempt number integer dương.

Initial = 1.

Retry = latest + 1.

Repository/service authority.

======================================================================
1051. PHASE 1 — ATTEMPT ERROR FIELDS
======================================================================

Phân biệt:

- error_category;
- error_code;
- error_message;
- error_details;
- retryable.

Không chỉ một string.

======================================================================
1052. PHASE 1 — ATTEMPT RUNTIME SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Runtime snapshot JSON-safe:

- engine version;
- adapter version;
- device type/index;
- runtime readiness version;
- resource lease summary;
- no secrets.

Không lưu process object.

======================================================================
1053. PHASE 1 — PLAN MODEL FROZEN FLAG
======================================================================

Plan có:

- frozen;
- frozen_at;
- plan_checksum;
- structural_fingerprint;
- validation_status.

Không chỉ boolean.

======================================================================
1054. PHASE 1 — PLAN INDEXES
======================================================================

Plan có thể lưu:

- document_ids;
- chapter_ids;
- unit_ids;
- chapter_to_units;
- document_to_chapters.

Nếu scale lớn, index file riêng.

Không duplicate quá mức.

======================================================================
1055. PHASE 1 — MANIFEST FINALIZED FLAG
======================================================================

Manifest:

- finalized;
- finalized_at;
- final_status;
- checksum.

Không sửa finalized manifest tùy tiện.

Nếu cần cập nhật health sau output mất:

- rebuild/new manifest revision hoặc health report riêng;
- không thay lịch sử không kiểm soát.

======================================================================
1056. PHASE 1 — ARTIFACT REQUIRED FLAG
======================================================================

Artifact metadata có thể ghi:

- required;
- logical_role;
- primary.

Completion logic rõ.

======================================================================
1057. PHASE 1 — VALIDATION REPORT MODEL
======================================================================

Report:

- report_id;
- report_type;
- entity_type;
- entity_id;
- status;
- issues;
- checks;
- validator_version;
- created_at;
- metadata.

Immutable.

======================================================================
1058. PHASE 1 — ISSUE MODEL
======================================================================

ValidationIssue:

- code;
- severity;
- field;
- message;
- developer_message;
- related_id;
- suggested_action;
- retryable;
- metadata.

Không lưu exception object.

======================================================================
1059. PHASE 1 — SETTINGS MODEL DEFAULT FACTORY
======================================================================

Mọi list/dict dùng default_factory.

Không mutable default.

======================================================================
1060. PHASE 1 — SETTINGS RANGE VALIDATION
======================================================================

Validate:

- min/target/max;
- retries;
- backoff;
- checkpoint interval;
- output formats;
- naming templates;
- minimum bytes;
- numeric finite.

Không Engine-specific clamp ở pure model nếu cần service capability.

======================================================================
1061. PHASE 1 — OUTPUT SPEC MODEL
======================================================================

OutputSpec không tự resolve filesystem.

Chỉ dữ liệu policy/template/effective paths relative.

Path resolution ở Output Manager/Resolver.

======================================================================
1062. PHASE 1 — SELECTION SNAPSHOT MODEL
======================================================================

Snapshot model immutable sau creation.

Có:

- requested;
- effective;
- IDs;
- display snapshots;
- versions;
- checksums;
- capability summary;
- validation summary.

Không chứa live object.

======================================================================
1063. PHASE 1 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT MODEL
======================================================================

Snapshot model không tự đọc file.

Chỉ metadata.

======================================================================
1064. PHASE 1 — REGISTRY ENTRY MODEL
======================================================================

Có thể dùng dataclass/model riêng.

Không dùng raw dict khắp code.

======================================================================
1065. PHASE 1 — SERIALIZATION API
======================================================================

Theo source có thể:

- to_dict/from_dict;
- model_dump/model_validate;
- serializer service.

Dùng một style thống nhất.

======================================================================
1066. PHASE 1 — CANONICAL JSON
======================================================================

Checksum canonical:

- sort keys;
- UTF-8;
- stable separators;
- enum values;
- exclude checksum field;
- no volatile fields nếu fingerprint structural.

Dùng utility chung.

======================================================================
1067. PHASE 1 — DESERIALIZATION VALIDATION
======================================================================

Loader phải phân biệt:

- malformed JSON;
- unsupported schema;
- missing required;
- invalid enum;
- wrong type;
- unknown fields.

Không crash registry toàn bộ.

======================================================================
1068. PHASE 1 — MODEL MIGRATION HOOK
======================================================================

Loader gọi migration framework trước model parse nếu schema cũ.

Không tự mutate source file trong pure model.

======================================================================
1069. PHASE 1 — STATE MACHINE CLASS
======================================================================

Tạo hoặc mở rộng pattern:

GenerateSessionStateMachine

Có:

- can_transition;
- validate_transition;
- transition;
- terminal state helpers;
- action mapping;
- transition record.

Không persistence trực tiếp nếu state machine pure.

======================================================================
1070. PHASE 1 — REQUEST STATE MACHINE
======================================================================

Nếu Request lifecycle đủ phức tạp, tạo riêng.

Không dùng Session state machine.

======================================================================
1071. PHASE 1 — UNIT/ATTEMPT TRANSITIONS
======================================================================

Có thể centralize rules trong domain transition service.

Không cần class riêng cho từng nếu overkill.

Nhưng rules phải test.

======================================================================
1072. PHASE 1 — STATUS COMPUTATION SERVICE
======================================================================

Chapter/Session aggregate status có thể computed bởi:

GenerateStatusComputationService

hoặc pure functions.

Không rải logic ở UI, Job handler, API.

======================================================================
1073. PHASE 1 — PROGRESS COMPUTATION SERVICE
======================================================================

Tách pure computation:

- input Unit summaries;
- output counts/percent/status candidates.

Test độc lập.

======================================================================
1074. PHASE 1 — HEALTH COMPUTATION SERVICE
======================================================================

Tách business status và health.

Không để output missing tự transition Session sai.

======================================================================
1075. PHASE 1 — MODEL TEST FILES
======================================================================

Nhóm test hợp lý.

Không cần một test file cho mỗi class nếu quá nhiều.

Nhưng test coverage đầy đủ.

======================================================================
1076. PHASE 1 — MODEL ROUNDTRIP TEST MATRIX
======================================================================

Mỗi model:

- default;
- populated;
- Unicode;
- optional null;
- enum;
- relative path;
- metadata;
- schema version.

======================================================================
1077. PHASE 1 — MODEL INVALID INPUT TEST
======================================================================

Test:

- invalid ID;
- invalid status;
- negative count;
- NaN;
- invalid span;
- invalid checksum;
- invalid path string;
- missing required.

======================================================================
1078. PHASE 1 — STATE TRANSITION TABLE TEST
======================================================================

Dùng parameterized table.

Không chỉ vài transition.

======================================================================
1079. PHASE 1 — PROGRESS TEST
======================================================================

- 0 Units.
- all pending.
- some running.
- all valid.
- failures.
- skipped.
- partial.
- waiting resource.
- no percent >100.

======================================================================
1080. PHASE 1 — HEALTH TEST
======================================================================

- healthy.
- missing manifest.
- corrupt Plan.
- missing output.
- read-only import.
- unknown.

======================================================================
1081. PHASE 1 — EXIT REVIEW
======================================================================

Trước PHASE 2:

- compile models;
- run model/state tests;
- search UI/repository imports trong model;
- verify no mutable defaults;
- verify schema version.

======================================================================
1082. PHASE 2 — STORAGE ROOT CREATION
======================================================================

Generate storage root chỉ tạo khi:

- Request persist;
- Session create;
- Registry create/rebuild;
- migration.

Không tạo khi import module.

======================================================================
1083. PHASE 2 — DIRECTORY PERMISSION CHECK
======================================================================

Trước write:

- Project root exists;
- writable;
- path inside root;
- directory create safe;
- permission error classified.

Không chmod tự động.

======================================================================
1084. PHASE 2 — ATOMIC JSON WRITER
======================================================================

Dùng utility hiện có.

Nếu cần mở rộng:

- UTF-8;
- temp sibling;
- flush;
- optional fsync;
- parse temp;
- replace;
- preserve valid old file;
- error context.

Không tạo writer cạnh tranh.

======================================================================
1085. PHASE 2 — ATOMIC TEXT WRITER
======================================================================

Raw/normalized text cũng cần temp/final.

Dùng utility hiện có hoặc thêm helper chung.

Không ghi trực tiếp final lớn nếu crash risk.

======================================================================
1086. PHASE 2 — FILE CHECKSUM UTILITY
======================================================================

Streaming.

Không duplicate code.

======================================================================
1087. PHASE 2 — RELATIVE PATH UTILITY
======================================================================

Có:

- to_managed_relative;
- resolve_managed_relative;
- ensure_inside_root;
- normalize_serialized_path.

Không dùng `Path.resolve()` không kiểm soát symlink policy.

======================================================================
1088. PHASE 2 — LOCK MANAGER
======================================================================

Nếu source có keyed lock, dùng.

Keys:

- registry project_id;
- request ID;
- session ID;
- Unit/Attempt mutation có thể Session lock hoặc Unit lock;
- package operation.

Không deadlock do nested lock order.

Document lock order.

======================================================================
1089. PHASE 2 — LOCK ORDER
======================================================================

Khuyến nghị:

Project/Registry lock
→ Session lock
→ Unit/Attempt lock
→ Output reservation lock

Không giữ nhiều nếu tránh được.

Không giữ registry lock rồi chạy filesystem scan dài.

======================================================================
1090. PHASE 2 — REQUEST FILE FORMAT
======================================================================

Request JSON có:

- schema_version;
- entity;
- revision;
- optional compatibility metadata.

Không cần wrapper nếu project models serialize trực tiếp.

Theo convention.

======================================================================
1091. PHASE 2 — SESSION FILE FORMAT
======================================================================

Session summary không chứa:

- full source text;
- all Attempt logs;
- binary;
- Engine object.

Giữ IDs/summaries.

======================================================================
1092. PHASE 2 — PLAN STORAGE CHOICE
======================================================================

Sau audit, chọn:

A. Single plan JSON.

B. Indexed/sharded Plan.

Tiêu chí:

- expected Unit count;
- repository pattern;
- performance;
- atomic update;
- test complexity.

Plan frozen nên ít update, single file có thể hợp lý nếu không quá lớn.

Không chọn sharding chỉ vì lý thuyết.

======================================================================
1093. PHASE 2 — ATTEMPT PER FILE
======================================================================

Per-attempt JSON thường phù hợp append/history.

Nếu existing repository khác, theo source.

======================================================================
1094. PHASE 2 — ARTIFACT METADATA STORAGE
======================================================================

Có thể per-artifact JSON dưới outputs/metadata hoặc attempts.

Không trộn binary và metadata.

======================================================================
1095. PHASE 2 — REPORT STORAGE
======================================================================

Report path dựa type/report_id.

Không dựa user message.

======================================================================
1096. PHASE 2 — OPERATION MARKER STORAGE
======================================================================

Chỉ tạo nếu cần.

Nằm temp/operations.

Không nằm project root chung không rõ owner.

======================================================================
1097. PHASE 2 — CREATE REQUEST TRANSACTION
======================================================================

1. Validate model.
2. Ensure request root.
3. Check duplicate.
4. Atomic write Request.
5. Update request index nếu có.
6. Return.
7. Event publish ngoài repository.

======================================================================
1098. PHASE 2 — CREATE SESSION TRANSACTION
======================================================================

1. Validate Project.
2. Allocate ID.
3. Create operation temp.
4. Write session draft.
5. Atomic finalize session directory hoặc metadata.
6. Update registry.
7. Publish event.
8. Clear marker.

Nếu registry fail, Session vẫn recoverable.

======================================================================
1099. PHASE 2 — SESSION DIRECTORY ATOMICITY
======================================================================

Directory rename atomicity platform-dependent nhưng cùng filesystem thường đủ.

Nếu không dùng directory rename:

- create directory;
- write session.json last;
- existence of valid session.json marks committed;
- recovery handles partial directory.

Document commit marker.

======================================================================
1100. PHASE 2 — COMMIT MARKER
======================================================================

Có thể coi:

- valid session.json;
- frozen plan.json;
- finalized manifest.json;

là commit markers theo stage.

Không cần file marker riêng nếu đủ.

======================================================================
1101. PHASE 2 — REPOSITORY ERROR TYPES
======================================================================

Classify:

- not found;
- duplicate;
- corrupt;
- unsupported schema;
- permission;
- conflict;
- write failure;
- path safety;
- checksum mismatch.

======================================================================
1102. PHASE 2 — LIST QUERY OBJECT
======================================================================

Có thể dùng filter dataclass:

GenerateSessionQuery

- statuses;
- health;
- archived;
- preview;
- search;
- limit;
- offset;
- sort.

Không bắt buộc nếu source style dùng args.

======================================================================
1103. PHASE 2 — REGISTRY INITIALIZATION
======================================================================

Nếu missing:

- create empty registry only when Generate used;
- hoặc rebuild if Session dirs exist;
- no data deletion.

======================================================================
1104. PHASE 2 — REGISTRY CORRUPTION
======================================================================

- preserve corrupt file;
- copy/rename backup if safe;
- rebuild into new temp;
- atomic replace;
- report.

Không overwrite corrupt evidence trước report/backup.

======================================================================
1105. PHASE 2 — REGISTRY ENTRY UPDATE
======================================================================

Summary from Session/Plan counts.

Không trust caller arbitrary dict.

Dùng mapper/query service.

======================================================================
1106. PHASE 2 — REGISTRY REBUILD UNREADABLE ENTRY
======================================================================

Có thể tạo special entry:

- session_id inferred from safe directory;
- health corrupt;
- storage path;
- error report ID.

Không bịa metadata.

======================================================================
1107. PHASE 2 — REQUEST INDEX REBUILD
======================================================================

Nếu có index:

- scan request JSON only;
- no source text;
- preserve corrupt report.

======================================================================
1108. PHASE 2 — REPOSITORY PAGINATION
======================================================================

Stable sort.

Pagination after filter.

Total correct.

No duplicates.

======================================================================
1109. PHASE 2 — REPOSITORY CACHE
======================================================================

Nếu có cache:

- keyed Project/ID;
- invalidate on write;
- not source of truth;
- thread-safe;
- bounded.

Không cần cache nếu chưa cần.

======================================================================
1110. PHASE 2 — SESSION UPDATE MERGE
======================================================================

Không merge raw dict từ client.

Service creates new model/state, repository writes full validated object.

======================================================================
1111. PHASE 2 — REVISION CONFLICT HANDLING
======================================================================

Conflict result giúp caller reload.

Không tự retry state-changing operation không idempotent.

======================================================================
1112. PHASE 2 — FROZEN PLAN WRITE PROTECTION
======================================================================

Repository checks existing frozen.

No update/delete.

Migration explicit only.

======================================================================
1113. PHASE 2 — MANIFEST FINALIZED WRITE PROTECTION
======================================================================

Finalized manifest cannot update in place except migration/rebuild policy.

Can create new revision/file.

======================================================================
1114. PHASE 2 — REPORT IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

No update.

======================================================================
1115. PHASE 2 — ARTIFACT PATH UNIQUE INDEX
======================================================================

Output Manager/Artifact repository detect duplicate logical final path.

Could maintain index in Plan/Session.

No filesystem-only authority.

======================================================================
1116. PHASE 2 — ORPHAN DETECTION
======================================================================

Repository consistency scan:

- metadata without file;
- file without metadata;
- attempt without Unit;
- Unit without Plan;
- registry without Session;
- Session without registry.

No auto delete.

======================================================================
1117. PHASE 2 — STORAGE VALIDATION REPORT
======================================================================

GenerateConsistencyService produces report.

Not repository side effects.

======================================================================
1118. PHASE 2 — MIGRATION READ PATH
======================================================================

Repository loader:

1. Read bytes.
2. Parse JSON.
3. Inspect version.
4. If older, call migration transformer.
5. Validate transformed in memory.
6. Persist only through migration service/policy.
7. Return model.

No silent destructive rewrite if auto migration disabled.

======================================================================
1119. PHASE 2 — FUTURE VERSION
======================================================================

Higher version:

- raise unsupported future schema;
- registry marks read-only/corrupt/degraded per policy;
- no overwrite.

======================================================================
1120. PHASE 2 — PERSISTENCE TESTS
======================================================================

Must cover:

- create/read/update;
- duplicate;
- not found;
- atomic failure;
- revision conflict;
- corruption;
- future schema;
- registry rebuild;
- pagination;
- concurrent updates;
- path safety;
- frozen Plan.

======================================================================
1121. PHASE 2 — EXIT REVIEW
======================================================================

Before PHASE 3:

- repositories pass;
- temp workspace only;
- no real data;
- no UI import;
- no source mutation;
- compile.

======================================================================
1122. PHASE 3 — SOURCE INPUT ABSTRACTION
======================================================================

Có thể dùng value object:

GenerateSourceInput

Fields:

- source_type;
- file_path optional;
- pasted_text optional;
- managed_snapshot_id optional;
- original_filename optional.

Pure input.

======================================================================
1123. PHASE 3 — SOURCE VALIDATOR
======================================================================

Tách basic source validation:

- type;
- extension;
- existence;
- file kind;
- size;
- pasted length;
- Project writable.

Không extract trong validator nhẹ.

======================================================================
1124. PHASE 3 — SOURCE IMPORT LIMIT
======================================================================

Có configurable safety limits.

Không cấm audiobook lớn vô lý.

Có warning threshold và hard limit khác nhau.

Pasted text hard limit nhỏ hơn file import có thể hợp lý.

======================================================================
1125. PHASE 3 — SOURCE PROVENANCE
======================================================================

Snapshot provenance:

- original_path optional;
- original_filename;
- original_size;
- original_mtime optional;
- original_checksum;
- imported_at;
- import_method;
- Request ID;
- Session ID.

Absolute original path có thể internal provenance nhưng không API default.

Managed locator là primary.

======================================================================
1126. PHASE 3 — RAW TEXT REPRESENTATION
======================================================================

Raw text là text sau extraction/decoding, trước normalization.

Với TXT:

- decoded text.

Với DOCX:

- extracted paragraph text.

Không phải original binary bytes.

Original binary checksum vẫn lưu.

======================================================================
1127. PHASE 3 — ORIGINAL FILE COPY POLICY
======================================================================

Không bắt buộc copy original DOCX/TXT binary nếu managed raw text đủ.

Nhưng backup/provenance requirements có thể cần.

Chọn sau audit.

Nếu copy:

- managed source/original;
- checksum;
- no mutation.

Nếu không:

- record omission.

======================================================================
1128. PHASE 3 — PASTED TEXT ORIGINAL
======================================================================

Pasted text raw UTF-8 chính là original managed source.

======================================================================
1129. PHASE 3 — SOURCE EXTRACTION STRATEGY REGISTRY
======================================================================

Nếu nhiều type, có thể dùng extractor registry nhỏ:

- TXT extractor;
- DOCX extractor;
- pasted extractor.

Không tạo plugin framework lớn.

======================================================================
1130. PHASE 3 — EXTRACTOR INTERFACE
======================================================================

Input:

- SourceInput;
- destination temp;
- cancellation/progress.

Output:

- raw text;
- metadata;
- headings;
- warnings;
- source checksums.

No persistence ownership beyond provided temp if architecture.

======================================================================
1131. PHASE 3 — TXT ENCODING ORDER
======================================================================

Suggested:

1. UTF-8 BOM.
2. UTF-8.
3. Existing detector/fallback.
4. Explicit failure.

Không đoán vô hạn.

======================================================================
1132. PHASE 3 — TXT BINARY DETECTION
======================================================================

Nếu nhiều null/binary signatures:

- reject as not text;
- no replacement decode.

Không cố đọc Audio đổi đuôi .txt.

======================================================================
1133. PHASE 3 — TXT LINE COUNT
======================================================================

Count after decode raw.

Record.

======================================================================
1134. PHASE 3 — DOCX VALIDATION
======================================================================

Check:

- regular file;
- ZIP/document validity through reader;
- not password protected unsupported;
- extraction exceptions classified.

No raw zip extraction custom if reader handles.

======================================================================
1135. PHASE 3 — DOCX EMPTY
======================================================================

If no meaningful text:

- validation error;
- Snapshot may preserve extraction report;
- no Plan.

======================================================================
1136. PHASE 3 — DOCX HEADINGS
======================================================================

Store stable ordered heading records:

- text;
- level;
- paragraph index;
- raw/extracted span if available;
- style name optional.

No UI object.

======================================================================
1137. PHASE 3 — SOURCE MAP INITIAL
======================================================================

Extraction from DOCX can map paragraph indices to raw text spans.

Normalization later extends mapping.

======================================================================
1138. PHASE 3 — EXTRACTION PROGRESS
======================================================================

Stages:

- validating_source;
- reading_source;
- decoding_or_extracting;
- writing_snapshot;
- checksum;
- finalizing.

No fake percent if unknown.

======================================================================
1139. PHASE 3 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT DIRECTORY
======================================================================

Inside Session source root.

Could use source_snapshot_id subdir if multiple.

Default one source per Session but model supports multiple.

======================================================================
1140. PHASE 3 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT COMMIT
======================================================================

Write:

- raw text temp;
- structure metadata temp;
- extraction report;
- source metadata last;
- finalize.

Session pointer updated after commit.

======================================================================
1141. PHASE 3 — SOURCE REUSE VALIDATION
======================================================================

Managed snapshot reuse only if:

- exists;
- checksum;
- same Project/allowed scope;
- immutable;
- no active mutation.

No reuse by path string alone.

======================================================================
1142. PHASE 3 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT HEALTH
======================================================================

Health:

- valid;
- missing_raw;
- checksum_mismatch;
- corrupt_metadata;
- unsupported_version.

Separate report.

======================================================================
1143. PHASE 3 — EXTERNAL SOURCE DELETION
======================================================================

After commit, external missing is not blocker.

Provenance may show unavailable.

======================================================================
1144. PHASE 3 — EXTERNAL SOURCE MODIFICATION
======================================================================

Session unaffected.

Draft Request can warn if not materialized yet.

======================================================================
1145. PHASE 3 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT API
======================================================================

API should expose summary:

- ID;
- type;
- filename;
- size/count;
- encoding;
- checksum short/full according policy;
- health.

No absolute path.

======================================================================
1146. PHASE 3 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT UI
======================================================================

Show:

- source name;
- type;
- status;
- characters;
- encoding;
- imported time.

No edit.

======================================================================
1147. PHASE 3 — SOURCE TEST FIXTURE CONTENT
======================================================================

Use Vietnamese sample with:

- headings;
- dialogue;
- decimals;
- abbreviations;
- ellipsis;
- blank lines;
- intro/outro.

No copyrighted long text.

======================================================================
1148. PHASE 3 — SOURCE TESTS
======================================================================

Cover:

- pasted text;
- UTF-8;
- BOM;
- CRLF;
- invalid encoding;
- binary;
- empty;
- DOCX headings;
- external delete;
- external modify;
- snapshot checksum;
- cancellation;
- atomic failure.

======================================================================
1149. PHASE 3 — EXIT REVIEW
======================================================================

Source snapshot survives restart.

No external dependency.

No normalization yet mixed into extractor.

======================================================================
1150. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION PIPELINE BUILDER
======================================================================

Có thể có ordered list transformations từ settings.

No dynamic code.

Stable order.

======================================================================
1151. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION RESULT MODEL
======================================================================

Internal/result:

- output_path;
- checksum;
- report_id;
- source_map_path;
- counts;
- warnings;
- transformation summary;
- version.

======================================================================
1152. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION LOCK
======================================================================

One normalization operation per Session/Snapshot.

Idempotent reuse.

======================================================================
1153. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION TEMP
======================================================================

Write normalized temp.

Validate.

Finalize.

No overwrite frozen mismatch.

======================================================================
1154. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION SOURCE MAP SEGMENTS
======================================================================

Segment record:

- raw_start;
- raw_end;
- normalized_start;
- normalized_end;
- transform;
- accuracy.

Could aggregate unchanged runs.

======================================================================
1155. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION SOURCE MAP SIZE
======================================================================

Avoid mapping every character if unnecessary.

Set size safety.

Report if approximate.

======================================================================
1156. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION CUSTOM REPLACEMENTS ORDER
======================================================================

Apply after basic Unicode/line normalization or documented order.

Stable.

Test overlapping replacements.

======================================================================
1157. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION NO-LOSS SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Normalization may change formatting by settings, but must not remove semantic sections by default.

Report every removal category.

======================================================================
1158. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZED TEXT EMPTY
======================================================================

Fail.

No structure/Plan.

======================================================================
1159. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION CHECKSUM REUSE
======================================================================

Reuse if version/settings/raw checksum match.

======================================================================
1160. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE DETECTOR COMPOSITION
======================================================================

Possible components:

- HeadingMetadataDetector.
- RegexChapterDetector.
- ParagraphDetector.
- SentenceDetector.

No ML.

======================================================================
1161. PHASE 4 — CHAPTER RULE PRECEDENCE
======================================================================

Metadata heading > explicit configured > built-in pattern > single chapter fallback.

No duplicate.

======================================================================
1162. PHASE 4 — CHAPTER TITLE CONTENT POLICY
======================================================================

Preserve title in spoken flow when setting true.

Structure records title span separately.

Planner/splitter handles inclusion.

======================================================================
1163. PHASE 4 — CHAPTER CONTENT SPAN
======================================================================

Define whether content span includes title.

Prefer fields:

- title_span;
- body_span;
- full_span.

Avoid ambiguity.

======================================================================
1164. PHASE 4 — INTRO STRUCTURE
======================================================================

Represent preface:

- chapter role intro;
- or first chapter prefix.

Choose one.

Preserve.

======================================================================
1165. PHASE 4 — OUTRO STRUCTURE
======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================
1166. PHASE 4 — HEADING-ONLY CHAPTER
======================================================================

No Unit body unless title spoken.

If title preserved, may create title Unit.

Otherwise metadata only with warning.

======================================================================
1167. PHASE 4 — PARAGRAPH MODEL
======================================================================

Internal:

- index;
- span;
- text checksum optional;
- source metadata;
- empty flag.

No need persist full model if structure file.

======================================================================
1168. PHASE 4 — SENTENCE MODEL
======================================================================

Internal:

- index;
- paragraph index;
- span;
- boundary type;
- text checksum optional.

======================================================================
1169. PHASE 4 — SENTENCE BOUNDARY TYPES
======================================================================

Possible:

- period;
- question;
- exclamation;
- ellipsis;
- paragraph_end;
- end_of_text;
- hard_fallback.

Useful debug.

======================================================================
1170. PHASE 4 — ABBREVIATION HANDLING
======================================================================

Keep small deterministic list.

Do not overfit.

Custom list optional settings future.

======================================================================
1171. PHASE 4 — URL/EMAIL HANDLING
======================================================================

Avoid splitting at dots inside obvious URL/email if simple safe rule.

Không cần full parser.

======================================================================
1172. PHASE 4 — NUMBERED LIST VS CHAPTER
======================================================================

Lines like:

1. Nội dung

should not become Chapter unless pattern/settings explicitly.

Avoid false positives.

======================================================================
1173. PHASE 4 — CHAPTER PATTERN ANCHOR
======================================================================

Built-in regex anchored line start/end with max title length.

No search anywhere in paragraph.

======================================================================
1174. PHASE 4 — CHAPTER PATTERN TIMEOUT
======================================================================

Python regex no native timeout in standard versions; keep safe simple patterns.

No user arbitrary complex regex by default.

======================================================================
1175. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Checksum of normalized checksum + detector version + rules + ordered spans.

No timestamp.

======================================================================
1176. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE VALIDATION
======================================================================

Check:

- spans sorted;
- no overlap invalid;
- in range;
- chapter coverage complete according policy;
- paragraph/sentence containment;
- no text loss at structure level.

======================================================================
1177. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

structure.json managed.

Plan references checksum/version.

======================================================================
1178. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION TEST MATRIX
======================================================================

In addition to earlier tests:

- no change idempotence;
- custom literal replacement;
- overlapping replacement;
- control removal source map;
- quote/ellipsis disabled;
- blank line preservation;
- report counts.

======================================================================
1179. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE TEST MATRIX
======================================================================

- DOCX metadata heading.
- Vietnamese Chương.
- Phần.
- Hồi.
- Chapter.
- Chinese heading optional.
- no chapter.
- duplicate titles.
- intro.
- outro.
- consecutive headings.
- false positive short line.
- decimals.
- abbreviations.
- quoted sentence.
- URL/email basic.

======================================================================
1180. PHASE 4 — EXIT REVIEW
======================================================================

- normalized file valid;
- structure valid;
- no semantic drop;
- deterministic;
- tests pass;
- no UI dependency.

======================================================================
1181. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER EFFECTIVE SETTINGS RESOLUTION
======================================================================

Before split, derive effective limits.

Store requested/effective.

Validation issues for clamps.

======================================================================
1182. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER HARD SAFETY MAX
======================================================================

App may define hard safety max to prevent huge Unit.

Do not choose arbitrary without source/Engine knowledge.

Central constant/settings.

======================================================================
1183. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER CHAPTER LOOP
======================================================================

Process chapters in order.

Never merge across chapters.

======================================================================
1184. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER TITLE POLICY
======================================================================

Implement chosen title handling consistently.

Test preserve true/false if false allowed.

Default preserve true.

======================================================================
1185. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER SPAN-FIRST
======================================================================

Prefer building Unit by normalized span range, preserving separators.

Avoid reconstruct by joining transformed sentence text.

======================================================================
1186. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER BUFFER STATE
======================================================================

Internal state:

- start;
- end;
- length;
- sentences;
- paragraphs;
- role;
- warnings.

Finalize deterministic.

======================================================================
1187. PHASE 5 — TARGET BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Target is soft.

Max is hard unless unavoidable long token/string with fallback.

Min soft except validation policy.

======================================================================
1188. PHASE 5 — PARAGRAPH PREFERENCE
======================================================================

If buffer near target at paragraph end, finalize.

Do not force paragraph split if under max.

======================================================================
1189. PHASE 5 — SENTENCE PREFERENCE
======================================================================

Never split sentence if complete sentence fits max.

======================================================================
1190. PHASE 5 — LONG SENTENCE SEARCH
======================================================================

Search punctuation nearest target within safe range.

Prefer before max.

If no safe boundary, whitespace.

Then hard.

======================================================================
1191. PHASE 5 — UNBROKEN TOKEN
======================================================================

Very long URL/string:

- hard split if necessary;
- warning;
- no infinite loop.

======================================================================
1192. PHASE 5 — UNIT FINALIZATION
======================================================================

On finalize:

- validate non-empty;
- compute spans;
- checksum;
- counts;
- split reason;
- warning;
- role;
- order.

======================================================================
1193. PHASE 5 — UNIT MERGE SHORT
======================================================================

Only adjacent same Chapter/compatible role.

Recompute spans/checksum/counts.

No duplicate.

======================================================================
1194. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER RECONSTRUCTION
======================================================================

Reconstruct using ordered spans/slices.

Compare canonical normalized content.

Record valid.

======================================================================
1195. PHASE 5 — WHITESPACE GAP
======================================================================

If Units exclude inter-unit whitespace, reconstruction policy must include gap mapping.

Prefer spans contiguous to avoid ambiguity.

======================================================================
1196. PHASE 5 — UNIT GLOBAL ORDER
======================================================================

Assign after all Chapters.

Stable.

======================================================================
1197. PHASE 5 — UNIT ID ASSIGNMENT
======================================================================

IDs can be random/stable factory.

Plan structural fingerprint excludes random IDs.

No content hash as sole ID.

======================================================================
1198. PHASE 5 — DOCUMENT/CHAPTER ID ASSIGNMENT
======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================
1199. PHASE 5 — SELECTION RESOLUTION STAGE
======================================================================

Resolve before final Unit objects if Unit stores snapshot.

Can share Session snapshot ID rather than duplicate full object.

Choose efficient design.

======================================================================
1200. PHASE 5 — SELECTION SNAPSHOT STORAGE
======================================================================

Prefer one immutable Session selection snapshot.

Unit stores selection_snapshot_id and effective per-Unit override if future.

Do not duplicate large snapshot per Unit.

======================================================================
1201. PHASE 5 — SETTINGS SNAPSHOT STORAGE
======================================================================

Same.

One Session settings snapshot.

Unit stores effective relevant values only if needed.

======================================================================
1202. PHASE 5 — OUTPUT PATH PLANNING
======================================================================

For each Unit:

- logical Artifact ID or planned record;
- expected relative path;
- format;
- required;
- collision result.

No file creation.

======================================================================
1203. PHASE 5 — PLAN VALIDATION PIPELINE
======================================================================

Ordered checks:

1. Entity IDs.
2. Ordering.
3. Spans.
4. Unit text/checksum.
5. Reconstruction.
6. Selection snapshot.
7. Settings.
8. Output paths.
9. Collision.
10. Reference requirements.
11. Engine capability planning.
12. Serialization.
13. Checksum.

======================================================================
1204. PHASE 5 — PLAN FREEZE TRANSACTION
======================================================================

Write draft graph.

Validate from disk, not only memory.

Compute checksum.

Set frozen/frozen_at.

Atomic write final Plan.

Update Session.

======================================================================
1205. PHASE 5 — PLAN READ-BACK TEST
======================================================================

After freeze:

- close repository;
- reopen;
- validate Plan;
- compare fingerprint.

======================================================================
1206. PHASE 5 — PLANNER SERVICE API
======================================================================

Possible methods:

- inspect_request(request_id)
- materialize_and_plan(request_id, operation_id)
- plan_session(session_id, operation_id)
- get_plan_summary(session_id)
- clone_session_as_request(session_id)

Follow source naming.

======================================================================
1207. PHASE 5 — PLANNER SYNC VS JOB
======================================================================

If using Job Queue:

- application service returns Job ID for large/background.

Core planner remains callable in tests.

No UI thread blocking.

======================================================================
1208. PHASE 5 — PLANNER FAILURE STAGES
======================================================================

Persist failure stage:

- source;
- normalization;
- structure;
- split;
- selection;
- output planning;
- validation;
- persistence.

Stable error code.

======================================================================
1209. PHASE 5 — PLANNER CLEANUP
======================================================================

Clean only operation temp known to planner.

Keep reports/source snapshot if useful.

No broad delete.

======================================================================
1210. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER TEST PROPERTY
======================================================================

For each fixture:

- concatenated/canonical Units == normalized source;
- each span exact;
- no overlap/gap unless documented;
- order stable;
- max respected;
- checksums stable.

======================================================================
1211. PHASE 5 — PLAN DETERMINISM TEST
======================================================================

Two independent Sessions:

- same structural fingerprint;
- same Unit checksum sequence;
- same chapter boundaries;
- same effective settings checksum.

======================================================================
1212. PHASE 5 — OUTPUT COLLISION TEST
======================================================================

Duplicate chapter titles and truncated names still unique.

======================================================================
1213. PHASE 5 — SELECTION SNAPSHOT TEST
======================================================================

Rename entities after planning; snapshot unchanged and IDs valid.

======================================================================
1214. PHASE 5 — ENGINE CAPABILITY TEST
======================================================================

Max text clamp/warning.

Unsupported output.

Required reference.

No runtime load.

======================================================================
1215. PHASE 5 — EXIT REVIEW
======================================================================

- Plan frozen.
- No-loss.
- Paths safe.
- Selection snapshot.
- No Jobs yet unless planning Job.
- No Audio.
- Tests pass.

======================================================================
1216. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT MANAGER PATH ROOTS
======================================================================

Managed output roots inside Session.

Published roots through Project export resolver.

No arbitrary external by default.

======================================================================
1217. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT NAMING CONTEXT
======================================================================

Build whitelist mapping from persisted snapshots/order.

No live display name changes.

======================================================================
1218. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT TEMPLATE VALIDATOR
======================================================================

Check:

- allowed placeholders;
- braces balanced;
- no attribute/index traversal;
- no separators from replacement unescaped;
- resulting component safe;
- extension controlled by format.

======================================================================
1219. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT PATH COLLISION RESOLVER
======================================================================

Policies:

fail

skip_if_valid

replace_invalid

versioned_copy

Return structured decision.

Do not mutate file during Plan.

======================================================================
1220. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT RESERVATION MODEL
======================================================================

If needed:

- reservation_id;
- artifact_id;
- attempt_id;
- final path;
- created_at;
- expires/recovery;
- status.

Could be embedded in Artifact metadata.

Avoid unnecessary model if simple.

======================================================================
1221. PHASE 6 — RESERVE OUTPUT
======================================================================

Checks:

- Attempt active;
- no other reservation;
- path safe;
- collision policy;
- directory writable;
- disk policy;
- create temp directory.

No final empty file.

======================================================================
1222. PHASE 6 — TEMP PATH
======================================================================

Generate from Attempt/Artifact IDs.

Never user-controlled full filename.

======================================================================
1223. PHASE 6 — ENGINE WRITE CONTRACT
======================================================================

Engine writes only provided temp path or returns created temp paths under allowed directory.

Output Manager verifies returned path.

Reject path outside root.

======================================================================
1224. PHASE 6 — BASIC TEMP VALIDATION
======================================================================

Before final move:

- exists;
- regular;
- inside temp root;
- size threshold;
- expected extension/container basic if available.

No Unit success.

======================================================================
1225. PHASE 6 — FINALIZE OUTPUT
======================================================================

Atomic move if possible.

If final exists, obey decision.

No overwrite valid silently.

======================================================================
1226. PHASE 6 — ARTIFACT REGISTER ORDER
======================================================================

A safe order could be:

- planned Artifact exists before execution;
- mark writing/reserved;
- finalize file;
- mark created;
- validate;
- mark valid/invalid.

No lost lineage.

======================================================================
1227. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT VALIDATION SERVICE API
======================================================================

Possible:

- validate_artifact(artifact_id, policy)
- validate_path_for_planned_artifact(...)
- revalidate_artifact(...)
- batch_validate_session(...)
- summarize(...)

No UI.

======================================================================
1228. PHASE 6 — BASIC VALIDATOR
======================================================================

Always available if filesystem works.

FFprobe optional.

======================================================================
1229. PHASE 6 — FULL VALIDATOR
======================================================================

Uses existing FFprobe service.

No direct subprocess duplication.

======================================================================
1230. PHASE 6 — VALIDATION REPORT CHECK IDS
======================================================================

Stable check codes:

- PATH_ALLOWED
- FILE_EXISTS
- FILE_REGULAR
- SIZE_MINIMUM
- EXTENSION_MATCH
- CHECKSUM_COMPUTED
- PROBE_AVAILABLE
- AUDIO_STREAM_PRESENT
- DURATION_POSITIVE
- CHANNELS_VALID
- SAMPLE_RATE_VALID
- CODEC_VALID
- LINEAGE_VALID

Follow project prefix if needed.

======================================================================
1231. PHASE 6 — VALIDATION STATUS
======================================================================

- valid
- invalid
- degraded
- unavailable
- error

Artifact valid only policy passes.

======================================================================
1232. PHASE 6 — INVALID OUTPUT HANDLING
======================================================================

- keep file;
- mark invalid;
- report;
- Attempt invalid_output;
- Unit failed/retryable;
- no final Session success.

======================================================================
1233. PHASE 6 — MISSING OUTPUT HANDLING
======================================================================

Artifact missing.

No fake repair.

======================================================================
1234. PHASE 6 — ARTIFACT SUPERSEDE
======================================================================

New valid retry Artifact can supersede old invalid/previous according policy.

Old metadata remains.

======================================================================
1235. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST SERVICE CREATE
======================================================================

After Plan freeze create draft.

No fake Attempt/output.

======================================================================
1236. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST UPDATE SOURCES
======================================================================

Read repositories.

Do not trust event payload alone.

======================================================================
1237. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST SUMMARY BUILDERS
======================================================================

Pure helpers:

- request summary;
- source summary;
- selection summary;
- plan summary;
- progress;
- failure;
- retry;
- output;
- Job/resource links.

======================================================================
1238. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Finalization transaction:

- build temp;
- validate;
- checksum;
- atomic replace;
- update Session manifest pointer/status after success;
- registry;
- event.

Careful order so Session not completed before manifest exists.

======================================================================
1239. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST REVISION
======================================================================

If draft updated, revision increments.

Final checksum.

Rebuild can create new revision.

======================================================================
1240. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST REBUILD
======================================================================

Explicit safe operation.

No Plan mutation.

======================================================================
1241. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT MANAGER TESTS
======================================================================

- path safety;
- templates;
- collisions;
- reservation;
- temp;
- finalize;

- supersede;
- orphan.

- extension mismatch.

======================================================================
1243. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST TESTS
======================================================================

- draft;
- update;
- finalize;
- checksum;
- rebuild;
