- write failure;
- no full text/log duplication.

======================================================================
1244. PHASE 6 — EXIT REVIEW
======================================================================

No production Audio fake.

Output foundation real.

Manifest draft real.

Tests temp only.

======================================================================
1245. PHASE 7 — RESUME INSPECTION QUERY
======================================================================

Inspection should not require production execution handler to classify state.

It can report execution blocker separately.

======================================================================
1246. PHASE 7 — RESUME CANDIDATE ORDER
======================================================================

Use Plan global order.

Stable.

======================================================================
1247. PHASE 7 — RESUME ACTIVE JOB CHECK
======================================================================

Query Job repository/service by Job ID and domain IDs.

Do not rely only Unit active_job_id.

======================================================================
1248. PHASE 7 — RESUME ARTIFACT CHECK
======================================================================

For Unit marked succeeded:

- verify Artifact metadata/health;
- optionally deep validation according inspection mode.

No rerun valid.

======================================================================
1249. PHASE 7 — RESUME REPORT
======================================================================

Persist summary and per-category IDs, not full Unit text.

======================================================================
1250. PHASE 7 — RESUME ACTION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Operation record or Job idempotency.

Repeated same operation returns existing.

======================================================================
1251. PHASE 7 — RESUME WITHOUT HANDLER
======================================================================

Inspection succeeds.

Execute returns blocker.

No Attempt/Job created if execution unavailable unless Attempt creation without Job is explicitly designed and recoverable; default avoid partial action.

======================================================================
1252. PHASE 7 — RETRY INSPECTION
======================================================================

Returns:

- eligible;
- latest Attempt;
- category;
- retryable;
- retries used/remaining;
- Artifact state;
- blockers.

No mutation.

======================================================================
1253. PHASE 7 — RETRY UNIT ACTION PRECHECK
======================================================================

Revalidate:

- Session state;
- Unit state;
- Plan;
- selection;
- handler;
- collision;
- active Job;
- retry limit.

======================================================================
1254. PHASE 7 — RETRY CHAPTER BATCH PRECHECK
======================================================================

Build full eligible set before mutation.

Report ineligible Units.

Policy decides partial accept.

Default safe can retry eligible only with summary/confirmation.

======================================================================
1255. PHASE 7 — RETRY ATTEMPT CREATION
======================================================================

New Attempt immutable identity.

Parent = latest Attempt.

Reason.

No reuse.

======================================================================
1256. PHASE 7 — RETRY OUTPUT DESTINATION
======================================================================

Uses logical path/collision policy.

No overwrite valid.

======================================================================
1257. PHASE 7 — RETRY JOB CREATION
======================================================================

Use Job Queue API.

Payload IDs.

Resource requirement.

Idempotency key.

======================================================================
1258. PHASE 7 — RETRY STATE UPDATE
======================================================================

Unit:

- queued or retry_wait depending Job.

Session:

- queued.

Registry/progress.

======================================================================
1259. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY CANDIDATE FILTER
======================================================================

Non-terminal Session or health recovery_required.

Do not deep scan completed healthy every startup.

======================================================================
1260. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY REPORT STAGES
======================================================================

- registry;
- session;
- plan;
- attempts;
- jobs;
- leases;
- outputs;
- manifest;
- classification;
- safe actions.

======================================================================
1261. PHASE 7 — SAFE RECONCILIATION
======================================================================

Safe:

- running Attempt with lost Job → interrupted;
- stale active job cache removal;
- progress recompute;
- registry rebuild;
- manifest draft rebuild;
- Artifact missing status;
- stale lease reference note.

Not safe:

- create output;
- change selection;
- replan;
- delete unknown file.

======================================================================
1262. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY STATE TRANSITION
======================================================================

Use state machine.

Persist transition reason/report ID.

======================================================================
1263. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY OPERATION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Repeated startup scan should not create duplicate reports/actions endlessly if unchanged.

Can group by state fingerprint/check time.

Not mandatory complex, but avoid duplicate mutation.

======================================================================
1264. PHASE 7 — PROGRESS REBUILD
======================================================================

Use Plan + Unit/Artifact truth.

Update Session/Registry.

======================================================================
1265. PHASE 7 — HEALTH REBUILD
======================================================================

Separate.

======================================================================
1266. PHASE 7 — RESUME TESTS
======================================================================

All scenarios in previous parts plus:

- inspection with stale registry;
- active Job;
- waiting resource;
- missing handler;
- selection invalid;
- operation duplicate.

======================================================================

======================================================================

- initial failure;

- limit;

- collision.

- no auto inference.

1269. PHASE 7 — EXIT REVIEW
======================================================================

Resume/Retry foundation real.

No handler fake.

Recovery conservative.

======================================================================
1270. PHASE 8 — GENERATE JOB TYPE CONSTANTS
======================================================================

Add only needed types.

At minimum:

- generate_prepare
- generate_finalize_session
- generate_rebuild_manifest

- generate_unit

Do not register unavailable concrete handler.

======================================================================
1271. PHASE 8 — JOB PAYLOAD MODELS
======================================================================

GeneratePrepareJobPayload

GenerateUnitJobPayload

GenerateFinalizeSessionJobPayload

GenerateManifestRebuildJobPayload

Versioned.

JSON-safe.

======================================================================
1272. PHASE 8 — PREPARE JOB HANDLER
======================================================================

Real handler can:

- load Request/Session;
- call Planner;
- update progress stages;
- handle cancellation;
- no GPU;
- no Engine inference.

======================================================================
1273. PHASE 8 — UNIT EXECUTION HANDLER INTERFACE
======================================================================

Define protocol/interface provider.

Production registration conditional.

Do not concrete fake.

======================================================================
1274. PHASE 8 — FINALIZATION JOB HANDLER
======================================================================

Can be real.

Checks all Unit terminal/required Artifacts.

No premature completion.

======================================================================
1275. PHASE 8 — MANIFEST REBUILD JOB HANDLER
======================================================================

Real optional for large Session.

No GPU.

======================================================================
1276. PHASE 8 — JOB HANDLER REGISTRY INTEGRATION
======================================================================

Register at AppContext startup/composition root.

No import side effects.

Execution handler only if actual provider.

======================================================================
1277. PHASE 8 — JOB PAYLOAD VALIDATION
======================================================================

Check IDs/version.

Load entities.

Reject mismatch Project/Session/Unit.

======================================================================
1278. PHASE 8 — JOB DOMAIN LOCK
======================================================================

Before mutation, short lock and reload.

Do not hold during long execution unless status-only.

======================================================================
1279. PHASE 8 — PREPARE JOB RESOURCE
======================================================================

CPU/RAM/disk.

No GPU default.

Estimate from source size.

======================================================================
1280. PHASE 8 — UNIT JOB RESOURCE
======================================================================

From Engine capability factory.

No hardcoded GPU.

======================================================================
1281. PHASE 8 — FINALIZE JOB RESOURCE
======================================================================

CPU/disk.

No GPU unless merge handler explicitly future.

======================================================================
1282. PHASE 8 — WAITING RESOURCE MAPPING
======================================================================

Job waiting_resource event/service updates Attempt/Unit/Session summary.

Avoid repeated writes each monitor tick.

======================================================================
1283. PHASE 8 — RESOURCE LEASE START
======================================================================

Execution only after lease granted.

Attempt resource_lease_id persisted near start.

======================================================================
1284. PHASE 8 — RESOURCE LEASE RELEASE
======================================================================

Job infrastructure owns release.

Generate records historical linkage.

No direct delete lease file.

======================================================================
1285. PHASE 8 — JOB CANCELLATION MAPPING
======================================================================

Prepare cancellation:

- Session cancelled/draft state per stage.

Unit cancellation:

- Attempt cancelled;
- Unit cancelled/pending according Session action.

Finalize cancellation:

- recovery_required if manifest incomplete.

======================================================================
1286. PHASE 8 — JOB FAILURE MAPPING
======================================================================

Classify Worker error.

Persist Attempt/Session.

No swallowed exceptions.

======================================================================
1287. PHASE 8 — JOB COMPLETION MAPPING
======================================================================

Prepare Job completed only means Plan persisted.

Unit Job completed only after handler + Artifact validation if production handler wrapper owns full flow.

Finalization completed only after manifest/status persist.

======================================================================
1288. PHASE 8 — ROOT JOB
======================================================================

Do not assume one root Job required.

If Job system supports dependency graph, Session can track root/finalizer.

No Session identity = Job ID.

======================================================================
1289. PHASE 8 — BATCH QUEUE STRATEGY
======================================================================

Audit Queue capacity.

Choose eager/batched.

Document.

Test no duplicate.

======================================================================
1290. PHASE 8 — QUEUE SESSION SERVICE
======================================================================

Possible service:

GenerateQueueService

Responsibilities:

- prevalidate;
- create Attempts/Jobs;
- dependency graph;
- idempotency;
- Session transition;
- no Engine call.

Could be method of ApplicationService if source prefers.

======================================================================
1291. PHASE 8 — QUEUE SESSION PREPARE
======================================================================

If Session only Request draft:

- queue may first create prepare Job;
- execution Jobs cannot exist until Plan frozen.

Simpler UI should require Plan before Queue.

Follow chosen UX.

======================================================================
1292. PHASE 8 — QUEUE PLANNED SESSION
======================================================================

Create first Attempts for pending Units.

Create Jobs only if production handler ready.

If not ready, no mutation or clear blocked result.

======================================================================
1293. PHASE 8 — JOB DEPENDENCY PER UNIT
======================================================================

If Unit independent, no sequential dependency required.

Finalizer depends on Unit/validation outcomes or coordinator.

If output merge/order requires future, graph extension possible.

======================================================================
1294. PHASE 8 — JOB GRAPH LARGE SCALE
======================================================================

If batched enqueue:

- coordinator uses Queue APIs;
- no own threads;
- cursor persisted;
- idempotent.

======================================================================
1295. PHASE 8 — RESOURCE WAITING SESSION STATUS
======================================================================

Do not switch Session waiting_resource if some Units actively running unless status computation policy chooses running with waiting count.

Primary status should reflect active work.

Could use:

- running + waiting_resource_units count.

Only waiting_resource when no running and work blocked by resource.

======================================================================
1296. PHASE 8 — RESOURCE UNSUPPORTED SESSION
======================================================================

Blocked.

No retry loop.

======================================================================
1297. PHASE 8 — JOB/RESOURCE TEST HANDLER
======================================================================

Test-only fake registered in fixture.

No production import.

======================================================================
1298. PHASE 8 — JOB TESTS
======================================================================

- prepare real;
- execution unavailable;
- test-only execution;
- payload version;
- dependency;
- idempotency;
- cancel;
- pause;
- recovery;
- Job completed invalid Artifact;
- finalizer conditions.

- planning CPU.
- GPU required.
- waiting.

- disk pressure.
- leases.

- no duplicate.
- Session propagation.

======================================================================

Job Queue remains sole scheduler.

Resource Manager remains sole resource authority.

No production fake.

- UI no business logic.

- API no direct filesystem.

1445. FINAL CAPABILITY EXPECTATION
======================================================================

Sau Sprint, capability có thể là:

Generate Planning:

READY

Generate Session Persistence:

READY

Generate Manifest:

READY

Generate Resume Inspection:

READY

Generate Retry Inspection:

READY

Generate Execution:

READY chỉ nếu production handler thật đã tồn tại và được tích hợp an toàn.

Nếu không:

UNAVAILABLE

Generate MP3:

Theo thực tế.

Output Validation:

READY hoặc DEGRADED tùy FFprobe.

Không ép trạng thái trước audit.

======================================================================
1446. FINAL USER DATA STATUS EXPECTATION
======================================================================

Nếu source/docs/tests pass nhưng real data xuất hiện trong git status:

SOURCE_DOCS_TESTS_READY
WORKTREE_NOT_CLEAN_DUE_TO_REAL_USER_DATA

- interface;
- registration;
- runtime;
- capability;
- resource;
- reference;

phần nào thiếu.

- extension interface;
- handler registration point;
- Job type;
- Resource requirement factory;
- Output Manager contract;
- tests cần real adapter.

Không triển khai next Sprint.

======================================================================
1449. CONSISTENCY WITH PART 01–03
======================================================================

PART 04 tiếp tục cùng Master Prompt.

Không thay đổi:

- Sprint ID.
- PHASE 0–12.
- Canonical entities.
- State meanings.
- No-fake rule.
- Source-first rule.
- Data-safety rule.
- Job/Resource ownership.
- Reference asset-ID requirement.
- Engine-neutral core.
- Plan immutability.
- Retry creates Attempt.
- Resume does not rerun valid Unit.
- Manifest rebuild.
- UI/API service parity.
- Git restrictions.

======================================================================
1450. CONTINUATION MARKER
======================================================================

Nếu còn PART tiếp theo:

- bắt đầu từ mục 1451;
- nối trực tiếp;
- không sửa mục cũ;
- không lặp Header nội dung như một Sprint mới;
- chỉ kết luận “ĐÃ HẾT TOÀN BỘ PROMPT” tại Part cuối thật sự.

===== KẾT THÚC PART 04 — CHƯA KẾT THÚC TOÀN BỘ PROMPT =====
# AI VOICE STUDIO
# MASTER IMPLEMENTATION PROMPT
# AVS-014.16 — GENERATE PIPELINE FOUNDATION
# PART 05

======================================================================
1451. DOMAIN EVENT RECORD
======================================================================

Nếu source hiện tại có event envelope chung, phải tái sử dụng.

Generate domain event tối thiểu cần:

- event_id;
- event_type;
- event_version;
- occurred_at;
- source;
- project_id;
- request_id optional;
- session_id optional;
- document_id optional;
- chapter_id optional;
- unit_id optional;
- attempt_id optional;
- artifact_id optional;
- job_id optional;
- operation_id optional;
- previous_status optional;
- current_status optional;
- reason_code optional;
- summary metadata JSON-safe.

Không đưa:

- toàn bộ source text;
- toàn bộ Unit text;
- binary Audio;
- traceback dài;
- secret;
- absolute path không cần thiết.

======================================================================
1452. EVENT IDENTITY
======================================================================

Mỗi event có event_id riêng nếu Event Bus hiện tại hỗ trợ.

Không dùng entity_id thay event_id.

Không yêu cầu Event Bus trở thành durable event store.

Entity repositories vẫn là nguồn sự thật.

======================================================================
1453. EVENT PUBLISH FAILURE
======================================================================

Nếu publish event thất bại sau persistence:

- không rollback dữ liệu đã ghi thành công;
- ghi warning/error;
- trả operation thành công kèm warning nếu business state đã hoàn tất;
- UI/API phải có thể reload state từ repository;
- không phát event giả lần hai không kiểm soát.

======================================================================
1454. EVENT SUBSCRIBER FAILURE
======================================================================

Một subscriber lỗi không được làm hỏng subscriber khác nếu Event Bus hiện có hỗ trợ isolation.

Generate service không được trực tiếp gọi widget.

======================================================================
1455. EVENT REFRESH STRATEGY
======================================================================

UI nhận event chỉ dùng để:

- xác định entity cần refresh;
- reload summary/detail;
- cập nhật badge/count;
- điều hướng nếu người dùng yêu cầu.

Không dùng event payload làm state đầy đủ lâu dài.

======================================================================
1456. GENERATE QUERY SERVICE RESPONSIBILITY
======================================================================

Nếu tạo GenerateQueryService, service này phải chỉ đọc.

Các method canonical có thể gồm:

- list_requests(...)
- get_request(...)
- list_sessions(...)
- get_session_summary(...)
- get_session_detail(...)
- get_source_summary(...)
- get_plan_summary(...)
- list_documents(...)
- list_chapters(...)
- list_units(...)
- get_unit_detail(...)
- list_attempts(...)
- get_attempt_detail(...)
- list_artifacts(...)
- get_manifest_summary(...)
- get_validation_reports(...)
- get_resume_inspection(...)
- get_retry_inspection(...)
- get_readiness(...)

Không mutate.

Không tạo Job.

Không transition trạng thái.

======================================================================
1457. QUERY SERVICE DATA JOIN
======================================================================

Query service có thể join:

- Registry summary;
- Session;
- Plan summary;
- latest validation;
- Job summary;
- Resource waiting summary;
- Artifact summary.

Không load dữ liệu sâu khi endpoint/UI chỉ cần list.

======================================================================
1458. QUERY SERVICE PAGINATION
======================================================================

Mọi query danh sách lớn phải hỗ trợ pagination theo pattern hiện tại.

Danh sách cần xem xét:

- Sessions;
- Chapters;
- Units;
- Attempts;
- Artifacts;
- Reports;
- Jobs liên quan.

Không hardcode trả tất cả.

======================================================================
1459. QUERY SERVICE SORTING
======================================================================

Sorting phải whitelist field.

Không nhận arbitrary property path từ API.

Session sort cho phép tối thiểu:

- updated_at;
- created_at;
- display_name;
- status;
- progress_percent.

Unit sort mặc định:

- global_order.

Attempt sort:

- attempt_number.

======================================================================
1460. QUERY SERVICE SEARCH
======================================================================

Search Session có thể dùng:

- display_name;
- source display name;
- Voice display snapshot;
- session_id exact/prefix.

Không search toàn bộ source text.

Không đọc Manifest lớn cho từng row.

======================================================================

- latest_error_message optional;

- primary_output_status.

Read model không persist.

======================================================================
1468. APPLICATION SERVICE RESPONSIBILITY
======================================================================

GenerateApplicationService hoặc orchestration service tương đương phải là entry point chung cho UI/API.

Các action có thể gồm:

- create_request;
- update_request;
- validate_request;
- materialize_request;
- plan_session;
- queue_session;
- pause_session;
- cancel_session;
- inspect_resume;
- resume_session;
- inspect_retry_unit;
- retry_unit;
- inspect_retry_chapter;
- retry_chapter;
- revalidate_session;
- rebuild_manifest;
- archive_session;
- restore_session;
- clone_session_as_request.

Không bắt buộc đúng một class nếu source chia command services.

Nhưng UI/API không được tự phối hợp nhiều repository trực tiếp.

======================================================================
1469. APPLICATION OPERATION RESULT
======================================================================

Mọi mutation quan trọng nên trả operation result có cấu trúc:

- operation_id;
- success;
- accepted;
- entity_id;
- status;
- created_ids;
- existing_ids;
- validation;
- readiness;
- blockers;
- warnings;
- error_code;
- error_message;
- job_ids;
- report_ids;
- idempotent_replay.

Theo result model hiện có nếu project đã có.

======================================================================
1470. OPERATION ID
======================================================================

Operation ID khác:

- Request ID;
- Session ID;
- Job ID;
- Attempt ID.

Dùng để:

- idempotency;
- audit;
- recovery;
- correlation.

Không bắt buộc mọi read operation có operation ID.

======================================================================
1471. OPERATION RECORD PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Các mutation nhiều bước nên persist operation record hoặc tận dụng Job/idempotency infrastructure.

Operation record tối thiểu:

- operation_id;
- operation_type;
- project_id;
- entity_id;
- status;
- started_at;
- updated_at;
- completed_at;
- stage;
- created_entity_ids;
- created_job_ids;
- error_code;
- result summary.

Không xây workflow engine mới.

======================================================================
1472. OPERATION STATES
======================================================================

Có thể dùng:

- created;
- running;
- completed;
- failed;
- cancelled;
- recovery_required.

Không trộn với Session states.

======================================================================
1473. IDEMPOTENT REPLAY RESPONSE
======================================================================

Khi nhận operation_id đã hoàn tất:

- không chạy lại;
- load result cũ;
- trả idempotent_replay=true;
- xác minh entity vẫn tồn tại;
- nếu result record corrupt, báo recovery thay vì tạo duplicate.

======================================================================
1474. IDEMPOTENCY SCOPE
======================================================================

Idempotency key phải scoped theo:

- project;
- operation type;
- entity;
- client key.

Không để key của Project A chặn Project B.

======================================================================
1475. REQUEST CREATE IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Create Request cùng operation key:

- trả Request đã tạo;
- không tạo Request mới.

Nếu payload khác với operation key cũ:

- conflict;
- không âm thầm trả entity cũ mà bỏ qua khác biệt.

Có thể lưu request payload fingerprint.

======================================================================
1476. MATERIALIZE IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Một Request chỉ materialize một Session mặc định.

Nếu Request đã materialized:

- trả existing Session;
- không tạo Session thứ hai.

Muốn tạo phiên mới:

- clone Request;
- hoặc explicit duplicate operation.

======================================================================
1477. QUEUE IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Queue một Session đã có active Jobs:

- trả active Job IDs;
- không queue duplicate.

Nếu Session status đã chạy/queued:

- action idempotent hoặc conflict theo convention.

======================================================================
1478. RETRY IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Retry operation key gắn Unit/Chapter và expected latest Attempt.

Nếu latest Attempt đã thay đổi:

- stale conflict;
- không tạo thêm.

======================================================================
1479. RESUME IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Resume operation phải snapshot inspection fingerprint.

Nếu state đã thay đổi đáng kể:

- re-inspect;
- không dùng stale selected set.

======================================================================
1480. SESSION LOCK SCOPE
======================================================================

Mutation Session phải lock ngắn quanh:

- state validation;
- entity creation;
- pointer/count update;
- persistence.

Không giữ lock trong:

- source extraction dài;
- normalization dài;
- Engine execution;
- FFprobe dài;
- package copy lớn.

Dùng operation state/checkpoint để phối hợp.

======================================================================
1481. UNIT LOCK SCOPE
======================================================================

Retry/Attempt creation cần Unit hoặc Session keyed lock.

Không để hai Job handler cùng chạy một Unit trừ explicit regeneration feature ngoài scope.

======================================================================
1482. OUTPUT RESERVATION CONCURRENCY
======================================================================

Hai Attempt không được reserve cùng logical output nếu policy không cho.

Reservation service phải atomic trong process/repository.

======================================================================
1483. SESSION MUTATION REVISION
======================================================================

Nếu Session revision tồn tại:

- mọi update expected revision;
- computation dài phải reload trước final write;
- stale operation không overwrite progress/status mới.

======================================================================
1484. LONG OPERATION FINAL CHECK
======================================================================

Sau normalization/planning dài:

- reload Session;
- kiểm tra cancellation;
- kiểm tra status;
- kiểm tra operation ownership;
- mới finalize.

Không ghi Plan nếu Session đã cancelled trong lúc xử lý.

======================================================================
1485. CANCELLATION OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Session cancel action phải ghi cancellation request persistent.

Long operation định kỳ đọc cancellation token/state.

Không chỉ dựa biến RAM.

======================================================================
1486. PAUSE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Pause request persistent.

Queue dispatcher đọc.

Unit worker cooperative theo capability.

Không giả process đã pause nếu chưa.

======================================================================
1487. SESSION ACTION PERMISSION MATRIX
======================================================================

Phải centralize xác định action allowed.

Action:

- edit_request;
- validate_request;
- materialize;
- plan;
- queue;
- pause;
- resume;
- cancel;
- retry;
- revalidate;
- rebuild_manifest;
- archive;
- restore;
- clone.

Input:

- Request status;
- Session status;
- health;
- Project status;
- readiness;
- active operation;
- active Job.

Không hardcode khác nhau giữa UI/API.

======================================================================
1488. ACTION AVAILABILITY RESULT
======================================================================

Mỗi action availability có:

- allowed;
- reason_code;
- message;
- blockers;
- warnings.

UI dùng tooltip.

API dùng conflict/validation response.

======================================================================
1489. ACTION MATRIX TEST
======================================================================

Parameterized tests cho các trạng thái chính.

Đảm bảo UI/API parity.

======================================================================
1490. PROJECT WRITABILITY
======================================================================

Planning/mutation yêu cầu Project writable.

Read-only history vẫn query được.

Nếu Project root read-only:

- readiness planning blocked;
- list/history vẫn hoạt động;
- không thử chmod.

======================================================================
1491. PROJECT ARCHIVED ACTIONS
======================================================================

Project archived:

- read history;
- export/backup theo Project policy;
- không create Request;
- không queue;
- không retry/resume;
- restore Project trước.

======================================================================
1492. SESSION ARCHIVED ACTIONS
======================================================================

Session archived:

- read;
- restore;
- export/history;
- không queue/resume/retry;
- không mutate frozen snapshots.

======================================================================
1493. REQUEST ARCHIVED ACTIONS
======================================================================

Request archived:

- read;
- clone optional;
- không materialize trực tiếp.

======================================================================
1494. PREVIEW SESSION REGISTRY
======================================================================

Preview Session phải có:

- preview=true;
- parent_session_id optional;
- parent_unit_id optional;
- registry filter;
- output root riêng;
- display name rõ.

Không tính Preview vào batch Session progress.

======================================================================
1495. PREVIEW SOURCE SPAN
======================================================================

Nếu Preview từ Unit/Chapter:

- tham chiếu source_snapshot_id;
- normalized span;
- text checksum;
- copy managed preview text nếu Session riêng cần độc lập;
- không phụ thuộc widget selection sau đó.

======================================================================
1496. PREVIEW MAX LENGTH
======================================================================

Preview Plan giới hạn bằng setting tập trung.

Không hardcode ở UI khác service.

Nếu selection vượt:

- truncate chỉ khi user được báo và checksum/spans đúng;
- hoặc validation yêu cầu chọn ngắn hơn.

Không truncate âm thầm.

======================================================================
1497. PREVIEW OUTPUT COLLISION
======================================================================

Preview Artifact path luôn tách khỏi production Session outputs.

Không overwrite bản chính.

======================================================================
1498. PREVIEW EXPIRATION
======================================================================

Metadata:

- expires_at optional;
- cleanup_eligible;
- pinned.

Không bắt buộc auto cleanup.

Không xóa khi chưa có safe cleanup.

======================================================================
1499. SOURCE STRUCTURE VERSION COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Plan phải lưu structure_version.

Nếu Resume chỉ dùng frozen Units, không cần rerun detector.

Nếu structure.json version mới hơn app:

- lịch sử đọc summary nếu có;
- không replan;
- execution có thể vẫn dùng Units nếu Plan compatible;
- validation rõ.

======================================================================
1500. SPLITTER VERSION COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Frozen Unit text là execution input.

Resume không cần latest splitter.

Không block Resume chỉ vì app có splitter version mới, miễn Plan/Unit schema đọc được và references hợp lệ.

======================================================================
1501. ENGINE VERSION COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Khác Engine/adapter version có thể ảnh hưởng output.

Readiness/Resume inspection phải báo.

Policy có thể:

- allow_with_warning;
- require_confirmation;
- block_new_session.

Default an toàn theo source.

Không tự thay engine_id.

======================================================================
1502. MODEL REFERENCE VERSION
======================================================================

Nếu Voice chứa model checkpoint/reference:

- snapshot identifier/fingerprint;
- không copy model binary;
- execution revalidate existence;
- no model load during planning.

======================================================================
1503. SPEAKER REFERENCE SEGMENT
======================================================================

Nếu selected_segment_id được dùng:

- segment metadata tồn tại;
- start/end hợp lệ;
- source asset checksum;
- managed normalized segment path nếu Reference system có;
- execution resolve qua Reference service.

Không tự cắt Audio trong Generate Pipeline nếu Reference system đã quản lý.

======================================================================
1504. SPEAKER REFERENCE TEXT
======================================================================

Nếu Engine yêu cầu prompt text:

- text_asset_id hoặc selected text;
- checksum;
- encoding;
- validation;
- không dùng external path.

Không log toàn bộ reference text.

======================================================================
1505. STYLE PROFILE SOURCE SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Selection snapshot chỉ cần asset IDs/checksums và effective settings.

Không copy toàn Style Vault data vào Session.

======================================================================
1506. VOICE VARIANT COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Variant phải thuộc đúng Voice.

Nếu legacy Variant không có immutable ID:

- migration tạo ID;
- giữ legacy name;
- không dùng list index.

======================================================================
1507. VOICE MODEL AVAILABILITY
======================================================================

Planning có thể lưu Voice snapshot dù model file chưa sẵn sàng nếu mục tiêu Plan-only.

Execution validation phải block.

UI phải phân biệt:

- cấu hình giọng tồn tại;
- runtime/model sẵn sàng.

======================================================================
1508. ENGINE READINESS LAYERS
======================================================================

Engine readiness có thể gồm:

- registered;
- configured;
- runtime_available;
- model_available;
- capability_supported;
- resource_supported;
- reference_valid;
- output_format_supported.

Không gộp thành message duy nhất.

======================================================================
1509. ENGINE READINESS FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Có thể lưu fingerprint của readiness prerequisites trong validation report.

Không coi readiness cache vĩnh viễn.

======================================================================
1510. RESOURCE DECISION SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Session/Attempt chỉ lưu summary:

- decision_id nếu có;
- state;
- reason;
- requirement;
- checked_at;
- hardware profile ID/version;
- policy version.

Không nhúng toàn HardwareProfile lặp lại trong mỗi Unit nếu lớn.

======================================================================
1511. RESOURCE REQUIREMENT ESTIMATION VERSION
======================================================================

ResourceRequirement factory có version/factory_version nếu estimate thay đổi.

Attempt snapshot.

======================================================================
1512. RESOURCE REQUIREMENT OVERRIDE SAFETY
======================================================================

User/API không được hạ minimum safety requirement của Engine tùy ý.

Override có thể tăng preference/priority trong giới hạn policy.

ResourcePolicyService quyết định effective.

======================================================================
1513. CPU-ONLY ENGINE
======================================================================

Nếu Engine hỗ trợ CPU:

- requirement có thể CPU;
- không buộc GPU;
- readiness dựa capability;
- performance warning optional.

Không hardcode mọi Generate cần GPU.

======================================================================
1514. MULTI-GPU FUTURE
======================================================================

Core lưu device preference/lease ID, không hardcode GPU 0.

Không triển khai multi-GPU scheduler mới.

Resource Manager sở hữu.

======================================================================
1515. DISK SPACE PRECHECK
======================================================================

Trước Plan freeze:

- kiểm tra path/collision;
- estimate.

Trước execution:

- Resource Manager kiểm tra actual reserve.

Trước finalize:

- handle disk write failure.

Không dựa estimate duy nhất.

======================================================================
1516. DISK PRESSURE TRANSITION
======================================================================

Nếu disk pressure critical khi queued:

- waiting_resource hoặc blocked theo Resource Decision;
- không fail retry count.

Nếu disk đầy trong write:

- execution failure disk_space;
- Attempt fail;
- temp handling;
- retryable sau user action.

======================================================================
1517. MEMORY PRESSURE DURING PLANNING
======================================================================

Nếu process gặp MemoryError:

- classify resource/persistence;
- Session failed/recovery_required;
- no partial Plan freeze;
- raw Snapshot giữ;
- report.

Không catch rồi tiếp tục với truncated text.

======================================================================
1518. ENGINE OUT-OF-MEMORY
======================================================================

Map stable code:

GENERATE_ENGINE_OUT_OF_MEMORY

Retryable tùy policy.

Không tự giảm settings/chunk hoặc đổi device âm thầm.

User có thể tạo Session mới với chunk khác.

======================================================================
1519. ENGINE TIMEOUT
======================================================================

Map:

GENERATE_ENGINE_TIMEOUT

Attempt failed/interrupted theo worker semantics.

Temp output không valid tự động.

======================================================================
1520. ENGINE PROCESS CRASH
======================================================================

Map:

GENERATE_ENGINE_PROCESS_CRASHED

Capture bounded diagnostics/log reference.

No raw full stderr in UI.

======================================================================
1521. ENGINE CANCELLED
======================================================================

Phân biệt user cancellation với runtime failure.

Attempt cancelled.

Không tăng retry count nếu policy.

======================================================================
1522. ENGINE INVALID RESPONSE
======================================================================

Nếu handler trả path ngoài temp root hoặc metadata sai:

- security/output error;
- Attempt failed non-retryable hoặc provider bug;
- no finalize.

======================================================================
1523. ENGINE MULTIPLE OUTPUTS
======================================================================

Handler có thể trả nhiều temp outputs trong future.

Output contract phải map logical roles.

Không chỉ tuple path.

Sprint không bắt buộc production multiple outputs.

======================================================================
1524. ENGINE PROGRESS
======================================================================

Progress reporter:

- stage;
- percent optional;
- message;
- metrics bounded.

Không persist mỗi token.

Throttle through Job system.

======================================================================
1525. ENGINE LOGGING
======================================================================

Handler uses provided logger context.

Không print trực tiếp nếu source logging standard.

======================================================================
1526. ENGINE TEMP OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Engine chỉ sở hữu viết file temp.

Output Manager sở hữu finalization/Artifact.

Engine không update Session status.

======================================================================
1527. ENGINE REFERENCE RESOLUTION
======================================================================

Handler nhận resolved runtime path từ resolver context.

Không tự đọc SpeakerReference legacy path.

======================================================================
1528. ENGINE OPTIONS VALIDATION
======================================================================

Capability/provider validates namespaced options before Job queue.

Không để lỗi option chỉ phát hiện sau model load nếu có thể.

======================================================================
1529. ENGINE SECRET HANDLING
======================================================================

Nếu future remote Engine có secret:

- secret reference từ config;
- không snapshot secret;
- không log;
- không Manifest.

Core model chỉ lưu provider/config fingerprint non-secret.

======================================================================
1530. OUTPUT FILE PROVENANCE
======================================================================

Artifact provenance:

- Session;
- Unit;
- Attempt;
- Engine;
- selection checksum;
- input text checksum;
- output validation;
- created/finalized timestamps.

Đủ để audit.

======================================================================
1531. OUTPUT MIME TYPE
======================================================================

Có thể lưu mime_type:

- audio/wav;
- audio/mpeg.

Không dùng mime_type thay format enum.

======================================================================
1532. OUTPUT EXTENSION POLICY
======================================================================

Extension do format/capability, không nhận tùy ý từ naming template.

Template không được đổi extension thành executable.

======================================================================
1533. OUTPUT FILE MODE
======================================================================

Không cần chmod đặc biệt.

Dùng mặc định hệ thống.

Không làm file executable.

======================================================================
1534. OUTPUT SIDECAR JSON SAFETY
======================================================================

Sidecar JSON:

- schema_version;
- UTF-8;
- no secrets;
- relative IDs;
- atomic write.

Không bắt buộc tạo nếu OutputSpec false.

======================================================================
1535. OUTPUT TEXT SIDECAR
======================================================================

Text sidecar giữ exact Unit execution text hoặc Chapter text theo role.

Không chứa source toàn sách cho mỗi Unit nếu không cần.

======================================================================
1536. OUTPUT CHAPTER INDEX
======================================================================

Nếu Chapter có nhiều Artifacts:

- Plan/Manifest giữ order;
- không dựa filename listing.

======================================================================
1537. OUTPUT SESSION INDEX
======================================================================

Manifest là index tổng.

Không cần scan folder để biết outputs.

======================================================================
1538. OUTPUT PUBLISH RECORD
======================================================================

Nếu publish:

- publish_id;
- artifact_id;
- destination policy;
- relative/external destination metadata;
- checksum;
- published_at;
- status;
- error.

Không bắt buộc public model nếu feature minimal.

======================================================================
1539. EXTERNAL OUTPUT POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu existing UI cho chọn ngoài Project:

- Output manager xác minh destination;
- Session vẫn có managed metadata;
- backup/package ghi external;
- deletion không quản lý tự động;
- API không expose absolute path mặc định.

======================================================================
1540. EXTERNAL OUTPUT MISSING
======================================================================

Health degraded.

Không coi Project data corrupt nếu intentional external output đã bị user di chuyển, nhưng Session output unavailable.

======================================================================
1541. OUTPUT OPEN ACTION
======================================================================

Chỉ Artifact valid/exists.

Use platform helper.

No arbitrary command.

======================================================================
1542. OUTPUT PLAY ACTION
======================================================================

Nếu player hiện có:

- chỉ valid supported Audio;
- no auto play;
- handle missing.

Không xây media subsystem mới.

======================================================================
1543. OUTPUT EXPORT ACTION
======================================================================

Nếu Project export service supports:

- export Artifact via service;
- no direct widget copy;
- collision policy.

Không bắt buộc ngoài scope.

======================================================================
1544. OUTPUT REVALIDATION
======================================================================

Revalidate:

- tạo report mới;
- update latest validation pointer/status;
- không đổi provenance;
- health/progress recompute nếu validity thay đổi.

======================================================================
1545. OUTPUT VALIDITY REVOCATION
======================================================================

Artifact từng valid nhưng file changed/missing:

- current validation invalid/missing;
- previous validation report giữ;
- Unit current completion health thay đổi;
- business history tách health.

======================================================================
1546. SESSION CURRENT COMPLETION
======================================================================

Nếu required Artifact mất sau completed:

- không âm thầm giữ progress 100 healthy;
- summary health degraded;
- valid_units current có thể giảm trong health computation;
- lifecycle completed history vẫn giữ theo policy.

UI giải thích.

======================================================================
1547. MANIFEST HISTORICAL VS CURRENT
======================================================================

Finalized manifest là lịch sử tại thời điểm finalization.

Current health report có thể mới hơn.

Không chỉnh sửa lịch sử mù quáng.

Có thể rebuild new manifest revision nếu product policy.

======================================================================
1548. MANIFEST REVISION LINEAGE
======================================================================

Nếu cho rebuild revision:

- previous_manifest_id/checksum;
- revision number;
- reason;
- created_at;
- finalized;
- Session latest_manifest_id.

Không xóa manifest cũ.

======================================================================
1549. MANIFEST DRAFT RECOVERY
======================================================================

Nếu draft corrupt/missing:

- rebuild từ repositories;
- report;
- no Plan mutation.

======================================================================
1550. MANIFEST FINALIZATION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Gọi finalize lại cùng consistent state:

- trả existing finalized manifest;
- không tạo duplicate revision nếu không cần.

Nếu state khác:

- validation/conflict hoặc explicit rebuild revision.

======================================================================
1551. SESSION FINALIZATION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Finalizer chạy lại sau timeout:

- reload Session/Manifest;
- nếu completed/finalized đúng, return existing;
- không duplicate event/Artifact;
- repair registry nếu stale.

======================================================================
1552. CHAPTER FINALIZATION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Same.

No duplicate Chapter Artifact planning.

======================================================================
1553. UNIT SUCCESS IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Mark Unit succeeded chỉ khi:

- same Attempt;
- Artifact valid;
- Unit not already succeeded by another Attempt.

Nếu already succeeded same Artifact:

- no-op idempotent.

Nếu different active Attempt:

- conflict/recovery.

======================================================================
1554. ATTEMPT STATUS IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Terminal Attempt cannot transition to another terminal arbitrarily.

Invalid_output khác succeeded.

No succeeded → failed direct.

Health of Artifact later does not rewrite historical Attempt execution result nếu design separates execution and validation; nhưng PART trước yêu cầu Attempt succeeded chỉ khi output validation. Giữ đúng:

- Attempt chỉ succeeded sau validation;
- nếu Artifact sau này mất, Attempt history vẫn succeeded tại thời điểm đó;
- current Artifact health degraded riêng.

======================================================================
1555. ATTEMPT SUCCEEDED TIMESTAMP
======================================================================

finished_at set once.

Do not update on later health revalidation.

======================================================================
1556. UNIT COMPLETED TIMESTAMP
======================================================================

completed_at set when first valid success.

Nếu later Artifact missing, không xóa lịch sử; current health separate.

Retry/regenerate future can add latest valid Artifact.

======================================================================
1557. RETRY AFTER HISTORICAL SUCCESS OUTPUT MISSING
======================================================================

Nếu Unit lifecycle succeeded nhưng current required Artifact missing:

- retry inspection may allow regenerate_missing_output;
- create new Attempt;
- preserve historical completed_at/previous Artifact;
- Unit current status policy may become recovery_required/failed health until new output.

Không giả regular Retry error nếu business semantics khác; document.

======================================================================
1558. REGENERATE OPERATION BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Sprint chỉ bắt buộc Retry failed/invalid.

Regenerate valid/missing historical output có thể ngoài scope.

Không thêm nếu chưa cần.

Nhưng model không chặn future.

======================================================================
1559. RETRY REASON CATALOG
======================================================================

Retry reason stable examples:

- execution_failed;
- output_invalid;
- interrupted;
- user_requested_retry;
- recovery_retry;
- resource_recovered.

Không dùng free text duy nhất.

User note optional.

======================================================================
1560. RESUME REASON CATALOG
======================================================================

- user_resume;
- startup_recovery_resume;
- resource_available;
- paused_session_resume.

Không tự auto resume default.

======================================================================
1561. CANCEL REASON CATALOG
======================================================================

- user_cancelled;
- project_archived;
- shutdown_policy;
- validation_blocker;
- dependency_cancelled.

Project archive không nên tự cancel mặc định nếu policy block archive.

======================================================================
1562. PAUSE REASON CATALOG
======================================================================

- user_paused;
- resource_policy_pause;
- shutdown_checkpoint;
- maintenance.

Không dùng resource waiting như pause nếu Job state đã waiting_resource.

======================================================================
1563. BLOCKED REASON CATALOG
======================================================================

- source_invalid;
- reference_invalid;
- engine_unavailable;
- engine_unsupported;
- project_read_only;
- resource_unsupported;
- output_policy_invalid;
- migration_required;
- recovery_required;
- future_schema.

======================================================================
1564. RECOVERY ISSUE CATALOG
======================================================================

- stale_registry;
- missing_session;
- missing_plan;
- corrupt_plan;
- missing_unit;
- lost_job;
- stale_lease;
- temp_output;
- orphan_output;
- artifact_missing;
- manifest_missing;
- manifest_stale;
- checksum_mismatch.

Stable codes.

======================================================================
1565. VALIDATION REPORT AGGREGATION
======================================================================

Session detail cần aggregate issues từ:

- Request validation;
- Source;
- Selection;
- Plan;
- Execution readiness;
- Output;
- Consistency.

Không duplicate cùng issue quá nhiều.

Có thể dedupe display bằng code/entity, nhưng giữ reports gốc.

======================================================================
1566. ERROR SUMMARY AGGREGATION
======================================================================

Batch failure summary:

- error_code;
- count;
- retryable_count;
- affected_unit_ids bounded/list paginated;
- latest_time;
- suggested_action.

Không nhúng thousands IDs trong Session summary.

Có thể report file/query.

======================================================================
1567. FAILURE GROUP PAGINATION
======================================================================

Query Units by error code/status.

Không cần lưu full group in Session.

======================================================================
1568. SESSION TAG FILTER
======================================================================

Optional.

Không ưu tiên hơn core.

======================================================================
1569. SESSION SEARCH NORMALIZATION
======================================================================

Search display names case-insensitive theo locale/basic.

Không ảnh hưởng identity.

======================================================================
1570. SOURCE TEXT PREVIEW
======================================================================

UI/API preview phải bounded length.

Không load full novel by default.

Include:

- start offset;
- end offset;
- truncated;
- checksum.

======================================================================
1571. UNIT TEXT PRIVACY
======================================================================

Local app có thể xem, nhưng logs/API list không trả mặc định.

No remote telemetry.

======================================================================
1572. API MANIFEST DOWNLOAD
======================================================================

Nếu Local API có file download framework, có thể cho manifest; không bắt buộc.

Không tạo binary Audio streaming trong Sprint.

======================================================================
1573. API ARTIFACT DOWNLOAD
======================================================================

Ngoài scope nếu chưa có secure file endpoint.

Không tự thêm.

======================================================================
1574. API PATH IDENTIFIER
======================================================================

Trả artifact_id, không absolute path.

Desktop UI resolve internal.

======================================================================
1575. API SOURCE FILE IMPORT
======================================================================

Nếu API client chạy cùng máy và path input được hỗ trợ:

- source_path accepted only controlled;
- materialize immediately;
- response no path.

Nếu web-exposed API future, local path không phù hợp; docs nói Local API.

======================================================================
1576. API PASTED TEXT REDACTION
======================================================================

Không echo toàn pasted text trong response/error/log.

Return character count/checksum.

======================================================================
1577. API REQUEST GET
======================================================================

Có thể omit pasted_text after materialization hoặc require include_source flag authorized/local.

Theo privacy/performance.

======================================================================
1578. API UNIT TEXT GET
======================================================================

Dedicated detail endpoint, not Session list.

======================================================================
1579. API VALIDATION ISSUE FORMAT
======================================================================

Mỗi issue:

- code;
- severity;
- field;
- message;
- related_id;
- suggested_action;
- retryable.

Developer detail có thể chỉ debug mode/local.

======================================================================
1580. API READINESS ENGINE FILTER
======================================================================

Có thể nhận engine_id/voice_id/reference_id để trả readiness cụ thể.

Không chỉ global.

======================================================================
1581. API ACTION STALE REVISION
======================================================================

Có thể nhận expected_revision.

Nếu stale:

- 409/conflict;
- return current revision/status;
- no mutation.

Theo API convention.

======================================================================
1582. API RATE/CONCURRENCY
======================================================================

Không cần rate limiter mới.

Idempotency/locks đủ cho Local API.

Không scope creep.

======================================================================
1583. UI DRAFT FORM VALIDATION TIMING
======================================================================

Basic validation on change/debounce.

Deep validation on button.

Không checksum file lớn mỗi keystroke.

======================================================================
1584. UI SOURCE FILE CHANGE DETECTION
======================================================================

Trước materialize có thể show file changed based size/mtime/checksum on validate.

Sau materialize Session unaffected.

======================================================================
1585. UI PROJECT READ-ONLY BANNER
======================================================================

Show:

“Dự án hiện chỉ đọc. Bạn có thể xem lịch sử nhưng không thể tạo phiên mới.”

======================================================================
1586. UI FUTURE SCHEMA BANNER
======================================================================

Show:

“Phiên này được tạo bởi phiên bản mới hơn và chỉ có thể xem.”

Không overwrite.

======================================================================
1587. UI RECOVERY BANNER
======================================================================

Show report summary and “Kiểm tra khôi phục”.

No auto Resume.

======================================================================
1588. UI BLOCKED BANNER
======================================================================

Primary blocker plus count.

Link actions.

======================================================================
1589. UI HEALTH BANNER
======================================================================

Separate from status.

Example:

“Phiên đã hoàn thành nhưng thiếu 2 tệp đầu ra.”

======================================================================
1590. UI VALIDATION GROUP COLLAPSE
======================================================================

Có thể dùng collapsible sections/shared widgets.

Không bắt buộc custom widget nếu existing.

======================================================================
1591. UI PLAN WARNING COUNT
======================================================================

Show:

- Unit dưới min;
- hard split;
- chapter title fallback;
- unsupported optional parameter;
- filename truncated.

No hidden warnings.

======================================================================
1592. UI PLAN RECONSTRUCTION STATUS
======================================================================

Show “Kiểm tra toàn vẹn văn bản: Đạt” hoặc error.

Không queue invalid Plan.

======================================================================
1593. UI PLAN FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Developer/detail optional.

Không cần user main view.

======================================================================
1594. UI SELECTION SNAPSHOT DISPLAY
======================================================================

Session history displays snapshot names/IDs, không current combo values.

Nếu current entity renamed, có thể show:

“Thu Minh (tên lúc tạo)”

và current name optional.

Không làm confusion.

======================================================================
1595. UI MISSING ENTITY DISPLAY
======================================================================

Show snapshot display name + “Không còn tồn tại”.

No fallback selection.

======================================================================
1596. UI REFERENCE CHECKSUM MISMATCH
======================================================================

Show blocker and repair/revalidate action.

Không tự cập nhật checksum.

======================================================================
1597. UI ENGINE VERSION CHANGE
======================================================================

Show warning before Resume if policy.

======================================================================
1598. UI OUTPUT COLLISION PREVIEW
======================================================================

Plan summary can show collision decisions:

- mới;
- bỏ qua tệp hợp lệ;
- thay tệp không hợp lệ;
- tạo bản đánh số;
- xung đột chưa giải quyết.

======================================================================
1599. UI OVERWRITE POLICY WARNING
======================================================================

replace_invalid only, không “Ghi đè tất cả” mặc định.

Nếu legacy option ghi đè tồn tại, map safely and warn.

======================================================================
1600. UI DIRECTORY POLICY
======================================================================

Use dropdown:

- Lưu trong phiên;
- Xuất ra thư mục dự án;
- Tùy chọn tương thích nếu existing.

Không text field arbitrary path unless legacy.

======================================================================
1601. UI NAMING TEMPLATE
======================================================================

Show supported placeholders.

Validate.

Preview sample.

No Python formatting expressions.

======================================================================
1602. UI CHAPTER TITLE SANITIZED PREVIEW
======================================================================

Display planned filename, not modify chapter title.

======================================================================
1603. UI UNIT TEXT DETAIL
======================================================================

Read-only.

Show count/checksum/status.

No editing frozen text.

======================================================================
1604. UI CREATE NEW SESSION FROM UNIT EDIT
======================================================================

Nếu user muốn sửa Unit text:

- không edit frozen Unit;
- create new Request/Session flow;
- outside current minimal UI if complex.

Message clear.

======================================================================
1605. UI RETRY REASON
======================================================================

Can ask optional note.

Service uses stable reason code.

======================================================================
1606. UI RETRY LIMIT
======================================================================

Show attempts used/remaining.

Disable when reached.

======================================================================
1607. UI RESUME INSPECTION DIALOG
======================================================================

Summary:

- Đã hợp lệ: N, không chạy lại.
- Đang chờ: N.
- Bị gián đoạn: N.
- Lỗi có thể thử lại: N.
- Lỗi không thể thử lại: N.
- Thiếu đầu ra: N.
- Blocker.

Confirm only actionable.

======================================================================
1608. UI CHAPTER RETRY DIALOG
======================================================================

Show eligible/ineligible counts.

No valid Unit retry.

======================================================================
1609. UI SESSION CANCEL DIALOG
======================================================================

Explain:

- công việc mới sẽ dừng;
- tệp hợp lệ đã tạo được giữ;
- không xóa dữ liệu;
- phiên không thể Resume mặc định.

======================================================================
1610. UI SESSION PAUSE DIALOG
======================================================================

May not need confirmation.

Show behavior:

“Đoạn đang xử lý có thể hoàn thành trước khi phiên tạm dừng.”

======================================================================
1611. UI OPERATION BUSY STATE
======================================================================

While action pending:

- disable conflicting buttons;
- retain view;
- show operation ID/job link optional;
- handle timeout by query state.

Không assume timeout = failure.

======================================================================
1612. UI API/SERVICE TIMEOUT
======================================================================

On timeout:

- query operation/session;
- do not resubmit without idempotency key;
- show “Đang kiểm tra trạng thái”.

======================================================================
1613. UI REOPEN ACTIVE SESSION
======================================================================

Load repository current state.

No reliance old widget memory.

======================================================================
1614. UI RECENT SESSION
======================================================================

Dashboard/list sorted updated_at.

No global current Session assumption.

======================================================================
1615. UI MULTIPLE ACTIVE SESSION
======================================================================

List all.

No overwrite progress card from last event without ID matching.

======================================================================
1616. UI EVENT ENTITY MATCH
======================================================================

Page only refresh selected detail when event session_id matches; list summary can refresh row.

======================================================================
1617. UI EVENT THROTTLE
======================================================================

Combine multiple Unit events into periodic list refresh.

No full Plan load every event.

======================================================================
1618. UI MODEL ID ROLE
======================================================================

Qt model stores entity ID in custom role.

Sort/filter row index not identity.

======================================================================
1619. UI MODEL PAGINATION RESET
======================================================================

On filter/project change:

- cancel old query;
- reset safely;
- no stale rows.

======================================================================
1620. UI STATUS BADGE TEXT
======================================================================

Status text mapping central.

Health mapping separate.

Resource wait separate.

======================================================================
1621. UI STATUS COLOR
======================================================================

Use existing palette/theme.

Do not hardcode inaccessible colors if shared badge.

Status not only color.

======================================================================
1622. UI DARK/LIGHT THEME
======================================================================

Reuse style.

No new fixed colors.

======================================================================
1623. UI SCROLL NESTING
======================================================================

Main form can scroll.

Tables have controlled size.

Avoid scroll area inside scroll area excessively.

======================================================================
1624. UI WINDOW RESIZE
======================================================================

No fixed widths that break laptop.

Use splitter/layout stretch.

======================================================================
1625. UI LONG PATH DISPLAY
======================================================================

Ellipsis visual, tooltip safe relative path.

No absolute user path if not needed.

======================================================================
1626. UI LONG ERROR MESSAGE
======================================================================

Summary in table.

Detail dialog.

No layout break.

======================================================================
1627. UI LARGE TEXT PREVIEW
======================================================================

Load bounded snippet/lazy.

No freeze.

======================================================================
1628. UI JOB LOG LINK
======================================================================

Pass Job ID to existing Jobs Page.

No expose internal message ID.

======================================================================
1629. UI RESOURCE WAIT LINK
======================================================================

Open Resource Monitor with current snapshot.

No custom hardware probe.

======================================================================
1630. UI REFERENCE REPAIR LINK
======================================================================

Navigate only if page exists.

Otherwise message.

No auto repair.

======================================================================
1631. DASHBOARD SESSION COUNTS
======================================================================

Counts by:

- active;
- waiting resource;
- paused;
- recovery required;
- failed;
- completed recent.

Registry/query.

======================================================================
1632. DASHBOARD PLANNING JOB
======================================================================

Can show planning progress separately from Audio execution.

No misleading “đang tạo Audio” while only planning.

======================================================================
1633. DASHBOARD READINESS Wording
======================================================================

“Lập kế hoạch: Sẵn sàng”

“Tạo Audio: Chưa có bộ xử lý”

or actual status.

======================================================================
1634. DASHBOARD CLICK FILTER
======================================================================

Click “Chờ tài nguyên” opens Generate Page filtered waiting_resource.

======================================================================
1635. SETTINGS GLOBAL DEFAULTS
======================================================================

Global Generate defaults should be application-level.

Project override.

Session snapshot.

No retroactive.

======================================================================
1636. SETTINGS PROJECT OVERRIDES
======================================================================

Store in Project config/versioned section.

Do not create separate Project file if existing settings schema.

======================================================================
1637. SETTINGS UI PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Only allowed defaults.

No Session status/history.

======================================================================
1638. SETTINGS UNKNOWN ENGINE OPTIONS
======================================================================

Do not persist invalid arbitrary options through UI.

API reject/validate.

======================================================================
1639. SETTINGS RESET MIGRATION
======================================================================

Old split_length can map target/max according explicit migration.

Do not guess silently.

======================================================================
1640. SETTINGS VALIDATION REPORT
======================================================================

Project settings validation can warn before Request.

======================================================================
1641. LOCAL API STARTUP
======================================================================

Generate router registration must not initialize Engine runtime.

======================================================================
1642. LOCAL API SHUTDOWN
======================================================================

No new requests after AppContext shutdown starts.

Current operation checkpoint via Job/application.

======================================================================
1643. LOCAL API PROJECT SCOPE
======================================================================

Endpoint must resolve project_id explicitly or current Project per existing API policy.

Jobs require explicit persisted Project ID.

======================================================================
1644. LOCAL API SESSION OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Verify Session belongs Project.

No cross-project ID query accidental.

======================================================================
1645. LOCAL API ENTITY OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Unit/Chapter/Attempt/Artifact endpoint verifies lineage/project.

Do not trust ID alone without repository context.

======================================================================
1646. LOCAL API PATH TRAVERSAL
======================================================================

No endpoint directly concatenates IDs into paths without resolver validation.

======================================================================
1647. LOCAL API OPERATION STATUS
======================================================================

Reuse Job endpoint or expose operation summary if application operations persisted.

No duplicate task system.

======================================================================
1648. LOCAL API BACKGROUND PLAN
======================================================================

If planning Job:

- response 202/accepted pattern current API;
- Job ID;
- Session ID;
- no Plan ID until done.

======================================================================
1649. LOCAL API SYNC PLAN
