======================================================================

If source small/sync:

- still operation ID;
- return Plan after persisted.

Do not vary semantics unpredictably; document threshold/policy.

======================================================================
1650. LOCAL API PLAN MODE SETTING
======================================================================

Can always use Job Queue for consistency.

Audit source.

No custom thread.

======================================================================
1651. API CREATE REQUEST SOURCE FILE
======================================================================

File path must be materialized at materialize stage.

Request draft can retain provenance path temporarily, but do not rely after Session create.

If path deleted before materialize:

- validation fail.

======================================================================
1652. API CREATE REQUEST PASTED TEXT
======================================================================

Request persistence of pasted text raises privacy/size consideration.

Safe options:

- materialize immediately;
- store draft source managed;
- or persist pasted text in Request file with size guard.

Choose based source/product.

Do not leave only memory.

======================================================================
1653. DRAFT SOURCE SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Có thể materialize source at Request stage rather than Session stage.

Nếu vậy:

- Request owns draft Source Snapshot;
- Session references/copies immutable snapshot;
- lifecycle documented.

Không bắt buộc.

Chọn minimal architecture.

======================================================================
1654. REQUEST CANCEL SOURCE CLEANUP
======================================================================

If draft managed source exists:

- archive/cleanup policy;
- do not delete immediately without ownership safety;
- not confuse Session-owned snapshot.

Avoid complexity by materialize at Session if possible.

======================================================================
1655. SESSION CREATION BEFORE SOURCE
======================================================================

Nếu Session created then source extraction fails:

- status failed/draft/recovery;
- Request remains;
- Session record useful for report;
- no zombie unknown.

======================================================================
1656. SESSION CREATION AFTER SOURCE
======================================================================

Alternative source temp first then Session commit.

Need Request lineage.

Choose based atomicity/source architecture.

Document transaction.

======================================================================
1657. PLANNER OPERATION JOURNAL
======================================================================

If Session created early, operation journal tracks stages.

No need full distributed workflow.

======================================================================
1658. PLANNING RETRY
======================================================================

Retry planning failure is not Generate Unit Retry.

Could re-run materialize/plan on same Request/Session only if Plan not frozen and source snapshot valid.

Must be idempotent.

======================================================================
1659. PLAN FAILURE RETRY
======================================================================

If splitter/settings corrected:

- Request draft update then materialize new Session;
- or same Session draft if no frozen Plan/Attempt.

Choose clear policy.

Do not mutate frozen.

======================================================================
1660. REQUEST INVALID TO VALID
======================================================================

User can fix draft Request and validate again.

Validation report history persists.

======================================================================
1661. SESSION BLOCKED BEFORE PLAN
======================================================================

If missing reference/Engine:

- Session can be blocked with source snapshot preserved;
- user can repair/revalidate;
- selection snapshot maybe requested unresolved.
- Plan may not freeze.

Alternatively keep Request invalid and no Session. Choose after source flow.

Do not create inconsistent half snapshot.

======================================================================
1662. PLAN-ONLY WITHOUT ENGINE
======================================================================

Requirement says planning can be available even execution unavailable.

Nhưng Generate Plan cần selection snapshot Engine ID nếu Request chooses Engine.

Nếu no Engine registered:

- allow text-only structural Plan mode only if product wants;
- otherwise Request planning validation blocks at selection.
- Readiness must explain.

Do not invent phantom Engine.

Có thể support `engine_id` required for final Plan but text preview structure can run independently.

======================================================================
1663. TEXT PLAN VS EXECUTION PLAN
======================================================================

Nếu cần phân biệt:

- TextStructurePreview: can run without full selection.
- GeneratePlan: requires frozen selection/output spec.

UI “Xem trước cấu trúc” khác “Lập kế hoạch phiên”.

Không bắt buộc nếu source Engine luôn có.

======================================================================
1664. PRE-PLAN TEXT INSPECTION
======================================================================

Could provide source validation/structure preview before Session Plan.

No persistent Generate Plan freeze.

Useful UX.

Do not confuse with Preview Audio.

======================================================================
1665. STRUCTURE PREVIEW SERVICE
======================================================================

If implemented:

- uses temp/draft source;
- normalization/split settings;
- returns bounded summary;
- no final Session/Plan unless user confirms.

Avoid duplicate algorithms; use same text services.

======================================================================
1666. STRUCTURE PREVIEW PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Can be ephemeral or report.

No fake Session completed.

Not core required.

======================================================================
1667. PLAN VALIDATION REFERENCE TIMING
======================================================================

Before Plan freeze, validate immutable reference IDs/checksum.

Execution revalidate again.

Two-layer.

======================================================================
1668. PLAN VALIDATION RESOURCE TIMING
======================================================================

Plan can freeze even hardware currently busy.

Resource wait is execution condition.

Plan should block only unsupported requirements, not temporary busy, unless resource cannot be determined.

======================================================================
1669. PLAN VALIDATION DISK TIMING
======================================================================

Path and rough estimate.

Actual wait/failure later.

======================================================================
1670. PLAN OUTPUT COLLISION TIMING
======================================================================

Detect existing outputs at Plan time.

Recheck before Attempt because filesystem may change.

Persist planned decision, but runtime revalidate.

======================================================================
1671. PLAN STALE OUTPUT DECISION
======================================================================

If collision state changed before execution:

- re-evaluate policy;
- no silent overwrite;
- block/recovery if decision invalid.

======================================================================
1672. PLAN STALE REFERENCE
======================================================================

If asset changed/missing before execution:

- block;
- no fallback;
- Plan remains historical.

======================================================================
1673. PLAN STALE VOICE
======================================================================

Voice archived/missing:

- execution policy;
- no auto select new.

======================================================================
1674. PLAN STALE ENGINE
======================================================================

Handler removed:

- execution unavailable;
- no Job if prequeue validation;
- queued Job recovery if removed after queue.

======================================================================
1675. QUEUED JOB HANDLER REMOVED
======================================================================

Job cannot run:

- unsupported/unavailable;
- Attempt blocked/failed non-retryable until provider restored;
- Session blocked/recovery;
- no infinite retry.

======================================================================
1676. QUEUED JOB PROJECT ARCHIVED
======================================================================

Worker revalidates Project state.

Policy:

- block/cancel safely;
- no new output if archive disallows.

Do not run solely because Job old.

======================================================================
1677. QUEUED JOB SESSION CANCELLED
======================================================================

Worker exits cancelled/no-op.

No Engine call.

======================================================================
1678. QUEUED JOB UNIT ALREADY VALID
======================================================================

Worker idempotently skips/completes Job without new output according Job contract.

No duplicate Attempt execution.

======================================================================
1679. QUEUED JOB ATTEMPT MISMATCH
======================================================================

Payload Attempt not active/latest:

- reject stale;
- no output;
- Job cancelled/failed stable stale code.

======================================================================
1680. WORKER PRE-EXECUTION CHECKLIST
======================================================================

Before Engine:

- payload version;
- Project;
- Session;
- Plan frozen/checksum;
- Unit;
- Attempt active;
- no cancellation;
- selection/reference;
- Engine provider;
- resource lease;
- output reservation;
- disk/path;
- input checksum.

======================================================================
1681. WORKER POST-ENGINE CHECKLIST
======================================================================

- cancellation state;
- temp path allowed;
- basic validation;
- finalize;
- full validation;
- Attempt;
- Unit;
- Session progress;
- manifest summary/rebuild marker;
- events/logs.

======================================================================
1682. WORKER EXCEPTION FINALLY
======================================================================

Always:

- release reservation;
- Resource Lease handled by Job framework;
- close runtime resources;
- persist failure if safe;
- no temp delete blind;
- log correlation.

======================================================================
1683. WORKER CRASH MID-FINALIZE
======================================================================

Operation marker/Artifact state writing/created enables recovery.

No false valid.

======================================================================
1684. WORKER HEARTBEAT
======================================================================

Use Job infrastructure if exists.

No Generate heartbeat service.

Attempt may store last_progress_at summary.

======================================================================
1685. JOB STALE DETECTION
======================================================================

Job Recovery owns timing/stale.

Generate maps result.

======================================================================
1686. JOB RETRY VS DOMAIN RETRY
======================================================================

Infrastructure Job retry for transient dispatch may reuse same Attempt only if no Engine execution side effect and Job contract supports.

Domain Retry after Attempt failure creates new Attempt.

Phải phân biệt rõ.

Không để Job auto retry chạy cùng Attempt sau uncertain output mà không idempotency/reservation safety.

======================================================================
1687. JOB AUTO RETRY POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu Job system auto retry:

- Generate Unit handler idempotent;
- check Attempt/output;
- same Job retry không tăng domain retry_count;
- if previous execution uncertain, recovery before rerun.

Document.

======================================================================
1688. DOMAIN RETRY COUNT
======================================================================

Chỉ tăng khi GenerateRetryService tạo Attempt mới.

Không tăng khi Job chờ tài nguyên hoặc infrastructure retry.

======================================================================
1689. JOB FAILURE BEFORE ENGINE
======================================================================

Ví dụ payload invalid/resource setup:

- Attempt may fail/blocked;
- retryability category.

No output.

======================================================================
1690. JOB FAILURE AFTER ENGINE BEFORE FINALIZE
======================================================================

Temp may exist.

Attempt interrupted/output uncertain.

Recovery.

Không tự retry immediately without inspection.

======================================================================
1691. JOB FAILURE AFTER FINALIZE BEFORE METADATA
======================================================================

Final orphan possible.

Recovery inspect.

No overwrite.

======================================================================
1692. JOB FAILURE AFTER ARTIFACT VALID BEFORE SESSION UPDATE
======================================================================

Recovery recompute Unit/Session from Artifact/Attempt.

Operation idempotent.

======================================================================
1693. RESOURCE LEASE FAILURE BEFORE ENGINE
======================================================================

No execution.

Job waiting/failed according manager.

Attempt waiting_resource.

======================================================================
1694. RESOURCE LEASE LOST DURING ENGINE
======================================================================

Job/runtime policy.

Generate logs warning/recovery.

Do not directly reacquire in handler unless Job framework.

======================================================================
1695. RESOURCE USAGE METRICS
======================================================================

Optional summary:

- peak RAM;
- peak VRAM;
- duration;
- device.

Only if Resource Manager provides.

No custom polling heavy.

======================================================================
1696. RESOURCE USAGE PRIVACY
======================================================================

No hardware serial/user path.

======================================================================
1697. RESOURCE DECISION HISTORY
======================================================================

Attempt can store last/decision IDs.

No list unbounded in Session.

Job/resource logs retain detail.

======================================================================
1698. WAITING RESOURCE ETA
======================================================================

Unknown unless Resource Manager provides.

Do not invent.

======================================================================
1699. QUEUE POSITION
======================================================================

If Job Queue supports, UI can show.

Generate service not calculate own.

======================================================================
1700. QUEUE PAUSE SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Pause Session means prevent dispatch eligible Generate Jobs through Queue mechanisms.

Do not pause unrelated Jobs.

======================================================================
1701. QUEUE CANCEL SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Cancel linked active/pending Generate Jobs only.

Do not cancel Project validation/backup Jobs unrelated unless dependency policy.

======================================================================
1702. QUEUE JOB LINK INDEX
======================================================================

Session may store Job IDs; Job repository can query metadata.

Do not duplicate full Job objects.

======================================================================
1703. JOB METADATA TAGS
======================================================================

Add:

- project_id;
- session_id;
- chapter_id;
- unit_id;
- attempt_id;
- generate job type.

Enables filtering in Jobs Page.

======================================================================
1704. JOBS PAGE GENERATE FILTER
======================================================================

Use existing filter/tag if easy.

No duplicate Jobs Page.

======================================================================
1705. JOBS PAGE DISPLAY
======================================================================

Could show Session/Chapter/Unit labels via query service without loading text.

No mandatory large UI change.

======================================================================
1706. RESOURCE PAGE GENERATE CONTEXT
======================================================================

Waiting lease/job shows Generate IDs/type.

No duplicate monitor.

======================================================================
1707. PROJECT DETAIL GENERATE SUMMARY
======================================================================

If Project Detail exists, optional summary:

- Sessions;
- active;
- outputs;
- storage health.

Do not scan deep.

======================================================================
1708. PROJECT VALIDATION GENERATE SECTION
======================================================================

Checks:

- registry;
- session metadata;
- path safety;
- schema;
- no deep Audio default.

Report.

======================================================================
1709. PROJECT BACKUP GENERATE ACTIVE STATE
======================================================================

Before backup:

- checkpoint;
- include non-terminal status;
- manifest draft;
- no temp as valid.

======================================================================
1710. PROJECT RESTORE JOB LINKS
======================================================================

Restored backup should not assume original Job records active.

Mark historical/missing/recovery as needed.

No auto resume.

======================================================================
1711. PROJECT IMPORT JOB ID COLLISION
======================================================================

Job IDs external to Project package may not import.

Session stores historical job links flagged unavailable.

Do not remap to unrelated Jobs.

======================================================================
1712. PROJECT IMPORT RESOURCE LEASE LINKS
======================================================================

Lease links historical only.

No active lease restored.

======================================================================
1713. PROJECT IMPORT ENGINE AVAILABILITY
======================================================================

Snapshot preserved.

Current readiness re-evaluated.

======================================================================
1714. PROJECT IMPORT REFERENCE IDS
======================================================================

Use package remap table/dedupe.

No path-only.

======================================================================
1715. PROJECT IMPORT VOICE IDS
======================================================================

If Voice included/remapped, update Session snapshot references according package strategy while preserving original ID provenance.

If not included, read-only/blocked.

======================================================================
1716. IMMUTABLE SNAPSHOT ID REMAP
======================================================================

Import into new Project may require IDs remapped.

“Immutable” means within entity lifecycle, not package collision impossible.

Remap must be atomic/complete and recorded.

======================================================================
1717. SESSION IMPORT PROVENANCE
======================================================================

Store:

- source_package_id;
- original_project_id;
- original_session_id;
- imported_at;
- remap report ID.

No absolute paths.

======================================================================
1718. BACKUP OUTPUT INCLUSION
======================================================================

Mode actual:

- metadata only;
- valid required outputs;
- all managed outputs.

Do not include corrupt/temp by default unless full diagnostic.

======================================================================
1719. BACKUP SOURCE INCLUSION
======================================================================

Metadata mode may omit.

Standard/full should include managed source if Resume expected.

Docs.

======================================================================
1720. BACKUP MANIFEST CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Package manifest includes checksums for files included.

Use existing package service.

======================================================================
1721. BACKUP CONSISTENCY WINDOW
======================================================================

Checkpoint snapshot.

Do not hold app frozen for whole copy if existing backup supports versioned files.

At least metadata internally consistent.

======================================================================
1722. DUPLICATE PROJECT SOURCE REFERENCES
======================================================================

If duplicate without Session history, no issue.

If history copied, source snapshots managed copy/remap.

No cross-project absolute reference.

======================================================================
1723. DUPLICATE PROJECT REFERENCES
======================================================================

Follow Reference Vault duplicate policy.

Session snapshot links remap if history copied.

======================================================================
1724. PROJECT ARCHIVE OUTPUT ACCESS
======================================================================

Archived Project outputs can be viewed/exported if path exists, but no execution.

According Project policy.

======================================================================
1725. PROJECT DELETE
======================================================================

Outside current Sprint.

Do not add cascade deletion.

======================================================================
1726. SESSION STORAGE SIZE SUMMARY
======================================================================

Registry may store estimated storage bytes if available.

Do not compute recursively every refresh.

Update during Artifact/source writes or background.

Optional.

======================================================================
1727. STORAGE QUOTA
======================================================================

No new quota system.

Resource disk policy handles safety.

======================================================================
1728. CLEANUP REPORT
======================================================================

If cleanup foundation exists, dry-run report lists:

- preview expired;
- orphan temp;
- superseded invalid files;
- bytes.

No automatic deletion by default.

======================================================================
1729. TEMP FILE NAMING SAFETY
======================================================================

IDs only.

No source title/user text needed.

======================================================================
1730. TEMP FILE AGE
======================================================================

mtime can help candidate classification but not sole authority.

Operation metadata.

======================================================================
1731. ORPHAN DIRECTORY
======================================================================

Partial Session directory without valid session.json:

- recovery report;
- no registry active entry;
- no auto delete.

======================================================================
1732. SESSION DIRECTORY COLLISION
======================================================================

ID collision reject/regenerate before write.

Never merge directories.

======================================================================
1733. REQUEST FILE COLLISION
======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================
1734. REPORT FILE COLLISION
======================================================================

Unique report_id.

No overwrite.

======================================================================
1735. OUTPUT FILE COLLISION CASE FOLD
======================================================================

Use platform-aware normalized key.

On Windows treat case-insensitive.

======================================================================
1736. UNICODE NORMALIZATION FILENAME
======================================================================

Sanitized filename normalization deterministic.

Avoid visually same names collision by normalized key.

Identity suffix.

======================================================================
1737. WINDOWS RESERVED PATH SEGMENT
======================================================================

Sanitize not only exact name but reserved before extension.

Example:

CON.txt

must be safe.

======================================================================
1738. WINDOWS TRAILING CHARACTERS
======================================================================

Remove/replace trailing dot/space.

Recheck empty name.

Add stable fallback ID.

======================================================================
1739. PATH LENGTH BUDGET
======================================================================

Resolver should budget directory + filename.

Truncate human title before identity/extension.

Test.

======================================================================
1740. SAFE FILENAME FALLBACK
======================================================================

If sanitized title empty:

- use role/index/ID;
- deterministic.

No empty component.

======================================================================
1741. NAMING TEMPLATE REQUIRED PLACEHOLDER
======================================================================

Không bắt buộc user template có Unit ID, nhưng collision resolver must ensure uniqueness.

Could append index/ID automatically with warning if template duplicates, or reject.

Prefer reject/explicit deterministic policy.

======================================================================
1742. TEMPLATE PREVIEW COLLISION
======================================================================

Plan validation uses all Units to catch duplicates.

======================================================================
1743. TEMPLATE CHANGE AFTER PLAN
======================================================================

Not allowed in frozen Session.

Create new Session.

======================================================================
1744. OUTPUT ROOT CHANGE AFTER PLAN
======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================
1745. PUBLISH DESTINATION CHANGE
======================================================================

Publishing can be separate post-processing operation without altering managed Plan, if future.

Not required.

======================================================================
1746. UNIT TEXT CHANGE AFTER PLAN
======================================================================

Not allowed.

New Session.

======================================================================
1747. CHAPTER TITLE DISPLAY EDIT
======================================================================

User may edit Session metadata display title future, but spoken Unit text frozen.

Do not change output paths.

======================================================================
1748. SESSION DISPLAY EDIT
======================================================================

Allowed.

Registry update.

Storage unchanged.

======================================================================
1749. SESSION DESCRIPTION/TAGS EDIT
======================================================================

Allowed if model supports.

No Plan effect.

======================================================================
1750. ARCHIVE RESTORE SESSION STATE
======================================================================

Store:

- pre_archive_status;
- archived_at.

Restore:

- revalidate;
- choose safe status based history;
- no auto queue.

======================================================================
1751. TERMINAL SESSION ARCHIVE
======================================================================

Completed/failed/cancelled/partially_completed can archive.

Active Session archive should be blocked or require pause/cancel first.

======================================================================
1752. SESSION ARCHIVE MANIFEST
======================================================================

Manifest remains.

Archive flag may update registry/session metadata, not immutable final Manifest unless new revision needed.

======================================================================
1753. REQUEST ARCHIVE AFTER MATERIALIZE
======================================================================

Request can archive while Session remains.

Lineage still readable via snapshot/ID.

======================================================================
1754. REQUEST DELETE
======================================================================

Not required.

Archive only.

======================================================================
1755. GENERATED REPORT CONTENT LANGUAGE
======================================================================

Machine fields English/stable.

User messages Vietnamese.

Developer details according project.

======================================================================
1756. REPORT JSON SIZE
======================================================================

Do not include full source/trace.

Pagination/file references for lists.

======================================================================
1757. REPORT HTML
======================================================================

Không cần HTML report mới.

TXT/JSON according project.

======================================================================
1758. TXT REPORT EXPORT
======================================================================

If UI offers download/view report:

- generate human-readable TXT from structured report;
- managed temp/export;
- no data mutation.

Not mandatory core.

======================================================================
1759. REPORT CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Optional if package/integrity system.

Use common utility.

======================================================================
1760. REPORT IMMUTABLE TIMESTAMP
======================================================================

created_at fixed.

No update.

======================================================================
1761. LATEST REPORT POINTER
======================================================================

Entity can store latest report ID by type.

Historical list repository.

======================================================================
1762. VALIDATION REPORT SUPERSESSION
======================================================================

New report supersedes current pointer, not delete old.

======================================================================
1763. REPORT READ FAILURE
======================================================================

Missing/corrupt report degrades diagnostics, not necessarily business data.

Consistency issue.

======================================================================
1764. LOG VS REPORT
======================================================================

Log:

- chronological technical events.

Report:

- structured result of validation/recovery/migration.

Do not conflate.

======================================================================
1765. MANIFEST VS REPORT
======================================================================

Manifest summary overall lifecycle/output.

Reports specific checks/operations.

======================================================================
1766. REGISTRY VS MANIFEST
======================================================================

Registry fast list.

Manifest detailed summary.

Neither replaces Session/Plan repositories.

======================================================================
1767. SESSION VS REQUEST
======================================================================

Request mutable draft intent.

Session materialized/frozen lifecycle.

Keep separation throughout code/docs/UI.

======================================================================
1768. SESSION VS PROJECT
======================================================================

Session belongs Project immutable ID.

Project rename/archive lifecycle separate.

======================================================================
1769. UNIT VS JOB
======================================================================

Unit business input.

Job scheduler record.

One Unit can have multiple Attempts/Jobs over time.

======================================================================
1770. ATTEMPT VS JOB
======================================================================

Attempt business execution try.

Usually linked one primary Job, but infrastructure retries may occur within same Job.

Document exact mapping.

======================================================================
1771. ARTIFACT VS FILE
======================================================================

Artifact metadata/lineage.

File is physical.

File can missing/change; Artifact health updates.

======================================================================
1772. SOURCE SNAPSHOT VS REFERENCE ASSET
======================================================================

Source Snapshot for text to synthesize.

ReferenceAsset for Voice/Style/Speaker references.

Do not mix registries.

======================================================================
1773. STYLE PROFILE VS STYLE PARAMETER
======================================================================

StyleProfile entity snapshot.

Style free parameter Engine option.

Do not use one field for both.

======================================================================
1774. VARIANT VS SPEED
======================================================================

Variant bundle overrides.

Speed is parameter.

No new Variant per speed automatically.

======================================================================
1775. PREVIEW PLAN VS PREVIEW AUDIO
======================================================================

Preview Plan works without inference.

Preview Audio requires handler.

UI wording exact.

======================================================================
1776. BATCH SESSION VS MULTI-DOCUMENT
======================================================================

Batch can mean many Units/Chapters.

Multi-document model supported but UI may currently one document.

Do not conflate.

======================================================================
1777. CHAPTER ROLE VS TITLE SOURCE
======================================================================

Role:

- normal;
- intro;
- outro.

Title source:

- DOCX heading;
- regex;
- user;
- fallback.

Separate.

======================================================================
1778. UNIT ROLE VS SPLIT REASON
======================================================================

Role semantic basic.

Split reason technical boundary.

Separate.

======================================================================
1779. BUSINESS STATUS VS HEALTH
======================================================================

Repeat enforcement in code/tests/docs.

No status overloading.

======================================================================
1780. READINESS VS VALIDATION
======================================================================

Validation checks specific Request/Session data.

Readiness checks capability/environment.

Both required before execution.

======================================================================
1781. WAITING VS BLOCKED
======================================================================

Waiting:

- condition temporary/schedulable.

Blocked:

- prerequisite/action required or unsupported.

No retry storm.

======================================================================
1782. FAILED VS INVALID
======================================================================

Request invalid:

- validation.

Attempt failed:

- execution.

Artifact invalid:

- output validation.

Session failed:

- lifecycle outcome.

Use correct.

======================================================================
1783. INTERRUPTED VS CANCELLED
======================================================================

Interrupted:

- unexpected loss/crash.

Cancelled:

- explicit/system cancellation.

Retry/resume policy differs.

======================================================================
1784. SKIPPED VS CANCELLED UNIT
======================================================================

Skipped by completion policy/explicit skip.

Cancelled due Session/action.

Do not count same.

======================================================================
1785. PARTIALLY_COMPLETED SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Terminal outcome after continue-on-failure.

Not merely progress between 0 and 100.

======================================================================
1786. RECOVERY_REQUIRED SEMANTICS
======================================================================

State/health requires reconciliation.

No execution until resolved.

======================================================================
1787. READ_ONLY_HISTORY SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Imported/unsupported data viewable.

No mutation/execution.

======================================================================
1788. LEGACY_IMPORTED SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Data came from old schema/history.

Does not imply invalid by itself.

Validation required.

======================================================================
1789. MIGRATION_REQUIRED SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Schema known old but not safely auto migrated.

Read-only/block mutation.

======================================================================
1790. FUTURE_SCHEMA SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Newer than app.

Never downgrade.

======================================================================
1791. TEST TERMINOLOGY
======================================================================

Test names use actual entity terms.

No ambiguous `task`.

======================================================================
1792. DOCUMENT TERMINOLOGY GLOSSARY
======================================================================

Add glossary to Generate docs if helpful.

======================================================================
1793. API TERMINOLOGY
======================================================================

Routes use sessions/units/attempts, not tasks/jobs interchangeably.

Jobs routes remain Job subsystem.

======================================================================
1794. UI TERMINOLOGY
======================================================================

Vietnamese user-friendly labels consistent.

======================================================================
1795. CODE TERMINOLOGY SEARCH
======================================================================

Search old `task` fields in Generate code.

Keep only legacy compatibility or Job context.

======================================================================
1796. LEGACY TASK MODEL
======================================================================

If existing GenerateTask:

- audit responsibility;
- map to Job/Unit/Session;
- do not delete blindly;
- compatibility adapter/migration.

======================================================================

======================================================================

- do not keep scheduler competing;
- migrate call sites to Job Queue;
- retain wrapper if needed.

======================================================================
1798. LEGACY HISTORY MODEL
======================================================================

Map to Session/Artifact history conservatively.

1799. LEGACY PREVIEW FILE
======================================================================

Can import as legacy Artifact unverified/preview.

No fake Attempt.

======================================================================
1800. LEGACY OUTPUT DIRECTORY
======================================================================

Preserve external provenance.

Do not move automatically.

======================================================================
1801. LEGACY PROGRESS
======================================================================

Do not trust persisted 100% as proof output valid.

1802. LEGACY STATUS DONE
======================================================================

Conservative mapping defined in previous Parts.

======================================================================

======================================================================

1807. LEGACY ENGINE CONFIG
======================================================================

Map safe fields/fingerprint.

No secret snapshot.

1808. MIGRATION DRY RUN
======================================================================

If framework supports:

- inspect;
- report proposed;
- no write.

Useful real data safety.

Not mandatory if existing migration system khác.

======================================================================
1809. MIGRATION USER DATA
======================================================================

Không chạy bulk migration trên real workspace trong test.

Only test fixtures.

Application production migration follows safe backup/policy.

======================================================================
1810. MIGRATION ERROR ISOLATION
======================================================================

Registry marks issue.

======================================================================
1811. MIGRATION REPORT UI
======================================================================

Show unresolved entities/count.

No raw user text.

======================================================================

No new endpoint required unless framework existing.

1813. DOCUMENT MIGRATION VERSION TABLE
======================================================================

No hypothetical.

======================================================================

But required full tests must ultimately pass or report NOT_READY.

======================================================================

======================================================================

Use existing pytest markers.

Do not add custom marker without config.

======================================================================
1816. TEST TEMP DIRECTORY
======================================================================

Use tmp_path.

No repository runtime directories.

======================================================================
1817. TEST CLOCK
======================================================================

Use injectable clock/time helper if project has.

1818. TEST ID FACTORY
======================================================================

Can inject deterministic ID factory for assertions.

Production uses real.

No global monkeypatch leakage.

1819. TEST EVENT BUS
======================================================================

Use fake/recording bus.

1820. TEST JOB QUEUE
======================================================================

No real threads if test helper exists; otherwise ensure shutdown.

1821. TEST RESOURCE MANAGER
======================================================================

1822. TEST ENGINE MANAGER
======================================================================

======================================================================

1824. TEST DOCX

1825. TEST UTF-8 JSON

1826. TEST PATH SERIALIZATION
======================================================================

Windows-style and POSIX serialized relative.

Resolve consistently.

1827. TEST SYMLINK ESCAPE
======================================================================

If platform/test environment supports.

======================================================================

1829. TEST CANCELLATION
======================================================================

Deterministic cancellation token at stages.

No sleep-heavy flaky tests.

======================================================================
1830. TEST PAUSE
======================================================================

No timing races uncontrolled.

======================================================================
1831. TEST CONCURRENCY
======================================================================

Use barriers/locks if needed.

======================================================================
1931. CODE REVIEW CHECKLIST
======================================================================

Review each layer:

Models:

- no I/O;
- IDs;
- schema;
- validation.

Repositories:

- atomic;
- path safe;
- no business logic.

Services:

- ownership;
- idempotency;
- transitions.

Jobs:

- IDs;
- resource;
- no fake.

API/UI:

- same services;
- no path leak;
- honest readiness.

Tests/docs:

- actual.

======================================================================
1932. IMPORT GRAPH REVIEW
======================================================================

Use import analysis/compile.

No circular:

- models → services;
- repository → UI;
- Engine → UI;
- Job → widget.

======================================================================
1933. EXCEPTION REVIEW
======================================================================

Search broad exceptions.

Each broad catch must:

- be boundary;
- log;
- classify;
- not swallow;
- preserve cleanup.

======================================================================
1934. MUTABLE DEFAULT REVIEW
======================================================================

Search dataclasses/Pydantic fields.

Fix.

======================================================================
1935. PATH REVIEW
======================================================================

Search string joins/hardcoded roots.

Use resolver.

======================================================================
1936. IDENTITY REVIEW
======================================================================

Search display name used dictionary key/path.

Fix or explicit legacy.

======================================================================
1937. STATUS REVIEW
======================================================================

Search direct assignment.

Route through state service except deserialization/migration controlled.

======================================================================
1938. CHECKSUM REVIEW
======================================================================

No Python hash.

Canonical SHA utility.

======================================================================
1939. TIME REVIEW
======================================================================

Timezone-aware utility.

======================================================================
1940. SERIALIZATION REVIEW
======================================================================

JSON-safe.

No Path/datetime raw if writer can't.

======================================================================
1941. EVENT REVIEW
======================================================================

Persist before publish.

No huge payload.

======================================================================
1942. UI THREAD REVIEW
======================================================================

No widget updates worker thread.

======================================================================
1943. JOB HANDLER REVIEW
======================================================================

No production fake.

No direct UI.

No scheduler duplication.

======================================================================
1944. RESOURCE REVIEW
======================================================================

No direct GPU detection in Generate.

======================================================================
1945. ENGINE REVIEW
======================================================================

No runtime load at import/planning.

No GPT-SoVITS runtime modification.

======================================================================
1946. REFERENCE REVIEW
======================================================================

Asset IDs/checksum, no external path primary.

======================================================================
1947. PROJECT REVIEW
======================================================================

Lifecycle/package integration.

No current Project implicit in Job.

======================================================================
1948. API REVIEW
======================================================================

No arbitrary status/path/ID mutation.

======================================================================
1949. UI REVIEW
======================================================================

Buttons matrix/readiness/tooltips/scroll.

======================================================================
1950. TEST REVIEW
======================================================================

No real data/Engine/GPU/network.

======================================================================
1951. DOCUMENT REVIEW
======================================================================

No overclaim.

======================================================================
1952. FINAL TARGETED COMMANDS
======================================================================

Run commands actual project supports.

Possible sequence:

- compileall source;
- targeted Generate tests;
- full pytest;
- bootstrap smoke;
- UI smoke;
- Generate workflow smoke;
- package smoke;
- git status read-only.

Do not copy example command if path differs.

======================================================================
1953. TARGETED TEST FAILURE
======================================================================

Fix before full suite.

No skip critical.

======================================================================
1954. FULL SUITE FAILURE
======================================================================

Determine regression vs baseline.

Fix Sprint-related.

NOT_READY if required remains.

======================================================================
1955. WARNING REVIEW
======================================================================

Warnings:

- deprecation;
- thread;
- unclosed file;
- resource;
- Qt;
- schema.

Do not ignore meaningful.

======================================================================
1956. THREAD LEAK REVIEW
======================================================================

After pytest/UI smoke no hanging worker.

======================================================================
1957. FILE HANDLE REVIEW
======================================================================

Use context managers.

No Windows locked temp due unclosed.

======================================================================
1958. TEMP CLEANUP REVIEW
======================================================================

Tests clean automatically.

Production only known temp.

======================================================================
1959. REAL DATA DIFF REVIEW
======================================================================

Any file under real directories classify.

Do not remove.

======================================================================
1960. GIT UNTRACKED REVIEW
======================================================================

Distinguish:

- source/tests/docs new;
- test artifact accidental;
- real user data.

No clean.

======================================================================
1961. FINAL REPORT DELTA AUDIT
======================================================================

Include actual audit summary, not full internal thought.

======================================================================
1962. FINAL REPORT FILE PLAN RESULT
======================================================================

Show planned vs actual deviations.

If source required different naming, explain.

======================================================================
1963. FINAL REPORT MODELS
======================================================================

List actual models/enums/state.

======================================================================
1964. FINAL REPORT PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Storage layout/repositories/registry.

======================================================================
1965. FINAL REPORT TEXT PIPELINE
======================================================================

Source/normalization/structure/split/no-loss.

======================================================================
1966. FINAL REPORT PLANNER
======================================================================

Snapshot/effective settings/Plan freeze.

======================================================================
1967. FINAL REPORT OUTPUT
======================================================================

Path/Artifact/validation/Manifest.

======================================================================
1968. FINAL REPORT RESUME RETRY RECOVERY
======================================================================

Actual capabilities and blockers.

======================================================================
1969. FINAL REPORT JOB RESOURCE
======================================================================

Production handler status.

======================================================================
1970. FINAL REPORT PROJECT REFERENCE
======================================================================

Lifecycle/package/asset IDs.

======================================================================
1971. FINAL REPORT API UI
======================================================================

Routes/pages/readiness.

======================================================================
1972. FINAL REPORT MIGRATION COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Actual.

======================================================================
1973. FINAL REPORT TESTS
======================================================================

Actual counts/commands.

======================================================================
1974. FINAL REPORT DATA SAFETY
======================================================================

Actual.

======================================================================
1975. FINAL REPORT READINESS
======================================================================

Capability table.

======================================================================
1976. FINAL REPORT BLOCKERS
======================================================================

Specific.

======================================================================
1977. FINAL REPORT GIT STATUS
======================================================================

One of defined statuses.

======================================================================
1978. NO CLAIM “FULL GENERATE”
======================================================================

Unless real production handler integrated and tests/readiness support.

Foundation Sprint wording.

======================================================================
1979. NO CLAIM “MP3 READY”
======================================================================

Unless actual.

======================================================================
1980. NO CLAIM “PREVIEW AUDIO READY”
======================================================================

Unless actual.

======================================================================
1981. NO CLAIM “BATCH AUDIO COMPLETE”
======================================================================

Unless actual production execution.

Batch planning/orchestration can be ready.

======================================================================
1982. NO CLAIM “RESUME RUNS”
======================================================================

If handler unavailable, Resume inspection ready/action unavailable.

State exact.

======================================================================
1983. NO CLAIM “RETRY RUNS”
======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================
1984. NO CLAIM “OUTPUT VALIDATION FULL”
======================================================================

If FFprobe missing, degraded/basic.

======================================================================
1985. NO CLAIM “WORKTREE CLEAN”
======================================================================

If real data.

======================================================================
1986. FINAL STATUS LOGIC
======================================================================

Use:

READY_FOR_GITHUB_REVIEW

only if all criteria and worktree policy.

Use:

SOURCE_DOCS_TESTS_READY
WORKTREE_NOT_CLEAN_DUE_TO_REAL_USER_DATA

when source/docs/tests ready but real data remains.

Use:

NOT_READY

for implementation/test blockers.

======================================================================
1987. SOURCE FIRST OVERRIDE
======================================================================

Nếu any detail in PART 05 conflicts with verified source convention:

- preserve safety;
- preserve responsibilities;
- adapt naming/layout;
- document mapping;
- no duplicate system.

Không bỏ requirement cốt lõi.

======================================================================
1988. MASTER PART CONSISTENCY
======================================================================

PART 05 tiếp tục trực tiếp PART 01–04.

Giữ nguyên:

- Sprint AVS-014.16;
- PHASE 0–12;
- canonical domain separation;
- persistent Source Snapshot;
- immutable Plan;
- Unit/Attempt split;
- Artifact validation authority;
- Manifest rebuild;
- Resume no rerun valid;
- Retry new Attempt;
- Job Queue sole scheduler;
- Resource Manager sole resource authority;
- Reference Vault asset IDs;
- Engine-neutral core;
- no fake production inference;
- no Train;
- no Analyzer;
- no GPT-SoVITS runtime modification;
- no real user data mutation;
- no Git write operation;
- honest readiness;
- full tests/docs.

======================================================================
1989. CONTINUATION RULE
======================================================================

Nếu còn PART tiếp theo:

- bắt đầu từ mục 1990;
- nối đúng Master Prompt;
- không sửa nội dung các PART trước;
- không đổi tên canonical đã khóa;
- không đổi PHASE;
- không tuyên bố toàn bộ Prompt kết thúc cho tới marker cuối thật sự.

===== KẾT THÚC PART 05 — CHƯA KẾT THÚC TOÀN BỘ PROMPT =====
# AI VOICE STUDIO
# MASTER IMPLEMENTATION PROMPT
# AVS-014.16 — GENERATE PIPELINE FOUNDATION
# PART 06

======================================================================
1990. GENERATE APPLICATION SERVICE — TRANSACTION COORDINATION
======================================================================

GenerateApplicationService phải điều phối transaction ở cấp use case.

Không được thay thế trách nhiệm của:

- Repository;
- Planner;
- Output Manager;
- Job Queue;
- Resource Manager;
- EngineManager;
- Reference Vault.

Application Service chịu trách nhiệm:

- kiểm tra action availability;
- tạo operation_id;
- gọi đúng domain service;
- phối hợp persistence;
- map result;
- publish event sau persistence;
- trả structured operation result.

Không chứa thuật toán chia văn bản.

Không trực tiếp thao tác file Audio.

======================================================================
1991. CREATE REQUEST USE CASE
======================================================================

Flow tạo Request:

1. Resolve Project.
2. Kiểm tra Project writable/active.
3. Parse input DTO.
4. Validate JSON-safe metadata.
5. Validate source mode sơ bộ.
6. Validate immutable selection IDs sơ bộ nếu có.
7. Tính input fingerprint.
8. Kiểm tra idempotency.
9. Tạo GenerateRequest.
10. Persist Request.
11. Tạo validation report sơ bộ nếu cần.
12. Publish request.created.
13. Trả Request summary.

Không materialize source lớn trong cùng bước nếu architecture đã chọn materialize sau.

======================================================================
1992. UPDATE REQUEST USE CASE
======================================================================

Chỉ Request draft/invalid phù hợp mới được update.

Update phải:

- nhận expected_revision nếu hệ thống hỗ trợ;
- không cho đổi request_id;
- không cho đổi project_id;
- không cho sửa materialized_session_id;
- validate source conflict;
- invalidate validation cũ khi field ảnh hưởng thay đổi;
- tăng revision;
- update updated_at;
- persist atomic;
- publish request.updated nếu Event Bus có.

======================================================================
1993. VALIDATE REQUEST USE CASE
======================================================================

Validation nên có hai scope:

- planning;
- execution.

Planning validation:

- Project;
- source;
- Voice/Variant/Style/Reference identity;
- Engine metadata;
- settings;
- output policy;
- path template.

Execution validation bổ sung:

- Engine handler;
- runtime;
- model/reference availability;
- output format capability;
- resource support;
- disk policy.

Không tạo Job trong validation.

======================================================================
1994. MATERIALIZE REQUEST USE CASE
======================================================================

Materialize Request phải:

- idempotent;
- giữ Request lineage;
- tạo Session đúng một lần;
- tạo Source Snapshot;
- tạo selection/settings snapshot;
- tạo operation report;
- không tạo Plan frozen nếu extraction/validation lỗi;
- không đánh dấu Request materialized trước Session commit hợp lệ.

Nếu Session đã tồn tại:

- trả Session hiện tại;
- không tạo duplicate.

======================================================================
1995. PLAN SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Plan Session phải:

- kiểm tra Session state;
- kiểm tra Source Snapshot;
- kiểm tra operation conflict;
- gọi normalization/structure/split/planner;
- persist frozen Plan;
- tạo Manifest draft;
- update Session;
- update Registry;
- publish session.planned.

Không tạo execution Job nếu chỉ plan.

======================================================================
1996. QUEUE SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Queue Session phải:

- kiểm tra Plan frozen;
- kiểm tra readiness execution;
- kiểm tra active operation/Job;
- tạo Attempt cần thiết;
- tạo Job graph qua Job Queue;
- persist IDs;
- transition Session planned/paused/partial phù hợp → queued;
- publish event.

Nếu handler unavailable:

- không tạo Attempt/Job dở dang mặc định;
- trả blocker rõ;
- giữ Session planned.

======================================================================
1997. PAUSE SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Pause phải:

- kiểm tra action matrix;
- ghi pause_requested_at/reason;
- gọi Job Queue pause liên quan;
- transition running/queued/waiting phù hợp → pausing;
- chờ reconciliation để paused;
- không đánh dấu paused tức thời nếu Job đang xử lý không hỗ trợ pause.

======================================================================
1998. CANCEL SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Cancel phải:

- idempotent;
- ghi cancel request;
- gọi Job Queue cancel cho Job liên quan;
- ngăn Job mới;
- giữ Artifact valid;
- không xóa output;
- cập nhật Session state qua cancelling;
- finalize Manifest cancelled khi reconciliation xong.

======================================================================
1999. RESUME SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Resume gồm hai bước:

1. Inspection.
2. Execution.

Inspection:

- không mutate execution state;
- phân loại Units;
- kiểm tra blockers;
- tạo report.

Execution:

- xác minh report/fingerprint;
- tạo Attempts/Jobs cho Unit eligible;
- không queue lại Unit valid;
- transition Session → queued;
- persist operation.

======================================================================
2000. RETRY UNIT USE CASE
======================================================================

Retry Unit phải:

- kiểm tra Unit thuộc frozen Plan;
- kiểm tra latest Attempt;
- kiểm tra retryable;
- kiểm tra limit;
- kiểm tra active Job;
- tạo Attempt mới;
- tạo Job idempotent;
- không đụng Artifact valid;
- update retry count;
- publish event.

======================================================================
2001. RETRY CHAPTER USE CASE
======================================================================

Retry Chapter phải:

- query Units theo Chapter ID;
- phân loại eligible/ineligible;
- không retry Unit valid;
- tạo operation batch;
- mỗi Unit có Attempt mới;
- Job graph qua Queue;
- report chi tiết;
- không rollback mù quáng nếu batch partial.

======================================================================
2002. REVALIDATE SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Revalidate phải kiểm tra:

- Source Snapshot;
- selection references;
- Voice/Variant/Style;
- Engine;
- Plan checksum;
- output paths;
- Artifacts;
- consistency;
- current readiness.

Không mutate frozen snapshots.

Có thể update:

- validation report pointers;
- health;
- blockers;
- registry summary.

======================================================================
2003. REBUILD MANIFEST USE CASE
======================================================================

Rebuild Manifest:

- lock Session ngắn;
- đọc entity graph;
- tạo Manifest mới/revision;
- validate;
- atomic finalize;
- update latest manifest pointer;
- không thay Plan;
- không thay Attempt history;
- update Registry.

======================================================================
2004. ARCHIVE SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Archive chỉ khi:

- Session terminal;
- hoặc active đã pause/cancel theo policy.

Archive:

- set archived;
- pre_archive_status;
- archived_at;
- Registry active filter update;
- không xóa file;
- không thay Session ID.

======================================================================
2005. RESTORE SESSION USE CASE
======================================================================

Restore:

- clear archived;
- revalidate consistency;
- restore safe lifecycle state;
- không auto Resume;
- không auto Retry;
- update Registry;
- publish event.

======================================================================
2006. CLONE SESSION AS REQUEST USE CASE
======================================================================

Clone:

- đọc frozen snapshots;
- tạo Request mới;
- copy requested/effective values thành draft input;
- giữ immutable IDs nếu entity còn;
- không copy Job/Attempt/Artifact/Manifest;
- revalidate;
- source reuse theo policy;
- operation idempotent.

======================================================================
2007. APPLICATION SERVICE ERROR BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Application Service phải bắt các domain exceptions đã biết và map result.

Không broad catch rồi trả success=false chung chung.

Mọi lỗi phải có:

- code;
- message;
- developer detail bounded;
- operation_id;
- entity_id;
- retryable;
- report ID nếu có.

======================================================================
2008. APPLICATION SERVICE EVENT ORDER
======================================================================

Mutation event chỉ publish sau:

- entity persistence;
- registry update hoặc warning;
- operation record update.

Nếu Registry lỗi nhưng entity thành công:

- event có warning/rebuild_required;
- không giả rollback.

======================================================================
2009. APPLICATION SERVICE TESTS
======================================================================

Test từng use case:

- happy path;
- invalid state;
- idempotent replay;
- stale revision;
- persistence failure;
- registry failure;
- event failure;
- action unavailable;
- Project archived/read-only;
- no production handler.

======================================================================
2010. REQUEST FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Request fingerprint có thể gồm:

- project_id;
- source descriptor/checksum nếu có;
- selected IDs;
- requested parameters;
- split settings;
- output settings.

Không gồm:

- timestamps;
- display names nếu rename không ảnh hưởng;
- operation_id;
- secrets.

Dùng cho idempotency/conflict, không làm Request ID.

======================================================================
2011. SESSION MATERIALIZATION FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- Request ID/revision;
- source checksum;
- selection checksum;
- settings checksum.

Nếu Request revision thay đổi sau operation key cũ:

- conflict;
- không trả Session từ payload khác mà không cảnh báo.

======================================================================
2012. PLAN STRUCTURAL CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Plan checksum phải bao gồm:

- schema/version;
- source normalized checksum;
- structure checksum;
- ordered entity structural data;
- selection snapshot checksum;
- effective settings checksum;
- output specification checksum.

Không bao gồm:

- mutable progress;
- Attempt;
- Job;
- updated_at sau freeze.

======================================================================
2013. SESSION CONSISTENCY FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Consistency scan có thể tạo fingerprint từ:

- Session revision;
- Plan checksum;
- latest manifest checksum;
- counts;
- active IDs;
- Artifact state summary.

Dùng để tránh tạo report duplicate khi không thay đổi.

======================================================================
2014. RESUME INSPECTION FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Gồm:

- Session revision;
- Plan checksum;
- ordered Unit status/latest Attempt/Artifact health;
- active Job IDs;
- readiness summary.

Nếu fingerprint thay đổi trước execute:

- re-inspect.

======================================================================
2015. RETRY INSPECTION FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Unit retry:

- Unit ID/revision;
- latest Attempt ID/status;
- Artifact health;
- retry count;
- Session revision;
- readiness.

Chapter retry:

- ordered eligible Unit fingerprints.

======================================================================
2016. OUTPUT COLLISION FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Có thể dựa:

- normalized destination path;
- existing file size/mtime/checksum if known;
- registered Artifact ID/status;
- collision policy.

Recheck runtime.

======================================================================
2017. SOURCE EXTERNAL PROVENANCE FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Draft Request có thể lưu:

- path;
- size;
- mtime;
- checksum optional.

Không dùng làm managed identity.

======================================================================
2018. READINESS FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Readiness cache key có thể gồm:

- Project state/version;
- Engine registry version;
- handler registry version;
- Resource Policy version;
- hardware profile version;
- Reference validation revision;
- output capability/FFprobe state.

Không cache theo display name.

======================================================================
2019. SELECTION RESOLUTION TRACE
======================================================================

GenerateSelectionResolver nên trả trace có cấu trúc:

- field;
- source layer;
- requested value;
- effective value;
- override applied;
- validation issue.

Ví dụ source layer:

- global_default;
- project_default;
- voice_default;
- variant_override;
- style_override;
- request;
- engine_capability.

Không cần persist trace toàn bộ nếu lớn, nhưng report/effective snapshot đủ.

======================================================================
2020. SETTINGS MERGE IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Merge phải tạo object mới.

Không mutate:

- global settings;
- Project settings;
- Voice;
- Variant;
- Style Profile;
- Request input.

Test deep copy/immutability.

======================================================================
2021. ENGINE OPTION MERGE WHITELIST
======================================================================

Engine options chỉ merge keys được provider schema cho phép.

Unknown key:

- error hoặc warning theo strict policy;
- không silently pass.

Không cho override core fields.

======================================================================
2022. OUTPUT SETTING MERGE
======================================================================

Output settings merge riêng với Engine options.

Engine không được override:

- Project output root;
- naming template;
- overwrite policy;

trừ capability constraints.

======================================================================
2023. SPLIT SETTING MERGE
======================================================================

Split settings có thể bị Engine max giới hạn.

Phải lưu:

- requested;
- effective;
- reason.

Không âm thầm clamp.

======================================================================
2024. RETRY POLICY MERGE
======================================================================

Session snapshot retry policy từ:

- application defaults;
- Project;
- Request explicit.

Không lấy policy mới khi Resume.

======================================================================
2025. RESOURCE POLICY REFERENCE
======================================================================

Session có thể lưu Resource Policy ID/version dùng lúc Plan.

Actual decision runtime dùng current policy hoặc snapshot policy theo hệ thống.

Phải document.

Không cho Session tự thực thi policy.

======================================================================
2026. PROJECT SETTINGS SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Session settings snapshot phải đủ để không thay đổi khi Project defaults đổi.

Không cần copy unrelated Project settings.

======================================================================
2027. VOICE DEFAULT SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Voice defaults ảnh hưởng output phải snapshot.

Không chỉ lưu voice_id.

======================================================================
2028. VARIANT SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Variant overrides snapshot.

Nếu Variant entity bị xóa, Session vẫn hiển thị/đọc effective values.

Execution có thể cần Voice model/reference; revalidate.

======================================================================
2029. STYLE SETTINGS SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Style settings có ảnh hưởng phải snapshot.

Asset IDs/checksums.

Không live-read Style Profile mỗi Unit để lấy mutable values.

======================================================================
2030. REFERENCE VALIDATION SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Lưu:

- report ID;
- checked_at;
- asset IDs;
- checksums;
- segment;
- validity;
- validator version.

Execution revalidate current state.

======================================================================
2031. ENGINE CAPABILITY SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Lưu capability có ảnh hưởng:

- max text;
- supported formats;
- required refs;
- parameter support;
- resource template version.

Không cần lưu toàn provider object.

======================================================================
2032. SNAPSHOT DISPLAY NAME POLICY
======================================================================

Display name tại thời điểm tạo để lịch sử.

Không đưa display name vào identity/checksum reproducibility nếu không ảnh hưởng.
