======================================================================
2033. SNAPSHOT SERIALIZATION TEST
======================================================================

Rename/delete current entities sau snapshot:

- roundtrip vẫn hiển thị lịch sử;
- ID/checksum giữ;
- no fallback.

======================================================================
2034. SNAPSHOT SCHEMA MIGRATION
======================================================================

Migration schema-only phải không đổi semantic effective values.

Không tự refresh snapshot từ current entity.

======================================================================
2035. SOURCE SNAPSHOT MULTI-DOCUMENT
======================================================================

Core model có thể hỗ trợ nhiều Source Snapshot/Document trong một Session.

Nếu UI chỉ một file:

- Request materializes một Document;
- repository/API không hardcode impossible extension.

Không cần batch multi-file UI nếu ngoài scope.

======================================================================
2036. MULTI-DOCUMENT ORDER
======================================================================

Explicit document_order.

Không sort filename.

======================================================================
2037. MULTI-DOCUMENT OUTPUT
======================================================================

Output path bao gồm document index/ID để tránh collision.

Không cần implement multi-document merge.

======================================================================
2038. MULTI-DOCUMENT PLAN FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Ordered document checksums.

======================================================================
2039. MULTI-DOCUMENT BACKUP
======================================================================

Package includes all source snapshots theo mode.

======================================================================
2040. DOCUMENT STATUS COMPUTATION
======================================================================

Document status computed từ Chapters.

Không được set tùy ý bởi UI.

======================================================================
2041. DOCUMENT HEALTH
======================================================================

Có thể derived từ source/Plan/Artifact health.

Không bắt buộc model enum riêng nếu summary.

======================================================================
2042. CHAPTER TITLE NORMALIZATION
======================================================================

Giữ raw title và optional normalized display title.

Không thay raw source.

Filename uses sanitized separate.

======================================================================
2043. CHAPTER DUPLICATE TITLE
======================================================================

Không lỗi Plan nếu title trùng.

Output uniqueness bằng index/ID.

======================================================================
2044. CHAPTER NUMBER EXTRACTION
======================================================================

Có thể lưu detected ordinal text/number nếu rule chắc chắn.

Không dùng làm identity/order duy nhất.

Order theo position.

======================================================================
2045. CHAPTER NESTED HEADING
======================================================================

Nếu DOCX nested:

- flatten theo policy;
- lưu heading_level;
- không tạo complex tree nếu ngoài scope.

Không mất text.

======================================================================
2046. CHAPTER STRUCTURE REPORT
======================================================================

Report warning cho:

- fallback single chapter;
- consecutive headings;
- empty body;
- duplicate titles;
- low-confidence rule nếu có.

======================================================================
2047. PARAGRAPH PRESERVATION
======================================================================

Unit text phải giữ paragraph separators theo normalized source.

Engine may receive newlines.

Không flatten mặc định.

======================================================================
2048. SENTENCE COUNT
======================================================================

Unit sentence_count từ structure spans.

Hard split fragments có thể count policy rõ.

Không dùng count làm identity.

======================================================================
2049. WORD COUNT
======================================================================

Optional.

Nếu implement, dùng simple deterministic tokenizer documented.

Không cần dependency NLP.

======================================================================
2050. CHARACTER COUNT
======================================================================

Normalized Unicode code points.

Không byte length.

Output storage estimate có thể dùng bytes separate.

======================================================================
2051. UNIT SOURCE RANGE PREVIEW
======================================================================

Query service có thể trả bounded raw/normalized context quanh Unit.

Không UI tự slice external file.

======================================================================
2052. UNIT CHECKSUM VALIDATION
======================================================================

Khi load frozen Plan:

- checksum Unit text;
- mismatch → corrupt/recovery;
- không sửa tự động.

======================================================================
2053. UNIT SELECTION REFERENCE
======================================================================

Ưu tiên one Session selection_snapshot_id.

Nếu future Unit-specific variation:

- explicit override ID/checksum;
- model extensible.

Sprint không tự tạo nhiều selection per Unit.

======================================================================
2054. UNIT OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
======================================================================

Mỗi Unit có required Artifact specifications từ OutputSpec.

Không assume one WAV nếu Request khác.

======================================================================
2055. UNIT DEPENDENCY
======================================================================

Mặc định Unit execution độc lập, order chỉ output.

Nếu Engine/session stateful cần sequential future:

- capability/dependency policy.

Không hardcode sequence nếu không cần.

======================================================================
2056. UNIT SKIP ACTION
======================================================================

Không bắt buộc UI/API Sprint này.

Model hỗ trợ explicit skip metadata.

Không auto skip Engine failure.

======================================================================
2057. UNIT BLOCKED STATE
======================================================================

Blocked nếu Unit-specific prerequisite không đạt.

Có thể Session vẫn partially runnable nếu policy.

Status computation phải xử lý.

======================================================================
2058. PARTIAL RUNNABILITY
======================================================================

Nếu một số Unit blocked do Unit-specific issue:

- Queue policy có thể chạy Units khác nếu continue policy;
- hoặc block whole Session.

Default lựa chọn phải document.

Không tự chạy partial nếu Request yêu cầu strict.

======================================================================
2059. STRICT SESSION POLICY
======================================================================

Có thể setting:

- stop_on_invalid_reference;
- continue_on_unit_failure;
- continue_on_chapter_failure.

Không thêm quá nhiều policy nếu source chưa cần.

Snapshot.

======================================================================
2060. UNIT RETRYABLE COMPUTATION
======================================================================

Retryable không chỉ lưu boolean cũ.

Có thể recompute từ:

- latest Attempt category;
- retry policy;
- count;
- current readiness;
- Session state;
- Artifact health.

Summary lưu cache.

======================================================================
2061. ATTEMPT PARENT LINEAGE
======================================================================

Retry Attempt parent_attempt_id = latest relevant Attempt.

Không tạo chain vòng.

Consistency test.

======================================================================
2062. ATTEMPT INITIAL VS RETRY
======================================================================

Có thể field:

- attempt_kind: initial/retry/resume/recovery.

Hoặc execution_mode/retry_reason đủ.

Không bắt buộc enum mới nếu thừa.

======================================================================
2063. ATTEMPT JOB HISTORY
======================================================================

Nếu infrastructure retry tạo nhiều Job records cho một Attempt:

- primary job_id + job_ids;
- hoặc Job repository query by attempt_id.

Không mất linkage.

======================================================================
2064. ATTEMPT OUTPUT MULTIPLICITY
======================================================================

output_artifact_ids list.

Không one-to-one assumption.

======================================================================
2065. ATTEMPT METRICS
======================================================================

Metrics JSON-safe/bounded.

Không nhúng model tensors.

======================================================================
2066. ATTEMPT LOG SIZE
======================================================================

Reference log only.

No full stderr.

======================================================================
2067. ATTEMPT INTERRUPTED RECOVERY
======================================================================

Interrupted terminal for old Attempt.

Resume creates new Attempt.

Không đổi old Attempt back running.

======================================================================
2068. ATTEMPT INVALID_OUTPUT
======================================================================

Engine execution có thể hoàn thành nhưng output validation không đạt.

Attempt status invalid_output.

Error category output_validation.

Retryable policy.

======================================================================
2069. ATTEMPT SUCCEEDED CONDITION
======================================================================

Tất cả required Unit Artifacts của Attempt valid.

Optional Artifact warnings không ngăn nếu policy.

======================================================================
2070. ATTEMPT CANCELLED OUTPUT
======================================================================

Nếu cancellation nhưng output temp/final exists:

- không tự valid;
- recovery/validation;
- status cancelled;
- Artifact may be orphan/invalid;
- preserve evidence.

======================================================================
2071. ATTEMPT FAILED OUTPUT
======================================================================

Same conservative.

======================================================================
2072. ATTEMPT DURATION
======================================================================

finished_at - started_at.

Không use Engine-reported duration làm processing duration.

Audio duration separate Artifact.

======================================================================
2073. ARTIFACT CHECKSUM ALGORITHM
======================================================================

Dùng project checksum algorithm, ưu tiên SHA-256.

Store algorithm nếu utility supports multiple.

======================================================================
2074. ARTIFACT SIZE VALIDATION
======================================================================

Size bytes non-negative.

minimum_output_bytes từ OutputSpec.

Không coi >0 luôn valid.

======================================================================
2075. ARTIFACT DURATION VALIDATION
======================================================================

duration_seconds finite >0 khi full validation required.

No NaN/Infinity.

======================================================================
2076. ARTIFACT SAMPLE RATE
======================================================================

Positive integer.

Engine/output policy may validate expected range.

Không hardcode 32k nếu Engine supports khác, trừ actual project convention.

======================================================================
2077. ARTIFACT CHANNELS
======================================================================

Positive.

Mono/stereo capability.

Không auto convert.

======================================================================
2078. ARTIFACT CODEC
======================================================================

Probe metadata.

No assumption extension alone.

======================================================================
2079. ARTIFACT PATH IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Artifact physical relative path không đổi sau valid, trừ explicit publish/migration.

Rename Session không đổi.

======================================================================
2080. ARTIFACT SUPERSEDED LINEAGE
======================================================================

Fields:

- superseded_by_artifact_id;
- supersedes_artifact_id optional;
- superseded_at;
- reason.

No delete.

======================================================================
2081. ARTIFACT QUARANTINE STATUS
======================================================================

Có thể represent invalid file location metadata.

Không bắt buộc enum quarantine nếu status invalid + path.

======================================================================
2082. ARTIFACT EXTERNAL AVAILABILITY
======================================================================

External Artifact có:

- managed=false;
- external=true;
- availability;
- provenance.

Package omission explicit.

======================================================================
2083. ARTIFACT VALIDATION CACHE
======================================================================

Cache key:

- artifact_id;
- size;
- mtime;
- checksum/report version.

Current validity must invalidate when file changes.

======================================================================
2084. ARTIFACT PROBE SERVICE ABSTRACTION
======================================================================

Output validator dùng AudioProbeService hiện có.

Không gọi ffprobe trực tiếp nếu service tồn tại.

======================================================================
2085. PROBE RESULT MODEL
======================================================================

JSON-safe:

- available;
- valid;
- format;
- duration;
- streams;
- codec;
- sample_rate;
- channels;
- error.

No raw process object.

======================================================================
2086. PROBE ERROR CLASSIFICATION
======================================================================

- executable unavailable;
- timeout;
- process failure;
- malformed response;
- invalid media;
- permission.

======================================================================
2087. PROBE SECURITY
======================================================================

Argument list.

No shell.

Timeout.

Path validated.

======================================================================
2088. PROBE LOGGING
======================================================================

No raw full command with sensitive path in API.

Internal bounded.

======================================================================
2089. MANIFEST DOCUMENT SUMMARY
======================================================================

Per Document:

- document_id;
- source checksum;
- counts;
- status;
- health;
- chapter IDs/count;
- output summary.

No full text.

======================================================================
2090. MANIFEST CHAPTER SUMMARY
======================================================================

- chapter_id;
- order;
- title snapshot;
- unit counts/status;
- output IDs;
- failure summary.

No full body.

======================================================================
2091. MANIFEST UNIT SUMMARY
======================================================================

- unit_id;
- order;
- text checksum;
- status;
- latest Attempt;
- Artifact IDs;
- validation;
- error code.

No full text by default.

======================================================================
2092. MANIFEST ATTEMPT SUMMARY
======================================================================

As previous.

No traceback/runtime full.

======================================================================
2093. MANIFEST JOB LINKS
======================================================================

- Job IDs;
- types;
- historical/current status summary;
- no full logs.

======================================================================
2094. MANIFEST RESOURCE LINKS
======================================================================

- lease IDs;
- decision summaries;
- policy/hardware versions.

No full hardware profile.

======================================================================
2095. MANIFEST FAILURE SUMMARY
======================================================================

Grouped codes/counts.

No huge list.

======================================================================
2096. MANIFEST RETRY SUMMARY
======================================================================

- attempts total;
- retry Units;
- retry Chapters;
- max reached count;
- latest retry report IDs.

======================================================================
2097. MANIFEST RESUME SUMMARY
======================================================================

- resume operations;
- resumed Units count;
- skipped valid count;
- latest report.

======================================================================
2098. MANIFEST HEALTH SUMMARY
======================================================================

Current at build time.

Historical final Manifest health timestamp.

Later changes separate report/revision.

======================================================================
2099. MANIFEST SOURCE OF TRUTH REFERENCES
======================================================================

Manifest includes repository entity IDs/checksums.

Allows verification/rebuild.

======================================================================
2100. MANIFEST EXPORT SAFETY
======================================================================

No absolute paths/secrets.

Relative paths and IDs.

======================================================================
2101. MANIFEST PACKAGE ROLE
======================================================================

Project package can include final/draft Manifest.

Package manifest distinct from GenerateManifest.

Do not confuse names.

======================================================================
2102. GENERATE REGISTRY SUMMARY MAPPER
======================================================================

Central mapper from Session/Plan/progress/health.

UI/API không tự build khác nhau.

======================================================================
2103. REGISTRY ENTRY SOURCE NAME
======================================================================

Use source snapshot original filename/display.

No absolute path.

======================================================================
2104. REGISTRY ENTRY VOICE NAME
======================================================================

Snapshot display name.

Current rename optional query enrichment, not identity.

======================================================================
2105. REGISTRY ENTRY ERROR
======================================================================

Latest error code/message bounded.

No traceback.

======================================================================
2106. REGISTRY ENTRY OUTPUT
======================================================================

Primary output count/status/availability.

No full list.

======================================================================
2107. REGISTRY ENTRY READINESS
======================================================================

Có thể cache capability summary, nhưng readiness volatile.

UI should query current readiness for actions.

Registry only last known.

======================================================================
2108. REGISTRY ENTRY RECOVERY
======================================================================

recovery_required flag/report ID.

======================================================================
2109. REGISTRY REBUILD PERFORMANCE
======================================================================

Read session.json/summary only.

Không read Plan Units/output binaries.

Nếu count fields missing:

- mark degraded;
- deep repair explicit.

======================================================================
2110. SESSION SUMMARY CACHE
======================================================================

Session.json itself can hold counts to rebuild Registry.

Progress recompute updates.

======================================================================
2111. PROGRESS CACHE VALIDATION
======================================================================

Cache includes computed_from_revision/fingerprint.

Consistency service can detect stale.

======================================================================
2112. PROGRESS PERCENT ROUNDING
======================================================================

Central policy.

Ví dụ one decimal hoặc integer theo UI convention.

Persist raw numeric.

No cumulative rounding.

======================================================================
2113. ZERO-UNIT SESSION
======================================================================

Plan invalid.

Session cannot complete.

Progress percent null/0 according policy.

======================================================================
2114. ALL-SKIPPED SESSION
======================================================================

Completion chỉ nếu skip policy explicitly permits.

Otherwise partial/failed.

Document.

======================================================================
2115. OPTIONAL UNIT
======================================================================

Không cần Unit optional trong current model trừ role/policy.

Nếu có, required flag.

Completion calculations use required.

======================================================================
2116. REQUIRED UNIT COUNT
======================================================================

Plan records total_required_units.

Progress denominator.

======================================================================
2117. ACTIVE UNIT COUNT
======================================================================

Statuses:

- queued;
- waiting_dependency;
- waiting_resource;
- running;
- retry_wait;
- paused? Define separate.

No overlap.

======================================================================
2118. PENDING UNIT COUNT
======================================================================

pending/ready not queued.

======================================================================
2119. TERMINAL UNIT COUNT
======================================================================

succeeded/failed/skipped/cancelled.

blocked/recovery may non-terminal.

======================================================================
2120. SESSION STATUS COMPUTATION PRIORITY
======================================================================

Possible priority:

1. archived wrapper;
2. cancelling/cancelled;
3. recovery_required;
4. pausing/paused;
5. running;
6. waiting_resource;
7. queued/waiting_dependency;
8. partial terminal;
9. failed;
10. completed;
11. planned/ready/draft.

Must align state machine and explicit transition, not purely override all states.

Use helper as validation/reconciliation.

======================================================================
2121. CHAPTER STATUS COMPUTATION PRIORITY
======================================================================

Similar from Units.

No direct Job status.

======================================================================
2122. DOCUMENT STATUS COMPUTATION PRIORITY
======================================================================

From Chapters.

======================================================================
2123. SESSION FINAL STATUS POLICY
======================================================================

Given all required Units terminal:

- all valid/success or permitted skipped → completed;
- some valid + failures under continue policy → partially_completed;
- no valid + failures → failed;
- cancellation request wins → cancelled.

Manifest must match.

======================================================================
2124. SESSION FINALIZATION RACE
======================================================================

Two finalizers:

- lock;
- idempotent;
- one Manifest finalization;
- other returns existing.

======================================================================
2125. FINALIZER ACTIVE JOB CHECK
======================================================================

No active required Unit Job.

Stale Job reconciliation first.

======================================================================
2126. FINALIZER OUTPUT CHECK
======================================================================

Required Artifacts current valid.

No metadata-only success.

======================================================================
2127. FINALIZER MANIFEST CHECK
======================================================================

Build/finalize atomic before Session completed.

======================================================================
2128. FINALIZER REGISTRY FAILURE
======================================================================

Session/Manifest remain completed; Registry rebuild required.

Operation warning.

======================================================================
2129. FINALIZER EVENT FAILURE
======================================================================

No rollback.

======================================================================
2130. FINALIZER TEST MATRIX
======================================================================

- all success;
- optional failure;
- required failure;
- partial;
- cancelled;
- active Job;
- invalid Artifact;
- Manifest write fail;
- Registry fail;
- duplicate finalizer.

======================================================================
2131. SESSION PAUSE FINALIZATION CONFLICT
======================================================================

If all Units finish while pause requested:

- decide final completed vs paused;
- completed should win if fully finalized before pause semantics;
- state machine/reason document.

No paused completed Session ambiguity.

======================================================================
2132. SESSION CANCEL FINALIZATION CONFLICT
======================================================================

Cancellation timing authority must be deterministic.

If cancel request persisted before finalizer commit:

- final status cancelled or policy, even if outputs valid;
- preserve outputs.

If completed committed before cancel:

- cancel rejected/no-op.

Test.

======================================================================
2133. RETRY FINALIZATION CONFLICT
======================================================================

Retry cannot start while finalizer lock/terminal completed unless partial/failed eligible.

Stale action rejected.

======================================================================
2134. RECOVERY FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Recovery can call finalizer only after strong evidence and validation.

No guess.

======================================================================
2135. MANIFEST CANCELLED FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Manifest final can record partial valid outputs.

status cancelled.

======================================================================
2136. MANIFEST FAILED FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Plan/source/selection/failure summary.

Outputs if any.

======================================================================
2137. MANIFEST PARTIAL FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Clearly list failed/skipped/valid counts.

======================================================================
2138. MANIFEST ARCHIVE
======================================================================

Archive metadata not necessarily change final Manifest.

Could have Session archive field outside.

======================================================================
2139. SESSION HEALTH AFTER ARCHIVE
======================================================================

History health can still be checked.

No mutation execution.

======================================================================
2140. SESSION RESTORE FROM ARCHIVE
======================================================================

Terminal history restored for viewing.

Actions depend status/readiness.

No direct running.

======================================================================
2141. ERROR CODE REGISTRY
======================================================================

Nếu project có error registry/catalog, add Generate codes there.

Không rải constants.

======================================================================
2142. ERROR CODE STABILITY
======================================================================

Persisted error codes must not change casually.

User message can improve without migration.

======================================================================
2143. ERROR MESSAGE LOCALIZATION
======================================================================

Store code; UI maps Vietnamese.

Persist message snapshot optional.

No translated string as logic.

======================================================================
2144. ERROR DETAILS STRUCTURE
======================================================================

JSON-safe:

- stage;
- entity;
- check;
- expected;
- actual bounded;
- related IDs;
- log reference.

No full source/secret/path external.

======================================================================
2145. ERROR RETRYABLE SOURCE
======================================================================

Retryable derived from error category + policy, not client input.

======================================================================
2146. SUGGESTED ACTION CATALOG
======================================================================

Stable action codes:

- OPEN_PROJECT;
- SELECT_VOICE;
- SELECT_ENGINE;
- REPAIR_REFERENCE;
- REVALIDATE;
- FREE_DISK_SPACE;
- OPEN_RESOURCE_MONITOR;
- CREATE_NEW_SESSION;
- REBUILD_MANIFEST;
- INSPECT_RECOVERY;
- RETRY;
- RESUME.

UI maps action availability.

No executable arbitrary action from server.

======================================================================
2147. VALIDATION SEVERITY POLICY
======================================================================

Critical examples:

- path traversal;
- corrupt Plan;
- future schema write;
- managed checksum mismatch.

Error examples:

- source missing before snapshot;
- Voice missing;
- invalid settings.

Warning examples:

- hard split;
- title fallback;
- FFprobe missing in basic mode;
- estimated duration unavailable.

======================================================================
2148. VALIDATION ISSUE FIELD PATH
======================================================================

Use stable field names:

- source.path;
- selection.voice_id;
- settings.split.max;
- output.naming_template.

No UI label text as field.

======================================================================
2149. VALIDATION ISSUE DEDUPLICATION
======================================================================

Display can dedupe by:

- code;
- related entity;
- field.

Reports retain original checks.

======================================================================
2150. VALIDATION REPORT STATUS
======================================================================

Possible:

- passed;
- passed_with_warnings;
- failed;
- unavailable;
- degraded;
- cancelled.

Follow project convention.

======================================================================
2151. REQUEST VALIDATION REPORT LINK
======================================================================

Request stores latest validation report ID.

Materialize verifies current Request revision matches report.

If stale:

- revalidate.

======================================================================
2152. PLAN VALIDATION REPORT LINK
======================================================================

Plan stores report IDs/checksum.

Freeze only on passed/passed_with_warnings allowed.

======================================================================
2153. OUTPUT VALIDATION REPORT LINK
======================================================================

Artifact latest report.

Attempt/Unit success uses report.

======================================================================
2154. CONSISTENCY REPORT LINK
======================================================================

Session health stores latest consistency report.

======================================================================
2155. RECOVERY REPORT LINK
======================================================================

Session recovery state stores report.

======================================================================
2156. MIGRATION REPORT LINK
======================================================================

Entity/Project metadata provenance.

======================================================================
2157. OPERATION REPORT LINK
======================================================================

Operation record can reference validation/retry/resume reports.

======================================================================
2158. SOURCE EXTRACTION WARNING POLICY
======================================================================

Examples:

- fallback encoding;
- replacement characters;
- unsupported DOCX element omitted;
- heading metadata unavailable.

No silent.

======================================================================
2159. SOURCE EXTRACTION ERROR POLICY
======================================================================

Examples:

- unreadable;
- corrupt DOCX;
- binary TXT;
- empty;
- permission;
- cancelled.

======================================================================
2160. SOURCE ORIGINAL CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Original binary checksum useful provenance.

Managed raw text checksum execution source.

Do not compare them directly as same content.

======================================================================
2161. SOURCE RAW CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Checksum UTF-8 bytes of managed raw text.

======================================================================
2162. NORMALIZED CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Checksum UTF-8 normalized text.

======================================================================
2163. STRUCTURE CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Canonical structure metadata + normalized checksum/version.

======================================================================
2164. UNIT CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Text only.

======================================================================
2165. SETTINGS CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Effective execution/planning settings canonical.

======================================================================
2166. OUTPUT SPEC CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Formats/templates/policies/required roles.

No volatile runtime collision state unless planned decision.

======================================================================
2167. SELECTION CHECKSUM
======================================================================

IDs/content fingerprints/effective parameters.

No secret/display rename dependence.

======================================================================
2168. PLAN CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Aggregate.

======================================================================
2169. MANIFEST CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Aggregate final summary excluding own checksum.

======================================================================
2170. CHECKSUM PREFIX/FORMAT
======================================================================

Nếu existing model stores:

`sha256:<hex>`

use same.

Otherwise lowercase hex + algorithm field.

Không mix.

======================================================================
2171. CHECKSUM VALIDATION ERROR
======================================================================

Stable codes per entity:

- GENERATE_SOURCE_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH;
- GENERATE_PLAN_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH;
- GENERATE_ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH;
- GENERATE_MANIFEST_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH;
- GENERATE_REFERENCE_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH.

======================================================================
2172. CHECKSUM COST CONTROL
======================================================================

Immutable small JSON can full checksum frequently.

Large Audio/reference use cache/policy.

No repeated per UI refresh.

======================================================================
2173. FILE MTIME USE
======================================================================

Only cache invalidation/provenance.

Not integrity proof.

======================================================================
2174. FILE SIZE USE
======================================================================

Quick change signal, not checksum substitute.

======================================================================
2175. SESSION STORAGE REVISION
======================================================================

Could store revision in session.json.

Plan/Manifest own revisions.

No one global revision necessary if source pattern differs.

======================================================================
2176. ENTITY UPDATE TIMESTAMPS
======================================================================

updated_at changes only on actual mutation.

Read/revalidation report creation may update health/report pointer.

No update on simple query.

======================================================================
2177. SESSION LAST ACTIVITY
======================================================================

Registry updated_at could reflect lifecycle/progress.

Do not rewrite every second.

======================================================================
2178. SESSION LAST ERROR
======================================================================

Cache latest error summary.

Historical errors in Attempts/reports.

Clearing error after success should not delete history.

======================================================================
2179. UNIT LAST ERROR
======================================================================

Latest Attempt summary.

Valid retry success can clear current error but history remains.

======================================================================
2180. CHAPTER FAILURE SUMMARY
======================================================================

Derived from Units.

No duplicate storage if not needed.

======================================================================
2181. DOCUMENT FAILURE SUMMARY
======================================================================

Derived.

======================================================================
2182. SESSION FAILURE SUMMARY
======================================================================

Derived/grouped, cache in Manifest/Session summary.

======================================================================
2183. ERROR CLEARING SEMANTICS
======================================================================

When blocker resolved:

- current blocker/error summary clears/updates;
- old report remains.

No destructive history.

======================================================================
2184. WAITING REASON CLEARING
======================================================================

When resource available:

- current waiting reason clears;
- ResourceDecision history remains.

======================================================================
2185. ACTIVE LEASE CLEARING
======================================================================

Remove from active list after release.

Historical Attempt lease ID remains.

======================================================================
2186. ACTIVE JOB CLEARING
======================================================================

Remove active cache after terminal.

job_ids history remains.

======================================================================
2187. ACTIVE ATTEMPT CLEARING
======================================================================

Unit active_attempt_id null after terminal.

latest_attempt_id remains.

======================================================================
2188. UNIT SUCCEEDED LATEST ATTEMPT
======================================================================

latest_attempt_id successful Attempt.

If invalid retry later? Retry valid normally disallowed.

======================================================================
2189. PARTIAL RETRY LATEST ATTEMPT
======================================================================

Failed retry updates latest.

Previous valid Artifact Units untouched.

======================================================================
2190. SESSION ROOT JOB ID
======================================================================

Optional finalizer/coordinator.

Do not rely as sole state.

======================================================================
2191. JOB DEPENDENCY FAILURE
======================================================================

If prerequisite Job fails:

- dependent Job state from Queue;
- Unit/Session mapping;
- no silent skip;
- retry/resume inspection.

======================================================================
2192. JOB CANCEL DEPENDENTS
======================================================================

Use Job Queue policy.

Generate does not manually traverse raw files.

======================================================================
2193. JOB PRIORITY UPDATE
======================================================================

If Queue supports, Session priority action optional.

Not required.

No custom reorder.

======================================================================
2194. BATCH QUEUE CURSOR
======================================================================

If batched strategy:

- next_global_order;
- enqueued count;
- operation ID;
- complete flag;
- revision.

Persist.

======================================================================
2195. BATCH ENQUEUE RECOVERY
======================================================================

On restart:

- inspect cursor + existing Job idempotency;
- continue without duplicate;
- no own background loop outside Queue/recovery.

======================================================================
2196. BATCH ENQUEUE PAUSE
======================================================================

Stop creating new Job when pause requested.

Existing queued/running handled Queue.

======================================================================
2197. BATCH ENQUEUE CANCEL
======================================================================

Stop cursor.

Cancel created pending/active linked Jobs.

No delete history.

======================================================================
2198. BATCH ENQUEUE FAILURE
======================================================================

Store operation report and created Job IDs.

Session recovery_required/queued_partial.

Resume queue idempotently.

======================================================================
2199. LARGE JOB GRAPH MANIFEST
======================================================================

Manifest should summarize job count, not embed all full Job details.

IDs may be external query.

======================================================================
2200. LARGE ATTEMPT HISTORY
======================================================================

Manifest summary, repository pagination.

======================================================================
2201. LARGE REPORT LIST
======================================================================

Pagination.

======================================================================
2202. LARGE SESSION REGISTRY
======================================================================

Pagination/search.

======================================================================
2203. REGISTRY ARCHIVE PARTITION
======================================================================

Không bắt buộc separate file.

Filter archived.

If size issue future, migration.

======================================================================
2204. QUERY RESULT CACHING
======================================================================

Can cache summaries with revision.

No stale action decisions.

Mutation availability always current service validation.

======================================================================
2205. UI PAGE INITIAL QUERY
======================================================================

Load first page, not all.

======================================================================
2206. UI INFINITE SCROLL VS PAGINATION
======================================================================

Use existing convention.

No new complex interaction.

======================================================================
2207. API DEFAULT PAGE SIZE
======================================================================

Use project default.

Set max.

======================================================================
2208. API ORDER STABILITY
======================================================================

Tie-break by immutable ID.

======================================================================
2209. QUERY FILTER VALIDATION
======================================================================

Unknown status/sort field reject.

No arbitrary expressions.

======================================================================
2210. QUERY SEARCH LENGTH
======================================================================

Bounded/sanitize.

No regex from user by default.

======================================================================
2211. SESSION DISPLAY NAME SEARCH
======================================================================

Case-insensitive simple.

Unicode safe.

======================================================================
2212. SESSION ID LOOKUP
======================================================================

Exact ID path resolver validation.

No partial path concatenation.

======================================================================

======================================================================

======================================================================

Same inspection/operation.

======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================

======================================================================
2431. BOOTSTRAP SERVICE ORDER
======================================================================

Ensure:

- Project services;
- path/checksum/atomic utilities;
- repositories;
- Generate domain services;
- Job/Resource integrations;
- readiness;
- API/UI.

No handler registration before dependencies.

======================================================================
2432. BOOTSTRAP FAILURE ISOLATION
======================================================================

If Generate registry corrupt:

- app boots degraded;
- history page can show repair;
- no whole app crash if safe.

If critical service constructor fails:

- readiness unavailable;
- log;
- no fake service.

======================================================================
2433. BOOTSTRAP LAZY REGISTRY
======================================================================

Load current Project only if architecture.

No scan all Projects.

======================================================================

Mock assert provider runtime methods not called.

Resource Manager handles.

======================================================================

Session recovery state.

======================================================================
2450. CRASH SIMULATION BOUNDARIES
======================================================================

Tests can simulate failure after:

- Session write;
- source write;
- normalized write;
- Plan draft;
- Plan freeze;
- Registry update;
- Attempt create;
- Job create;
- output temp;
- final move;
- Artifact metadata;
- Manifest write;
- Session final status.

Verify recovery/no data loss.

======================================================================
2451. CRASH AFTER REQUEST WRITE
======================================================================

Request loadable.

Index rebuild if stale.

======================================================================
2452. CRASH AFTER SESSION WRITE BEFORE REGISTRY
======================================================================

Registry rebuild finds Session.

======================================================================
2453. CRASH AFTER SOURCE RAW BEFORE METADATA
======================================================================

Partial source dir candidate.

No Session pointer finalize.

Recovery/report.

======================================================================
2454. CRASH AFTER NORMALIZED FILE BEFORE REPORT
======================================================================

Do not reuse unless metadata/checksum evidence complete.

======================================================================
2455. CRASH AFTER PLAN SHARDS BEFORE FREEZE
======================================================================

Plan draft not queueable.

Recovery/retry planning.

======================================================================
2456. CRASH AFTER PLAN FREEZE BEFORE SESSION UPDATE
======================================================================

No duplicate Plan.

======================================================================
2457. CRASH AFTER ATTEMPT CREATE BEFORE JOB
======================================================================

Attempt created/queue_failure/recovery.

Resume/retry operation can continue idempotently.

======================================================================
2458. CRASH AFTER JOB CREATE BEFORE UNIT UPDATE
======================================================================

No duplicate Job.

======================================================================
2459. CRASH AFTER OUTPUT TEMP
======================================================================

No valid.

======================================================================
2460. CRASH AFTER FINAL MOVE BEFORE ARTIFACT METADATA
======================================================================

Orphan final recovery.

======================================================================
2461. CRASH AFTER ARTIFACT VALID BEFORE UNIT
======================================================================

Recovery can reconcile strong lineage.

======================================================================
2462. CRASH AFTER UNIT SUCCESS BEFORE SESSION PROGRESS
======================================================================

Recompute.

======================================================================
2463. CRASH AFTER MANIFEST FINAL BEFORE SESSION COMPLETED
======================================================================

Recovery validates Manifest/entity and finalizes Session idempotently.

======================================================================
2464. CRASH AFTER SESSION COMPLETED BEFORE REGISTRY
======================================================================

Registry rebuild/update.

======================================================================

Immutable Project ID/path resolver/lifecycle/package.

======================================================================
2870. MASTER UI/API TRUTH REAFFIRMATION
======================================================================

Same application/domain services.

======================================================================
2871. MASTER REPORT TRUTH REAFFIRMATION
======================================================================

Actual files/tests/status only.

======================================================================
2872. PART 06 CONSISTENCY
======================================================================

PART 06 tiếp tục trực tiếp PART 01–05.

Không thay đổi:

- Sprint ID AVS-014.16;
- mục tiêu Generate Pipeline Foundation;
- PHASE 0–12;
- canonical terminology;
- immutable identity;
- Source Snapshot;
- frozen Plan;
- Unit/Attempt separation;
- Artifact validation authority;
- Manifest persistence/rebuild;
- Resume/Retry/Recovery semantics;
- Job Queue/Resource Manager ownership;
- Reference Vault responsibility;
- Engine-neutral core;
- no production fake;
- no Train;
- no Analyzer;
- no GPT-SoVITS runtime modification;
- no source/user data mutation;
- no Git write;
- full test/documentation requirements;
- exact final readiness statuses.

======================================================================
2873. CONTINUATION RULE
======================================================================

Nếu còn PART tiếp theo:

- bắt đầu từ mục 2874;
- nối tiếp cùng Master Prompt;
- không sửa/lặp nội dung Part trước;
- không đổi các class/responsibility đã khóa;
- không đổi PHASE;
- không tuyên bố kết thúc toàn bộ cho tới marker cuối thật sự.

===== KẾT THÚC PART 06 — CHƯA KẾT THÚC TOÀN BỘ PROMPT =====
# AI VOICE STUDIO
# MASTER IMPLEMENTATION PROMPT
# AVS-014.16 — GENERATE PIPELINE FOUNDATION
# PART 07

======================================================================
2874. IMPLEMENTATION WORKTREE ENTRY CHECK
======================================================================

Trước khi bắt đầu sửa source:

- đọc Git status ở chế độ chỉ đọc;
- phân loại file source, docs, tests, runtime data;
- không stage;
- không commit;
- không reset;
- không clean;
- không checkout.

Nếu có file người dùng trong worktree:

- giữ nguyên;
- không dùng làm test fixture;
- không sửa nếu không thuộc task;
- ghi rõ trong Final Report.

======================================================================
2875. CURRENT SOURCE SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Phải xác định trạng thái source hiện tại bằng:

- file thực tế;
- import graph thực tế;
- tests thực tế;
- cấu hình thực tế.

Không dùng nội dung từ báo cáo Sprint trước làm source duy nhất.

Báo cáo cũ chỉ dùng để đối chiếu.

======================================================================
2876. FILE READ BEFORE EDIT
======================================================================

Trước khi sửa mỗi file:

1. Đọc file phiên bản mới nhất.
2. Xác định public symbols.
3. Xác định call sites.
4. Xác định tests liên quan.
5. Xác định compatibility risk.
6. Sau đó mới sửa.

Nếu file đã sửa trước đó trong cùng Sprint:

- phải đọc lại bản mới nhất trước lần sửa tiếp theo.

======================================================================
2877. SOURCE AUDIT SEARCH PATTERNS
======================================================================

Trong PHASE 0 phải search tối thiểu:

- `Generate`
- `Generation`
- `TTS`
- `synthesize`
- `infer`
- `preview`
- `speaker_reference`
- `style_profile`
- `variant`
- `EngineManager`
- `JobQueue`
- `ResourceManager`
- `AppContext`
- `ProjectService`
- `backup`
- `export`
- `import`
- `manifest`
- `history`
- `retry`
- `resume`
- `cancel`
- `progress`

Không chỉ search class names canonical của prompt.

======================================================================
2878. SOURCE AUDIT IMPORT GRAPH
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- Generate UI import service nào;
- service import Engine nào;
- Engine import runtime nào;
- Project services import Generate hay ngược lại;
- Job/Resource integration ở composition root nào;
- API router được đăng ký ở đâu.

Nếu có circular import hiện tại:

- ghi rõ;
- chỉ sửa nếu Sprint integration yêu cầu;
- không refactor rộng không cần thiết.

======================================================================
2879. SOURCE AUDIT RUNTIME ENTRY
======================================================================

Phải đọc entry point thực tế:

- app startup;
- CLI;
- test bootstrap;
- UI bootstrap;
- Local API bootstrap.

Xác định AppContext được tạo ở đâu và lifecycle shutdown thế nào.

======================================================================
2880. SOURCE AUDIT SETTINGS FLOW
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- settings load ở đâu;
- global defaults;
- Project settings;
- UI last selection;
- Engine config;
- migration;
- persistence;
- validation.

GenerateSettings mới không được tạo hệ settings cạnh tranh.

======================================================================
2881. SOURCE AUDIT EVENT FLOW
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- Event Bus class;
- event constants;
- subscribe/unsubscribe;
- thread dispatch;
- UI bridge;
- error handling;
- payload convention.

Không tạo signal/event framework mới.

======================================================================
2882. SOURCE AUDIT LOCK FLOW
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- repository locks;
- Project locks;
- Job locks;
- Resource lease locks;
- file atomic helpers.

Không thêm lock manager mới nếu utility hiện có phù hợp.

======================================================================
2883. SOURCE AUDIT CHECKSUM FLOW
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- checksum algorithm;
- checksum utility;
- canonical JSON;
- file streaming;
- cache;
- validation.

Không dùng thuật toán khác cho Generate nếu project đã chuẩn hóa.

======================================================================
2884. SOURCE AUDIT PATH FLOW
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- Project root resolver;
- workspace root;
- Voice root;
- Reference Vault root;
- outputs root;
- backup/export root;
- temp root.

GeneratePathResolver phải dựa vào Project path architecture hiện tại.

======================================================================
2885. SOURCE AUDIT MODEL STYLE
======================================================================

Phải xác định project dùng:

- dataclass;
- Pydantic;
- attrs;
- plain class;
- dict serializer.

Không tự đưa model framework mới vào chỉ cho Generate.

======================================================================
2886. SOURCE AUDIT REPOSITORY STYLE
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- repository interface;
- JSON layout;
- atomic writes;
- revision;
- cache;
- index;
- error classes.

Generate repositories phải đồng nhất.

======================================================================
2887. SOURCE AUDIT SERVICE RESULT STYLE
======================================================================

Phải xác định service hiện trả:

- model;
- result object;
- tuple;
- exception;
- boolean.

Không tạo style hoàn toàn khác nếu không cần.

======================================================================
2888. SOURCE AUDIT ERROR STYLE
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- error codes;
- exception hierarchy;
- API mapping;
- UI message mapping;
- logging.

Generate errors phải tích hợp.

======================================================================
2889. SOURCE AUDIT TEST STYLE
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- pytest fixtures;
- tmp workspace;
- fake services;
- UI offscreen;
- API test client;
- markers;
- monkeypatch conventions.

Không tạo test framework mới.

======================================================================
2890. SOURCE AUDIT DOCUMENTATION STYLE
======================================================================

Phải xác định:

- docs folder;
- ADR/DECISIONS format;
- CURRENT_SPRINT format;
- CHANGELOG format;
- ROADMAP status format;
- README feature format.

Không cập nhật docs sai style.

======================================================================
2891. BASELINE FAILURE REGISTER
======================================================================

Nếu baseline test có lỗi:

- ghi test name;
- error;
- source file;
- có liên quan Sprint hay không;
- có tồn tại trước thay đổi không.

Không dùng baseline lỗi để bỏ qua regression mới.

======================================================================
2892. BASELINE DATA SAFETY
======================================================================

Baseline commands không được:

- chạy inference;
- load model lớn;
- sửa dữ liệu thật;
- migrate real workspace;
- tạo output trong projects/workspace thật.

Nếu command hiện tại có side effect:

- dùng test config/temp;
- hoặc không chạy và ghi lý do.

======================================================================
2893. PHASE COMMIT BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Dù không Git commit, mỗi PHASE phải có logical completion boundary:

- code coherent;
- tests targeted pass;
- docs note nếu quyết định;
- không để source compile dở.

======================================================================
2894. PHASE ROLLBACK STRATEGY
======================================================================

Nếu một thay đổi PHASE gây regression:

- sửa source hiện tại;
- không dùng Git reset;
- không xóa file user;
- đọc lại file;
- đưa source về trạng thái coherent bằng chỉnh sửa an toàn.

======================================================================
2895. PHASE CHANGE LOG INTERNAL
======================================================================

Có thể duy trì internal task log:

- Phase;
- files touched;
- tests run;
- blockers.

Không cần commit log vào source nếu project không có.

======================================================================
2896. MODEL ID PREFIX
======================================================================

Nếu project dùng ID prefix, Generate IDs có thể là:

- genreq_
- gensess_
- gendoc_
- genchap_
- genunit_
- genatt_
- genart_
- genplan_
- genman_
- genreport_
- genop_

Không bắt buộc đúng prefix.

Phải theo ID factory/convention hiện có.

======================================================================
2897. MODEL ID LENGTH
======================================================================

ID phải:

- đủ unique;
- path-safe;
- không quá dài;
- không chứa display text;
- không phụ thuộc thứ tự hiện tại.

======================================================================
2898. REQUEST MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateRequest tối thiểu cần:

- request_id;
- project_id;
- status;
- source input descriptor;
- requested selection IDs;
- requested settings;
- requested output settings;
- requested retry policy;
- priority;
- preview flag;
- schema_version;
- revision;
- created_at;
- updated_at;
- latest_validation_report_id;
- materialized_session_id;
- metadata.

Không bắt buộc mọi field nằm flat.

======================================================================
2899. REQUEST MODEL DRAFT MUTABILITY
======================================================================

Các field draft có thể sửa:

- display_name;
- source input;
- selected IDs;
- settings;
- output settings;
- priority;
- description/tags.

Không sửa:

- request_id;
- project_id;
- created_at;
- materialized_session_id sau materialization.

======================================================================
2900. REQUEST MODEL SOURCE PAYLOAD
======================================================================

Không lưu đồng thời:

- file path đang active;
- pasted text đang active;
- managed snapshot đang active;

mà không có source_type rõ.

Validation phải đảm bảo một nguồn.

======================================================================
2901. REQUEST MODEL SOURCE PROVENANCE
======================================================================

Source provenance có thể lưu:

- original_filename;
- original_path internal;
- size;
- mtime;
- checksum;
- source_type.

Không dùng provenance làm locator sau materialization.

======================================================================
2902. REQUEST MODEL DISPLAY NAME
======================================================================

Display name optional.

Nếu rỗng, service sinh default.

Không dùng làm path identity.

======================================================================
2903. REQUEST MODEL VALIDATION STATE
======================================================================

Ngoài status có thể lưu:

- validation_revision;
- validated_request_revision;
- validation_scope;
- validation_fingerprint.

Nếu Request thay đổi sau validation:

- report cũ stale;
- materialize phải revalidate.

======================================================================
2904. REQUEST MODEL OPERATION LINKS
======================================================================

Có thể lưu:

- create_operation_id;
- materialize_operation_id;
- latest_operation_id.

Không lưu full operation history inline nếu lớn.

======================================================================
2905. SESSION MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateSession tối thiểu cần:

- session_id;
- project_id;
- request_id;
- status;
- health_status;
- display_name;
- source_snapshot_ids;
- document_ids;
- selection_snapshot;
- settings_snapshot;
- output_spec;
- plan_id;
- manifest_id/latest_manifest_id;
- active_operation_id;
- active_job_ids;
- active_attempt_ids;
- progress summary;
- blockers;
- current warnings;
- recovery_required;
- preview;
- archived;
- schema_version;
- revision;
- timestamps;
- metadata.

Có thể chia model phụ.

======================================================================
2906. SESSION MODEL STATUS REQUEST FLAGS
======================================================================

Nên có các request flags nếu state machine cần:

- pause_requested;
- pause_requested_at;
- cancel_requested;
- cancel_requested_at;
- auto_resume_enabled;
- recovery_required.

Không dùng UI-only boolean làm persistence truth.

======================================================================
2907. SESSION MODEL PROGRESS
======================================================================

Progress summary tối thiểu:

- total_required_units;
- total_units;
- pending_units;
- queued_units;
- waiting_dependency_units;
- waiting_resource_units;
- running_units;
- succeeded_units;
- failed_units;
- skipped_units;
- cancelled_units;
- blocked_units;
- recovery_units;
- percent;
- eta_seconds;
- updated_at;
- computed_from_fingerprint.

======================================================================
2908. SESSION MODEL BLOCKERS
======================================================================

Blocker summary không nên chỉ một string.

Mỗi blocker:

- code;
- scope;
- related_id;
- message snapshot;
- suggested action;
- created_at;
- current.

Historical blocker details nằm reports.

======================================================================
2909. SESSION MODEL WARNINGS
======================================================================

Warnings current/bounded.

Không nhúng toàn bộ history.

======================================================================
2910. SESSION MODEL LIFECYCLE TIMESTAMPS
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- created_at;
- planned_at;
- queued_at;
- started_at;
- paused_at;
- completed_at;
- failed_at;
- cancelled_at;
- archived_at;
- updated_at.

Chỉ set khi transition thực xảy ra.

======================================================================
2911. SESSION MODEL CURRENT HEALTH CHECK
======================================================================

Có thể lưu:

- latest_health_report_id;
- health_checked_at;
- health_fingerprint.

Không deep check mỗi query.

======================================================================
2912. DOCUMENT MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateDocument:

- document_id;
- session_id;
- source_snapshot_id;
- order_index;
- display_name;
- normalized_text_checksum;
- structure_checksum;
- normalized_relative_path;
- structure_relative_path;
- character_count;
- chapter_count;
- unit_count;
- status;
- health;
- schema_version;
- timestamps.

======================================================================
2913. DOCUMENT MODEL ONE SOURCE RELATION
======================================================================

Một Document phải trỏ một Source Snapshot canonical.

Nếu một source tạo nhiều document future:

- model cho phép rõ;
- không giả trong Sprint nếu không cần.

======================================================================
2914. CHAPTER MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateChapter:

- chapter_id;
- document_id;
- session_id;

- title span;
- body span;
- character_count;
- unit_ids hoặc index;
- status;
- progress summary;
- output artifact IDs;
- schema_version;
- timestamps.

======================================================================
2915. CHAPTER TITLE SOURCE ENUM
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- docx_heading;
- regex_chapter;
- explicit;
- fallback;
- none;
- legacy.

Không dùng localized string làm value persist.

======================================================================
2916. CHAPTER ROLE ENUM
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- normal;
- intro;
- outro;
- appendix;
- legacy.

Không semantic AI classification.

======================================================================
2917. UNIT MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateUnit:

- unit_id;

- chapter_id;

- paragraph_count;
- sentence_count;
- split_reason;
- hard_split;
- selection_snapshot_id;
- output_requirement IDs;
- status;
- active_attempt_id;
- latest_attempt_id;
- retry_count;
- current_error summary;
- timestamps;
- schema_version.

======================================================================
2918. UNIT MODEL TEXT IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Sau Plan freeze:

- text;
- spans;
- checksum;
- order;
- chapter/document relation;
- output requirements;

không được sửa.

======================================================================
2919. UNIT MODEL STATUS MUTABILITY
======================================================================

Có thể thay đổi qua state machine:

- status;
- active_attempt_id;
- latest_attempt_id;
- retry_count;
- current error;
- progress summary;
- timestamps.

======================================================================
2920. UNIT ROLE ENUM
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- narration;
- chapter_title;
- intro;
- outro;
- legacy.

Không tạo quá nhiều role nếu splitter không dùng.

======================================================================
2921. UNIT SPLIT REASON ENUM
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- paragraph_boundary;
- sentence_boundary;
- target_boundary;
- maximum_boundary;
- long_sentence_punctuation;
- long_sentence_whitespace;
- hard_split;
- short_merge;
- chapter_title;
- final_unit;
- legacy.

======================================================================
2922. ATTEMPT MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateAttempt:

- attempt_id;
- session_id;
- document_id;
- chapter_id;
- unit_id;
- parent_attempt_id;
- attempt_number;
- status;
- kind/reason;
- job_ids;
- primary_job_id;
- resource_decision_id;
- resource_lease_id;
- engine_snapshot;
- input_checksum;
- output_artifact_ids;
- error category/code/message;
- retryable;
- operation_id;
- timestamps;
- runtime metrics;
- schema_version.

======================================================================
2923. ATTEMPT INPUT CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Input checksum có thể kết hợp:

- Unit text checksum;
- selection checksum;
- settings checksum;
- Engine fingerprint;
- OutputSpec checksum.

Giúp phát hiện stale Attempt.

======================================================================
2924. ATTEMPT ATTEMPT_NUMBER AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Attempt number do service/repository xác định dưới lock.

Client/Job payload không được tự chọn.

======================================================================
2925. ATTEMPT PARENT VALIDATION
======================================================================

Nếu parent_attempt_id có:

- cùng Unit;
- attempt_number nhỏ hơn;
- không vòng;
- tồn tại hoặc legacy marker.

======================================================================
2926. ATTEMPT JOB LINK VALIDATION
======================================================================

Job metadata phải có cùng:

- project_id;
- session_id;
- unit_id;
- attempt_id.

Mismatch là consistency error.

======================================================================
2927. ATTEMPT TERMINAL IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Sau terminal:

- status;
- error;
- finished_at;
- runtime metrics;

không thay đổi tùy ý.

Có thể thêm validation/report link nếu output health later thay đổi, nhưng không sửa lịch sử.

======================================================================
2928. ARTIFACT MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateArtifact:

- artifact_id;
- project_id;
- session_id;
- document_id optional;
- chapter_id optional;
- unit_id optional;
- attempt_id optional;
- logical_role;
- format;
- required;
- primary;
- managed;
- planned_relative_path;
- current_relative_path;
- external provenance optional;
- status;
- availability;
- validation status;
- checksum;
- size;
- duration;
- sample rate;
- channels;
- codec;
- latest_validation_report_id;
- supersession links;
- recovered flag;
- timestamps;
- schema_version.

======================================================================
2929. ARTIFACT AVAILABILITY ENUM
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- available;
- missing;
- inaccessible;
- omitted_by_package;
- external_unavailable;
- unknown.

Không trộn với Artifact lifecycle status.

======================================================================
2930. ARTIFACT VALIDATION STATUS ENUM
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- not_checked;
- validating;
- valid;
- invalid;
- degraded;
- unavailable;
- error.

======================================================================
2931. OUTPUT REQUIREMENT MODEL
======================================================================

Output requirement có thể gồm:

- requirement_id;
- logical_role;
- format;
- required;
- primary;
- validation policy;
- expected relative path;
- minimum bytes;
- expected capability;
- sidecar policy.

Có thể nằm trong Plan/Unit.

======================================================================
2932. PLAN MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GeneratePlan:

- plan_id;
- session_id;
- project_id;
- source snapshot IDs/checksums;
- normalization version/settings checksum;
- structure version/checksum;
- splitter version;
- planner version;
- selection snapshot checksum;
- settings snapshot checksum;
- output spec checksum;
- document/chapter/unit indexes;
- ordered counts;
- reconstruction result;
- structural fingerprint;
- validation report ID;
- frozen;
- frozen_at;
- checksum;
- schema_version;
- created_at.

======================================================================
2933. PLAN DRAFT STATE
======================================================================

Plan draft có thể tồn tại trong temp/staging.

Không được:

- queue;
- Resume;
- Retry;
- coi là canonical.

Chỉ frozen Plan là execution input.

======================================================================
2934. PLAN FREEZE WRITE ORDER
======================================================================

Khuyến nghị:

1. Persist entity drafts.
2. Read back.
3. Validate checksums/spans/order.
4. Compute structural fingerprint.
5. Compute Plan checksum.
6. Write final Plan frozen.
7. Update Session plan_id/status.
8. Draft Manifest.
9. Registry.
10. Event.

======================================================================
2935. PLAN FREEZE FAILURE
======================================================================

Nếu fail trước Plan final:

- Session không planned;
- operation failed/recovery;
- draft files giữ hoặc cleanup known temp;
- source snapshot giữ;
- no Job.

======================================================================
2936. PLAN READ CONSISTENCY
======================================================================

Khi load Plan:

- schema/version;
- checksum;
- frozen;
