- session/project IDs;
- index references;
- entity existence;
- structural fingerprint optional verify.

Không deep validate output files trong Plan load.

======================================================================
2937. MANIFEST MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateManifest:

- manifest_id;
- session_id;
- project_id;
- revision;
- previous_manifest_id;
- status;
- finalized;
- final_status;
- request summary;
- source summary;
- selection summary;
- settings summary;
- Plan summary;
- documents;
- chapters;
- Unit summary/index;
- Attempts summary;
- Artifacts summary;
- Job/resource summary;
- progress;
- failures;
- retries;
- Resume;
- recovery;
- health at build;
- omissions;
- checksums;
- created_at;
- finalized_at;
- schema_version.

======================================================================
2938. MANIFEST UNIT SUMMARY SCALE
======================================================================

Nếu Unit quá nhiều:

- Manifest có thể lưu bounded/index file;
- hoặc mỗi Unit summary gọn;
- không full text.

Phải đảm bảo package/audit đủ.

======================================================================
2939. MANIFEST DRAFT MUTABILITY
======================================================================

Draft có thể update revision.

Finalized Manifest immutable.

Rebuild tạo revision mới nếu policy.

======================================================================
2940. SOURCE SNAPSHOT MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateSourceSnapshot:

- source_snapshot_id;
- project_id;
- request_id;
- session_id;
- source_type;
- original filename;
- original provenance;
- original checksum;
- managed raw relative path;
- managed raw checksum;
- encoding;
- extraction metadata;
- heading metadata path/summary;
- extraction report ID;
- health;
- finalized;
- schema_version;
- timestamps.

======================================================================
2941. SOURCE SNAPSHOT ORIGINAL PATH
======================================================================

Nếu lưu absolute original path nội bộ:

- không dùng primary;
- không API response;
- không package export mặc định;
- sanitize logs.

Có thể chỉ lưu basename + optional redacted provenance nếu privacy policy.

======================================================================
2942. SOURCE SNAPSHOT FINALIZED FLAG
======================================================================

Session không được trỏ snapshot chưa finalized.

======================================================================
2943. NORMALIZATION RESULT MODEL
======================================================================

Có thể lưu:

- normalization_id;
- source_snapshot_id;
- version;
- settings checksum;
- normalized relative path;
- normalized checksum;
- source map path;
- report ID;
- transformation summaries;
- character/line counts;
- finalized;
- timestamps.

Có thể là metadata file thay vì domain entity public.

======================================================================
2944. STRUCTURE RESULT MODEL
======================================================================

Có thể lưu:

- structure_id;
- document_id;
- source checksum;
- normalization checksum;
- detector version;
- chapter/paragraph/sentence index;
- checksum;
- report ID;
- timestamps.

======================================================================
2945. SELECTION SNAPSHOT MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateSelectionSnapshot:

- snapshot_id;
- project_id;
- voice;
- variant;
- style profile;
- speaker reference;
- engine;
- requested/effective parameters;
- capability summary;
- validation report ID;
- checksum;
- created_at;
- schema_version.

======================================================================
2946. VOICE SNAPSHOT FIELDS
======================================================================

Voice snapshot:

- voice_id;
- display name;
- schema/version;
- model/reference identifiers;
- defaults affecting generation;
- fingerprint;
- archived/current status at snapshot optional.

Không copy binary.

======================================================================
2947. VARIANT SNAPSHOT FIELDS
======================================================================

Variant snapshot:

- variant_id;
- voice_id;
- display name;
- override fields;
- schema/version;
- checksum/fingerprint.

======================================================================
2948. STYLE SNAPSHOT FIELDS
======================================================================

Style snapshot:

- style_profile_id;
- display name;
- version;
- asset IDs/checksums;
- effective override fields;
- fingerprint.

======================================================================
2949. SPEAKER REFERENCE SNAPSHOT FIELDS
======================================================================

Speaker Reference snapshot:

- speaker_reference_id;
- display name;
- reference asset IDs;
- text asset IDs;
- selected segment;
- checksums;
- latest validation report;
- fingerprint.

Không lưu runtime absolute path.

======================================================================
2950. ENGINE SNAPSHOT FIELDS
======================================================================

Engine snapshot:

- engine_id;
- engine type;
- adapter version;
- runtime version metadata;
- capability version;
- config fingerprint;
- supported format subset;
- max text;
- reference requirements;
- resource requirement version.

Không secrets.

======================================================================
2951. SETTINGS SNAPSHOT MODEL
======================================================================

GenerateSettingsSnapshot:

- snapshot_id;
- requested settings;
- effective settings;
- merge trace summary;
- output settings;
- split settings;
- retry policy;
- checkpoint policy;
- continue policy;
- checksum;
- schema_version;
- created_at.

======================================================================
2952. OUTPUT SPEC MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateOutputSpec:

- output_spec_id;
- root policy;
- format requirements;
- primary format;
- naming template;
- collision policy;
- sidecar policy;
- merge policy;
- validation policy;
- minimum bytes;
- path plan version;
- checksum;
- schema_version.

======================================================================
2953. RETRY POLICY MODEL REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

GenerateRetryPolicy:

- max_retries;
- retryable categories/codes;
- non-retryable categories/codes;
- backoff;
- multiplier;
- continue_on_failure;
- retry_invalid_output;
- retry_interrupted;
- preserve_failed_outputs;
- collision policy on retry.

======================================================================
2954. CONTINUE POLICY MODEL
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- stop_on_first_failure;
- continue_on_unit_failure;
- continue_on_chapter_failure;
- permit_skipped_completion;
- partial_completion_allowed.

Không cần class riêng nếu settings đủ.

======================================================================
2955. VALIDATION POLICY MODEL
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- basic output required;
- full probe required;
- checksum required;
- minimum bytes;
- codec constraints;
- sample rate constraints;
- channel constraints;
- allow degraded probe.

Snapshot.

======================================================================
2956. MODEL RELATION VALIDATION
======================================================================

Phải có tests/invariants:

- Request.project_id tồn tại;
- Session.request_id đúng Project;
- Document.session_id đúng;
- Chapter.document_id/session_id đúng;
- Unit.chapter/document/session đúng;
- Attempt.unit/session đúng;
- Artifact.attempt/unit/session đúng;
- Plan.session đúng;
- Manifest.session đúng.

======================================================================
2957. MODEL COUNT VALIDATION
======================================================================

Counts cache không được âm.

Nếu count mismatch source truth:

- consistency degraded;
- recompute;
- không sửa Plan frozen.

======================================================================
2958. MODEL TIMESTAMP VALIDATION
======================================================================

Đảm bảo:

- created_at ≤ updated_at;
- started_at ≤ finished_at;
- planned_at after created;
- completed_at only terminal;
- archived_at only archived.

Legacy invalid timestamp:

- preserve/report;
- không crash whole registry.

======================================================================
2959. MODEL STATUS TIMESTAMP COHERENCE
======================================================================

Ví dụ:

- status completed nhưng completed_at null → consistency issue;
- Attempt running nhưng started_at null → issue;
- Artifact valid nhưng validated_at null → issue.

Migration có thể repair safe metadata nếu evidence.

======================================================================
2960. MODEL CHECKSUM FORMAT VALIDATION
======================================================================

Checksum field phải:

- đúng algorithm/length;
- lowercase;
- không placeholder;
- không empty khi required.

======================================================================
2961. MODEL PATH FIELD VALIDATION
======================================================================

Managed relative path:

- không absolute;
- không traversal;
- không empty khi required;
- normalized serialization.

======================================================================
2962. MODEL METADATA SIZE
======================================================================

Metadata tùy ý phải bounded.

Không cho nhúng source text/log/tensor.

API validation.

======================================================================
2963. MODEL UNKNOWN FIELD HANDLING
======================================================================

Theo project:

- preserve extras;
- hoặc strict.

Nhưng future schema không được silently drop.

======================================================================
2964. MODEL HASH EQUALITY
======================================================================

Không dùng mutable entity làm dict key dựa full fields.

ID-based equality nếu convention.

======================================================================
2965. MODEL COPY SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Snapshots immutable/deep copy.

Entities update tạo validated copy hoặc controlled mutation.

Không share mutable dict giữa Request/Session/Profile.

======================================================================
2966. STATE MACHINE REQUEST ACTIONS
======================================================================

Action availability Request:

- draft: edit, validate, cancel, archive optional;
- invalid: edit, validate, cancel;
- valid: edit may invalidate hoặc materialize;
- materializing: cancel request/cooperative;
- materialized: read/archive/clone;
- cancelled: read/archive/clone;
- archived: read/restore optional.

======================================================================
2967. STATE MACHINE SESSION DRAFT
======================================================================

Session draft/preparing có thể:

- materialize source;
- plan;
- cancel;
- revalidate;
- no queue.

======================================================================
2968. STATE MACHINE SESSION VALIDATING
======================================================================

No concurrent plan/queue.

Cancel cooperative.

======================================================================
2969. STATE MACHINE SESSION READY
======================================================================

Ready means prerequisites planning passed.

Can plan/cancel.

No execution without Plan.

======================================================================
2970. STATE MACHINE SESSION PLANNED
======================================================================

Can:

- queue if ready;
- revalidate;
- clone;
- archive only if policy terminal? Planned non-terminal nên không archive nếu active semantics;
- cancel;
- inspect output Plan.

Cannot edit frozen fields.

======================================================================
2971. STATE MACHINE SESSION QUEUED
======================================================================

Can:

- pause;
- cancel;
- view;
- no new queue duplicate;
- no edit Plan.

======================================================================
2972. STATE MACHINE SESSION WAITING_RESOURCE
======================================================================

Can:

- pause;
- cancel;
- view Resource;
- no retry count increment.

======================================================================
2973. STATE MACHINE SESSION RUNNING
======================================================================

Can:

- pause;
- cancel;
- view progress;
- no replan;
- Retry only failed terminal Units through controlled operation if policy allows while other Units run, but default may defer.

======================================================================
2974. STATE MACHINE SESSION PAUSING
======================================================================

No new Job dispatch.

Wait active Unit policy.

Can cancel.

======================================================================
2975. STATE MACHINE SESSION PAUSED
======================================================================

Can:

- inspect Resume;
- Resume;
- cancel;
- revalidate;
- view;
- no queue duplicate without Resume service.

======================================================================
2976. STATE MACHINE SESSION PARTIALLY_COMPLETED
======================================================================

Terminal outcome but eligible:

- Retry failed Units;
- Resume incomplete;
- revalidate;
- archive;
- clone.

======================================================================
2977. STATE MACHINE SESSION FAILED
======================================================================

Can:

- inspect Retry/Resume if eligible;
- revalidate;
- archive;
- clone.

No arbitrary status reset.

======================================================================
2978. STATE MACHINE SESSION BLOCKED
======================================================================

Can:

- revalidate;
- repair prerequisite externally;
- inspect blockers;
- cancel;
- clone.

Execution only after blocker resolved through controlled transition.

======================================================================
2979. STATE MACHINE SESSION RECOVERY_REQUIRED
======================================================================

Can:

- inspect recovery;
- safe repair;
- revalidate;
- cancel depending evidence;
- no execution.

======================================================================
2980. STATE MACHINE SESSION COMPLETED
======================================================================

Can:

- read;
- revalidate health;
- archive;
- clone;
- export.

No Resume/Retry normal.

Regenerate missing output future explicit.

======================================================================
2981. STATE MACHINE SESSION CANCELLED
======================================================================

Can:

- read;
- archive;
- clone;
- health check.

No Resume default.

======================================================================
2982. STATE MACHINE SESSION ARCHIVED
======================================================================

Read-only except restore.

No queue/retry/resume.

======================================================================
2983. STATE MACHINE HEALTH INDEPENDENCE
======================================================================

Health change không nhất thiết business transition.

Ví dụ completed + degraded.

Action matrix xét cả status và health.

======================================================================
2984. UNIT STATE READY
======================================================================

Unit ready khi Plan frozen và prerequisites basic valid.

Can create initial Attempt.

======================================================================
2985. UNIT STATE QUEUED
======================================================================

Must have active Attempt/Job.

No second Attempt.

======================================================================
2986. UNIT STATE WAITING_DEPENDENCY
======================================================================

Job graph dependency not satisfied.

No retry count.

======================================================================
2987. UNIT STATE WAITING_RESOURCE
======================================================================

Active Attempt/Job.

No retry count.

======================================================================
2988. UNIT STATE RUNNING
======================================================================

Active Attempt started.

Output reservation may exist.

======================================================================
2989. UNIT STATE PAUSED
======================================================================

Only if worker/Queue semantics support Unit pause.

Otherwise Session paused while Unit finishes and Unit terminal/pending.

Không invent unsupported state transition.

======================================================================
2990. UNIT STATE RETRY_WAIT
======================================================================

Retry Attempt scheduled delayed/backoff.

No active duplicate.

======================================================================
2991. UNIT STATE SUCCEEDED
======================================================================

Required Artifact valid.

No normal retry.

Current health may later degrade.

======================================================================
2992. UNIT STATE FAILED
======================================================================

Latest Attempt terminal failure/invalid output.

Retry eligibility computed.

======================================================================
2993. UNIT STATE SKIPPED
======================================================================

Explicit policy/reason.

No output required only if completion policy.

======================================================================
2994. UNIT STATE CANCELLED
======================================================================

Session/action cancellation.

No automatic Resume.

======================================================================
2995. UNIT STATE BLOCKED
======================================================================

Prerequisite/action required.

No Job retry loop.

======================================================================
2996. UNIT STATE RECOVERY_REQUIRED
======================================================================

Inconsistent active state/output.

No execution until reconcile.

======================================================================
2997. ATTEMPT STATE CREATED
======================================================================

Persisted but Job chưa queue.

Short-lived/recoverable.

======================================================================
2998. ATTEMPT STATE QUEUED
======================================================================

Job exists.

======================================================================
2999. ATTEMPT STATE WAITING_RESOURCE
======================================================================

Job waiting Resource Manager.

======================================================================
3000. ATTEMPT STATE RUNNING
======================================================================

Engine/worker execution active.

======================================================================
3001. ATTEMPT STATE SUCCEEDED
======================================================================

Required Artifacts valid.

======================================================================
3002. ATTEMPT STATE FAILED
======================================================================

Execution failed before valid output.

======================================================================
3003. ATTEMPT STATE INVALID_OUTPUT
======================================================================

Execution returned file nhưng validation failed.

======================================================================
3004. ATTEMPT STATE INTERRUPTED
======================================================================

Unexpected process/job loss.

Resume/new Attempt.

======================================================================
3005. ATTEMPT STATE CANCELLED
======================================================================

Explicit cancellation.

======================================================================
3006. ARTIFACT STATE PLANNED
======================================================================

Metadata expected path/requirement.

No file.

======================================================================
3007. ARTIFACT STATE RESERVED
======================================================================

Attempt owns destination reservation.

No final validity.

======================================================================
3008. ARTIFACT STATE WRITING
======================================================================

Temp output in progress.

======================================================================
3009. ARTIFACT STATE CREATED
======================================================================

Physical final file exists but chưa full valid.

======================================================================
3010. ARTIFACT STATE VALIDATING
======================================================================

Validation active.

======================================================================
3011. ARTIFACT STATE VALID
======================================================================

Policy passed.

======================================================================
3012. ARTIFACT STATE INVALID
======================================================================

File exists but validation failed.

======================================================================
3013. ARTIFACT STATE MISSING
======================================================================

Expected/registered file unavailable.

======================================================================
3014. ARTIFACT STATE SUPERSEDED
======================================================================

Replaced by newer Artifact but retained history.

======================================================================
3015. ARTIFACT STATE ARCHIVED
======================================================================

Only if artifact-level archive existing; not required.

======================================================================
3016. STATE TRANSITION RECORD
======================================================================

Transition record nên chứa:

- transition_id;
- entity_type;
- entity_id;
- previous_status;
- next_status;
- reason_code;
- operation_id;
- job_id;
- actor/source;
- timestamp;
- metadata bounded.

======================================================================
3017. STATE TRANSITION PERSIST ORDER
======================================================================

Có thể:

- update entity + transition history cùng atomic file;
- hoặc write transition then entity với recovery marker.

Chọn theo repository architecture.

Không để history nói transition thành công khi entity write fail.

======================================================================
3018. STATUS DIRECT ASSIGNMENT EXCEPTIONS
======================================================================

Direct assignment chỉ được phép trong:

- entity creation factory;
- deserialization;
- migration transformer;
- state machine internals;
- recovery repair có kiểm soát.

Không ở UI/API/Job handler tùy ý.

======================================================================
3019. ACTION AVAILABILITY SERVICE
======================================================================

Có thể tạo:

GenerateActionAvailabilityService

Input:

- entity state;
- health;
- Project state;
- readiness;
- active operations;
- Job state.

Output:

- action code;
- allowed;
- blockers;
- warnings;
- message.

======================================================================
3020. ACTION CODE ENUM
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- CREATE_REQUEST;
- UPDATE_REQUEST;
- VALIDATE_REQUEST;
- MATERIALIZE_REQUEST;
- PLAN_SESSION;
- QUEUE_SESSION;
- PAUSE_SESSION;
- RESUME_SESSION;
- CANCEL_SESSION;
- RETRY_UNIT;
- RETRY_CHAPTER;
- REVALIDATE_SESSION;
- REBUILD_MANIFEST;
- INSPECT_RECOVERY;
- APPLY_SAFE_REPAIR;
- ARCHIVE_SESSION;
- RESTORE_SESSION;
- CLONE_SESSION.

======================================================================
3021. ACTION MATRIX SOURCE OF TRUTH
======================================================================

UI button state và API action response phải gọi cùng service/helper.

Không copy bảng điều kiện vào widget/router.

======================================================================
3022. ACTION AVAILABILITY CACHE
======================================================================

Không cache dài.

State/readiness volatile.

Có thể compute nhanh từ summaries.

======================================================================
3023. ACTION AVAILABILITY STALE
======================================================================

Dù UI hiển thị enabled, service phải recheck lúc click.

======================================================================
3024. OPERATION RECORD MODEL
======================================================================

GenerateOperationRecord:

- operation_id;
- operation_type;
- project_id;
- request/session/unit/chapter IDs;
- input fingerprint;
- status;
- stage;
- created IDs;
- Job IDs;
- report IDs;
- progress summary;
- error;
- created_at;
- updated_at;
- completed_at;
- schema_version.

======================================================================
3025. OPERATION RECORD IMMUTABLE INPUT
======================================================================

Operation type/entity/input fingerprint không đổi sau create.

Stage/status/progress mutable.

======================================================================
3026. OPERATION RECORD RESULT
======================================================================

Completed operation stores bounded result summary.

Không nhúng full Plan/Manifest.

======================================================================
3027. OPERATION RECORD REPOSITORY
======================================================================

Nếu project đã có generic operation/job repository, reuse.

Không tạo riêng nếu redundant.

======================================================================
3028. OPERATION RECORD CLEANUP
======================================================================

Không cần cleanup policy mới.

Có thể giữ bounded/history theo existing infrastructure.

======================================================================
3029. OPERATION RECORD IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Lookup by:

- Project;
- operation type;
- client key/operation ID.

Payload fingerprint conflict.

======================================================================
3030. MATERIALIZE OPERATION STAGES
======================================================================

Stable stage codes:

- request_validation;
- session_creation;
- source_validation;
- source_extraction;
- source_snapshot_finalize;
- selection_resolution;
- settings_snapshot;
- session_finalize;
- completed.

======================================================================
3031. PLAN OPERATION STAGES
======================================================================

Stable:

- loading_source;
- normalization;
- structure_detection;
- splitting;
- selection_validation;
- output_planning;
- Plan validation;
- Plan persistence;
- Manifest draft;
- Registry update;
- completed.

Use machine-safe snake_case.

======================================================================
3032. QUEUE OPERATION STAGES
======================================================================

- prevalidation;
- Attempt creation;
- ResourceRequirement creation;
- Job creation;
- dependency setup;
- Session transition;
- completed.

======================================================================
3033. RESUME OPERATION STAGES
======================================================================

- inspection;
- revalidation;
- candidate selection;
- Attempt creation;
- Job creation;
- Session transition;
- completed.

======================================================================
3034. RETRY OPERATION STAGES
======================================================================

- inspection;
- eligibility;
- Attempt creation;
- Job creation;
- Session update;
- completed.

======================================================================
3035. FINALIZATION OPERATION STAGES
======================================================================

- entity reload;
- active Job reconciliation;
- Artifact validation;
- progress recompute;
- status determination;
- Manifest build;
- Manifest finalize;
- Session finalize;
- Registry update;
- completed.

======================================================================
3036. RECOVERY OPERATION STAGES
======================================================================

- metadata scan;
- Job reconciliation;
- Lease reconciliation;
- output inspection;
- classification;
- safe repair;
- progress/health rebuild;
- report;
- completed.

======================================================================
3037. OPERATION PROGRESS RANGE
======================================================================

Operation progress không nhất thiết giống Session execution progress.

UI phải label rõ.

Planning progress có stage weights.

Session progress count-based.

======================================================================
3038. OPERATION CANCELLATION
======================================================================

Long operation cancellation phải:

- persistent request;
- cooperative token;
- safe stage checkpoint;
- no partial canonical finalize;
- operation status cancelled;
- Session/Request state consistent.

======================================================================
3039. OPERATION FAILURE RECOVERY
======================================================================

Operation failure record giúp:

- retry idempotently;
- recovery inspect;
- audit created entities/Jobs.

Không xóa record khi fail.

======================================================================
3040. REQUEST VALIDATOR COMPONENTS
======================================================================

Có thể chia:

- SourceInputValidator;
- SelectionInputValidator;
- GenerateSettingsValidator;
- OutputSpecValidator;
- RetryPolicyValidator;
- ProjectActionValidator.

Application combines reports.

======================================================================
3041. SOURCE INPUT VALIDATION LIGHT
======================================================================

Pasted text:

- string;
- non-empty;
- size;
- null/control safety.

File:

- path type;
- extension;
- exists;
- regular;
- size;
- readable;
- safe.

Managed snapshot:

- ID;
- Project scope;
- finalized;
- health.

======================================================================
3042. SOURCE INPUT VALIDATION DEEP
======================================================================

- decode/extract;
- text non-empty;
- checksum;
- encoding warnings;
- DOCX validity.

Deep validation may materialize temp/snapshot.

======================================================================
3043. SELECTION INPUT VALIDATION
======================================================================

- voice_id exists;
- variant belongs Voice;
- style scope;
- reference required/valid;
- engine exists;
- capability supports language/format/parameters.

No runtime model load unless execution validation explicitly.

======================================================================
3044. SETTINGS VALIDATION NUMERIC
======================================================================

Mọi float phải:

- finite;
- trong range;
- đúng type;
- no bool-as-int accidental nếu validator strict.

======================================================================
3045. SETTINGS VALIDATION SPLIT
======================================================================

- min > 0;
- target ≥ min;
- max ≥ target;
- max ≤ hard safety;
- effective max respects Engine;
- no zero-unit result.

======================================================================
3046. SETTINGS VALIDATION RETRY
======================================================================

- max_retries bounded;
- backoff non-negative;
- multiplier finite ≥1 hoặc policy;
- categories valid;
- no duplicate conflict.

======================================================================
3047. SETTINGS VALIDATION CHECKPOINT
======================================================================

- interval positive;
- progress throttle reasonable;
- no write every token.

======================================================================
3048. OUTPUT SPEC VALIDATION
======================================================================

- formats supported;
- primary format required;
- required roles consistent;
- template valid;
- collision policy valid;
- root policy allowed;
- sidecars valid;
- validation policy feasible.

======================================================================
3049. OUTPUT SPEC FORMAT DEPENDENCY
======================================================================

MP3 requirement có thể cần converter.

Nếu Engine outputs WAV only:

- converter readiness required;
- no fake extension rename.

======================================================================
3050. OUTPUT SPEC WAV POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu WAV primary:

- Engine/provider supports;
- validator can validate;
- naming extension controlled.

======================================================================
3051. OUTPUT SPEC OPTIONAL DERIVED
======================================================================

Optional MP3 fail không necessarily fail Unit nếu WAV primary required.

Manifest warning.

======================================================================
3052. OUTPUT SPEC MULTIPLE REQUIRED
======================================================================

Nếu Request yêu cầu WAV + MP3 cả hai:

- Attempt/Unit success only both valid;
- missing converter blocks or invalid.

======================================================================
3053. OUTPUT SPEC SIDECARS
======================================================================

Nếu required text/metadata sidecar:

- success policy includes them;
- sidecars atomic/validated.

Nếu optional, warning.

======================================================================
3054. OUTPUT SPEC CHAPTER MERGE
======================================================================

Nếu merge required nhưng handler unavailable:

- execution/finalization blocked;
- không claim Session completed with only Unit outputs.

Nếu merge optional:

- Unit outputs enough.

======================================================================
3055. OUTPUT SPEC SESSION MERGE
======================================================================

Same.

Do not implement merge fake.

======================================================================
3056. OUTPUT SPEC COLLISION DEFAULT
======================================================================

An toàn mặc định:

- fail;
- hoặc versioned_copy;

không silent replace.

Nếu source existing policy khác, document/safety adaptation.

======================================================================
3057. OUTPUT SPEC PATH PLAN VERSION
======================================================================

Naming/path algorithm version persisted.

Resume uses expected paths frozen.

======================================================================
3058. OUTPUT TEMPLATE PLACEHOLDERS
======================================================================

Whitelist có thể gồm:

- session_index;
- document_index;
- chapter_index;
- unit_index;
- chapter_title;
- unit_id_short;
- session_id_short;
- voice_name_snapshot;
- format.

Không cho arbitrary object attribute.

======================================================================
3059. OUTPUT TEMPLATE EMPTY RESULT
======================================================================

Nếu template render empty:

- validation error;
- fallback chỉ nếu explicit safe policy;
- no empty filename.

======================================================================
3060. OUTPUT TEMPLATE DUPLICATE RESULT
======================================================================

Plan detects duplicate all Units.

Reject hoặc deterministic suffix policy.

Không phát hiện muộn sau execution.

======================================================================
3061. OUTPUT TEMPLATE SANITIZATION REPORT
======================================================================

Nếu title sanitized/truncated:

- warning/report;
- expected path stores final sanitized result.

======================================================================
3062. OUTPUT PATH ROOT POLICY SESSION_MANAGED
======================================================================

Primary safe policy:

- output dưới Session root;
- Project package aware;
- relative path;
- full lineage.

======================================================================
3063. OUTPUT PATH ROOT POLICY PROJECT_EXPORT
======================================================================

Nếu output dưới Project export root:

- still managed Project path;
- collision/index;
- package policy;
- Session metadata.

======================================================================
3064. OUTPUT PATH ROOT POLICY EXTERNAL
======================================================================

Legacy/explicit only.

- validate;
- external flag;
- no package inclusion default;
- no auto cleanup;
- no absolute API response;
- recheck runtime.

======================================================================
3065. OUTPUT DIRECTORY CREATION
======================================================================

Create directory only when execution/finalization needs.

Plan resolves expected path but không nhất thiết create.

======================================================================
3066. OUTPUT DIRECTORY PERMISSION
======================================================================

Runtime precheck.

Permission error stable.

No chmod.

======================================================================
3067. OUTPUT DIRECTORY SYMLINK
======================================================================

Managed root containment.

External policy explicit/safe.

No symlink escape.

======================================================================
3068. OUTPUT TEMP DIRECTORY
======================================================================

Must be same filesystem as final when atomic rename desired, if managed.

If external final, temp strategy documented.

======================================================================
3069. OUTPUT TEMP FILE EXTENSION
======================================================================

Temp suffix không làm Engine/validator nhầm.

Có thể:

- `.tmp.wav`
- `.partial.wav`

Final extension controlled.

======================================================================
3070. OUTPUT TEMP FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Attempt/Artifact IDs embedded metadata/name.

No source title.

======================================================================
3071. OUTPUT TEMP FILE CLEANUP ON SUCCESS
======================================================================

After atomic finalize, temp absent.

Do not remove unrelated temp.

======================================================================
3072. OUTPUT TEMP FILE ON FAILURE
======================================================================

Preserve/cleanup according policy.

If uncertain, preserve with report.

======================================================================
3073. OUTPUT RESERVATION RECORD
======================================================================

Reservation must prevent two active Attempts writing same destination.

Can persist in Artifact status/reservation metadata.

======================================================================
3074. OUTPUT RESERVATION EXPIRY
======================================================================

Stale reservation detected by recovery, not arbitrary timer deletion.

======================================================================
3075. OUTPUT RESERVATION RELEASE
======================================================================

On terminal Attempt/finalize failure/cancel:

- release active reservation;
- keep history metadata.

======================================================================
3076. OUTPUT COLLISION EXISTING VALID ARTIFACT
======================================================================

Policy skip_if_valid:

- verify Artifact current valid;
- mark Unit satisfied only if input/selection/output checksum lineage compatible;
- không dùng unrelated file cùng tên.

Nếu lineage không match:

- collision conflict.

======================================================================
3077. OUTPUT COLLISION EXISTING UNREGISTERED FILE
======================================================================

Do not skip by file existence alone.

Classify orphan/collision.

Require versioned/fail/recovery.

======================================================================
3078. OUTPUT COLLISION EXISTING INVALID ARTIFACT
======================================================================

replace_invalid two-phase.

Old file preserved until new valid.

======================================================================
3079. OUTPUT COLLISION EXISTING VALID DIFFERENT INPUT
======================================================================

Never overwrite/skip as same.

Collision error/versioned output.

======================================================================
3080. OUTPUT LINEAGE MATCH
======================================================================

For safe reuse/skip, require:

- Unit text checksum;
- selection checksum;
- settings checksum;
- Engine/provider fingerprint policy;
- output format/validation;
- Artifact valid.

Không chỉ filename.

======================================================================
3081. OUTPUT VALIDATOR BASIC WAV
======================================================================

Basic WAV may use:

- existence;
- size;
- header/probe;
- checksum.

Nếu standard library `wave` phù hợp, test-only/basic service có thể dùng, nhưng không duplicate existing AudioProbe service.

======================================================================
3082. OUTPUT VALIDATOR BASIC MP3
======================================================================

Extension/size alone insufficient.

Use FFprobe/existing parser.

If unavailable and full required:

- invalid/unavailable.

Không đánh valid chỉ vì `.mp3`.

======================================================================
3083. OUTPUT VALIDATOR SIDECAR TXT
======================================================================

- exists;
- UTF-8;
- expected checksum/content relation;
- size;
- path safe.

======================================================================
3084. OUTPUT VALIDATOR SIDECAR JSON
======================================================================

- parse;
- schema;
- lineage IDs;
- checksum;
- no secrets.

======================================================================
3085. OUTPUT VALIDATOR REPORT CONTENT
======================================================================

Report includes each check:

- check_code;
- status;
- expected;
- actual bounded;
- duration;
- message.

No raw binary.

======================================================================
3086. OUTPUT VALIDATOR RETRYABILITY
======================================================================

Missing file after Engine may be retryable.

Path traversal/provider contract error likely non-retryable.

File locked may retryable.

Corrupt Audio may retryable via regeneration.

======================================================================
3087. OUTPUT VALIDATOR TIMEOUT
======================================================================

Probe timeout report.

Artifact not valid.

No infinite subprocess.

======================================================================
3088. OUTPUT VALIDATOR CANCEL
======================================================================

If validation Job cancelled:

- Artifact remains created/unvalidated;
- Unit not succeeded;
- Resume/recovery can validate later.

======================================================================
3089. OUTPUT VALIDATOR IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Same unchanged file/policy:

- reuse latest report/cache;
- no duplicate heavy probe unless explicit revalidate.

======================================================================
3090. OUTPUT VALIDATOR POLICY CHANGE
======================================================================

New stricter policy can create new report.

Historical report retained.

Current validity/health updates.

======================================================================
3091. MANIFEST BUILD SOURCE ORDER
======================================================================

Build ordered by:

- document_order;
- chapter_order;
- global_unit_order;
- attempt_number;
- Artifact role/order.

Deterministic.

======================================================================
3092. MANIFEST CHECKSUM DETERMINISM
======================================================================

Two builds from same repository state should produce same core checksum.

Volatile build timestamp excluded khỏi core checksum hoặc version policy rõ.

======================================================================
3093. MANIFEST BUILD LOCK
======================================================================

Lock Session snapshot/revision briefly.

Can read entity graph then final recheck revision before write.

No hold across huge probe.

======================================================================
3094. MANIFEST BUILD STALE RETRY
======================================================================

If Session revision changes while build:

- discard/rebuild;
- no stale finalization.

======================================================================
3095. MANIFEST MISSING OPTIONAL REPORT
======================================================================

Warning/omission.

Core finalization may proceed if not required.

======================================================================
3096. MANIFEST MISSING CORE ENTITY
======================================================================

Cannot final valid.

Recovery required.

======================================================================
3097. MANIFEST OUTPUT VALIDITY SUMMARY
======================================================================

For each required role/Unit:

- valid;
- invalid;
- missing;
- omitted.

No ambiguity.

======================================================================
3098. MANIFEST PARTIAL OUTPUT
======================================================================

Cancelled/failed Session Manifest can include valid partial outputs.

======================================================================
3099. MANIFEST SOURCE TEXT PRIVACY
======================================================================

No full text.

Checksums/counts/spans/IDs.

======================================================================
3100. MANIFEST DISPLAY SNAPSHOTS
======================================================================

Names at Session creation for history.

No dependency on current entity rename.

======================================================================
3101. MANIFEST EXTERNAL OUTPUT
======================================================================

Mark:

- external;
- included false;
- availability;
- basename/relative policy;
- checksum if available.

No personal absolute path in exported Manifest.

======================================================================
3102. MANIFEST PACKAGE OMISSIONS
======================================================================

Explicit:

- source omitted;
- Audio omitted;
- reports omitted;
- logs omitted;
- external output omitted;
- model binaries omitted.

======================================================================
3103. MANIFEST FINAL STATUS VALIDATION
======================================================================

final_status phải match Session terminal/status computation.

No completed Manifest for failed Session.

======================================================================
3104. MANIFEST PREVIOUS REVISION
======================================================================

Rebuild new revision links previous.

No delete.

======================================================================
3105. MANIFEST FINALIZATION REPORT
======================================================================

Could create validation/finalization report with checksum/results.

======================================================================
3106. FINALIZATION REQUIRED REPORTS
======================================================================

At minimum:

- Plan validation;
- required Artifact validation;
- consistency/Manifest validation.

Không cần every optional report.

======================================================================
3107. FINALIZATION ACTIVE OPERATION
======================================================================

No conflicting queue/retry/recovery operation.

Lock/action matrix.

======================================================================
3108. FINALIZATION ACTIVE ATTEMPT
======================================================================

No required Unit active Attempt.

======================================================================
3109. FINALIZATION ACTIVE RESERVATION
======================================================================

No unresolved required output reservation.

======================================================================
3110. FINALIZATION BLOCKED UNIT
======================================================================

If blocked Units remain:

- completed not allowed;
- partial/failed/blocked according policy.

======================================================================
3111. FINALIZATION SKIPPED UNIT
======================================================================

Evaluate permit_skipped_completion.

Manifest lists reason.

======================================================================
3112. FINALIZATION CANCEL REQUEST
======================================================================

Cancellation persisted before commit affects final status.

======================================================================
3113. FINALIZATION PARTIAL POLICY
======================================================================

Must use Session snapshot policy, not current Project defaults.

======================================================================
3114. FINALIZATION OUTPUT HEALTH
======================================================================

Use current validation reports at finalization time.

======================================================================
3115. FINALIZATION EVENT PAYLOAD
======================================================================

Small summary:

- session_id;
- final status;
- progress;
- manifest_id/checksum;
- output counts;
- operation_id.

======================================================================
3116. FINALIZATION UI REFRESH
======================================================================

UI reload Session/Manifest.

No optimistic completed before event/persistence.

======================================================================
3117. RESUME INSPECTION DEEP MODE
======================================================================

Deep Resume inspection can:

- validate output existence/checksum;
- compare active Jobs;
- verify references;
- verify Engine fingerprint;
- verify output collision.

May run background.

======================================================================
3118. RESUME INSPECTION LIGHT MODE
======================================================================

Use metadata/Job status for UI quick summary.

Before actual Resume, run authoritative validation.

======================================================================
3119. RESUME VALID UNIT RULE
======================================================================

A Unit is valid complete only if:

- status succeeded hoặc historical success;
- required Artifact metadata;
- current availability;
- validation policy passes;
- lineage matches frozen input.

Không chỉ status.

======================================================================
3120. RESUME ACTIVE UNIT RULE
======================================================================

If active Job/Attempt valid:

- do not create new;
- report active.

If metadata active but Job stale:

- recovery first.

======================================================================
3121. RESUME PENDING UNIT RULE
======================================================================

No Attempt or ready/pending:

- eligible initial Attempt if execution ready.

======================================================================
3122. RESUME INTERRUPTED UNIT RULE
======================================================================

Old Attempt marked interrupted.

New Attempt created.

======================================================================
3123. RESUME FAILED UNIT RULE
======================================================================

Only if retry policy/mode includes and retries remain.

======================================================================
3124. RESUME INVALID_OUTPUT RULE
======================================================================

Eligible if policy.

New Attempt.

Old invalid Artifact preserved.

======================================================================
3125. RESUME CANCELLED UNIT RULE
======================================================================

Default not eligible.

Requires clone/new Session or explicit policy future.

======================================================================
3126. RESUME BLOCKED UNIT RULE
======================================================================

Not eligible until blocker resolved.

======================================================================
3127. RESUME RECOVERY_UNIT RULE
======================================================================

Recovery action first.

No direct execution.

======================================================================
3128. RESUME SESSION STATUS PRECONDITION
======================================================================

Allowed:

- paused;
- recovery resolved to paused;
- partially_completed;
- failed;
- planned with pending Units maybe queue rather than Resume.

Action naming should match.

======================================================================
3129. RESUME SESSION CURRENT SETTINGS
======================================================================

Use frozen snapshot.

No current defaults.

======================================================================
3130. RESUME ENGINE FINGERPRINT CHANGE
======================================================================

Policy must produce:

- allow;
- warning/confirmation;
- block.

No silent.

======================================================================
3131. RESUME REFERENCE CHECKSUM CHANGE
======================================================================

Block unless exact original restored.

No snapshot update.

======================================================================
3132. RESUME OUTPUT PATH CHANGE
======================================================================

Expected frozen path.

Runtime collision recheck.

No recompute new template.

======================================================================
3133. RESUME OPERATION PARTIAL FAILURE
======================================================================

If some Job creation succeeds:

- record;
- no duplicate;
- Session recovery/queued_partial;
- Resume same operation continues safe.

======================================================================
3134. RESUME FINALIZER JOB
======================================================================

Ensure one finalizer/coordinator after resumed Jobs according Queue architecture.

No duplicate finalizer.

======================================================================
3135. RETRY UNIT LATEST ATTEMPT VALIDATION
======================================================================

Retry request should optionally include expected latest Attempt ID/revision.

Stale request conflict.

======================================================================
3136. RETRY UNIT ACTIVE JOB
======================================================================

Reject/idempotent if active.

No second Attempt.

======================================================================
3137. RETRY UNIT LIMIT
======================================================================

Compute attempts/retries correctly.

No off-by-one.

======================================================================
3138. RETRY UNIT NON-RETRYABLE
======================================================================

Return blocker/error code, no mutation.

======================================================================
3139. RETRY UNIT OUTPUT COLLISION
======================================================================

Use retry collision policy.

No valid overwrite.

======================================================================
3140. RETRY UNIT RESOURCE WAIT
======================================================================

Job can queue/wait resource.

Attempt waiting_resource.

No retry count increase beyond created retry Attempt.

======================================================================
3141. RETRY CHAPTER ELIGIBILITY SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Operation stores ordered Unit IDs/fingerprints.

Before each mutation recheck.

======================================================================
3142. RETRY CHAPTER PARTIAL ACCEPT
======================================================================

Policy must be explicit:

- reject if any ineligible;
- hoặc retry eligible with report.

UI confirmation.

No hidden.

======================================================================
3143. RETRY CHAPTER JOB SCALE
======================================================================

Use batch Queue strategy if many Units.

No custom loop scheduler.

======================================================================
3144. RETRY CHAPTER FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Session transitions from partial/failed to queued/running.

Finalizer recomputes entire Session.

Valid Units unchanged.

======================================================================
3145. RETRY FAILED SESSION
======================================================================

Could be wrapper over retry eligible failed Units.

Not mandatory separate action if Chapter/Unit sufficient.

======================================================================
3146. RETRY PLANNING FAILURE
======================================================================

Not Unit Retry.

Use Request/Plan operation retry.

Do not create GenerateAttempt for text planning.

======================================================================
3147. RECOVERY STARTUP LIGHT SCAN
======================================================================

At startup/Project open:

- registry schema;
- non-terminal Session metadata;
- active Attempt/Job linkage;
- operation markers;
- no deep Audio checks.

======================================================================
3148. RECOVERY DEEP SCAN TRIGGER
======================================================================

- user action;
- recovery_required Session;
- startup detected inconsistency;
- Project validation;
- explicit API.

Background if large.

======================================================================
3149. RECOVERY LOST PLANNING JOB
======================================================================

If Session planning status but Job missing:

- inspect operation stage;
- Plan frozen? link/reconcile;
- Plan draft only? mark operation interrupted;
- Session recovery_required/paused;
- no auto rerun.

======================================================================
3150. RECOVERY LOST EXECUTION JOB
======================================================================

Attempt running/queued but Job missing:

- mark interrupted/recovery;
- inspect output temp/final;
- no new Attempt until report.

======================================================================
3151. RECOVERY LOST FINALIZATION JOB
======================================================================

If all Units terminal but Session not final:

- validate;
- run finalization safe;
- no Engine.

======================================================================
3152. RECOVERY LOST MANIFEST JOB
======================================================================

Rebuild safe.

======================================================================
3153. RECOVERY STALE REGISTRY ENTRY
======================================================================

Update/rebuild.

No Session data mutation besides summary/report pointer if needed.

======================================================================
3154. RECOVERY MISSING REGISTRY ENTRY
======================================================================

Add summary from valid Session.

======================================================================
3155. RECOVERY DUPLICATE REGISTRY ENTRY
======================================================================

Resolve by session_id; report.

No duplicate Session delete.

======================================================================
3156. RECOVERY CORRUPT REGISTRY FILE
======================================================================

Preserve corrupt file.

Rebuild atomic.

======================================================================
3157. RECOVERY CORRUPT SESSION FILE
======================================================================

- preserve;
- isolate;
- report;
- do not guess from folder only beyond safe summary;
- no overwrite.

======================================================================
3158. RECOVERY CORRUPT PLAN FILE
======================================================================

No execution.

If backup/previous valid exact available through atomic utility, restore safe with report.

Else recovery required/new Session.

======================================================================
3159. RECOVERY CORRUPT MANIFEST FILE
======================================================================

Rebuild if repositories valid.

Preserve corrupt previous.

======================================================================
3160. RECOVERY CORRUPT ATTEMPT FILE
======================================================================

Unit/Session recovery issue.

Do not create retry until inspect lineage.

======================================================================
3161. RECOVERY CORRUPT ARTIFACT METADATA
======================================================================

Physical file not automatically trusted.

Report/orphan.

======================================================================
3162. RECOVERY MISSING SOURCE RAW
======================================================================

No Plan re-execution if frozen Units include text? Execution may technically use Unit text, nhưng data integrity policy phải decide.

Default:

- health degraded/recovery;
- execution blocked until source integrity resolved, unless Plan is self-contained and policy explicitly allows.

Document actual choice.

======================================================================
3163. RECOVERY MISSING NORMALIZED FILE
======================================================================

If Plan frozen/Unit text self-contained:

- history/execution policy may continue only if Plan checksum/Unit text sufficient;
- but source verification degraded.

Safe regeneration only from raw with same version/settings and checksum match.

======================================================================
3164. RECOVERY MISSING STRUCTURE FILE
======================================================================

Frozen Plan may be self-contained for execution.

Health degraded.

Rebuild only if exact deterministic version/settings available and checksum matches.

No replan mutation.

======================================================================
3165. RECOVERY MISSING PLAN ENTITY FILE
======================================================================

If Plan index missing Unit/Chapter:

- critical;
- no execution;
- no inference.

======================================================================
3166. RECOVERY MISSING ATTEMPT JOB
======================================================================

As lost Job.

======================================================================
3167. RECOVERY MISSING ARTIFACT FILE
======================================================================

Artifact missing/current health degraded.

Retry/regenerate policy.

======================================================================
3168. RECOVERY FINAL FILE WITHOUT ARTIFACT
======================================================================

Only attach if definitive lineage.

Else orphan.

======================================================================
3169. RECOVERY TEMP FILE WITHOUT OPERATION
======================================================================

Unknown orphan temp.

No delete/attach.

Report.

======================================================================
3170. RECOVERY STALE RESERVATION
======================================================================

If Attempt terminal/lost and reservation old:

- release through Output Manager safe repair;
- preserve record;
- no file delete.

======================================================================
3171. RECOVERY STALE ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_ID
======================================================================

If Attempt terminal:

- clear active pointer;
- latest remains;
- recompute Unit.

Safe repair.

======================================================================
3172. RECOVERY STALE ACTIVE_JOB_IDS
======================================================================

Remove terminal/missing active cache after reconciliation.

Historical IDs remain.

======================================================================
3173. RECOVERY STALE LEASE IDS
======================================================================

Active cache cleanup through Resource Manager status.

Historical link remains.

======================================================================
3174. RECOVERY STALE PROGRESS
======================================================================

Recompute.

Safe.

======================================================================
3175. RECOVERY STALE HEALTH
======================================================================

Recompute report.

======================================================================
3176. RECOVERY SESSION STATUS RECONCILIATION
======================================================================

Use state machine/status computation.

Record transition reason.

No arbitrary direct assignment.

======================================================================
3177. RECOVERY NO AUTO ENGINE CALL
======================================================================

Recovery never runs production inference automatically.

Even if output missing.

======================================================================
3178. RECOVERY NO AUTO REFERENCE REPLACE
======================================================================

No alternative asset.

======================================================================
3179. RECOVERY NO AUTO SOURCE REIMPORT
======================================================================

No external current file guess.

======================================================================
3180. RECOVERY NO AUTO PLAN REBUILD
======================================================================

No latest splitter replan frozen Session.

======================================================================
3181. RECOVERY NO AUTO OUTPUT OVERWRITE
======================================================================

No.

======================================================================
3182. RECOVERY SAFE REPAIR CODES
======================================================================

Có thể whitelist:

- REBUILD_REGISTRY;
- REBUILD_MANIFEST;
- RECOMPUTE_PROGRESS;
- RECOMPUTE_HEALTH;
- MARK_ATTEMPT_INTERRUPTED;
- CLEAR_STALE_ACTIVE_JOB;
- CLEAR_STALE_ACTIVE_ATTEMPT;
- RELEASE_STALE_RESERVATION;
- REGISTER_RECOVERED_ARTIFACT_STRONG_EVIDENCE;
- LINK_FROZEN_PLAN_STRONG_EVIDENCE.

Last two require strict evidence.

======================================================================
3183. RECOVERY MANUAL ACTION CODES
======================================================================

- RESTORE_SOURCE;
- RESTORE_REFERENCE;
- SELECT_VALID_ENGINE;
- CREATE_NEW_SESSION;
- REVIEW_ORPHAN_OUTPUT;
- RESTORE_FROM_BACKUP;
- RETRY_AFTER_REPAIR.

No arbitrary script.

======================================================================
3184. RECOVERY REPORT ISSUE EVIDENCE
======================================================================

Each issue:

- code;
- severity;
- entity;
- expected;
- observed;
- evidence level;
- safe repair;
- manual action;
- related paths redacted/relative;
- timestamp.

======================================================================
3185. RECOVERY REPORT FINGERPRINT
======================================================================

Avoid duplicate reports if unchanged.

New scan can reuse current report summary.

======================================================================
3186. RECOVERY UI REPORT GROUPING
======================================================================

Group:

- metadata;
- Jobs;
- resources;
- outputs;
- source;
- Manifest;
- safe repairs;
- manual actions.

======================================================================
3187. RECOVERY API REPORT PAGINATION
======================================================================

Large issues paginated or bounded.

======================================================================
3188. RECOVERY ACTION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Same safe repair operation returns existing result.

======================================================================
3189. RECOVERY ACTION CONFLICT
======================================================================

If state changed after report:

- re-inspect;
- no stale repair.

======================================================================
3190. CONSISTENCY CHECK ENTITY GRAPH
======================================================================

Validate full lineage without relying on filenames.

IDs and indexes.

======================================================================
3191. CONSISTENCY CHECK PROJECT ROOT
======================================================================

All managed relative paths resolve inside correct Project.

======================================================================
3192. CONSISTENCY CHECK SOURCE SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Metadata/raw/checksum/finalized.

======================================================================
3193. CONSISTENCY CHECK NORMALIZATION
======================================================================

Raw checksum/settings/version/output checksum.

======================================================================
3194. CONSISTENCY CHECK STRUCTURE
======================================================================

Checksum/spans/coverage/version.

======================================================================
3195. CONSISTENCY CHECK PLAN
======================================================================

Frozen/checksum/index/entity/order/reconstruction/output paths.

======================================================================
3196. CONSISTENCY CHECK SELECTION
======================================================================

Snapshot checksum/IDs/content fingerprints.

Current readiness separate.

======================================================================
3197. CONSISTENCY CHECK SETTINGS
======================================================================

Snapshot checksum/JSON-safe/ranges.

======================================================================
3198. CONSISTENCY CHECK OUTPUT SPEC
======================================================================

Checksum/requirements/paths/collision uniqueness.

======================================================================
3199. CONSISTENCY CHECK ATTEMPTS
======================================================================

Sequence/parent/status/job/output lineage.

======================================================================
3200. CONSISTENCY CHECK ARTIFACTS
======================================================================

Path uniqueness/status/availability/validation/supersession.

======================================================================
3201. CONSISTENCY CHECK MANIFEST
======================================================================

Checksum/revision/entity references/final status.

======================================================================
3202. CONSISTENCY CHECK REGISTRY
======================================================================

Summary vs Session revision/health/progress.

======================================================================
3203. CONSISTENCY CHECK OPERATIONS
======================================================================

Active operation matches Session/action.

Stale operation recovery.

======================================================================
3204. CONSISTENCY CHECK JOBS
======================================================================

Metadata/status/Attempt/Session.

======================================================================
3205. CONSISTENCY CHECK RESOURCES
======================================================================

Lease/job linkage/current active cache.

======================================================================
3206. CONSISTENCY CHECK EVENTS
======================================================================

Event Bus not source truth, so missing event không consistency error business.

No durable event verification required.

======================================================================
3207. CONSISTENCY CHECK REPORT POINTERS
======================================================================

Latest report IDs exist/type/entity match.

Missing report warning/degraded.

======================================================================
3208. CONSISTENCY CHECK TIMESTAMPS
======================================================================

Logical ordering.

Legacy anomalies report.

======================================================================
3209. CONSISTENCY CHECK REVISIONS
======================================================================

Indexes/Registry/Session stale detection.

======================================================================
3210. CONSISTENCY CHECK FUTURE SCHEMA
======================================================================

Read-only.

No repair downgrade.

======================================================================
3211. CONSISTENCY RESULT REPAIRABILITY
======================================================================

Each issue classify:

- informational;
- repairable automatically;
- repairable with confirmation;
- manual;
- unrecoverable in current Session.

======================================================================
3212. CONSISTENCY RESULT SESSION HEALTH
======================================================================

Health status derived from highest severity/core integrity.

Business status unchanged unless reconciliation required.

======================================================================
3213. CONSISTENCY RESULT PROJECT HEALTH
======================================================================

Aggregate count/severity.

One corrupt Session may Project degraded, not completely unusable.

======================================================================
3214. JOB TYPE GENERATE_PREPARE
======================================================================

Real production-safe because no inference.

Payload:

- project_id;
- request_id;
- session_id;
- operation_id;
- payload_version.

Handler:

- source/Plan pipeline.

======================================================================
3215. JOB TYPE GENERATE_UNIT
======================================================================

Contract only until real provider.

Payload:

- project_id;
- session_id;
- unit_id;
