- attempt_id;
- operation_id;
- payload_version.

Production handler registered only if real implementation.

======================================================================
3216. JOB TYPE GENERATE_VALIDATE_OUTPUT
======================================================================

Optional separate real Job.

Payload:

- artifact_id;
- attempt_id;
- policy ID/version.

No GPU.

======================================================================
3217. JOB TYPE GENERATE_FINALIZE_CHAPTER
======================================================================

Only if actual architecture needs.

No empty handler.

======================================================================
3218. JOB TYPE GENERATE_FINALIZE_SESSION
======================================================================

Real metadata/finalization.

No inference.

======================================================================
3219. JOB TYPE GENERATE_REBUILD_MANIFEST
======================================================================

Real metadata.

======================================================================
3220. JOB TYPE GENERATE_RECOVERY
======================================================================

Optional deep recovery.

No inference.

======================================================================
3221. JOB TYPE GENERATE_BATCH_COORDINATOR
======================================================================

Only if Queue capacity/batched enqueue requires.

Must use Queue APIs.

No own worker thread loop.

======================================================================
3222. JOB HANDLER BASE CONTRACT
======================================================================

Follow existing JobHandler protocol.

Must support:

- payload validation;
- cancellation;
- progress;
- logging;
- error mapping;
- dependency/result;
- ResourceRequirement if architecture.

======================================================================
3223. JOB HANDLER DOMAIN RELOAD
======================================================================

Never trust payload object snapshot for mutable state.

Load by IDs.

======================================================================
3224. JOB HANDLER PAYLOAD VERSION
======================================================================

Unsupported version stable failure.

No guess.

======================================================================
3225. JOB HANDLER PROJECT CHECK
======================================================================

Project exists/allowed.

No current Project implicit.

======================================================================
3226. JOB HANDLER SESSION CHECK
======================================================================

Session status/action.

Cancelled/archived/completed stale Job no-op/fail safely.

======================================================================
3227. JOB HANDLER UNIT CHECK
======================================================================

Unit belongs Plan/Session.

Attempt matches.

======================================================================
3228. JOB HANDLER PLAN CHECK
======================================================================

Frozen/checksum.

No execution if corrupt.

======================================================================
3229. JOB HANDLER REFERENCE CHECK
======================================================================

Current asset/checksum/readiness.

No fallback.

======================================================================
3230. JOB HANDLER ENGINE CHECK
======================================================================

Provider registered/readiness.

No dynamic import from payload.

======================================================================
3231. JOB HANDLER RESOURCE CHECK
======================================================================

Lease granted as required.

No direct acquire outside framework.

======================================================================
3232. JOB HANDLER OUTPUT CHECK
======================================================================

Reservation/path/collision.

======================================================================
3233. JOB HANDLER CANCELLATION PRECHECK
======================================================================

Before Engine.

======================================================================
3234. JOB HANDLER CANCELLATION POSTCHECK
======================================================================

After Engine before finalize.

======================================================================
3235. JOB HANDLER OUTPUT FINALIZE
======================================================================

Output Manager only.

======================================================================
3236. JOB HANDLER DOMAIN SUCCESS
======================================================================

Only after validator.

======================================================================
3237. JOB HANDLER FINALLY
======================================================================

Release reservation/close resources/log.

Resource lease by framework.

======================================================================
3238. JOB HANDLER INFRA RETRY
======================================================================

Idempotent same Attempt.

No domain retry increment.

======================================================================
3239. JOB HANDLER TEST-ONLY PROVIDER
======================================================================

Registered by fixture/composition override only.

No production import side effect.

======================================================================
3240. JOB HANDLER PRODUCTION PROVIDER DISCOVERY
======================================================================

If existing real GPT-SoVITS adapter:

- audit;
- wrap;
- preserve;
- no real test execution;
- readiness from actual config.

======================================================================
3241. JOB HANDLER ABSENT PROVIDER
======================================================================

Execution readiness unavailable.

Queue action blocked before mutation.

======================================================================
3242. JOB PAYLOAD SIZE
======================================================================

Small IDs only.

No source text/settings graph.

======================================================================
3243. JOB METADATA SEARCH
======================================================================

Job records tagged for query/recovery.

======================================================================
3244. JOB DEPENDENCY FINALIZER
======================================================================

Finalizer must run after all required execution/validation Jobs terminal according Queue support.

If Queue dependency treats failed prerequisite as cancel, coordinator/recovery must still finalize failed Session.

Choose actual strategy.

======================================================================
3245. JOB FAILURE FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Session must reach failed/partial Manifest even when Unit Jobs fail.

Do not leave running forever.

======================================================================
3246. JOB CANCEL FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Cancellation reconciliation/finalizer.

======================================================================
3247. JOB PAUSE FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Do not final terminal while paused with pending Units.

======================================================================
3248. JOB WAITING_RESOURCE FINALIZATION
======================================================================

No final while required work waiting.

======================================================================
3249. JOB MISSING FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Recovery detects and schedules/calls safe finalizer.

======================================================================
3250. RESOURCE REQUIREMENT PLANNING
======================================================================

Generate prepare:

- CPU;
- RAM estimate from source size;
- disk for snapshots/Plan;
- no GPU unless actual source processing requires, which it should not.

======================================================================
3251. RESOURCE REQUIREMENT EXECUTION
======================================================================

Provider/capability-specific:

- CPU cores preference;
- RAM;
- GPU required/preferred;
- VRAM;
- disk temp/final;
- device constraints;
- concurrency key if Engine singleton.

======================================================================
3252. RESOURCE REQUIREMENT VALIDATION
======================================================================

No negative/NaN.

Engine requirement must be JSON-safe/persistable.

======================================================================
3253. RESOURCE REQUIREMENT DISK ESTIMATE
======================================================================

Include:

- temp;
- primary output;
- derived outputs;
- sidecars;
- safety buffer.

Confidence.

======================================================================

======================================================================

Provider may estimate runtime/resource by Unit chars.

No model load.

======================================================================

======================================================================

No hardcode GPT-SoVITS assumptions in core.

======================================================================

======================================================================

======================================================================

======================================================================

Temporary insufficiency.

Job remains same Attempt.

======================================================================
3258. RESOURCE DECISION UNSUPPORTED
======================================================================

Permanent current environment/policy.

No retry storm.

======================================================================

======================================================================

======================================================================

Historical link remains.

3267. ENGINE EXECUTOR PROTOCOL

- get_capabilities();
- get_readiness(context);

- close/release if needed.

Adapt to actual EngineManager.

- operation/job IDs;
- logger/progress/cancellation.

No Qt.

- max text;

- parameter support;
- resource requirements.

======================================================================

======================================================================

EngineManager/Resource policy owns instance.

Generate core không tạo global instance.

======================================================================

======================================================================

======================================================================

No fake.

======================================================================

- effective runtime metadata;
- reproducibility impact;
- potentially block if critical.

No hidden.

Generate Page loads/plans/readiness.

3713. FINAL CAPABILITY TABLE REQUIRED
======================================================================

Phải ghi actual:

- Generate Request;

- Manifest Finalization;

- Resume Inspection;
- Resume Execution;
- Retry Inspection;
- Retry Execution;
- Recovery;
- MP3;
- Project Backup/Export/Import;
- UI;
- Local API.

======================================================================
3714. FINAL CAPABILITY STATUS VALUES
======================================================================

Dùng rõ:

- READY;
- DEGRADED;
- UNAVAILABLE;
- BLOCKED;
- TEST_ONLY;
- NOT_IMPLEMENTED;
- NOT_APPLICABLE.

Không dùng “gần xong”.

======================================================================
3715. FINAL TEST TABLE REQUIRED
======================================================================

Columns:

- Check;
- Command;
- Result;
- Notes.

Actual.

======================================================================

======================================================================

Columns:

- Action;
- File;
- Purpose;
- Compatibility impact;
- Tests.

Actual.

======================================================================

Columns:

- Capability;
- Blocker code;
- Missing component;
- Current safe behavior;
- Required next step.

Actual.

======================================================================
3718. FINAL DATA SAFETY TABLE REQUIRED
======================================================================

Include:

- real Project data;
- workspace;
- Reference Vault;
- outputs;
- backups/exports;
- Git operations;
- test temp roots.

Actual.

======================================================================
3719. FINAL MIGRATION TABLE REQUIRED
======================================================================

If migration touched:

- source schema;
- target schema;
- fields mapped;
- unresolved;
- backup;
- test.

======================================================================
3720. FINAL READY STATUS
======================================================================

Only:

READY_FOR_GITHUB_REVIEW

when all required criteria and worktree acceptable.

======================================================================
3721. FINAL SOURCE_READY STATUS
======================================================================

Use:

SOURCE_DOCS_TESTS_READY
WORKTREE_NOT_CLEAN_DUE_TO_REAL_USER_DATA

when source/docs/tests ready but real user data present.

======================================================================
3722. FINAL NOT_READY STATUS
======================================================================

Use:

NOT_READY

when critical implementation/tests/docs/data safety unresolved.

======================================================================
3723. FOUNDATION COMPLETE WITH EXECUTION UNAVAILABLE
======================================================================

Có thể vẫn đạt Sprint foundation nếu:

- planning thật;
- persistence thật;
- output foundation thật;
- orchestration contracts thật;
- UI/API honest;
- no fake;
- tests/docs pass.

Capability execution vẫn UNAVAILABLE.

======================================================================
3724. FOUNDATION NOT COMPLETE
======================================================================

Không đạt nếu chỉ có:

- interfaces;
- models;
- docs;
- UI mock;
- API stub;
- readiness unavailable;
- TODO.

Phải có real Plan/persistence/text/output foundation.

======================================================================
3725. PRODUCTION EXECUTION READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Chỉ READY khi:

- real handler registered;
- provider/runtime/model readiness;
- Reference resolution;
- Resource requirement;
- output finalization/validation;
- errors/cancel/progress;
- integration tests không chạy inference thật nhưng contract verified;
- no fake.

======================================================================
3726. PREVIEW AUDIO READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Real handler/capability/output valid.

Không dùng Plan preview.

======================================================================
3727. MP3 READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Real direct output hoặc converter + validator.

Không rename extension.

======================================================================
3728. RESUME EXECUTION READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Inspection + handler + Job/Resource + retry/Attempt/output flow.

Nếu handler absent:

- inspection READY;
- execution UNAVAILABLE.

======================================================================
3729. RETRY EXECUTION READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Same.

======================================================================
3730. OUTPUT VALIDATION FULL READY CONDITION
======================================================================

FFprobe/probe service available and policy/tests.

Otherwise basic READY/full DEGRADED hoặc UNAVAILABLE.

======================================================================
3731. PACKAGE READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Generate metadata integrated, omissions/remap/checksums/tests.

======================================================================
3732. MIGRATION READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Actual legacy evidence/transform/idempotent/backup/future handling/tests.

======================================================================
3733. UI READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Usable plan/history/readiness/actions/responsive/smoke.

No hidden misleading buttons.

======================================================================
3734. API READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Routes/services/errors/idempotency/pagination/security/tests.

======================================================================
3735. DASHBOARD READY CONDITION
======================================================================

Accurate summary/readiness/no deep load.

======================================================================
3736. FINAL NEXT SPRINT HANDOFF CONTENT
======================================================================

Nếu production execution absent, handoff phải chỉ rõ:

- execution protocol/class;
- composition registration point;
- Job handler type;
- EngineManager call;
- ResourceRequirement factory;
- Reference runtime resolver;
- Output Manager temp/final contract;
- validation/finalization flow;
- tests cần thêm.

Không triển khai next Sprint.

======================================================================
3737. FINAL USER-FACING SUMMARY
======================================================================

Phải nói đúng:

- người dùng hiện làm được gì;
- chưa làm được gì;
- dữ liệu có được bảo toàn không;
- tests ra sao;
- cần gì để production Generate Audio.

Không marketing.

======================================================================
3738. FINAL DEVELOPER-FACING SUMMARY
======================================================================

Phải nói:

- architecture;
- extension points;
- compatibility;
- known blockers;
- source files;
- test commands.

======================================================================
3739. FINAL NO_CHAIN_OF_THOUGHT
======================================================================

Không trình bày suy luận nội bộ.

Chỉ evidence/kết quả.

======================================================================
3740. MASTER PART CONSISTENCY
======================================================================

PART 07 tiếp tục trực tiếp PART 01–06.

Giữ nguyên toàn bộ nguyên tắc đã khóa:

- Sprint AVS-014.16;
- Generate Pipeline Foundation;
- PHASE 0–12;
- Source-first;
- Data-first;
- immutable IDs;
- Request/Session separation;
- Source Snapshot managed;
- deterministic normalization;
- no-loss structure/splitting;
- frozen Plan;
- Unit/Attempt/Job separation;
- Artifact validation authority;
- Manifest persistence/rebuild;
- Resume không chạy lại Unit hợp lệ;
- Retry tạo Attempt mới;
- Recovery không đoán;
- Job Queue là scheduler duy nhất;
- Resource Manager là authority duy nhất;
- Reference Vault dùng asset IDs/checksums;
- Engine-neutral core;
- production fake bị cấm;
- test fake chỉ trong tests;
- không Train;
- không Voice DNA Analyzer;
- không sửa GPT-SoVITS runtime ngoài adapter/integration cần thiết;
- không sửa dữ liệu thật;
- không Git write;
- API/UI cùng application services;
- readiness phải trung thực;
- full tests/docs/final report.

======================================================================
3741. CONTINUATION RULE
======================================================================

Nếu còn PART tiếp theo:

- bắt đầu từ mục 3742;
- nối tiếp cùng Master Prompt;
- không sửa nội dung PART trước;
- không thay Sprint;
- không đổi PHASE;
- không đổi canonical responsibility;
- không tuyên bố kết thúc toàn bộ Prompt cho tới marker cuối thật sự.

===== KẾT THÚC PART 07 — CHƯA KẾT THÚC TOÀN BỘ PROMPT =====
# AI VOICE STUDIO
# MASTER IMPLEMENTATION PROMPT
# AVS-014.16 — GENERATE PIPELINE FOUNDATION
# PART 08

======================================================================
3742. CODEX EXECUTION MODE
======================================================================

Codex phải thực hiện task trên source hiện tại theo quy trình:

1. Đọc source.
2. Audit.
3. Lập File Plan.
4. Thực hiện từng PHASE.
5. Chạy targeted tests sau mỗi nhóm.
6. Chạy full tests.
7. Cập nhật docs.
8. Kiểm tra dữ liệu thật.
9. Kiểm tra Git status chỉ đọc.
10. Trả Final Report.

Không dừng ở việc lập kế hoạch nếu không có blocker thực tế.

======================================================================
3743. RESPONSE CHANGE CLASSIFICATION
======================================================================

Khi báo cáo file thay đổi, phải phân loại:

- KEEP
- NEW
- REPLACE
- DELETE

Ý nghĩa:

KEEP:

- file được đọc/kiểm tra;
- không cần thay đổi.

NEW:

- file mới cần thiết cho Sprint;
- không trùng trách nhiệm file hiện có.

REPLACE:

- file hiện có được sửa;
- trong báo cáo phải mô tả chính xác thay đổi.

DELETE:

- chỉ dùng khi file source thật sự dư thừa sau migration;
- phải chứng minh không còn call site;
- không dùng để xóa dữ liệu người dùng;
- không dùng nếu compatibility wrapper còn cần.

======================================================================
3744. DELETE RESTRICTION
======================================================================

Không DELETE:

- Project data;
- Workspace;
- Voice data;
- Reference Vault;
- Audio outputs;
- Reports;
- Backups;
- Exports;
- migration backups;
- unknown files;
- untracked files không chắc ownership.

DELETE source file chỉ được phép khi:

- file chắc chắn thuộc code;
- chức năng đã được thay thế hoàn chỉnh;
- toàn bộ imports/call sites/tests/docs đã cập nhật;
- full tests pass;
- không phá compatibility.

======================================================================
3745. FULL FILE EDIT POLICY
======================================================================

Khi Codex sửa file trong môi trường yêu cầu full-file replacement:

- đọc bản mới nhất;
- giữ toàn bộ chức năng không liên quan;
- chỉ thay đổi phần cần thiết;
- không trả patch rời nếu hệ thống yêu cầu full file;
- không bỏ imports/public methods cũ không có lý do;
- không tự format lại toàn file gây diff lớn.

======================================================================
3746. NO ASSUMED FILE PATH
======================================================================

Tên file/module trong Prompt chỉ là canonical responsibility.

Codex phải tìm đường dẫn thật.

Không tự tạo:

`src/generate/...`

nếu project có cấu trúc khác như:

- app/services;
- core;
- domain;
- infrastructure;
- ui/pages;
- api/routes.

Ưu tiên kiến trúc hiện có.

======================================================================
3747. FILE PLAN REQUIRED COLUMNS
======================================================================

File Plan phải có:

- Action.
- Actual file path.
- Current responsibility.
- Required change.
- New responsibility.
- Public API impact.
- Migration impact.
- Test file.
- Risk.
- Phase.

======================================================================
3748. FILE PLAN KEEP ENTRIES
======================================================================

File quan trọng được audit nhưng không cần sửa nên ghi KEEP.

Ví dụ:

- Engine runtime không cần sửa.
- Job Queue core đã đủ.
- Resource Manager đã đủ.
- Reference Vault đã đủ.
- Project Manager đã đủ.

Điều này chứng minh không tạo hệ thống trùng.

======================================================================
3749. FILE PLAN REPLACE LIMIT
======================================================================

Không gom quá nhiều trách nhiệm vào một REPLACE.

Nếu file hiện tại đã quá lớn:

- có thể NEW helper/service;
- REPLACE file cũ để delegate;
- giữ public compatibility.

Không refactor toàn module chỉ để đẹp.

======================================================================
3750. FILE PLAN NEW FILE JUSTIFICATION
======================================================================

Mỗi NEW phải trả lời:

- Vì sao file hiện tại không phù hợp?
- File mới chịu trách nhiệm duy nhất gì?
- Ai gọi file mới?
- Test nào bảo vệ?
- Có làm tăng circular dependency không?

======================================================================
3751. FILE PLAN DELETE JUSTIFICATION
======================================================================

Mỗi DELETE phải ghi:

- file thay thế;
- search call sites;
- migration/compatibility;
- tests;
- data safety.

Nếu không chứng minh được, không DELETE.

======================================================================
3752. PHASE OUTPUT CONTRACT
======================================================================

Mỗi PHASE phải tạo output thực tế:

PHASE 0:

- Audit.
- Delta map.
- File Plan.

PHASE 1:

- Domain models.
- Enums.
- State/action rules.

PHASE 2:

- Paths.
- Repositories.
- Registry.
- Atomic persistence.

PHASE 3:

- Source materialization.

PHASE 4:

- Normalization.
- Structure.

PHASE 5:

- Splitting.
- Planning.

PHASE 6:

- Output.
- Artifact.
- Validation.
- Manifest.

PHASE 7:

- Resume.
- Retry.
- Recovery.
- Consistency.

PHASE 8:

- Job Queue.
- Resource Manager.
- Engine contract.

PHASE 9:

- Project.
- Reference.
- AppContext.
- Events.
- Readiness.

PHASE 10:

- Local API.

PHASE 11:

- UI.
- Dashboard.
- Settings.

PHASE 12:

- Migration.
- Package.
- Tests.
- Docs.
- Final review.

======================================================================
3753. PHASE DEPENDENCY ENFORCEMENT
======================================================================

Không thực hiện:

- UI trước Application Service;
- API trước DTO/domain;
- Job execution trước Attempt/Artifact;
- Resume trước frozen Plan;
- Manifest trước entity repositories;
- package remap trước stable IDs;
- migration trước schema versions.

Nếu source có code cũ, có thể giữ chạy nhưng integration mới vẫn theo dependency.

======================================================================
3754. PHASE CHECKPOINT REPORT
======================================================================

Sau mỗi PHASE, internal checkpoint cần ghi:

- files changed;
- tests run;
- pass/fail;
- compatibility notes;
- unresolved blocker;
- next Phase prerequisites.

Không cần hỏi người dùng nếu không có blocker.

======================================================================
3755. BLOCKER DEFINITION
======================================================================

Blocker hợp lệ là:

- thiếu source file bắt buộc;
- source corrupt/không đọc được;
- architecture conflict có nguy cơ mất dữ liệu;
- test environment không khởi động;
- dependency thật sự không tồn tại;
- yêu cầu phá compatibility nhưng không có quyết định;
- không thể xác định real data path an toàn;
- production handler cần secret/model/runtime không có.

Không coi “task lớn” là blocker.

======================================================================
3756. NON-BLOCKING UNCERTAINTY
======================================================================

Nếu chưa rõ tên class/path:

- search;
- đọc source;
- thích nghi.

Không hỏi người dùng chỉ vì naming khác Prompt.

======================================================================
3757. DESTRUCTIVE DECISION BLOCKER
======================================================================

Chỉ hỏi người dùng trước hành động có thể:

- xóa/move dữ liệu thật;
- overwrite output;
- thay schema không có backup;
- phá public API;
- loại bỏ working Engine flow;
- thay Project package policy quan trọng.

Trong Sprint này ưu tiên tránh hành động đó để tiếp tục an toàn.

======================================================================
3758. SOURCE-FIRST IMPLEMENTATION
======================================================================

Mọi quyết định implementation phải dựa:

- actual classes;
- actual services;
- actual tests;
- actual data layout;
- actual public methods.

Không dựa vào nhớ nội dung file từ lượt trước.

======================================================================
3759. DATA-FIRST IMPLEMENTATION
======================================================================

Trước khi thiết kế migration/storage:

- đọc schema hiện tại;
- đọc sample fixture được phép;
- đọc tests;
- đọc path resolver;
- đọc Project layout.

Không tạo schema hypothetical không tích hợp.

======================================================================
3760. TEST-FIRST CRITICAL INVARIANTS
======================================================================

Trước hoặc cùng khi code, phải có tests cho invariants:

- immutable IDs;
- path containment;
- Plan freeze;
- valid Artifact authority;
- Retry new Attempt;
- Resume skip valid Unit;
- no fake handler;
- no real data mutation;
- no Job duplicate;
- no output overwrite.

======================================================================
3761. DOMAIN MODULE DISCOVERY
======================================================================

Tìm xem project hiện có:

- common model base;
- entity base;
- schema version mixin;
- timestamp mixin;
- validation result;
- ID factory;
- checksum helper;
- serialization helper.

Tái sử dụng.

======================================================================
3762. DOMAIN MODEL FILE GROUPING
======================================================================

Nếu project dùng file nhóm, có thể tổ chức:

- generate_models.py;
- generate_enums.py;
- generate_state.py;
- generate_validation.py.

Nếu project dùng package, có thể:

- generate/models/request.py;
- generate/models/session.py;
- generate/models/plan.py.

Không bắt buộc cấu trúc nào.

======================================================================
3763. REQUEST PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateRequest public contract phải cho phép:

- create draft;
- validate;
- update draft;
- materialize once;
- archive/read;
- serialize/deserialize;
- identify latest validation;
- identify materialized Session.

Không cho client tự set lifecycle.

======================================================================
3764. SESSION PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateSession public contract phải cho phép:

- read lifecycle;
- controlled transition;
- progress summary;
- health summary;
- active operations/Jobs;
- Plan/Manifest links;
- archive/restore;
- serialization.

Không chứa Engine execution method.

======================================================================
3765. DOCUMENT PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateDocument chịu trách nhiệm:

- normalized document identity;
- order;
- Source Snapshot relation;
- structure/Plan relation;
- counts;
- derived status.

Không đọc source file trực tiếp.

======================================================================
3766. CHAPTER PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateChapter chịu trách nhiệm:

- immutable structure;
- Unit ordering;
- title metadata;
- span metadata;
- derived progress/status;
- output summary.

Không split text.

======================================================================
3767. UNIT PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateUnit chịu trách nhiệm:

- frozen execution text reference;
- order/spans/checksum;
- Attempt links;
- current execution state;
- output requirements.

Không gọi Engine.

======================================================================
3768. ATTEMPT PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateAttempt chịu trách nhiệm:

- one domain execution try;
- Job/resource linkage;
- runtime result;
- errors;
- Artifact linkage;
- terminal history.

Không chứa Queue implementation.

======================================================================
3769. ARTIFACT PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateArtifact chịu trách nhiệm:

- planned/physical output identity;
- lineage;
- validation;
- availability;
- supersession;
- current health.

Không tự probe file trong model.

======================================================================
3770. PLAN PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GeneratePlan chịu trách nhiệm:

- frozen structural execution graph;
- snapshots/checksums;
- entity indexes;
- output requirements;
- deterministic fingerprint.

Không chứa runtime progress.

======================================================================
3771. MANIFEST PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateManifest chịu trách nhiệm:

- reproducible Session summary;
- lifecycle/output audit;
- revisions;
- finalization;
- package-friendly metadata.

Không thay repositories làm source truth.

======================================================================
3772. OPERATION PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

GenerateOperationRecord chịu trách nhiệm:

- idempotency;
- multi-stage coordination;
- result recovery;
- correlation.

Không thay Job.

======================================================================
3773. REPORT PUBLIC CONTRACT
======================================================================

Generate report models chịu trách nhiệm:

- validation;
- recovery;
- retry/resume inspection;
- migration;
- consistency.

Reports immutable.

======================================================================
3774. ENUM VALUE STABILITY
======================================================================

Persisted enum values:

- lowercase snake_case;
- không localized;
- không đổi tùy UI.

UI mapping tách riêng.

======================================================================
3775. ENUM UNKNOWN VALUE
======================================================================

Nếu loader gặp unknown enum trong schema supported:

- validation error/read-only;
- không map tự động sang default;
- không bỏ field.

Future schema policy áp dụng nếu version cao hơn.

======================================================================
3776. MODEL SCHEMA VERSION OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Mỗi persisted entity phải biết schema version.

Không lấy application version làm schema ngầm.

======================================================================
3777. MODEL SERIALIZATION ROUNDTRIP
======================================================================

Roundtrip phải giữ:

- IDs;
- enums;
- timestamps;
- checksums;
- relative paths;
- unknown compatible fields theo policy;
- Unicode tiếng Việt.

======================================================================
3778. MODEL DEFAULT VERSION
======================================================================

Factory dùng current schema.

Deserializer không tự đổi version cũ nếu chưa migration.

======================================================================
3779. MODEL VALIDATION ON CREATE
======================================================================

Factory reject invalid:

- empty Project ID;
- invalid source union;
- invalid settings;
- invalid path/checksum;
- inconsistent status/timestamp;
- negative count.

======================================================================
3780. MODEL VALIDATION ON LOAD
======================================================================

Loader phân biệt:

- corruption;
- unsupported version;
- migration needed;
- invariant mismatch.

Không return partially trusted entity như valid.

======================================================================
3781. MODEL VALIDATION ON UPDATE
======================================================================

Update service:

- reload latest;
- validate action;
- apply allowed fields;
- validate full entity;
- expected revision;
- atomic persist.

======================================================================
3782. STATE HISTORY STORAGE DECISION
======================================================================

Sau audit chọn:

A. Bounded transition list trong entity.

B. Separate transition report/log.

C. Existing audit service.

Không xây event sourcing.

======================================================================
3783. STATE HISTORY REQUIRED FIELDS
======================================================================

Phải đủ:

- from;
- to;
- reason;
- time;
- operation;
- actor/source.

Không cần full entity snapshot.

======================================================================
3784. STATE MACHINE ERROR
======================================================================

Invalid transition trả stable code:

GENERATE_INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION

Kèm:

- entity;
- current;
- requested;
- allowed actions.

======================================================================
3785. ACTION AVAILABILITY AND TRANSITION
======================================================================

Action availability không được tự transition.

Action service kiểm tra.

Application service thực hiện.

State machine validate transition.

Repository persist.

======================================================================
3786. PROGRESS RECONCILIATION AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Progress được tính từ Units/Artifacts.

Session cache chỉ tối ưu.

Không tăng `completed_units += 1` mù quáng từ event mà không kiểm tra duplicate.

======================================================================
3787. HEALTH RECONCILIATION AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Health từ consistency/Artifact current state.

Không tự suy luận từ business status.

======================================================================
3788. READINESS AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Readiness từ FeatureReadinessService + providers.

Không lưu boolean vĩnh viễn trong Session làm authority.

======================================================================
3789. BLOCKER AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Blockers current có thể derived từ validation/readiness/recovery.

Session cache phải có fingerprint/revision hoặc recompute.

======================================================================
3790. ERROR AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Latest Attempt/error report là authority.

Session/Unit latest_error chỉ summary.

======================================================================
3791. PATH RESOLVER PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

GeneratePathResolver public methods phải được giới hạn.

Không expose generic:

`resolve_any(user_path)`

cho managed storage.

Phải dùng entity-specific methods.

======================================================================
3792. PATH RESOLVER PROJECT INPUT
======================================================================

Nhận:

- Project model;
- Project ID qua ProjectPathService;
- scoped root.

Không nhận Project display name.

======================================================================
3793. PATH RESOLVER ENTITY INPUT
======================================================================

Nhận validated immutable IDs.

Không nhận arbitrary filename.

======================================================================
3794. PATH RESOLVER RELATIVE OUTPUT
======================================================================

Có helper serialize relative path.

Không persist Windows absolute drive.

======================================================================
3795. PATH RESOLVER RESOLVE OUTPUT
======================================================================

Runtime Path phải kiểm tra containment.

Không chỉ nối chuỗi.

======================================================================
3796. PATH RESOLVER EXTERNAL OUTPUT
======================================================================

Tách method/policy rõ.

Không dùng managed resolver cho arbitrary external path mà mất kiểm soát.

======================================================================
3797. PATH RESOLVER TEST INVALID ID
======================================================================

Test:

- slash;
- backslash;
- dot-dot;
- colon;
- null;
- empty;
- whitespace;
- Unicode separator;
- drive prefix;
- UNC prefix.

======================================================================
3798. PATH RESOLVER TEST CONTAINMENT
======================================================================

Mọi entity path nằm dưới expected Project Generate root.

======================================================================
3799. PATH RESOLVER TEST PROJECT RENAME
======================================================================

Display rename không đổi relative identity.

======================================================================
3800. PATH RESOLVER TEST PROJECT MOVE
======================================================================

Nếu Project service move root, relative locators resolve ở root mới.

======================================================================
3801. REPOSITORY BASE DISCOVERY
======================================================================

Nếu project có generic JSON repository:

- extend/configure;
- không copy toàn bộ code.

Nếu generic không hỗ trợ atomic/index/version:

- mở rộng chung nếu an toàn;
- hoặc adapter Generate nhỏ.

======================================================================
3802. REQUEST REPOSITORY FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Chỉ RequestRepository ghi Request.

Không UI/Application viết JSON trực tiếp.

======================================================================
3803. SESSION REPOSITORY FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Chỉ SessionRepository ghi Session metadata.

Registry mapper không ghi Session.

======================================================================
3804. PLAN REPOSITORY FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Chỉ PlanRepository quản lý draft/freeze/load Plan.

Planner gọi repository.

======================================================================
3805. ATTEMPT REPOSITORY FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Retry/Job services gọi repository.

Không Job Queue core ghi Attempt.

======================================================================
3806. ARTIFACT REPOSITORY FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

OutputManager/Validator gọi repository.

Engine không ghi metadata trực tiếp.

======================================================================
3807. MANIFEST REPOSITORY FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

ManifestService build.

ManifestRepository persist/version.

======================================================================
3808. REPORT REPOSITORY FILE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Validation/Recovery/Migration services tạo report.

Repository persist immutable.

======================================================================
3809. REGISTRY SERVICE OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

GenerateRegistryService quản lý:

- load;
- update summary;
- remove/mark archived;
- rebuild;
- validate.

Không chứa full Session logic.

======================================================================
3810. OPERATION REPOSITORY OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Application/use case services.

Job may update operation stage qua application/coordinator helper.

Không multiple writers không lock.

======================================================================
3811. REPOSITORY CREATE RETURN
======================================================================

Return persisted entity/read-back hoặc result.

Không return bool thiếu context nếu project supports result.

======================================================================
3812. REPOSITORY UPDATE RETURN
======================================================================

Return new revision/entity.

Không mutate caller object ngầm nếu immutable style.

======================================================================
3813. REPOSITORY NOT_FOUND
======================================================================

Stable typed error.

Không return empty object.

`try_get` mới return None.

======================================================================
3814. REPOSITORY CORRUPT
======================================================================

Typed error + path/report context internal.

Không parse failure thành not found.

======================================================================
3815. REPOSITORY UNSUPPORTED_SCHEMA
======================================================================

Typed error.

No write.

======================================================================
3816. REPOSITORY CONFLICT
======================================================================

Typed revision/duplicate/frozen conflict.

======================================================================
3817. REPOSITORY PATH_SAFETY
======================================================================

Typed critical error.

======================================================================
3818. REPOSITORY WRITE_FAILURE
======================================================================

Preserve previous file.

Include operation/entity code.

======================================================================
3819. REPOSITORY LIST CORRUPT ITEM
======================================================================

Không làm cả list fail nếu architecture cho phép.

Return issue/special summary hoặc report.

Không hide silently.

======================================================================
3820. REPOSITORY LIST FUTURE ITEM
======================================================================

Read-only summary nếu possible.

Không overwrite.

======================================================================
3821. REPOSITORY LIST ORDER
======================================================================

Stable.

No filesystem mtime only.

======================================================================
3822. REPOSITORY LIST FILTER
======================================================================

Apply fields from summary/index.

Không parse full Plan.

======================================================================
3823. REPOSITORY INDEX COMMIT ORDER
======================================================================

Entity first.

Index second.

Nếu index fail, rebuild marker.

======================================================================
3824. REPOSITORY INDEX REBUILD
======================================================================

Read committed entity marker only.

Ignore partial temp.

======================================================================
3825. REPOSITORY REVISION
======================================================================

Under lock.

No lost update.

======================================================================
3826. REPOSITORY LOCK GRANULARITY
======================================================================

- Request lock per ID.
- Session lock per ID.
- Registry lock per Project.
- Plan freeze lock per Session.
- Attempt creation lock per Unit/Session.
- Artifact destination lock/reservation.

Không global lock toàn app.

======================================================================
3827. REPOSITORY LOCK TIMEOUT
======================================================================

Follow existing utility.

Timeout stable conflict/busy.

Không deadlock indefinitely.

======================================================================
3828. REPOSITORY LOCK ORDER TEST
======================================================================

Concurrent create/update/retry/registry.

No deadlock.

======================================================================
3829. ATOMIC WRITE VALIDATION
======================================================================

Temp content phải parse/validate trước replace nếu JSON.

Text checksum trước finalize.

======================================================================
3830. ATOMIC WRITE TEMP NAME
======================================================================

Không predictable user-controlled.

Use operation/entity ID.

======================================================================
3831. ATOMIC WRITE CLEANUP
======================================================================

Remove only temp created by failed known operation if safe.

Nếu uncertainty, preserve/recovery.

======================================================================
3832. ATOMIC DIRECTORY FINALIZATION
======================================================================

Nếu dùng directory commit:

- same filesystem;
- unique temp;
- valid commit marker;
- recovery partial.

======================================================================
3833. FILE DURABILITY POLICY
======================================================================

Theo project utility.

Không thêm fsync toàn bộ không cần.

Metadata critical có thể use existing durable mode.

======================================================================
3834. SOURCE SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

GenerateSourceService có thể gồm:

- validate_input;
- materialize;
- get_snapshot;
- validate_snapshot;
- read_raw_text;
- read_normalized_text;
- get_text_preview;
- compute_health.

Không split/Engine.

======================================================================
3835. SOURCE EXTRACTOR REGISTRY
======================================================================

Chỉ registered built-ins:

- pasted;
- TXT;
- DOCX.

Không dynamic plugin path từ Request.

======================================================================
3836. SOURCE EXTRACTOR RESULT
======================================================================

Phải chứa:

- raw text;
- original metadata;
- encoding;
- headings;
- warnings;
- checksums;
- counts.

Không persist tùy tiện nếu service architecture separates.

======================================================================
3837. SOURCE INPUT PATH CANONICALIZATION
======================================================================

Trước đọc:

- expand/resolve theo policy;
- validate regular;
- reject forbidden;
- record provenance.

Không mutate file.

======================================================================
3838. SOURCE READ ERROR
======================================================================

Map:

- not found;
- permission;
- unsupported type;
- invalid encoding;
- corrupt document;
- size limit;
- cancelled;
- unknown I/O.

======================================================================
3839. SOURCE CHECKSUM ORDER
======================================================================

File original checksum nên tính streaming trước hoặc trong read.

Không đọc file hai lần nếu utility cho stream.

======================================================================
3840. SOURCE MATERIALIZATION TEMP
======================================================================

Raw text/metadata ghi temp.

Không update Session pointer sớm.

======================================================================
3841. SOURCE MATERIALIZATION FINAL
======================================================================

Sau finalize:

- validate metadata;
- validate raw checksum;
- create report;
- update Session;
- operation stage.

======================================================================
3842. SOURCE TEXT NORMALIZATION BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Source materialization không áp dụng semantic normalization.

Chỉ extraction/encoding/newline representation cần thiết theo contract.

Normalization service riêng.

======================================================================
3843. SOURCE DOCX ORIGINAL COPY
======================================================================

Nếu copy original binary:

- dưới Source Snapshot;
- checksum;
- package mode;
- no execution dependency.

Nếu không copy:

- raw extracted text canonical;
- provenance/omission.

======================================================================
3844. SOURCE TXT ORIGINAL COPY
======================================================================

Không cần duplicate bytes nếu raw UTF-8 snapshot đủ, nhưng original checksum/provenance phải giữ.

Chọn theo actual storage policy.

======================================================================
3845. SOURCE PASTED TEXT STORAGE
======================================================================

Raw managed file.

Không full text trong Registry/Manifest/log.

======================================================================
3846. SOURCE PREVIEW METHOD
======================================================================

Read bounded slice.

Không load entire large file trong UI nếu unnecessary.

======================================================================
3847. SOURCE PREVIEW CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Return source snapshot/checksum so UI biết snippet thuộc version nào.

======================================================================
3848. SOURCE HEALTH LIGHT CHECK
======================================================================

Metadata/raw existence/schema.

No full checksum list page.

======================================================================
3849. SOURCE HEALTH DEEP CHECK
======================================================================

Checksum/read/extraction consistency.

Explicit/background.

======================================================================
3850. NORMALIZATION SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- resolve_effective_settings;
- normalize_snapshot;
- validate_normalized_result;
- get_report;
- map_normalized_to_raw;
- can_reuse.

======================================================================
3851. NORMALIZATION PIPELINE ORDER LOCK
======================================================================

Transformation order phải constant/versioned.

Không thay order mà giữ same normalization version.

======================================================================
3852. NORMALIZATION VERSION CHANGE
======================================================================

Khi algorithm behavior thay đổi:

- bump version;
- old Plan/session unaffected;
- new Session dùng new;
- migration không rerun frozen Plan.

======================================================================
3853. NORMALIZATION TRANSFORM PURE
======================================================================

Mỗi transform:

- deterministic;
- no external state;
- input string/settings;
- output string/mapping/counts.

No I/O.

======================================================================
3854. NORMALIZATION REPORT ORDER
======================================================================

Transformation summaries theo actual execution order.

======================================================================
3855. NORMALIZATION CUSTOM LITERAL
======================================================================

Apply exact Unicode.

Handle empty `from` reject.

Stable order.

======================================================================
3856. NORMALIZATION CUSTOM REGEX
======================================================================

Chỉ nếu feature/source existing.

Validate safe pattern.

No arbitrary catastrophic regex.

Có thể disable trong Sprint nếu chưa có safe support.

======================================================================
3857. NORMALIZATION LINE MAP
======================================================================

Source map phải đủ để trace Unit normalized span về raw approximate/exact.

Không cần perfect character map nếu transformations make complex, nhưng accuracy field.

======================================================================
3858. NORMALIZATION REUSE METADATA
======================================================================

Reuse metadata:

- raw checksum;
- settings checksum;
- version;
- normalized checksum;
- finalized.

======================================================================
3859. NORMALIZATION CORRUPT REUSE
======================================================================

Checksum mismatch → no reuse.

Do not overwrite frozen result silently.

======================================================================
3860. STRUCTURE SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- detect;
- validate_structure;
- summarize;
- get_chapter_preview;
- reconstruct_coverage.

======================================================================
3861. STRUCTURE DETECTOR REGISTRY
======================================================================

Internal ordered detectors.

No dynamic arbitrary plugin.

======================================================================
3862. STRUCTURE HEADING METADATA PRIORITY
======================================================================

DOCX heading record validated against raw/normalized mapping.

If mapping uncertain:

- warning;
- regex fallback only controlled.

======================================================================
3863. STRUCTURE REGEX RULE ID
======================================================================

Mỗi built-in pattern có stable rule ID.

Report which matched.

======================================================================
3864. STRUCTURE REGEX TITLE LENGTH
======================================================================

Bound title length to avoid whole paragraphs false positive.

Config/versioned.

======================================================================
3865. STRUCTURE DUPLICATE BOUNDARY
======================================================================

If heading and regex same span:

- one Chapter;
- combine metadata;
- no duplicate.

======================================================================
3866. STRUCTURE OVERLAPPING HEADING
======================================================================

Resolve deterministic.

Report conflict.

No overlapping Chapters.

======================================================================
3867. STRUCTURE COVERAGE
======================================================================

Full normalized document coverage must be represented.

No dropped prefix/suffix.

======================================================================
3868. STRUCTURE TITLE SPAN
======================================================================

Exact normalized span when title originates text.

DOCX metadata title must map.

======================================================================
3869. STRUCTURE BODY SPAN
======================================================================

Start after title/heading separator according policy.

No negative/inverted span.

======================================================================
3870. STRUCTURE EMPTY BODY
======================================================================

Allowed Chapter metadata but splitter behavior explicit.

No empty Unit.

======================================================================
3871. STRUCTURE PARAGRAPH DETECTION
======================================================================

Use normalized newline/blank lines.

Preserve text.

======================================================================
3872. STRUCTURE SENTENCE DETECTION
======================================================================

Use safe deterministic rules.

No external NLP/model.

======================================================================
3873. STRUCTURE SENTENCE PUNCTUATION
======================================================================

Include closing punctuation/quotes in span where possible.

======================================================================
3874. STRUCTURE ABBREVIATION VERSION
======================================================================

If abbreviation list changes behavior, structure version bump.

======================================================================
3875. SPLITTER SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- resolve_limits;
- split_document;
- split_chapter;
- validate_units;
- reconstruct;
- summarize_warnings.

======================================================================
3876. SPLITTER INPUT IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Không mutate structure/settings/source.

Return drafts.

======================================================================
3877. SPLITTER LOOP PROGRESS
======================================================================

Must always advance span/index.

Test no infinite loop.

======================================================================
3878. SPLITTER BOUNDARY SEARCH ORDER
======================================================================

Recommended:

1. Paragraph end.
2. Sentence end.
3. Safe punctuation.
4. Whitespace.
5. Hard character boundary.

======================================================================
3879. SPLITTER TARGET WINDOW
======================================================================

Search near target within max.

Do not finalize too early unless paragraph/sentence policy.

======================================================================
3880. SPLITTER HARD MAX
======================================================================

No Unit over effective max except explicit unavoidable policy, which should instead hard split.

Test.

======================================================================
3881. SPLITTER MINIMUM
======================================================================

Soft for first/intermediate.

Merge short final.

No cross-Chapter.

======================================================================
3882. SPLITTER TITLE UNIT
======================================================================

If title separate:

- role chapter_title;
- same Chapter;
- ordered before body;
- output requirements same/different by policy.

If title prepended:

- preserve exact normalized text.

Choose one actual policy and test.

======================================================================
3883. SPLITTER INTRO UNIT
======================================================================

Role intro/narration.

Not dropped.

======================================================================
3884. SPLITTER OUTRO UNIT
======================================================================

Role outro/narration.

Not dropped.

======================================================================
3885. SPLITTER WHITESPACE PRESERVATION
======================================================================

Unit text from source slices.

No arbitrary trim changing spoken punctuation without report.

Can trim outer separators only if reconstruction policy preserves mapping.

======================================================================
3886. SPLITTER CHECKSUM SEQUENCE
======================================================================

Ordered Unit checksum sequence contributes fingerprint.

======================================================================
3887. SPLITTER WARNING MODEL
======================================================================

Warnings:

- hard split;
- under minimum;
- title split;
- unbroken token;
- approximate raw mapping;
- empty Chapter;
- Engine clamp.

======================================================================
3888. PLANNER PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

Planner core có thể expose:

- build_plan;
- validate_plan;
- freeze_plan;
- load_plan_summary;
- compare_fingerprint.

Application handles operation/persistence coordination.

======================================================================
3889. PLANNER PURE VS PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Nếu architecture phù hợp:

- PlanBuilder pure builds graph.
- PlannerService resolves/persists.

Không bắt buộc split nếu overkill.

Nhưng algorithm không nên phụ thuộc UI/Job.

======================================================================
3890. PLANNER INPUT
======================================================================

- Session ID/context.
- Source Snapshot.
- normalized result.
- structure.
- effective settings.
- selection snapshot.
- OutputSpec.
- cancellation/progress.

No arbitrary paths/client Plan.

======================================================================
3891. PLANNER OUTPUT
======================================================================

- Plan.
- Documents.
- Chapters.
- Units.
- planned Artifacts/output requirements.
- validation report.
- warnings.
- fingerprint.

======================================================================
3892. PLANNER ENTITY ID ALLOCATION
======================================================================

Allocate once per operation.

On retry same operation, reuse persisted IDs/operation result.

No duplicates.

======================================================================
3893. PLANNER REENTRY DISCOVERY
======================================================================

If operation interrupted:

- locate draft/frozen Plan by operation/session;
- validate;
- continue safe;
- no second graph.

======================================================================
3894. PLANNER CANCEL BEFORE FREEZE
======================================================================

No canonical Plan.

Session state/report consistent.

======================================================================
3895. PLANNER CANCEL AFTER FREEZE
======================================================================

If Plan committed before cancellation:

- Session planned;
- cancel action may move cancelled;
- do not delete Plan.

Operation ordering determines.

======================================================================
3896. PLANNER VALIDATION FAILURE
======================================================================

Persist report.

No Plan freeze.

No Job.

======================================================================
3897. PLANNER OUTPUT COLLISION FAILURE
======================================================================

Report affected Unit IDs/relative paths.

No directory/file write.

======================================================================
3898. PLANNER RECONSTRUCTION FAILURE
======================================================================

Critical.

No freeze.

======================================================================
3899. PLANNER SELECTION FAILURE
======================================================================

No freeze.

Source/normalization results may remain managed.

======================================================================
3900. PLANNER SETTINGS FAILURE
======================================================================

No freeze.

======================================================================
3901. PLANNER ENGINE TEMPORARILY BUSY
======================================================================

Should not block Plan if capability known and resource merely busy.

======================================================================
3902. PLANNER ENGINE UNREGISTERED
======================================================================

Full Generate Plan requiring engine may block.

Text structure preview can still work if separately supported.

No phantom.

======================================================================
3903. PLANNER REFERENCE TEMPORARY HEALTH
======================================================================

Missing/mismatch blocks frozen execution Plan if reference required.

No fallback.

======================================================================
3904. PLANNER OUTPUT ESTIMATE
======================================================================

Optional estimate based text/settings.

Store estimated, not authority.

======================================================================
3905. OUTPUT MANAGER PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

Có thể gồm:

- plan_artifact;
- validate_expected_path;
- inspect_collision;
- reserve;
- create_temp_target;
- finalize_temp;
- release_reservation;
- list_orphans;
- compute_health;
- resolve_open_path.

======================================================================
3906. OUTPUT MANAGER NO ENGINE
======================================================================

OutputManager không gọi Engine.

======================================================================
3907. OUTPUT MANAGER NO DOMAIN FINAL SUCCESS
======================================================================

OutputManager marks Artifact states.

Job/Application finalizer marks Attempt/Unit/Session after validation.

======================================================================
3908. OUTPUT MANAGER FILE MOVE
======================================================================

Prefer atomic replace/rename only under policy.

No overwrite valid.

======================================================================
3909. OUTPUT MANAGER CROSS_FILESYSTEM
======================================================================

Nếu external destination khác filesystem:

- copy to temp destination;
- flush/validate;
- atomic rename if possible;
- preserve source temp until success;
- no partial final.

Document/test.

======================================================================
3910. OUTPUT MANAGER INVALID TEMP
======================================================================

Do not move final if basic validation fails.

Keep/report according policy.

======================================================================
3911. OUTPUT MANAGER CANCELLED TEMP
======================================================================

No finalization after persisted cancel unless operation had already committed and policy.

======================================================================
3912. OUTPUT MANAGER FINAL PATH RECHECK
======================================================================

Immediately before finalization.

No stale collision decision.

======================================================================
3913. OUTPUT MANAGER REGISTERED PATH
======================================================================

ArtifactRepository path uniqueness check plus filesystem.

======================================================================
3914. OUTPUT MANAGER OPEN PATH
======================================================================

Resolve current relative path.

Check exists/inside root.

No arbitrary shell.

======================================================================
3915. OUTPUT VALIDATOR PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

- validate_basic;
- validate_full;
- revalidate;
- validate_required_set;
- summarize_attempt;
- determine_artifact_health.

======================================================================
3916. OUTPUT VALIDATOR POLICY SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

Use Session OutputSpec validation policy.

Revalidate current health can optionally use current stricter policy, report distinction.

======================================================================
3917. OUTPUT VALIDATOR REQUIRED_SET
======================================================================

Attempt success only when all required Artifact specs satisfied.

======================================================================
3918. OUTPUT VALIDATOR OPTIONAL_SET
======================================================================

Optional failures warnings.

Manifest records.

======================================================================
3919. OUTPUT VALIDATOR MIME_EXTENSION
======================================================================

Extension/content consistency.

No extension-only success.

======================================================================
3920. OUTPUT VALIDATOR CHECKSUM_AFTER_FINAL
======================================================================

Compute final file checksum after move/copy.

Temp checksum can compare.

======================================================================
3921. OUTPUT VALIDATOR FILE_CHANGE_DURING_CHECK
======================================================================

Capture size/mtime before/after.

If changed:

- validation unstable/error;
- no valid.

======================================================================
3922. OUTPUT VALIDATOR REPORT ATOMIC
======================================================================

Report persisted before Artifact marked valid where transaction permits.

If report write fails:

- Artifact not valid/finalization recovery;
- preserve file.

======================================================================
3923. MANIFEST SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

- create_draft;
- update_draft_summary;
- build_from_repositories;
- validate;
- finalize;
- rebuild;
- get_latest;
- compare_staleness.

======================================================================
3924. MANIFEST BUILD QUERY
======================================================================

Use batch repository/query methods.

No N².

======================================================================
3925. MANIFEST DRAFT UPDATE FREQUENCY
======================================================================

Không write mỗi progress tick.

Update at checkpoints/terminal transitions/finalization.

======================================================================
3926. MANIFEST STALENESS
======================================================================

Compare Session revision/entity fingerprint/checksum.

======================================================================
3927. MANIFEST REBUILD SAFE
======================================================================

No Engine/source mutation.

Can run when execution unavailable.

======================================================================
3928. MANIFEST FINALIZATION CONDITION
======================================================================

Only terminal Session or explicit cancelled/failed terminal final.

No finalize running/paused as completed.

======================================================================
3929. RESUME SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

- inspect;
- validate_inspection;
- execute_resume;
- get_latest_report.

No Engine direct.

======================================================================
3930. RETRY SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

- inspect_unit;
- retry_unit;
- inspect_chapter;
- retry_chapter;
- inspect_session_failed_units optional.

No direct file write.

======================================================================
3931. RECOVERY SERVICE PUBLIC METHODS
======================================================================

- scan_light;

- Reference validation changed.
- FFprobe/converter state changed.
