======================================================================
4080. PROJECT PACKAGE GENERATE SECTION
======================================================================

Fields may include:

- schema_version;
- registry included;
- Requests count;
- Sessions count;
- source snapshots included/omitted;
- Plans included;
- Manifests included;
- Reports included;
- Artifacts included/omitted;
- external outputs;
- remap required;
- checksums.

Actual schema follows package system.

======================================================================
4081. PROJECT PACKAGE METADATA_ONLY
======================================================================

Include:

- Session/Plan/Manifest metadata;
- summaries/reports optional.

Omit:

- source text;
- Audio outputs;
- temp;
- logs;
- model binaries.

Imported history read-only/degraded if execution inputs absent.

======================================================================
4082. PROJECT PACKAGE STANDARD
======================================================================

Recommended include:

- managed source snapshots;
- Plan/entities;
- Manifests;
- required valid outputs per policy;
- Reference metadata/assets according existing package;
- reports needed.

No temp.

======================================================================
4083. PROJECT PACKAGE FULL
======================================================================

May include:

- all managed outputs;
- reports;
- source originals if policy;
- historical metadata.

Still exclude:

- active temp uncertain unless diagnostic mode;
- secrets;
- model caches unless Project service supports.

======================================================================
4084. PROJECT PACKAGE DIAGNOSTIC
======================================================================

Không thêm mode mới nếu project không có.

Nếu existing full diagnostic, unknown temp/corrupt evidence can include explicitly.

======================================================================
4085. PROJECT PACKAGE REMAP GENERATE
======================================================================

Remap every internal ID consistently.

Use two-pass:

1. Allocate mapping.
2. Transform all entities/paths.
3. Validate graph.
4. Persist temp.
5. Finalize.

======================================================================
4086. PACKAGE PATH REMAP
======================================================================

Relative paths may retain structure under new Project root.

Identity components using IDs must update if IDs remapped.

No absolute.

======================================================================
4087. PACKAGE CHECKSUM AFTER REMAP
======================================================================

Metadata checksums/fingerprints dependent on IDs/paths may need recompute.

Frozen text checksums remain.

Plan/Manifest checksum policy must account remap.

Record original checksum/provenance.

======================================================================
4088. PACKAGE PLAN REMAP
======================================================================

Frozen Plan structural content remapped IDs.

Need new package/import checksum/revision while preserving source structural fingerprint.

Do not rerun splitter.

======================================================================
4089. PACKAGE MANIFEST REMAP
======================================================================

Create imported Manifest revision/provenance or transform according schema.

Do not pretend original checksum unchanged if IDs changed.

======================================================================
4090. PACKAGE ARTIFACT REMAP
======================================================================

Paths/IDs update.

Physical included files checksum unchanged.

Validation current import report.

- auto guess/attach/delete;
- no reports;
- no startup light scan;
- no lost Job handling;
- no registry/Manifest rebuild.

======================================================================
4257. IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETENESS CHECK — JOB_RESOURCE
======================================================================

Không coi hoàn chỉnh nếu:

- custom scheduler;
- direct GPU check;
- fake handler registered;
- payload full objects;
- no Job/Attempt mapping.

======================================================================
4258. IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETENESS CHECK — PROJECT_REFERENCE
======================================================================

Không coi hoàn chỉnh nếu:

- current Project implicit in Jobs;
- name/path identity;
- Reference fallback;
- package ignores Generate;
- archive/switch unsafe.

======================================================================
4259. IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETENESS CHECK — API_UI
======================================================================

Không coi hoàn chỉnh nếu:

- misleading buttons;
- no readiness;
- full text/path leaks;
- UI thread block;
- API arbitrary status update;
- UI/API rule divergence.

======================================================================
4260. IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETENESS CHECK — TEST_DOCS
======================================================================

Không coi hoàn chỉnh nếu:

- only unit tests;
- no workflow;
- no full pytest;
- no bootstrap/UI smoke;
- docs overclaim;
- no data safety report.

======================================================================
4261. TEST ASSERTION — REQUEST MATERIALIZE ONCE
======================================================================

Một Request cùng revision chỉ materialize một Session.

Concurrent calls:

- one Session;
- same result/conflict;
- no duplicate source copy.

======================================================================
4262. TEST ASSERTION — SESSION PLAN ONCE
======================================================================

Một Session chỉ có một active frozen Plan version mặc định.

Concurrent plan:

- one Plan;
- no duplicate Units.

======================================================================
4399. FINAL RESPONSE NO_CODE_DUMP
======================================================================

Sau khi Codex đã sửa source, Final Report không cần dán toàn bộ code.

Chỉ:

- files;
- summary;
- tests;
- readiness;
- blockers;
- data safety.

Trừ khi môi trường yêu cầu trả full files thay vì trực tiếp edit.

======================================================================
4400. FINAL RESPONSE NO_CHAIN_OF_THOUGHT
======================================================================

Không trình bày suy luận nội bộ.

Chỉ audit evidence, decisions và kết quả thực thi.

======================================================================
4401. FINAL RESPONSE HONEST FAILURE
======================================================================

Nếu không thể hoàn tất:

- không giả pass;
- không claim ready;
- ghi blocker;
- ghi những gì đã thực hiện;
- đảm bảo source không dở/không mất dữ liệu;
- status NOT_READY.

======================================================================
4402. FINAL RESPONSE PARTIAL SOURCE
======================================================================

Không được để source compile fail rồi chỉ báo partial.

Phải:

- sửa về coherent;
- hoặc hoàn nguyên bằng chỉnh sửa an toàn;
- targeted tests;
- report blocker.

Không Git reset.

======================================================================
4403. FINAL RESPONSE PRODUCTION_EXECUTION
======================================================================

Phải ghi một trong:

- READY — real handler integrated.
- UNAVAILABLE — no real handler/runtime.
- BLOCKED — selected Engine/reference/environment issue.
- TEST_ONLY — orchestration proven only with test provider.

Không mơ hồ.

======================================================================
4404. FINAL RESPONSE PLAN
======================================================================

Phải ghi READY chỉ khi real persistent Plan flow pass.

======================================================================
4405. FINAL RESPONSE OUTPUT_VALIDATION
======================================================================

Phân biệt basic/full.

======================================================================
4406. FINAL RESPONSE RESUME
======================================================================

Phân biệt inspection/execution.

======================================================================
4407. FINAL RESPONSE RETRY
======================================================================

Phân biệt inspection/execution.

======================================================================
4408. FINAL RESPONSE PREVIEW
======================================================================

Phân biệt Plan/Audio.

======================================================================
4409. FINAL RESPONSE BATCH
======================================================================

Phân biệt planning/orchestration/production execution.

======================================================================
4410. FINAL RESPONSE MP3
======================================================================

Phải nêu direct/converter/validator actual.

======================================================================
4411. FINAL RESPONSE PACKAGE
======================================================================

Phải nêu modes/omissions/import behavior.

======================================================================
4412. FINAL RESPONSE MIGRATION
======================================================================

Phải nêu actual legacy evidence.

======================================================================
4413. FINAL RESPONSE DATA
======================================================================

Phải nêu real user data untouched hoặc evidence khác.

======================================================================
4414. FINAL RESPONSE GIT
======================================================================

Phải nêu no Git write.

======================================================================
4415. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL FOUNDATION
======================================================================

Sprint chỉ được coi foundation hoàn chỉnh khi người dùng có thể:

1. Mở Project.
2. Tạo Request.
3. Chọn nguồn TXT/DOCX/dán text.
4. Chọn Voice/Variant/Style/Reference/Engine theo IDs.
5. Validate.
6. Materialize Source Snapshot.
7. Normalize.
8. Detect structure.
9. Split no-loss.
10. Lập frozen Plan.
11. Xem Session/Plan/Units.
12. Xem readiness.
13. Lưu/reopen.
14. Draft Manifest.
15. Quản lý output foundation.
16. Inspect Resume/Retry/Recovery.
17. Sử dụng API/UI cùng service.
18. Không tạo Audio giả khi handler absent.

======================================================================
4416. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL OUTPUT FOUNDATION
======================================================================

Phải có:

- planned Artifact;
- safe path;
- collision detection;
- reservation;
- temp/final contract;
- validation;
- Manifest output summary;
- recovery.

Dù chưa inference production.

======================================================================
4417. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL JOB FOUNDATION
======================================================================

Phải có:

- payload/version;
- prepare/finalize real handlers;
- Unit execution contract;
- handler readiness;
- Queue integration;
- Attempt mapping;
- ResourceRequirement mapping;
- no fake registration.

======================================================================
4418. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL RESUME_RETRY FOUNDATION
======================================================================

Phải có:

- inspection reports;
- eligibility;
- idempotency;
- stale checks;
- valid Unit skip;
- new Attempt;
- Queue action gated by handler.

======================================================================
4419. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL RECOVERY FOUNDATION
======================================================================

Phải có:

- startup light scan;
- lost Job;
- stale Registry;
- Manifest rebuild;
- progress recompute;
- temp/orphan classification;
- no guessing.

======================================================================
4420. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL UI
======================================================================

Không chỉ mock page.

Phải dùng Application/Query/Readiness thật trên temp/test Project.

======================================================================
4421. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL API
======================================================================

Không chỉ route stub.

Phải gọi Application/Query thật trong tests.

======================================================================
4422. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL PACKAGE
======================================================================

Nếu package service thuộc Sprint integration, phải có actual hook/tests.

Không chỉ docs.

======================================================================
4423. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — REAL MIGRATION
======================================================================

Chỉ khi legacy evidence.

Không cần speculative huge migration.

Nhưng loader future/old schema phải safe.

======================================================================
4424. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Existing working behavior preserved or explicitly adapted/tested.

======================================================================
4425. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — FULL TEST
======================================================================

All required tests and existing suite.

======================================================================
4426. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — DATA SAFETY
======================================================================

No source/user data mutation by tests/implementation process.

======================================================================
4427. MASTER ACCEPTANCE — HONEST STATUS
======================================================================

No false production claim.

======================================================================
4428. SOURCE ADAPTATION RULE
======================================================================

Nếu actual source đã có nhiều thành phần hơn Prompt:

- reuse;
- extend;
- test;
- do not replace solely for naming.

======================================================================
4429. SOURCE MINIMAL RULE
======================================================================

Nếu actual source rất ít:

- implement smallest coherent foundation satisfying invariants;
- no giant unrelated framework;
- still real persistence/Plan/UI/API.

======================================================================
4430. SOURCE LEGACY_COMPLEX RULE
======================================================================

Nếu existing Generate monolithic:

- preserve public behavior;
- extract/adapt incrementally;
- avoid rewrite all;
- add tests before risky changes.

======================================================================
4431. SOURCE REAL_HANDLER RULE
======================================================================

Nếu real Generate already works:

- integrate into Attempt/Job/Artifact;
- preserve;
- no real inference test;
- readiness actual.

======================================================================
4432. SOURCE NO_HANDLER RULE
======================================================================

Nếu absent:

- foundation still implemented;
- execution unavailable;
- no fake.

======================================================================
4433. SOURCE NO_FFPROBE RULE
======================================================================

Basic validation only/degraded.

No dependency install unless project already requires and approved by source setup.

======================================================================
4434. SOURCE NO_MP3_CONVERTER RULE
======================================================================

MP3 unavailable.

No rename.

======================================================================
4435. SOURCE NO_DOCX_READER RULE
======================================================================

Nếu dependency không có:

- check project dependencies;
- add only if requirement and dependency policy allows;
- hoặc mark DOCX blocker.

Không tự viết unsafe parser.

======================================================================
4436. SOURCE NO_EVENT_BUS RULE
======================================================================

Nếu architecture thật không có Event Bus:

- do not build huge bus solely;
- use existing Qt/signals/service callbacks;
- preserve responsibility/persist-first.
- document mapping.

Nhưng Project context says Event Bus likely exists; verify.

======================================================================
4437. SOURCE NO_READINESS_FRAMEWORK RULE
======================================================================

Nếu không có:

- create minimal shared readiness model/service, không UI booleans rải rác;
- avoid unrelated framework.

======================================================================
4438. SOURCE NO_OPERATION_FRAMEWORK RULE
======================================================================

Use existing Job idempotency/repository or minimal Generate operation record for critical multi-step flows.

No workflow engine.

======================================================================
4439. SOURCE NO_MIGRATION_FRAMEWORK RULE
======================================================================

Create minimal versioned loader/transformer/backup integration consistent with project.

No destructive auto migration.

======================================================================
4440. SOURCE NO_PACKAGE_FRAMEWORK RULE
======================================================================

Do not build full package system if Project currently lacks one.

Document Generate storage/backup compatibility and integrate existing backup only.

Acceptance adapts actual architecture.

======================================================================
4441. SOURCE NO_LOCAL_API RULE
======================================================================

Nếu Local API chưa tồn tại despite project docs:

- do not build entire server solely without roadmap evidence;
- report blocker/actual;
- implement service boundary ready for API if Sprint requirement/source says API required.
- Follow ROADMAP priority.

======================================================================
4442. SOURCE NO_DASHBOARD RULE
======================================================================

No Dashboard integration if component absent.

Mark NOT_APPLICABLE.

======================================================================
4443. SOURCE NO_ARCHIVE RULE
======================================================================

Do not invent Project archive subsystem.

Session archive can follow current patterns or defer.

======================================================================
4444. SOURCE NO_PROJECT_DUPLICATE RULE
======================================================================

No integration if feature absent.

======================================================================
4445. SOURCE NO_BACKUP_EXPORT_IMPORT RULE
======================================================================

Do not build unrelated package system.

But storage remains portable/relative.

Report NOT_APPLICABLE.

======================================================================
4446. SOURCE TEST_ENV_LIMIT RULE
======================================================================

If UI/headless unavailable:

- use controller/model tests;
- attempt offscreen;
- report exact blocker.
- Required app smoke still needed if infrastructure supports.

======================================================================
4447. SOURCE WINDOWS_CONSTRAINT RULE
======================================================================

Project targets Windows.

Path/file lock/reserved names/case-fold tests important.

Do not assume POSIX only.

======================================================================
4448. SOURCE PYTHON_VERSION RULE
======================================================================

Use current project Python.

No syntax incompatible.

4449. SOURCE PYSIDE6 RULE
======================================================================

Keep PySide6.

No Qt framework switch.

No training/analyzer scope.

4470. FINAL EXECUTION INSTRUCTION

Sau khi nhận toàn bộ Master Prompt, Codex phải:

- thực hiện liên tục tới Final Report;

- bảo vệ dữ liệu;
- không Git write;
- không inference thật trong test;
- không production fake.

4471. FINAL PROMPT ASSEMBLY RULE
======================================================================

PART 08 phải được nối trực tiếp sau:

`===== KẾT THÚC PART 07 — CHƯA KẾT THÚC TOÀN BỘ PROMPT =====`

Không xóa marker Part cũ cũng không ảnh hưởng nội dung.

Khi copy toàn bộ Parts:

- giữ đúng thứ tự PART 01 → PART 08;
- không đổi số mục;
- không thêm prompt khác xen giữa;
- không sửa canonical names;
- không xóa các nguyên tắc trùng có chủ đích;
- coi tất cả là một Master Prompt duy nhất.

======================================================================
4472. PART 08 CONSISTENCY
======================================================================

PART 08 tiếp tục trực tiếp PART 01–07.

Không thay đổi:

- Sprint ID AVS-014.16;
- mục tiêu Generate Pipeline Foundation;
- PHASE 0–12;
- source-first/data-first;
- KEEP/NEW/REPLACE/DELETE safety;
- immutable IDs;
- Request/Session separation;
- managed Source Snapshot;
- deterministic normalization;
- structure/splitting no-loss;
- frozen Plan;
- Unit/Attempt/Job separation;
- Artifact validation authority;
- Manifest persistence/rebuild;
- Resume skip valid;
- Retry new Attempt;
- Recovery no guessing;
- Job Queue sole scheduler;
- Resource Manager sole authority;
- Reference Vault asset IDs/checksums;
- Engine-neutral core;
- no production fake;
- test fake isolated;
- no Train;
- no Voice DNA Analyzer;
- no GPT-SoVITS runtime redesign;
- no real user data mutation;
- no Git write;
- API/UI parity;
- honest readiness;
- targeted/full tests;
- docs/final evidence.

Nếu còn PART tiếp theo:

# AI VOICE STUDIO

4474. PHASE 0 — REQUIRED AUDIT ARTIFACT
======================================================================

Trước khi sửa source, Codex phải tạo Audit Result nội bộ có cấu trúc:

- repository root;
- current branch;
- current worktree status;
- application entry points;
- source package roots;
- test roots;
- documentation roots;
- Project data roots;
- runtime data roots;
- existing Generate components;
- existing Engine components;
- existing Job components;
- existing Resource components;
- existing Reference components;
- existing API/UI components;
- compatibility surface;
- baseline test result;
- blockers;
- initial File Plan.

Audit Result không được dựa trên suy đoán.

======================================================================
4475. PHASE 0 — REPOSITORY ROOT CONFIRMATION
======================================================================

Phải xác nhận repository root bằng:

- AGENTS.md;
- pyproject.toml/setup.cfg/requirements;
- `.git`;
- source folders;
- tests;
- application entry point.

Không chạy command từ thư mục ngẫu nhiên.

======================================================================
4476. PHASE 0 — AGENTS INSTRUCTION PRECEDENCE
======================================================================

Nếu repository có AGENTS.md ở nhiều cấp:

- đọc root AGENTS.md;
- tìm AGENTS.md trong thư mục source liên quan;
- áp dụng file gần nhất cho phạm vi;
- không bỏ instruction project.

Nếu AGENTS.md xung đột Prompt:

- ưu tiên data safety;
- ưu tiên instruction repository có phạm vi cụ thể;
- vẫn giữ no-fake/no-Git-write/no-data-loss;
- ghi adaptation trong Final Report.

======================================================================
4477. PHASE 0 — ROADMAP SPRINT CONFIRMATION
======================================================================

Đọc ROADMAP.md và xác nhận:

- AVS-014.16 có tồn tại;
- mục tiêu hiện tại;
- dependency Sprint trước;
- Sprint tiếp theo;
- trạng thái hiện tại;
- acceptance criteria hiện có.

Nếu Sprint ID khác trong source:

- không tự sửa số;
- đối chiếu;
- dùng source canonical nếu rõ;
- ghi discrepancy.

======================================================================
4478. PHASE 0 — ARCHITECTURE CONFIRMATION
======================================================================

Đọc Architecture.md và xác định:

- layer boundaries;
- composition root;
- domain/application/infrastructure placement;
- UI pattern;
- API pattern;
- storage pattern;
- Project lifecycle;
- event model;
- Job/Resource ownership.

Không ép Prompt thành kiến trúc mới nếu Architecture.md đã khóa cách khác.

======================================================================
4479. PHASE 0 — CURRENT SPRINT DISCOVERY
======================================================================

Tìm:

- CURRENT_SPRINT.md;
- sprint reports;
- decisions;
- changelog;
- implementation reports;
- unfinished notes.

Không coi report cũ là source truth.

Dùng để phát hiện:

- component từng được thêm;
- compatibility promise;
- test command;
- known blocker;
- user-data warning.

Không sửa AppContext trước khi hiểu lifecycle đầy đủ.

Search toàn repository và lập danh sách symbol:

- classes;

Mỗi symbol ghi:

- path;

- preserve/extend/replace candidate.

4483. PHASE 0 — EXISTING GENERATE DATA DISCOVERY
======================================================================

Phải tìm các file/schema hiện có liên quan:

- generate history;
- preview metadata;
- output metadata;
- current task/session files;
- Project config;
- settings;
- logs;
- Job records;
- test fixtures.

Không mở/sửa dữ liệu thật nếu chỉ cần schema từ code/tests/docs.

Nếu phải đọc sample runtime data:

- chỉ metadata;
- không sửa;
- không đưa nội dung riêng tư vào báo cáo.

======================================================================
4484. PHASE 0 — PUBLIC API SURFACE
======================================================================

Liệt kê public surface hiện tại:

- imported classes;
- service methods;
- CLI commands;
- API routes;
- UI route keys;
- event names;
- settings keys;
- persisted schema;
- output naming behavior.

Đây là compatibility contract cần bảo vệ.

======================================================================
4485. PHASE 0 — CALL SITE MAP
======================================================================

Mỗi public Generate method hiện có phải search call sites.

Phân loại:

- production call;
- UI call;
- API call;
- test call;
- script/example;
- dead code candidate.

Không xóa chỉ vì không thấy một call trực tiếp nếu plugin/registry có thể dùng.

======================================================================
4486. PHASE 0 — ENGINE CALL MAP
======================================================================

Lập map:

Generate caller
→ EngineManager
→ Engine adapter
→ runtime
→ output path/result
→ validation hiện tại.

Xác định:

- có real handler không;
- output hiện được ghi ở đâu;
- có temp path không;
- có progress/cancel không;
- lỗi được map thế nào;
- model load khi nào.

======================================================================
4487. PHASE 0 — JOB CALL MAP
======================================================================

Lập map:

UI/API/Application
→ Job creation
→ handler registry
→ worker
→ Job state
→ persistence
→ recovery.

Xác định extension point thật cho Generate.

======================================================================
4488. PHASE 0 — RESOURCE CALL MAP
======================================================================

Lập map:

Job
→ ResourceRequirement
→ ResourceDecision
→ Lease
→ Worker context
→ release.

Xác định:

- waiting;
- unsupported;
- GPU selection;
- disk policy;
- concurrency.

Không tạo resource path riêng.

======================================================================
4489. PHASE 0 — REFERENCE CALL MAP
======================================================================

Lập map:

Voice
→ Variant
→ Style Profile
→ Speaker Reference
→ ReferenceAsset
→ managed paths/checksums
→ validation
→ Engine runtime resolution.

Xác định field nào hiện dùng name/path thay ID.

======================================================================
4490. PHASE 0 — PROJECT CALL MAP
======================================================================

Lập map:

Project create/open/close/switch/archive/restore/duplicate/backup/export/import
→ Generate hook hiện tại hoặc cần thêm.

Không chèn logic vào nhiều nơi nếu provider/hook architecture tồn tại.

4491. PHASE 0 — API CALL MAP
======================================================================

router
→ dependency provider

→ error mapper

→ tests.

navigation

4493. PHASE 0 — STORAGE CALL MAP

Lập map:

entity/service
→ path resolver
→ atomic writer
→ checksum

→ backup/package.

Xác định writer owner cho mỗi file.

4494. PHASE 0 — BASELINE COMMAND PLAN

Chạy compile/import check phù hợp.

- sửa nếu liên quan và cần để Sprint tiếp tục.

4496. PHASE 0 — BASELINE TEST
======================================================================

Chạy full hoặc targeted baseline theo project.

Nếu full suite quá lớn nhưng khả thi:

Nếu có environment blocker:

- chạy nhóm đủ an toàn;
- ghi rõ chưa chạy gì;
- không claim full baseline.

Xác nhận application/AppContext có thể bootstrap với test/temp config.

Không load model.

| Check | Command | Result | Pre-existing issue | Sprint relevance |

4501. PHASE 0 — DELTA MATRIX REQUIRED

| Capability | Existing implementation | Gap | Reuse | New work | Risk | Test |
