======================================================================
4502. PHASE 0 — CANONICAL NAME MAPPING
======================================================================

Lập bảng:

| Prompt canonical name | Actual source name | Decision |

Ví dụ:

- GenerateSession → GenerationRun hiện có;
- GenerateUnit → Chunk hiện có;
- GenerateAttempt → Attempt mới;
- GenerateArtifact → OutputRecord hiện có.

Không tạo class mới chỉ để tên khớp Prompt nếu entity hiện tại tương đương và đủ.

======================================================================
4503. PHASE 0 — RESPONSIBILITY COLLISION CHECK
======================================================================

Xác định nếu source hiện có nhiều component cùng trách nhiệm:

- multiple GenerateService;
- multiple Queue;
- multiple path resolver;
- multiple history stores;
- multiple output validators;
- multiple readiness booleans.

Sprint phải hợp nhất đường gọi hoặc chọn authority.

Không tạo thêm bản thứ ba.

======================================================================
4504. PHASE 0 — DATA MIGRATION RISK CHECK
======================================================================

Trước đổi schema:

- xác định current schema version;
- loader;
- writer;
- fixture;
- real data possibility;
- backup mechanism;
- downgrade/future handling.

Nếu không đủ evidence:

- giữ backward loader;
- không bulk rewrite data.

======================================================================
4505. PHASE 0 — OUTPUT OVERWRITE RISK CHECK
======================================================================

Xác định behavior hiện tại:

- overwrite;
- skip;
- suffix;
- error;
- unknown.

Nếu hiện tại silent overwrite:

- không tiếp tục silent behavior trong pipeline mới;
- compatibility path phải được bảo vệ;
- ghi decision.

======================================================================
4506. PHASE 0 — REAL DATA ROOT REGISTER
======================================================================

Lập danh sách root có thể chứa data thật:

- Project roots;
- workspace;
- voices;
- Reference Vault;
- outputs;
- previews;
- backups;
- exports;
- logs;
- caches;
- models.

Tests không được dùng các root này.

======================================================================
4507. PHASE 0 — TEMP TEST ROOT REGISTER
======================================================================

Xác định fixture/config tạo temp root.

Nếu chưa có:

- tạo test helper an toàn;
- không thay production default;
- assert temp path.

======================================================================
4508. PHASE 0 — FILE PLAN FREEZE
======================================================================

Trước code, File Plan phải đủ cụ thể.

Có thể thay đổi khi đọc source sâu hơn, nhưng mỗi deviation phải ghi.

Không bắt đầu bằng hàng loạt file NEW mơ hồ.

======================================================================
4509. PHASE 1 — DOMAIN IMPLEMENTATION ORDER
======================================================================

Thứ tự khuyến nghị:

1. Common types/utilities reuse.
2. Enums.
3. Validation issue/result.
4. Request.
5. Session.
6. Document/Chapter/Unit.
7. Attempt.
8. Artifact.
9. Plan.
10. Manifest.
11. Snapshots/settings/output specs.
12. State/action/progress/health.
13. Serialization/migration hooks.
14. Domain tests.

======================================================================
4510. PHASE 1 — ENUM AUDIT BEFORE ADD
======================================================================

Trước thêm enum:

- search enum hiện tại;
- search persisted values;
- search UI mapping;
- search tests.

Không thêm synonyms:

- complete/completed/succeeded;
- retrying/retry_wait;
- invalid/error/failed;

nếu không có semantics riêng.

======================================================================
4511. PHASE 1 — STATUS NAMING LOCK
======================================================================

Sau khi chọn theo source, phải dùng nhất quán:

- persisted enum;
- state machine;
- API;
- UI mapping;
- tests;
- docs;
- migration.

Không đổi giữa các file.

======================================================================
4512. PHASE 1 — DOMAIN ERROR BASE
======================================================================

Tái sử dụng error base hiện có.

Generate-specific error phải chứa:

- code;
- message;
- details;
- retryable;
- related IDs;
- suggested actions.

Không dùng generic Exception cho expected domain errors.

======================================================================
4513. PHASE 1 — VALIDATION RESULT BASE
======================================================================

Tái sử dụng model validation hiện có nếu đủ.

ValidationResult cần:

- valid/status;
- issues;
- warnings;
- errors;
- report ID optional;
- fingerprint;
- checked_at;
- scope.

======================================================================
4514. PHASE 1 — VALIDATION ISSUE IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

ValidationIssue không mutate sau report creation.

Display localization không sửa issue persisted.

======================================================================
4515. PHASE 1 — REQUEST FACTORY
======================================================================

Request factory phải:

- generate ID;
- validate Project ID;
- validate source union;
- copy requested settings;
- set draft;
- set schema/revision/timestamps;
- no materialized Session;
- no internal status input.

======================================================================
4516. PHASE 1 — REQUEST UPDATE METHOD
======================================================================

Nếu model supports domain method:

- only allowed fields;
- returns new/updated validated entity;
- invalidates validation fields;
- increases revision through service/repository authority.

Không cho arbitrary dict merge.

======================================================================
4517. PHASE 1 — REQUEST MATERIALIZATION MARK
======================================================================

Mark materialized only with:

- Session ID;
- operation ID;
- timestamp;
- validated Request revision.

Không mark trước Session commit.

======================================================================
4518. PHASE 1 — SESSION FACTORY
======================================================================

Session factory phải:

- bind Project/Request IDs;
- set preparing/draft state;
- create immutable display snapshot defaults;
- no Plan/Manifest/Jobs yet;
- initialize progress safely;
- schema/revision/timestamps.

======================================================================
4519. PHASE 1 — SESSION TRANSITION METHOD
======================================================================

Transition qua state machine:

- validate;
- set timestamps;
- update reason/current blocker;
- append audit/history;
- increase revision;
- no repository write inside pure method.

======================================================================
4520. PHASE 1 — SESSION ARCHIVE FLAG
======================================================================

Nếu archive không phải status:

- archived boolean/timestamp/pre-archive state.

Nếu project dùng archived status:

- theo convention.

Không có hai authority mâu thuẫn.

======================================================================
4521. PHASE 1 — SESSION HEALTH MODEL
======================================================================

Health phải độc lập:

- healthy;
- degraded;
- recovery_required;
- corrupt;
- read_only;
- unknown.

Nếu source dùng khác, map tương đương.

======================================================================
4522. PHASE 1 — SESSION PROGRESS MODEL
======================================================================

Progress object phải:

- immutable result hoặc validated value object;
- counts consistent;
- percent finite;
- ETA optional;
- no negative;
- no total mismatch.

======================================================================
4523. PHASE 1 — DOCUMENT FACTORY
======================================================================

Document factory chỉ được gọi từ Planner/materialization.

Không public client create.

======================================================================
4524. PHASE 1 — CHAPTER FACTORY
======================================================================

Chapter factory từ Structure Result.

Validate:

- spans;
- order;
- title;
- role;
- document/session relation.

======================================================================
4525. PHASE 1 — UNIT FACTORY
======================================================================

Unit factory từ Splitter/Planner.

Validate:

- non-empty;
- span;
- checksum;
- counts;
- order;
- output requirements;
- selection snapshot relation.

======================================================================
4526. PHASE 1 — UNIT TEXT LOCATOR DECISION
======================================================================

Sau audit chọn:

A. Unit text inline trong Plan/entity.

B. Unit text file/locator.

Tiêu chí:

- existing storage;
- expected Unit count;
- JSON size;
- query;
- package;
- recovery;
- complexity.

Không lưu duplicate text cả inline và file nếu không có lý do.

======================================================================
4527. PHASE 1 — UNIT CURRENT ERROR SUMMARY
======================================================================

Current error summary có:

- code;
- message;
- category;
- retryable;
- Attempt ID;
- time.

Historical errors ở Attempts/reports.

======================================================================
4528. PHASE 1 — ATTEMPT FACTORY
======================================================================

Attempt factory service phải:

- compute next number under lock;
- parent linkage;
- input checksum;
- reason/kind;
- created status;
- operation ID;
- no Job ID until Job created;
- no client attempt number.

======================================================================
4529. PHASE 1 — ATTEMPT ACTIVE DEFINITION
======================================================================

Active statuses phải central:

- created;
- queued;
- waiting_resource;
- running;
- possibly retry_wait.

Terminal statuses central.

Không duplicate helper lists.

======================================================================
4530. PHASE 1 — ATTEMPT TERMINAL METHOD
======================================================================

Terminal transition sets:

- status;
- finished_at;
- error/result;
- output IDs;
- runtime summary;
- retryable;
- no subsequent terminal mutation.

======================================================================
4531. PHASE 1 — ARTIFACT PLANNED FACTORY
======================================================================

Planned Artifact tạo từ Output Requirement:

- stable ID;
- expected path;
- role/format;
- required/primary;
- lineage;
- status planned;
- no file metadata.

======================================================================
4532. PHASE 1 — ARTIFACT PHYSICAL UPDATE
======================================================================

Artifact state service updates:

- reservation;
- temp/final;
- created;
- validation;
- availability;
- checksum/media metadata.

Không setter tùy ý từ Engine/UI/API.

======================================================================
4533. PHASE 1 — ARTIFACT SUCCESS VALIDATION
======================================================================

Artifact valid invariant:

- final path;
- available;
- checksum;
- validation report passed;
- lineage;
- no active write.

======================================================================
4534. PHASE 1 — PLAN FACTORY
======================================================================

Plan factory chỉ từ Planner.

No client DTO.

Plan draft can be mutable internally until freeze.

Public frozen instance immutable.

======================================================================
4535. PHASE 1 — PLAN INDEX VALIDATION
======================================================================

Indexes phải kiểm tra:

- unique IDs;
- ordered references;
- all referenced entities exist;
- no extra orphan entity;
- document/chapter/unit relations.

======================================================================
4536. PHASE 1 — PLAN FREEZE METHOD
======================================================================

Freeze phải:

- validate graph;
- validate reconstruction;
- validate output paths;
- compute fingerprints/checksum;
- set frozen;
- set timestamp;
- reject second different freeze.

======================================================================
4537. PHASE 1 — MANIFEST FACTORY
======================================================================

Manifest draft từ Session/Plan.

Không chứa fake execution data.

======================================================================
4538. PHASE 1 — MANIFEST FINALIZE METHOD
======================================================================

Finalize chỉ với validated terminal summary.

Sets final fields/checksum.

Immutable afterward.

======================================================================
4539. PHASE 1 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT FACTORY
======================================================================

Snapshot draft/final workflow.

Final factory validates:

- raw file;
- checksums;
- source type;
- metadata;
- extraction report;
- managed path.

======================================================================
4540. PHASE 1 — SELECTION SNAPSHOT FACTORY
======================================================================

Selection resolver là authority.

Không xây snapshot trực tiếp từ Request raw without resolving IDs/capabilities.

======================================================================
4541. PHASE 1 — SETTINGS SNAPSHOT FACTORY
======================================================================

Merge resolver authority.

Store requested/effective/differences/checksum.

======================================================================
4542. PHASE 1 — OUTPUT SPEC FACTORY
======================================================================

Validate formats/templates/policies/capabilities.

No internal path input.

======================================================================
4543. PHASE 1 — OPERATION RECORD FACTORY
======================================================================

Operation start:

- unique/scoped;
- input fingerprint;
- created/running;
- stage;
- no result.

Idempotency lookup before create.

======================================================================
4544. PHASE 1 — REPORT FACTORY
======================================================================

Reports generated by service.

No arbitrary report ID from client.

======================================================================
4545. PHASE 1 — DOMAIN SERIALIZER
======================================================================

Use one canonical serializer path.

Không để mỗi model viết JSON differently.

======================================================================
4546. PHASE 1 — DATETIME SERIALIZATION
======================================================================

Timezone-aware UTC or project standard.

Deserializer reject ambiguous/invalid.

Legacy naive handling through migration only.

======================================================================
4547. PHASE 1 — ENUM SERIALIZATION
======================================================================

Persist enum value, not Python repr/name unless project standard.

======================================================================
4548. PHASE 1 — PATH SERIALIZATION
======================================================================

Persist normalized relative string.

No `Path(...)` repr.

======================================================================
4549. PHASE 1 — CHECKSUM SERIALIZATION
======================================================================

Stable format.

No uppercase/mixed.

======================================================================
4550. PHASE 1 — DOMAIN TEST MINIMUM
======================================================================

Không chuyển PHASE 2 trước khi tests pass cho:

- factories;
- invalid inputs;
- serialization;
- state transitions;
- progress;
- health;
- action availability;
- immutable Plan/snapshots;
- Retry/Attempt invariants.

======================================================================
4551. PHASE 2 — STORAGE DESIGN DECISION RECORD
======================================================================

Sau domain models, ghi decision actual:

- root layout;
- file layout;
- indexing;
- lock strategy;
- revision strategy;
- atomic commit strategy;
- corruption behavior;
- package behavior.

Không triển khai path trước khi quyết định rõ.

======================================================================
4552. PHASE 2 — PROJECT GENERATE ROOT
======================================================================

Generate root phải được resolve từ Project service.

Ví dụ conceptual:

`<project_root>/generate/`

Không hardcode nếu source dùng:

- `.avs`;
- `data`;
- `workspace`;
- `project.json` sibling.

======================================================================
4553. PHASE 2 — ROOT LAZY CREATION
======================================================================

Chỉ create khi first write.

List/read missing root → empty state.

Không create khi bootstrap/page open.

======================================================================
4554. PHASE 2 — REQUEST STORAGE
======================================================================

Request storage phải hỗ trợ:

- get by ID;
- list/filter draft/materialized/archived;
- revision update;
- latest validation pointer;
- materialized Session link;
- corruption isolation.

======================================================================
4555. PHASE 2 — SESSION STORAGE
======================================================================

Session directory/file phải là commit authority.

Có thể dùng:

- one session directory;
- summary metadata;
- subfolders.

Không để registry entry là sole existence proof.

======================================================================
4556. PHASE 2 — SESSION DIRECTORY CONTENT
======================================================================

Actual layout tối thiểu phải phân tách:

- source;
- Plan/entities;
- Attempts;
- Artifacts/outputs;
- Manifests;
- reports;
- operation/temp metadata.

Không bắt buộc mỗi mục là folder nếu source style khác.

======================================================================
4557. PHASE 2 — PLAN STORAGE
======================================================================

Plan storage không được rewrite khi progress thay đổi.

Nếu entity files riêng:

- frozen index/checksum;
- read-back validation.

======================================================================
4558. PHASE 2 — ATTEMPT STORAGE
======================================================================

Append/new file per Attempt phù hợp history.

Không rewrite old Attempt khi Retry.

======================================================================
4559. PHASE 2 — ARTIFACT STORAGE
======================================================================

Metadata riêng binary.

Path/index uniqueness.

Current availability/validation update controlled.

======================================================================
4560. PHASE 2 — MANIFEST STORAGE
======================================================================

Support draft/current/history revisions.

No overwrite final history.

======================================================================
4561. PHASE 2 — REPORT STORAGE
======================================================================

Immutable report files/index.

No giant inline list in Session.

======================================================================
4562. PHASE 2 — OPERATION STORAGE
======================================================================

Critical multi-step operations survive restart.

Nếu generic Job/operation store đủ, không duplicate.

======================================================================
4563. PHASE 2 — REGISTRY STORAGE
======================================================================

Registry entry summary includes:

- Session ID;
- Project ID;
- status;
- health;
- counts;
- updated time;
- snapshot display;
- recovery flag;
- archived/preview.

No full Plan.

======================================================================
4564. PHASE 2 — REGISTRY REBUILD SOURCE
======================================================================

Rebuild from committed Session metadata.

Nếu Session summary missing counts:

- degraded summary;
- deep repair optional.

Không read all Audio.

======================================================================
4565. PHASE 2 — PATH VALIDATION LAYER
======================================================================

Path resolver must validate both:

- component IDs;
- resolved containment.

Không tin ID validator alone.

======================================================================
4566. PHASE 2 — RESERVED FILENAME LAYER
======================================================================

Output human filenames sanitized.

Internal ID-based files already safe.

Tests Windows reserved/case/length.

======================================================================
4567. PHASE 2 — LOCK STRATEGY DOCUMENTATION
======================================================================

Document actual lock order.

Avoid:

Registry lock
→ long Session scan
→ Engine call.

Locks only metadata transaction.

======================================================================
4568. PHASE 2 — REQUEST CREATE TRANSACTION TEST
======================================================================

Simulate:

- write success/index fail;
- duplicate concurrent;
- invalid temp;
- permission error.

No lost valid file.

======================================================================
4569. PHASE 2 — SESSION CREATE TRANSACTION TEST
======================================================================

Simulate:

- partial directory;
- Session committed/registry missing;
- duplicate ID;
- cancellation.

Recovery finds safely.

======================================================================
4570. PHASE 2 — PLAN FREEZE TRANSACTION TEST
======================================================================

Simulate failure at:

- entity writes;
- index write;
- final Plan;
- Session pointer;
- Registry.

No queueable partial.

======================================================================
4571. PHASE 2 — ATTEMPT CREATE TRANSACTION TEST
======================================================================

Concurrent Retry/Queue produces one next Attempt.

No duplicate number.

======================================================================
4572. PHASE 2 — ARTIFACT PATH TRANSACTION TEST
======================================================================

Concurrent reservations.

Only one writer.

======================================================================
4573. PHASE 2 — MANIFEST TRANSACTION TEST
======================================================================

Final file valid before Session completed.

Failure preserves old final/draft.

======================================================================
4574. PHASE 2 — CORRUPTION TEST
======================================================================

Each repository must distinguish:

- not found;
- malformed;
- checksum mismatch;
- unsupported schema;
- future schema;
- permission.

======================================================================
4575. PHASE 2 — INDEX STALENESS TEST
======================================================================

Entity newer than Registry:

- list shows stale/degraded or repair;
- rebuild correct;
- no data loss.

======================================================================
4576. PHASE 2 — MULTI-PROJECT ISOLATION TEST
======================================================================

Same IDs should still not cross root if global uniqueness assumptions fail.

Repository scope verifies Project.

======================================================================
4577. PHASE 2 — READ-ONLY TEST
======================================================================

Repositories load/query.

Mutation fails cleanly.

No directory creation.

======================================================================
4578. PHASE 2 — FUTURE SCHEMA TEST
======================================================================

Load as read-only/error.

No rewrite.

======================================================================
4579. PHASE 2 — PHASE EXIT
======================================================================

Không chuyển PHASE 3 nếu:

- path tests fail;
- atomic tests fail;
- Registry cannot rebuild;
- future schema overwrites;
- Project isolation chưa rõ.

======================================================================
4580. PHASE 3 — MATERIALIZATION APPLICATION FLOW
======================================================================

Materialization orchestration phải rõ:

Option A:

- create Session;
- extract into Session temp;
- finalize snapshot;
- commit Session pointer.

Option B:

- extract operation temp;
- create committed Session with finalized snapshot.

Chọn một.

Không nửa A nửa B không recoverable.

======================================================================
4581. PHASE 3 — SOURCE INPUT VALIDATION BEFORE SESSION
======================================================================

Basic validation trước Session creation:

- type;
- existence;
- size;
- permissions;
- Project state;
- Request revision.

Không cần deep parse trước nếu operation report cần Session.

======================================================================
4582. PHASE 3 — SOURCE CHECKSUM BEFORE COPY
======================================================================

Original file checksum/provenance.

Nếu file thay đổi trong lúc đọc:

- detect size/mtime/checksum inconsistency;
- fail/retry;
- không snapshot inconsistent partial.

======================================================================
4583. PHASE 3 — TXT DECODING POLICY RECORD
======================================================================

Phải ghi actual policy trong code/docs/tests.

Ví dụ:

- UTF-8 BOM;
- UTF-8 strict;
- configured fallback;
- reject unknown.

Không dùng `errors="ignore"`.

======================================================================
4584. PHASE 3 — REPLACEMENT CHARACTER POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu fallback decode tạo U+FFFD:

- report warning/error;
- count;
- no silent.

Strict product policy có thể reject vượt threshold.

======================================================================
4585. PHASE 3 — DOCX HEADING EXTRACTION
======================================================================

Phải giữ:

- paragraph order;
- heading styles/levels;
- text;
- table policy;
- blank paragraph policy.

Không làm mất lời mở đầu/kết.

======================================================================
4586. PHASE 3 — DOCX TABLE TEXT
======================================================================

Audit requirement hiện tại.

Nếu reader hiện lấy table:

- preserve order policy.

Nếu không:

- warning unsupported/omitted;
- không claim full extraction.

Không tự viết parser lớn nếu ngoài scope.

======================================================================
4587. PHASE 3 — DOCX FOOTNOTE/HEADER POLICY
======================================================================

Không bắt buộc.

Phải document omitted nếu relevant.

Không silently claim complete DOCX support beyond actual.

======================================================================
4588. PHASE 3 — PASTED TEXT POLICY
======================================================================

Pasted text:

- exact Unicode;
- managed snapshot;
- bounded;
- no logs;
- no echo in API response;
- persistence behavior clear.

======================================================================
4589. PHASE 3 — RAW TEXT NEWLINE POLICY
======================================================================

Phân biệt:

- extraction raw representation;
- normalization LF conversion.

Nếu raw already normalized newline for storage, ghi rõ version/semantics.

Không làm hai lần không kiểm soát.

======================================================================
4590. PHASE 3 — SOURCE SNAPSHOT FINALIZATION CHECK
======================================================================

Trước finalized:

- raw text exists;
- non-empty meaningful;
- checksum;
- metadata parse;
- path inside root;
- extraction report;
- Session/Request IDs match.

======================================================================
4591. PHASE 3 — EXTERNAL SOURCE CHANGE TEST
======================================================================

Test file modified during materialization.

No mixed snapshot.

======================================================================
4592. PHASE 3 — EXTERNAL SOURCE DELETE TEST
======================================================================

After finalized:

- delete external;
- Session/source still works.

======================================================================
4593. PHASE 3 — SOURCE CANCEL TEST
======================================================================

Cancel during read/extraction:

- no finalized snapshot;
- no false Session ready;
- operation cancelled;
- partial temp known.

======================================================================
4594. PHASE 3 — SOURCE PERMISSION TEST
======================================================================

Map correct error.

No chmod.

======================================================================
4595. PHASE 3 — SOURCE LARGE FILE TEST
======================================================================

Background/progress/cancellation.

No UI block.

======================================================================
4596. PHASE 3 — SOURCE HEALTH TEST
======================================================================

- valid;
- missing raw;
- checksum mismatch;
- corrupt metadata;
- future schema.

======================================================================
4597. PHASE 3 — PHASE EXIT
======================================================================

Materialized Snapshot phải:

- persist;
- reopen;
- survive external deletion;
- preserve Unicode;
- report extraction;
- no source mutation.

======================================================================
4598. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION TRANSFORM REGISTRY
======================================================================

Define actual ordered transform IDs.

Có thể gồm:

- unicode_normalization;
- newline_normalization;
- control_character_filter;
- trailing_space_cleanup;
- blank_line_policy;
- quote_normalization;
- ellipsis_normalization;
- custom_literal_replacements.

Chỉ enable transforms actual settings/policy.

======================================================================
4599. PHASE 4 — UNICODE NORMALIZATION FORM
======================================================================

Chọn NFC/NFKC hoặc project convention.

Không dùng NFKC nếu có nguy cơ semantic thay đổi mà product không yêu cầu.

Default an toàn thường NFC.

Document/test.

======================================================================
4600. PHASE 4 — CONTROL CHARACTER FILTER
======================================================================

Chỉ remove/control safe list.

Preserve:

- newline;
- tab nếu policy;
- meaningful Unicode.

Report removals.

======================================================================
4601. PHASE 4 — WHITESPACE POLICY
======================================================================

Không collapse mọi whitespace thành một space mặc định.

Preserve paragraph/newline semantics.

Trim trailing spaces có thể an toàn/versioned.

======================================================================
4602. PHASE 4 — BLANK LINE POLICY
======================================================================

Configurable/bounded.

Không remove all blank lines nếu splitter cần paragraph.

======================================================================
4603. PHASE 4 — QUOTE NORMALIZATION
======================================================================

Không bắt buộc.

Nếu enabled, deterministic và report.

Default không thay content quá mức.

======================================================================
4604. PHASE 4 — ELLIPSIS NORMALIZATION
======================================================================

Nếu chuyển `...` ↔ `…`:

- explicit setting/version;
- source map;
- no semantic loss.

======================================================================
4605. PHASE 4 — CUSTOM REPLACEMENT SAFETY
======================================================================

Validate:

- non-empty source token;
- bounded list;
- deterministic order;
- no recursive loop;
- no regex unless safe feature.

======================================================================
4606. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION SOURCE MAP
======================================================================

Mapping strategy phải support:

- exact unchanged runs;
- replacements;
- removals;
- insertions;
- approximate segment.

No per-char explosion without need.

======================================================================
4607. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION REPORT COUNTS
======================================================================

Report:

- input chars;
- output chars;
- line count;
- transform counts;
- removed controls;
- replacements;
- warning;
- source map accuracy.

======================================================================
4608. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION REUSE TEST
======================================================================

Same raw/settings/version:

- reuse exact finalized result.

Changed settings/version:

- no reuse.

======================================================================
4609. PHASE 4 — NORMALIZATION IDEMPOTENCE TEST
======================================================================

Running same transforms on already normalized output should produce same output where expected.

If custom replacement intentionally non-idempotent, prevent repeated application through metadata/version.

======================================================================
4610. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE DETECTION ORDER
======================================================================

Actual detector order must be fixed/versioned.

Example:

1. DOCX heading metadata.
2. Explicit configured chapter patterns.
3. Built-in Vietnamese patterns.
4. Optional English/Chinese patterns if requirement.
5. Single-document fallback.

======================================================================
4611. PHASE 4 — VIETNAMESE CHAPTER PATTERNS
======================================================================

Safe anchored patterns có thể nhận:

- Chương;
- Phần;
- Hồi;
- Quyển;
- Tập.

Không match mọi dòng có từ đó ở giữa.

======================================================================
4612. PHASE 4 — CHAPTER NUMBER FORMS
======================================================================

Có thể nhận:

- Arabic digits;
- Roman numerals;
- text forms nếu deterministic hiện có.

Không cần complex language parser.

Order vẫn theo position.

======================================================================
4613. PHASE 4 — FALSE POSITIVE DEFENSE
======================================================================

Không nhận heading nếu:

- line quá dài;
- dấu câu cho thấy paragraph thường;
- pattern không anchored;
- xuất hiện giữa câu;
- số thứ tự list đơn giản không có keyword.

======================================================================
4614. PHASE 4 — PREFACE DETECTION
======================================================================

Text trước first Chapter phải được giữ.

Represent intro/preface according actual model.

No drop.

======================================================================
4615. PHASE 4 — APPENDIX/OUTRO DETECTION
======================================================================

Không cần semantic AI.

Text sau final heading/body vẫn thuộc final Chapter hoặc explicit outro role theo deterministic rule.

No drop.

======================================================================
4616. PHASE 4 — PARAGRAPH SPAN TEST
======================================================================

Paragraph spans:

- sorted;
- in range;
- no overlap;
- preserve separators;
- reconstruct section.

======================================================================
4617. PHASE 4 — SENTENCE SPAN TEST
======================================================================

Test Vietnamese punctuation/quotes/abbreviations/numbers.

No sentence text reconstruction loss.

======================================================================
4618. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE CHECKSUM TEST
======================================================================

Same normalized input/rules/version → same checksum.

Changing heading rule/version → different.

======================================================================
4619. PHASE 4 — STRUCTURE FALLBACK TEST
======================================================================

No headings:

- one Document/Chapter fallback;
- full text preserved;
- warning informative, not error.

======================================================================
4620. PHASE 4 — DUPLICATE HEADING TEST
======================================================================

Same title repeated:

- separate Chapters by position;
- unique IDs/order;
- output paths later unique.

======================================================================
4621. PHASE 4 — CONSECUTIVE HEADING TEST
======================================================================

No empty Unit.

Heading metadata retained.

No text drop.

======================================================================
4622. PHASE 4 — PHASE EXIT
======================================================================

Normalization/Structure must be:

- deterministic;
- versioned;
- persisted;
- checksum verified;
- no-loss;
- Vietnamese tested;
- no AI/model dependency.

======================================================================
4623. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER EFFECTIVE LIMIT SOURCE
======================================================================

Effective split limits resolution order:

- application defaults;
- Project override;
- Voice/Variant/Style adjustments;
- Request;
- Engine hard capability;
- safety maximum.

Persist requested/effective/reason.

======================================================================
4624. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER LIMIT CONFLICT
======================================================================

If effective Engine max < requested minimum:

- validation error;
- no nonsensical clamp.

If target > Engine max:

- clamp target/max with warning or error per policy.

======================================================================
4625. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER TITLE INCLUSION DECISION
======================================================================

Chọn actual implementation:

A. Title included at start of first Unit.

B. Separate title Unit.

Không làm cả hai.

Default preserve spoken title.

======================================================================
4626. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER SOURCE SLICE AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Unit text phải được lấy từ normalized source spans.

Không build từ `.strip()` + joins làm mất separators.

======================================================================
4627. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER BUFFER ALGORITHM
======================================================================

Algorithm phải linear.

Không repeatedly concatenate large strings.

Use spans/length counters.

======================================================================
4628. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER TARGET CHOICE
======================================================================

At candidate boundaries:

- choose nearest safe boundary around target;
- never exceed max;
- respect paragraph preference.

Deterministic tie-break.

======================================================================
4629. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER SHORT FINAL UNIT
======================================================================

Try merge previous only if:

- same Chapter;
- merged ≤ max;
- roles compatible;
- no order/span issue.

Else keep short with warning.

======================================================================
4630. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER HARD SPLIT METADATA
======================================================================

Hard split Unit phải ghi:

- hard_split=true;
- split reason;
- boundary offset;
- warning code.

======================================================================
4631. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER NO EMPTY UNIT
======================================================================

No Unit with:

- empty;
- whitespace-only;
- title omitted accidentally.

======================================================================
4632. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER CONTIGUOUS COVERAGE
======================================================================

Preferred Unit spans cover Chapter full spoken range contiguously.

Nếu separators excluded by policy:

- mapping/reconstruction must explicitly include.

======================================================================
4633. PHASE 5 — SPLITTER RECONSTRUCTION AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Plan validation phải reconstruct normalized spoken source from ordered Units and compare according title/explicit exclusion policy.

No “looks close”.

======================================================================
4634. PHASE 5 — UNIT ORDER ASSIGNMENT
======================================================================

Assign:

- document order;
- chapter order;
- Unit order;
- global order.

Do not derive future order from filename.

======================================================================
4635. PHASE 5 — UNIT ID REENTRY
======================================================================

Interrupted Plan operation must reuse draft entity IDs when safe.

No duplicate Unit sets in same Session.

======================================================================
4636. PHASE 5 — SELECTION RESOLUTION ORDER
======================================================================

Resolve actual entity IDs before freeze.

No unresolved display-name placeholder.

======================================================================
4637. PHASE 5 — SELECTION ENTITY SNAPSHOT
======================================================================

For each selected entity:

- ID;
- display snapshot;
- schema/version;
- fingerprint/checksum;
- relevant settings/assets.

No full unrelated entity dump.

======================================================================
4638. PHASE 5 — SELECTION CURRENT HEALTH
======================================================================

Planning checks current.

Snapshot stores result.

Execution rechecks.

======================================================================
4639. PHASE 5 — ENGINE CAPABILITY RESOLUTION
======================================================================

Provider returns metadata only.

No runtime/model load.

Validate:

- text length;
- language;
- output;
- parameters;
- reference;
- resource template.

======================================================================
4640. PHASE 5 — OUTPUT REQUIREMENT PLANNING
======================================================================

For each Unit create required Artifact specs.

No physical file.

No output directory creation unless path service requires harmless parent metadata, but prefer none.

======================================================================
4641. PHASE 5 — OUTPUT PATH UNIQUENESS
======================================================================

Validate whole Session set:

- normalized case;
- Unicode normalization;
- path length;
- reserved names;
- duplicate template;
- existing registered/file collisions.

======================================================================
4642. PHASE 5 — EXISTING OUTPUT LINEAGE CHECK
======================================================================

Existing file can only satisfy planned output if registered lineage/checksum compatible.

Otherwise collision.

======================================================================
4643. PHASE 5 — PLAN VALIDATION REPORT
======================================================================

Must include:

- source integrity;
- structure integrity;
- split reconstruction;
- selection integrity;
- settings validity;
- Engine capability;
- output path uniqueness;
- reference readiness;
- resource support metadata;
- warnings.

======================================================================
4644. PHASE 5 — PLAN FREEZE READ-BACK
======================================================================

After write:

- reopen repository;
- verify checksum/frozen;
- load entities;
- reconstruct index;
- compare fingerprint.

Only then update Session planned.

======================================================================
4645. PHASE 5 — MANIFEST DRAFT CREATION
======================================================================

After Plan freeze:

- create draft Manifest from persisted data;
- no fake Attempts/Artifacts created status;
- planned Artifact summaries allowed;
- persist ID in Session.

======================================================================
4646. PHASE 5 — REGISTRY UPDATE
======================================================================

Registry summary:

- planned status;
- counts;
- progress 0;
- source/Voice snapshots;
- health;
- Manifest draft.

No full Plan load later for list.

======================================================================
4647. PHASE 5 — PLAN REOPEN TEST
======================================================================

Close all services/context.

Reopen Project.

Verify:

- Session list;
- Plan;
- Unit pagination;
- settings/selection snapshots;
- no external source requirement.

======================================================================
4648. PHASE 5 — PLAN CANCEL TEST
======================================================================

Cancel at each stage.

No false frozen/queueable Plan.

======================================================================
4649. PHASE 5 — PLAN CONCURRENT TEST
======================================================================

Two plan requests same Session:

- one operation/Plan;
- idempotent/conflict;
- no duplicate entities.

======================================================================
4650. PHASE 5 — PHASE EXIT
======================================================================

Không chuyển PHASE 6 nếu:

- reconstruction fails;
- output paths unsafe;
- Plan mutable;
- snapshot missing;
- read-back fails;
- duplicate Units possible.

======================================================================
4651. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT PATH PLANNER
======================================================================

Output path planning phải là pure/deterministic given:

- frozen output spec;
- snapshot display/index;
- Unit/Chapter/Document IDs/order;
- format;
- path algorithm version.

No current renamed entity dependency.

======================================================================
4652. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT PATH HUMAN COMPONENT
======================================================================

Human title/name chỉ là convenience component.

Identity suffix/order ensures uniqueness.

Sanitize/truncate separately.

======================================================================
4653. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT PATH ROOT RECHECK
======================================================================

At runtime resolve current Project root with frozen relative destination.

No cached absolute path from planning.

======================================================================
4654. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT COLLISION RUNTIME
======================================================================

Recheck:

- registered Artifact;
- filesystem;
- reservation;
- lineage;
- policy.

No stale Plan decision blindly applied.

======================================================================
4655. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT RESERVATION TRANSACTION
======================================================================

Reservation operation:

1. Lock destination/session.
2. Reload Artifact/Attempt.
3. Validate active Attempt.
4. Inspect collision.
5. Persist reserved state/record.
6. Create temp target.
7. Release metadata lock.
8. Engine writes.

======================================================================
4656. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT TEMP TARGET CONTRACT
======================================================================

Temp target object may include:

- Artifact ID;
- logical role;
- format;
- temp path;
- final relative path;
- reservation ID;
- validation policy.

Engine cannot choose arbitrary final.

======================================================================
4657. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT BASIC PRE-FINAL VALIDATION
======================================================================

Before move:

- path inside temp;
- exists;
- regular;
- non-zero/minimum;
- format basic;
- stable size;
- no cancellation conflict.

======================================================================
4658. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT FINALIZATION TRANSACTION
======================================================================

1. Recheck final collision.
2. Preserve old valid file if replace-invalid policy.
3. Atomic move/copy strategy.
4. Verify final existence/size.
5. Compute checksum.
6. Persist Artifact created.
7. Run validation.
8. Persist report.
9. Mark Artifact valid/invalid.
10. Release reservation.

======================================================================
4659. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT OLD FILE PRESERVATION
======================================================================

For replace_invalid:

- new file finalized to alternate temp/version path;
- validate new;
- only then swap/update current pointer;
- old invalid retained/superseded or quarantine according policy.

No delete-before-success.

======================================================================
4660. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT VALIDATION BASIC POLICY
======================================================================

Basic validator availability must not depend on production Engine.

It can validate test fixtures/real generated files.

======================================================================
4661. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT VALIDATION FULL POLICY
======================================================================

Full requires AudioProbe/FFprobe actual availability.

Readiness:

- READY;
- DEGRADED;
- UNAVAILABLE;

according actual.

======================================================================
4662. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT VALIDATION REPORT PERSISTENCE
======================================================================

Report immutable.

Artifact latest report pointer.

Attempt success waits.

======================================================================
4663. PHASE 6 — ATTEMPT SUCCESS COORDINATION
======================================================================

After all required outputs valid:

- mark Attempt succeeded;
- clear Unit active Attempt;
- mark Unit succeeded;
- update progress;
- update Registry/Manifest draft checkpoint;
- publish events.

Persist order must be recoverable.

======================================================================
4664. PHASE 6 — ATTEMPT FAILURE COORDINATION
======================================================================

On execution/validation failure:

- persist Attempt terminal;
- preserve invalid/temp evidence;
- clear active pointers safely;
- mark Unit failed/blocked/recovery;
- compute retryable;
- update Session/progress/Manifest draft;
- no automatic domain Retry unless policy explicitly scheduled through service.

======================================================================
4665. PHASE 6 — SESSION FINALIZER TRIGGER
======================================================================

Trigger via:

- coordinator;
- Job dependency;
- terminal Unit event;
- recovery.

Must be idempotent.

No custom endless poller.

======================================================================
4666. PHASE 6 — SESSION FINALIZER INPUT
======================================================================

Reload:

- Session;
- Plan;
- Units;
- Attempts;
- Artifacts;
- active Jobs;
- cancellation flags;
- completion policy.

No event payload authority.

======================================================================
4667. PHASE 6 — SESSION FINAL STATUS
======================================================================

Determine exactly from frozen policy and persisted truth.

No UI/API request can choose final status.

======================================================================
4668. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST FINAL BUILD
======================================================================

Build from repositories.

Validate:

- required outputs;
- status;
- counts;
- checksums;
- lineage;
- omission.

Then persist final Manifest.

======================================================================
4669. PHASE 6 — SESSION COMPLETED WRITE ORDER
======================================================================

Recommended:

1. Final Manifest valid/persisted.
2. Session terminal transition.
3. Registry update.
4. Operation final result.
5. Event.

If Registry/event fail, core remains recoverable.

======================================================================
4670. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT INVALID TEST
======================================================================

Engine/test provider returns corrupt Audio.

Expected:

- Job may complete handler call;
- Artifact invalid;
- Attempt invalid_output;
- Unit failed;
- Session not completed;
- report/retry eligibility.

======================================================================
4671. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT MISSING TEST
======================================================================

Provider returns no file/path.

No success.

======================================================================
4672. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT PATH ESCAPE TEST
======================================================================

Provider returns path outside temp.

Critical provider error.

No move/register valid.

======================================================================
4673. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT COLLISION RACE TEST
======================================================================

File appears after Plan/before finalization.

No overwrite.

======================================================================
4674. PHASE 6 — OUTPUT LOCKED FILE TEST
======================================================================

Map permission/locked error.

Old file preserved.

======================================================================
4675. PHASE 6 — FINALIZER RACE TEST
======================================================================

Two triggers produce one final Manifest/current terminal transition.

======================================================================
4676. PHASE 6 — MANIFEST REBUILD TEST
======================================================================

Delete/corrupt draft/current under temp test.

Rebuild from repositories.

No Plan mutation.

======================================================================
4677. PHASE 6 — HEALTH REVOCATION TEST
======================================================================

After completed:

- delete/modify output;
- revalidate;
- health degraded;
- historical Attempt unchanged;
- Session lifecycle remains completed per chosen separation.

======================================================================
4678. PHASE 6 — PHASE EXIT
======================================================================

Output foundation must prove:

- safe path;
- reservation;
- temp/final;
- no overwrite;
- Artifact lineage;
- validation authority;
- Manifest finalization;
- recovery evidence.

======================================================================
4679. PHASE 7 — RESUME REPORT MODEL
======================================================================

ResumeInspectionReport must include:

- session_id;
- mode;
- fingerprint;
- Plan checksum;
- current status/health;
- valid completed Units;
- pending Units;
- interrupted Units;
- failed retryable Units;
- invalid output Units;
- active Units;
- blocked Units;
- recovery Units;
- cancelled/skipped Units;
- execution readiness;
- blockers;
- created_at.

No full Unit text.

======================================================================
4680. PHASE 7 — RETRY REPORT MODEL
======================================================================

RetryInspectionReport must include:

- scope;
- entity IDs;
- latest Attempt IDs/status;
- retries used/remaining;
- failure categories;
- Artifact health;
- active Jobs;
- readiness;
- eligible/ineligible;
- fingerprint;
- created_at.

======================================================================
4681. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY REPORT MODEL
======================================================================

RecoveryReport must include:

- scan mode;
- Session/Project;
- issues;
- evidence levels;
- safe actions;
- manual actions;
- applied actions;
- before/after health;
- fingerprint;
- timestamps.

======================================================================
4682. PHASE 7 — RESUME CLASSIFICATION AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Classification must query:

- Unit state;
- latest Attempt;
- Artifact current validation;
- Job current state;
- Session action flags;
- readiness.

No status-only shortcut.

======================================================================
4683. PHASE 7 — RESUME VALID OUTPUT MATCH
======================================================================

Valid Unit skip requires lineage match.

A valid file from old/different Plan is not enough.

======================================================================
4684. PHASE 7 — RESUME OPERATION CREATION
======================================================================

After user/action confirmation:

- create operation with inspection fingerprint;
- lock/reload;
- reclassify;
- create Attempts/Jobs only eligible;
- persist partial operation result;
- update Session.

======================================================================
4685. PHASE 7 — RESUME JOB FAILURE MID-BATCH
======================================================================

If Job creation fails after some:

- keep created;
- operation recovery;
- no duplicate on replay;
- Session queued/recovery according actual;
- report exact.

======================================================================
4686. PHASE 7 — RETRY NEW ATTEMPT TRANSACTION
======================================================================

Under Unit/Session lock:

1. Reload latest Attempt.
2. Validate expected ID/revision.
3. Validate retry policy/limit.
4. Validate no active.
5. Create new Attempt.
6. Create Job.
7. Link Job/Unit.
8. Update Session.
9. Release lock.

If Job create fails:

- Attempt state/recovery explicit;
- replay can continue safely.

======================================================================
4687. PHASE 7 — RETRY CHAPTER TRANSACTION
======================================================================

Do not attempt all-or-nothing filesystem rollback.

Use batch operation with per-Unit results/idempotency.

======================================================================
4688. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY STARTUP INTEGRATION
======================================================================

Project open/App startup:

- light scan only;
- identify non-terminal/operation markers;
- reconcile Job status;
- mark recovery_required;
- no Engine execution;
- no deep output checksum.

======================================================================
4689. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY SAFE REPAIR EXECUTION
======================================================================

Each safe action must:

- revalidate report fingerprint;
- lock relevant entity;
- apply one controlled repair;
- persist;
- create action result;
- update health;
- publish event.

======================================================================
4690. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY LOST JOB TEST
======================================================================

Persist running Attempt with missing Job.

Expected:

- startup light detects;
- Attempt interrupted/recovery per evidence;
- Session not running forever;
- no auto Retry.

======================================================================
4691. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY JOB EXISTS SESSION STALE TEST
======================================================================

Persist Job active but Session cache says none.

Recovery re-links/update active summary.

No duplicate Job.

======================================================================
4692. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY OUTPUT ORPHAN TEST
======================================================================

Final file without metadata.

Expected:

- orphan issue;
- no auto valid;
- no delete;
- attach only if strict evidence test path.

======================================================================
4693. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY PLAN LINK TEST
======================================================================

Frozen Plan exists but Session pointer missing.

Only link if IDs/checksum/operation evidence match.

======================================================================
4694. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY MANIFEST TEST
======================================================================

All entities terminal/valid but Manifest missing.

Rebuild/finalize without Engine.

======================================================================
4695. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY STALE PROGRESS TEST
======================================================================

Recompute counts/percent/Registry.

No Plan update.

======================================================================
4696. PHASE 7 — RESUME SKIP VALID TEST
======================================================================

Required:

- valid Unit count;
- no new Attempt;
- no new Job;
- report skipped valid.

======================================================================
4697. PHASE 7 — RESUME INVALID OUTPUT TEST
======================================================================

Creates new Attempt only if policy/readiness.

Old invalid Artifact retained.

======================================================================
4698. PHASE 7 — RETRY LIMIT TEST
======================================================================

At limit:

- no Attempt;
- no Job;
- stable blocker.

======================================================================
4699. PHASE 7 — RETRY CONCURRENT TEST
======================================================================

Two calls:

- one Attempt;
- one Job;
- other idempotent/conflict.

======================================================================
4700. PHASE 7 — RECOVERY NO ENGINE TEST
======================================================================

Mock Engine execute and assert never called.

======================================================================
4701. PHASE 7 — PHASE EXIT
======================================================================

Resume/Retry/Recovery must work from persisted/reopened state.

No RAM-only state authority.

- Resume paused;
- Retry failed;
- recovery required;
- archive terminal.

======================================================================
4749. PHASE 11 — UI ASYNC STALE CALLBACK TEST
======================================================================

Switch Project/session while query runs.

Old result ignored.

======================================================================
4750. PHASE 11 — UI EVENT THROTTLE TEST
======================================================================

Many progress events.

No full reload per event.

Final status refresh immediate.

======================================================================
4751. PHASE 11 — UI NO_THREAD_BLOCK TEST
======================================================================

Large Plan/deep validation via Job/background.

Page remains responsive in smoke/controller contract.

======================================================================
4752. PHASE 11 — UI HONEST READINESS TEST
======================================================================

No handler:

- Plan button works;
- Queue/Audio Preview disabled;
- banner explains.

======================================================================
4753. PHASE 11 — UI OUTPUT ACTION TEST
======================================================================

Open/play only valid available Artifact.

Missing/invalid disabled.

No arbitrary command.

======================================================================

======================================================================

Shows valid skipped/eligible/blocked.

Confirm passes inspection fingerprint/operation.

======================================================================
4755. PHASE 11 — UI RETRY DIALOG TEST
======================================================================

Shows Attempt count/reason.

No Retry valid Unit.

======================================================================
4756. PHASE 11 — UI RECOVERY DIALOG TEST
======================================================================

Safe action whitelist.

Ambiguous issue no auto repair.

- actions reachable;
- scroll;
- tables resize;
- no clipped critical controls.

======================================================================

No cross-data/event leakage.

======================================================================

Chỉ dùng khi:

- required code complete;
- targeted/full tests pass;
- bootstrap/UI/workflow pass;

- no critical blockers;
- no unsafe user-data issue.

Không tự commit.

4807. FINAL STATUS — SOURCE_DOCS_TESTS_READY
======================================================================

Use together with:

WORKTREE_NOT_CLEAN_DUE_TO_REAL_USER_DATA

when implementation/tests/docs pass nhưng worktree contains real user data that must not be removed.

======================================================================
4808. FINAL STATUS — NOT_READY
======================================================================

Use when:

- required test fails;
- source compile fails;
- core foundation incomplete;
- data safety uncertain;
- docs overclaim;
- destructive migration unresolved;
- critical compatibility broken.

======================================================================
4809. FOUNDATION READINESS SEPARATION
======================================================================

Sprint foundation status không đồng nghĩa production execution status.

Có thể:

- Sprint foundation READY;
- Generate Execution UNAVAILABLE.

Final Report phải phân biệt.

======================================================================
4810. TEST_ONLY STATUS USAGE
======================================================================

Use TEST_ONLY only for:

- fake Engine provider;
- test Audio generation;
- orchestration proof.

Không dùng TEST_ONLY để ngụ ý production capability.

======================================================================
4811. DEGRADED STATUS USAGE
======================================================================

Use DEGRADED khi capability hoạt động giới hạn an toàn.

Ví dụ:

- basic validation ready, FFprobe absent;
- history readable, some reports missing.

Không dùng DEGRADED thay cho not implemented.

======================================================================
4812. BLOCKED STATUS USAGE
======================================================================

Use BLOCKED khi implementation tồn tại nhưng current scope/entity/environment có blocker.

Ví dụ:

- missing selected reference;
- Project read-only;
- Engine model missing.

======================================================================
4813. UNAVAILABLE STATUS USAGE
======================================================================

Use UNAVAILABLE khi component/handler/runtime không tồn tại hoặc không đăng ký.

======================================================================
4814. NOT_IMPLEMENTED STATUS USAGE
======================================================================

Use cho feature intentionally ngoài scope chưa có.

Ví dụ:

- Audio streaming;
- advanced merge;
- Train;
- Voice DNA Analyzer.

======================================================================
4815. NOT_APPLICABLE STATUS USAGE
======================================================================

Use khi subsystem không tồn tại trong source và Sprint không yêu cầu xây mới theo verified architecture.

Ví dụ Dashboard/package nếu project actual không có.

======================================================================

- persisted;
- validated;
- update/revision;
- materialize once;
- reopen;
- tests.

Không ghi:

- “sẽ làm sau”;

cho phần nằm trong Sprint nếu có thể thực hiện hiện tại.

Nếu blocker thật, report.

- Job Queue hỗ trợ dependency;

trước khi kiểm tra source/environment.

Không tự pip/npm/system install nếu chưa cần/không được project cho phép.

Ưu tiên existing dependencies.

- report blocker;
- update manifest only if source policy cho và implementation cần;
- không download model/runtime.

======================================================================
4899. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — NAMING
======================================================================

Tên method/class phải mô tả responsibility.

Không dùng vague:

- Manager2;
- HelperNew;
- ProcessorFinal;
- TaskData.

Reuse source terminology.

======================================================================
4900. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — MODULE SIZE
======================================================================

Nếu module quá lớn do Sprint:

- extract cohesive helpers;
- no circular;
- tests.

Không split chỉ vì line count.

======================================================================
4901. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — DOCSTRINGS
======================================================================

Document public service contracts/invariants.

Không copy toàn Prompt.

======================================================================
4902. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — COMMENTS
======================================================================

Comment why:

- atomic order;
- recovery evidence;
- no overwrite;
- compatibility.

Không comment obvious assignment.

======================================================================
4903. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — TYPE SAFETY
======================================================================

Use actual type hints.

Avoid broad `Any` where model known.

No type ignore blanket.

======================================================================
4904. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — ERROR CONTEXT
======================================================================

Errors carry IDs/stage/code.

No bare “failed”.

======================================================================
4905. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — LOG CONTEXT
======================================================================

Operation/Session/Unit/Attempt/Job IDs.

No full source.

======================================================================
4906. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — PURE FUNCTIONS
======================================================================

Use pure helpers for:

- status/progress;
- checksum payload;
- normalization;
- splitting;
- path naming/sanitization;
- eligibility.

Easy tests.

======================================================================
4907. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — BOUNDARY SERVICES
======================================================================

I/O/business boundaries clear.

No UI filesystem.

No repository Engine.

======================================================================
4908. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — RELOAD BEFORE MUTATION
======================================================================

Long async operations reload current state before final commit.

======================================================================
4909. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — IDEMPOTENT RETRY
======================================================================

Every multi-step operation designed for restart/replay.

======================================================================
4910. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — ATOMICITY
======================================================================

No partial canonical state.

Temp/draft/recovery markers.

======================================================================
4911. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Keep old behavior/API where safe.

Unsafe overwrite behavior may be constrained with explicit decision.

======================================================================
4912. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — PERFORMANCE
======================================================================

No full Plans in list/Manifest text duplication/deep scans.

======================================================================
4913. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — WINDOWS
======================================================================

Handle path length/reserved/case/file locks.

======================================================================
4914. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — UNICODE
======================================================================

Vietnamese text/display/path sanitization/checksum consistent.

======================================================================
4915. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — TIMEZONE
======================================================================

No naive new timestamps.

======================================================================
4916. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — JSON
======================================================================

Finite/UTF-8/versioned/atomic.

======================================================================
4917. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — TESTABILITY
======================================================================

Clock/ID/provider/services injectable as source allows.

No global hidden state.

======================================================================
4918. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — SHUTDOWN
======================================================================

No leaked workers/listeners/files.

======================================================================
4919. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — READINESS
======================================================================

Capability-specific and cheap.

======================================================================
4920. IMPLEMENTATION QUALITY — USER MESSAGING
======================================================================

Vietnamese clear, honest, actionable.

======================================================================
4921. MANDATORY SMOKE — PLAN ONLY
======================================================================

The exact smoke flow must prove:

1. Temp Project created/opened.
2. Test Voice/Reference metadata available.
3. Request from Vietnamese TXT/DOCX/pasted source.
4. Validation passes.
5. Session materialized.
6. External source can be deleted.
7. Snapshot remains.
8. Normalization/structure/split complete.
9. Plan frozen.
10. Reconstruction passes.
11. Manifest draft exists.
12. Registry lists Session.
13. AppContext closes.
14. Reopens.
15. Plan/Units query correctly.
16. Execution readiness truthful.
17. No Audio output created.
18. No production Engine loaded.

======================================================================
4922. MANDATORY SMOKE — TEST EXECUTION
======================================================================

Test-only flow must prove:

1. Planned Session.
2. Test provider registered only in test context.
3. Queue action.
4. Attempt created.
5. Job created.
6. Resource decision/lease.
7. Exact Unit text passed.
8. Temp Audio produced.
9. OutputManager finalizes.
10. Validator passes.
11. Artifact valid.
12. Attempt/Unit succeeded.
13. Progress recomputed.
14. Manifest final.
15. Session completed.
16. Reopen state.
17. Production context has no test provider.

======================================================================
4923. MANDATORY SMOKE — INVALID OUTPUT
======================================================================

Test provider returns corrupt file.

Expected:

- Artifact invalid;
- Attempt invalid_output;
- Unit failed;
- Session not completed;
- retry report;
- old data preserved.

======================================================================
4924. MANDATORY SMOKE — RETRY
======================================================================

Retry invalid/failed Unit:

- new Attempt ID/number;
- old Attempt unchanged;
- new Job;
- successful valid Artifact;
- supersession/history;
- Session finalization.

======================================================================
4925. MANDATORY SMOKE — RESUME
======================================================================

Session contains:

- valid Units;
- pending/interrupted Units;
- failed retryable;
- blocked.

Resume:

- valid skip;
- eligible new Attempts;
- blocked remain;
- no duplicate Jobs;
- final status according policy.

======================================================================
4926. MANDATORY SMOKE — RECOVERY
======================================================================

Persist crash-like state.

Restart:

- detect lost Job/stale active;
- no auto Engine;
- report;
- safe repair;
- Resume inspection.

======================================================================
4927. MANDATORY SMOKE — PROJECT SWITCH
======================================================================

Active Job Project A.

Switch B.

No cross context.

======================================================================
4928. MANDATORY SMOKE — PACKAGE
======================================================================

If applicable:

- export temp package;
