- import new Project;
- remap IDs;
- no active Job/Lease;
- source/output inclusion as mode;
- history/readiness correct.

======================================================================
4929. MANDATORY SMOKE — FUTURE SCHEMA
======================================================================

Open future schema fixture.

Read-only/error.

No write.

======================================================================
4930. MANDATORY SMOKE — DATA SAFETY
======================================================================

Verify no production/user roots modified by all tests.

======================================================================
4931. ACCEPTANCE GATE — DOMAIN
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- entities/invariants/state/action tests;
- no mutable default;
- serialization roundtrip;
- checksum/path validation;
- immutable Plan/snapshots.

======================================================================
4932. ACCEPTANCE GATE — STORAGE
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- atomic;
- Registry rebuild;
- corruption/future;
- Project isolation;
- no write bootstrap;
- revision/lock tests.

======================================================================
4933. ACCEPTANCE GATE — SOURCE
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- TXT/DOCX/pasted;
- managed Snapshot;
- external deletion;
- Unicode;
- cancellation;
- no mutation.

======================================================================
4934. ACCEPTANCE GATE — TEXT
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- deterministic normalization;
- structure coverage;
- splitter reconstruction;
- title/intro/outro;
- long text;
- no infinite loop.

======================================================================
4935. ACCEPTANCE GATE — PLAN
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- snapshot/effective settings;
- output paths;
- validation;
- freeze/read-back;
- idempotency.

======================================================================
4936. ACCEPTANCE GATE — OUTPUT
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- reservation;
- temp/final;
- collision/no overwrite;
- validation;
- Artifact;
- Manifest;
- health/recovery.

======================================================================
4937. ACCEPTANCE GATE — RESUME_RETRY
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- inspection;
- stale/idempotency;
- valid skip;
- new Attempt;
- limit;
- no duplicate.

======================================================================
4938. ACCEPTANCE GATE — RECOVERY
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- lost Job;
- stale Registry/progress;
- Manifest rebuild;
- orphan/temp classification;
- no guessing/inference/delete.

======================================================================
4939. ACCEPTANCE GATE — JOB_RESOURCE
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- actual Queue/Manager integration;
- payload IDs;
- waiting/unsupported;
- lease;
- no fake production;
- infra/domain Retry distinction.

======================================================================
4940. ACCEPTANCE GATE — PROJECT_REFERENCE
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- Project scope/switch;
- immutable IDs;
- Reference checksum/no fallback;
- lifecycle/package applicable tests.

======================================================================
4941. ACCEPTANCE GATE — API
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- real service;
- internal field rejection;
- idempotency;
- pagination;
- cross-project;
- no path/source leak;
- error/action parity.

======================================================================
4942. ACCEPTANCE GATE — UI
======================================================================

PASS only if:

- real service/query;
- IDs;
- async/event safe;
- honest readiness;
- actions;
- responsive;
- smoke.

======================================================================
4943. ACCEPTANCE GATE — MIGRATION_PACKAGE
======================================================================

PASS/NOT_APPLICABLE based actual source.

No speculative claim.

======================================================================
4944. ACCEPTANCE GATE — COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

PASS only if existing working public behavior preserved/tested or explicit safe adaptation.

======================================================================
4945. ACCEPTANCE GATE — FULL TESTS
======================================================================

PASS only if required targeted/full commands succeed.

======================================================================
4946. ACCEPTANCE GATE — DOCS
======================================================================

PASS only if actual architecture/capabilities/status.

======================================================================
4947. ACCEPTANCE GATE — DATA SAFETY
======================================================================

PASS only if no unauthorized real data/Git write.

======================================================================
4948. ACCEPTANCE GATE — FINAL STATUS
======================================================================

All gates determine Final Status.

No subjective override.

======================================================================
4949. MASTER PROMPT INTERNAL DUPLICATION
======================================================================

Một số nguyên tắc được lặp có chủ đích để Codex không bỏ sót trong task dài.

Không xóa/giảm mức nghiêm ngặt khi copy.

======================================================================
4950. MASTER PROMPT SOURCE ADAPTATION
======================================================================

Codex được phép đổi:

- class names;
- file paths;
- grouping;
- framework-specific implementation;
- route shapes;
- storage layout;

để phù hợp source.

Codex không được đổi:

- ownership;
- safety;
- invariants;
- no-fake;
- no-overwrite;
- immutable Plan;
- Retry/Resume semantics;
- test evidence.

======================================================================
4951. MASTER PROMPT EXECUTION COMPLETENESS
======================================================================

Không coi việc tạo 20–30 model/interface là đủ.

Phải nối thực tế:

Request
→ Session
→ Source
→ Text Pipeline
→ Plan
→ Output Foundation
→ Job/Resource contracts
→ Resume/Retry/Recovery
→ Project/API/UI
→ Tests/Docs.

======================================================================
4952. MASTER PROMPT MINIMALISM
======================================================================

Minimalism nghĩa là:

- ít duplicate;
- ít abstraction không cần;
- reuse source;
- coherent full vertical slice.

Không nghĩa là bỏ persistence/recovery/tests.

======================================================================
4953. MASTER PROMPT COMPATIBILITY
======================================================================

Compatibility không được dùng để giữ silent overwrite/data loss.

Data safety cao hơn unsafe legacy behavior.

Phải ghi decision/adaptor.

======================================================================
4954. MASTER PROMPT PRODUCTION HONESTY
======================================================================

Không có real Engine handler thì:

- no execution Job creation;
- no Audio Preview;
- no MP3;
- UI/API disabled/unavailable;
- Plan/history vẫn usable.

======================================================================
4955. MASTER PROMPT TEST HONESTY
======================================================================

Test provider chứng minh orchestration, không chứng minh quality/availability production Engine.

Final Report phải nói TEST_ONLY.

======================================================================
4956. MASTER PROMPT RECOVERY HONESTY
======================================================================

Recovery không thể chứng minh lineage thì không attach output.

Report ambiguous.

======================================================================
4957. MASTER PROMPT PACKAGE HONESTY
======================================================================

Metadata-only package không được claim resumable nếu source/reference/output omitted.

======================================================================
4958. MASTER PROMPT MIGRATION HONESTY
======================================================================

Không có legacy evidence thì không claim migration complete beyond safe version loader/future handling.

======================================================================
4959. MASTER PROMPT UI HONESTY
======================================================================

Disabled button với lý do tốt hơn fake workflow.

======================================================================
4960. MASTER PROMPT API HONESTY
======================================================================

Action unavailable phải trả structured blocker, không 200 fake success.

======================================================================
4961. MASTER PROMPT OUTPUT HONESTY
======================================================================

File extension đúng không đủ.

Validation authority.

======================================================================
4962. MASTER PROMPT STATUS HONESTY
======================================================================

Completed lifecycle không đồng nghĩa current files healthy.

======================================================================
4963. MASTER PROMPT PERFORMANCE HONESTY
======================================================================

Không claim scale lớn nếu chỉ test fixture nhỏ.

Describe design/evidence.

======================================================================
4964. MASTER PROMPT SECURITY HONESTY
======================================================================

Không claim hardened beyond tested local threat boundaries.

======================================================================
4965. MASTER PROMPT FINAL REPORT HONESTY
======================================================================

Không viết:

- “hoàn thiện 100%”;
- “production ready”;
- “không còn lỗi”;

trừ khi evidence thực sự phù hợp.

Dùng capability table cụ thể.

======================================================================
4966. PART 09 CONSISTENCY
======================================================================

PART 09 tiếp tục trực tiếp PART 01–08.

Giữ nguyên:

- Sprint AVS-014.16;
- Generate Pipeline Foundation;
- PHASE 0–12;
- source-first;
- data-first;
- KEEP/NEW/REPLACE/DELETE;
- immutable IDs;
- Request/Session separation;
- managed Source Snapshot;
- deterministic normalization;
- no-loss structure/splitter;
- frozen Plan;
- Unit/Attempt/Job separation;
- Artifact validation authority;
- Manifest persistence/rebuild;
- Resume không chạy lại Unit hợp lệ;
- Retry tạo Attempt mới;
- Recovery không đoán;
- Job Queue là scheduler duy nhất;
- Resource Manager là resource authority duy nhất;
- Reference Vault dùng asset IDs/checksums;
- Engine-neutral core;
- không production fake;
- test provider chỉ trong tests;
- không Train;
- không Voice DNA Analyzer;
- không AI rewrite text;
- không sửa GPT-SoVITS runtime ngoài adapter cần thiết;
- không sửa dữ liệu thật;
- không Git write;
- API/UI dùng chung application/domain services;
- readiness trung thực;
- full targeted/full tests;
- docs/final evidence.

======================================================================
4967. CONTINUATION RULE
======================================================================

Nếu còn PART tiếp theo:

- bắt đầu từ mục 4968;
- nối tiếp cùng Master Prompt;
- không sửa nội dung PART 01–09;
- không đổi Sprint;
- không đổi PHASE;
- không đổi canonical responsibility;
- không tuyên bố toàn bộ Prompt kết thúc cho tới marker cuối thật sự.

===== KẾT THÚC PART 09 — CHƯA KẾT THÚC TOÀN BỘ PROMPT =====
# AI VOICE STUDIO
# MASTER IMPLEMENTATION PROMPT
# AVS-014.16 — GENERATE PIPELINE FOUNDATION
# PART 10 — FINAL

======================================================================
4968. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CONTROL LOOP
======================================================================

Codex phải vận hành theo vòng kiểm soát:

1. Đọc source mới nhất.
2. Xác định responsibility đang sửa.
3. Xác định invariant liên quan.
4. Xác định compatibility surface.
5. Sửa tối thiểu nhưng đầy đủ.
6. Chạy targeted tests.
7. Đọc lại file vừa sửa.
8. Kiểm tra call sites.
9. Kiểm tra diff.
10. Chuyển sang responsibility tiếp theo.

Không thực hiện hàng loạt thay đổi chưa được kiểm tra ở giữa.

======================================================================
4969. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION STATE TRACKER
======================================================================

Duy trì trạng thái nội bộ cho từng capability:

- NOT_STARTED;
- AUDITED;
- IMPLEMENTING;
- TARGETED_TESTED;
- INTEGRATED;
- FULL_TESTED;
- DOCUMENTED;
- BLOCKED;
- COMPLETE.

Không đánh COMPLETE khi chỉ tạo model/interface.

======================================================================
4970. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DEPENDENCY TRACKER
======================================================================

Mỗi capability phải ghi dependency thực tế.

Ví dụ:

Generate Plan phụ thuộc:

- Source Snapshot;
- Normalization;
- Structure;
- Splitter;
- Selection Snapshot;
- Settings Snapshot;
- OutputSpec;
- repositories.

Generate Execution phụ thuộc:

- frozen Plan;
- Unit;
- Attempt;
- Job Queue;
- Resource Manager;
- Engine handler;
- Output Manager;
- Validator;
- Manifest finalizer.

Không kích hoạt capability khi dependency chưa đạt.

======================================================================
4971. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION BLOCKER PROPAGATION
======================================================================

Blocker capability dưới phải propagate chính xác.

Ví dụ:

- Engine handler unavailable
  → Generate Execution UNAVAILABLE.
- Generate Execution unavailable
  → Preview Audio UNAVAILABLE.
- Generate Execution unavailable
  → Resume Execution UNAVAILABLE.
- Generate Execution unavailable
  → Retry Execution UNAVAILABLE.
- Planning vẫn có thể READY.
- Resume/Retry Inspection vẫn có thể READY.

Không đánh toàn bộ Generate unavailable chỉ vì thiếu Engine handler.

======================================================================
4972. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION FALLBACK POLICY
======================================================================

Fallback chỉ được dùng khi:

- được định nghĩa rõ trong capability;
- không thay identity;
- không thay frozen input;
- không gây mất dữ liệu;
- có warning/report;
- có test.

Không fallback:

- Voice;
- Variant;
- Style;
- Reference;
- Engine;
- output path;
- output format required;
- source snapshot;
- frozen settings.

======================================================================
4973. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DEFAULT POLICY
======================================================================

Default chỉ dùng khi tạo Request mới.

Default không được áp dụng ngược cho:

- Session đã materialized;
- Plan đã frozen;
- Attempt;
- Artifact;
- Manifest;
- Resume;
- Retry;
- Recovery.

======================================================================
4974. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MUTATION OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Writer authority phải rõ:

- RequestRepository viết Request.
- SessionRepository viết Session.
- PlanRepository viết Plan.
- AttemptRepository viết Attempt.
- ArtifactRepository viết Artifact.
- ManifestRepository viết Manifest.
- ReportRepository viết reports.
- RegistryService viết Registry.
- OutputManager thao tác physical outputs.
- State/Application service quyết định transitions.
- Job Queue viết Job.
- Resource Manager viết decision/lease.
- Reference Vault viết Reference assets.

Không có hai writer độc lập cho cùng dữ liệu.

======================================================================
4975. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION READ OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

QueryService là đường đọc chính cho:

- UI;
- Local API;
- Dashboard;
- reports summary.

Các service mutation có thể đọc repositories trực tiếp trong transaction.

UI không đọc JSON/file trực tiếp.

======================================================================
4976. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT CONTEXT OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Mọi operation phải giữ Project ID xuyên suốt:

Request
→ Session
→ Plan
→ Unit
→ Attempt
→ Job
→ Resource Lease
→ Artifact
→ Manifest
→ Event
→ API/UI read model.

Không dùng `current_project` ngầm trong worker.

======================================================================
4977. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REQUEST REVISION FLOW
======================================================================

Request revision flow:

- Create: revision ban đầu theo convention.
- Update: expected revision.
- Validate: report ghi validated revision.
- Materialize: chỉ dùng report đúng revision.
- Materialized: frozen linkage.
- Clone: Request ID/revision mới.

Không materialize từ validation report stale.

======================================================================
4978. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SESSION REVISION FLOW
======================================================================

Session revision tăng khi:

- lifecycle transition;
- Plan/Manifest link;
- active operation/Job update;
- progress/health summary update;
- archive/restore;
- blocker/current warning update.

Không tăng khi query.

======================================================================
4979. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENTITY REVISION FLOW
======================================================================

Nếu Project model architecture hỗ trợ revision riêng:

- Unit revision khi status/Attempt/current error thay đổi.
- Artifact revision khi status/validation/availability thay đổi.
- Attempt revision khi Job/status/result thay đổi.
- Manifest revision theo manifest lineage.

Không bắt buộc thêm revision vào immutable Chapter nếu không cần.

======================================================================
4980. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION EXPECTED REVISION POLICY
======================================================================

Expected revision bắt buộc cho:

- Request update;
- stale-sensitive Session actions;
- Retry;
- Resume execution;
- recovery action;
- archive/restore nếu concurrent risk.

UI/API có thể không bắt người dùng nhập; controller lấy revision hiện tại.

======================================================================
4981. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION STALE RESULT POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu expected revision/fingerprint stale:

- không mutate;
- trả stable conflict;
- trả current state/revision;
- yêu cầu reload/reinspect;
- không tự merge lifecycle actions.

======================================================================
4982. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LOCK ORDER
======================================================================

Chọn và document lock order thực tế.

Ví dụ conceptual:

1. Project-scoped operation lock.
2. Session lock.
3. Unit/Attempt lock.
4. Artifact destination reservation.
5. Registry lock.

Không giữ Registry lock rồi chờ Engine/Resource/Job.

======================================================================
4983. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LOCK RELEASE
======================================================================

Mọi lock phải release trong:

- success;
- validation error;
- exception;
- cancellation;
- timeout.

Use context manager/finally theo source convention.

======================================================================
4984. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DEADLOCK PREVENTION
======================================================================

Không acquire cùng locks khác thứ tự giữa:

- Queue;
- Retry;
- Resume;
- Finalizer;
- Recovery;
- Registry rebuild.

Concurrency tests phải bao phủ đường quan trọng.

======================================================================
4985. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LONG OPERATION CHECKPOINT
======================================================================

Long operation checkpoint tối thiểu tại:

- source read completed;
- snapshot finalized;
- normalization finalized;
- structure finalized;
- splitting completed;
- Plan persisted;
- Job batch created;
- Artifact finalized;
- Manifest finalized.

Checkpoint không biến thành workflow engine riêng.

======================================================================
4986. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CANCELLATION CHECKPOINT
======================================================================

Kiểm tra cancellation trước/sau:

- source extraction;
- normalization;
- structure;
- splitting;
- Plan freeze;
- Job create batch;
- Engine execute;
- output finalize;
- validation;
- finalizer.

Không cancel giữa atomic metadata replacement.

======================================================================
4987. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PAUSE CHECKPOINT
======================================================================

Pause chủ yếu ngăn dispatch Job mới.

Nếu Engine hỗ trợ cooperative pause, dùng provider contract.

Nếu không:

- Unit hiện tại hoàn thành hoặc bị cancellation policy;
- Session chuyển pausing;
- chỉ paused khi trạng thái đã ổn định.

======================================================================
4988. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SHUTDOWN CHECKPOINT
======================================================================

App shutdown:

- từ chối mutation mới;
- yêu cầu cooperative stop;
- persist operation/active state;
- giữ uncertain temp;
- release managed resources;
- no false terminal success.

======================================================================
4989. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION EVENT ORDER CHECK
======================================================================

Mọi event mutation:

1. Domain validation.
2. Persistence.
3. Registry/current summary update hoặc warning.
4. Operation result.
5. Publish event.

Không publish trước persistence.

======================================================================
4990. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION EVENT DUPLICATE POLICY
======================================================================

Event có thể được publish lại do retry.

Subscribers phải idempotent hoặc reload state.

UI không tăng count trực tiếp từ event.

======================================================================
4991. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION EVENT LOSS POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu event mất:

- persisted state vẫn đúng;
- page reload/query khôi phục;
- Registry rebuild được;
- Job/Resource không phụ thuộc UI event.

======================================================================
4992. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION EVENT PAYLOAD LIMIT
======================================================================

Không đưa vào event:

- source text;
- Unit text;
- binary;
- full Manifest;
- full validation report;
- traceback;
- secret;
- external absolute path.

======================================================================
4993. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LOG LEVEL POLICY
======================================================================

Use level:

DEBUG:

- stage details;
- fingerprints truncated;
- repository operation details.

INFO:

- operation start/end;
- lifecycle transition;
- Job/Attempt/Artifact final state;
- recovery action.

WARNING:

- validation warning;
- degraded capability;
- Registry/event failure sau core persistence;
- fallback explicitly allowed.

ERROR:

- persistence corruption;
- Engine crash;
- output failure;
- recovery required;
- security/path issue.

======================================================================
4994. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LOG REDACTION
======================================================================

Log IDs thay cho:

- full source;
- full reference text;
- external personal path;
- secrets;
- model credentials.

Managed relative path chỉ log khi cần.

======================================================================
4995. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION METRICS BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Không thêm telemetry ngoài ứng dụng.

Có thể ghi local summaries:

- planning duration;
- Unit execution duration;
- validation duration;
- retry count;
- output bytes;
- waiting resource duration.

Không gửi external.

======================================================================
4996. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ERROR BOUNDARY
======================================================================

Exception phải được chuyển thành domain/application error tại boundary:

- source extractor;
- repository;
- Engine adapter;
- Job handler;
- OutputManager;
- Audio probe;
- package/migration;
- API router;
- UI controller.

Không swallow.

======================================================================
4997. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UNKNOWN ERROR
======================================================================

Unknown exception:

- operation marked failed/recovery as appropriate;
- log traceback internally;
- return sanitized stable code;
- preserve partial evidence;
- no false success.

======================================================================
4998. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RETRYABLE ERROR POLICY
======================================================================

Retryable categories có thể gồm:

- temporary file lock;
- transient process failure;
- timeout;
- Engine OOM theo policy;
- invalid output regeneration;
- interrupted Job;
- temporary runtime availability.

Không retryable mặc định:

- future schema;
- path traversal;
- corrupt frozen Plan;
- missing immutable reference different checksum;
- unsupported Engine;
- invalid settings;
- cancelled Session;
- archive/read-only.

======================================================================
4999. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION BACKOFF POLICY
======================================================================

Domain Retry backoff snapshot.

Job infrastructure retry backoff theo Job Queue.

Không cộng hai backoff không kiểm soát.

Không sleep trực tiếp trong UI/Application.

======================================================================
5000. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RETRY LIMIT SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Phải xác định rõ:

- `max_retries` là số lần thử lại sau initial Attempt;
- hoặc tổng số Attempts.

Ưu tiên tên `max_retries` = retries sau initial.

Tests chống off-by-one.

======================================================================
5001. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ATTEMPT NUMBER SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Attempt number bắt đầu theo convention, thường 1.

Retry count:

`max(0, attempt_number - 1)`

chỉ khi không có legacy/infra retry khác.

Nên dùng repository/history calculation rõ.

======================================================================
5002. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION INFRA RETRY SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Job infrastructure retry:

- cùng domain Attempt;
- cùng input checksum;
- không tăng domain retry count;
- idempotent;
- output/recovery inspection trước rerun nếu previous side effect uncertain.

======================================================================
5003. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOMAIN RETRY SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Domain Retry:

- Attempt mới;
- operation mới hoặc idempotent retry operation;
- parent Attempt;
- reason;
- policy/limit;
- new Job;
- old history preserved.

======================================================================
5004. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESUME SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Resume không đồng nghĩa retry tất cả.

Resume:

- inspect toàn Session;
- giữ valid outputs;
- giữ active Jobs;
- tạo initial/retry Attempts cho eligible incomplete Units;
- không thay frozen settings;
- không chạy cancelled/blocked/recovery Units.

======================================================================
5005. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RECOVERY SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Recovery không đồng nghĩa Resume.

Recovery:

- làm trạng thái nhất quán;
- không tự tạo Audio;
- không tự tạo Attempt trừ safe metadata reconstruction được định nghĩa;
- sau recovery thường đưa Session về paused/blocked/terminal hợp lệ.

======================================================================
5006. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REVALIDATION SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Revalidate:

- kiểm tra current health/readiness;
- tạo reports mới;
- không thay historical execution result;
- không thay snapshots;
- không tự Retry/Resume.

======================================================================
5007. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CLONE SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Clone Session as Request:

- lấy cấu hình frozen làm requested draft;
- source reuse theo managed snapshot policy;
- entity IDs mới;
- validation mới;
- không copy lifecycle execution history.

======================================================================
5008. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SOURCE REUSE POLICY
======================================================================

Khi clone:

Option A:

- Request trỏ managed Source Snapshot hiện tại read-only;
- materialize copy/reference theo ownership policy.

Option B:

- copy managed raw text vào Request/Session mới.

Phải đảm bảo Project package/delete/lifecycle an toàn.

Không trỏ external original file.

======================================================================
5009. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SOURCE SNAPSHOT OWNERSHIP
======================================================================

Nếu Source Snapshot thuộc Session:

- clone không được chia sẻ file có nguy cơ bị xóa cùng Session;
- hoặc storage content-addressed/reference-counted hiện có.

Không thêm reference counting phức tạp nếu không có.

Safe choice có thể copy managed raw text.

======================================================================
5010. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PLAN SELF-CONTAINMENT
======================================================================

Plan execution phải đủ thông tin để chạy mà không cần:

- UI state;
- current default settings;
- external source path;
- display-name lookup;
- current list ordering.

Reference/Engine runtime assets vẫn được resolve bằng immutable IDs/checksums.

======================================================================
5011. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UNIT TEXT AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Execution lấy Unit text từ frozen Plan/entity.

Không đọc lại:

- external source;
- current normalized file nếu checksum không xác minh;
- UI editor;
- clipboard;
- current Request draft.

======================================================================
5012. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT SPEC AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Attempt/output dùng OutputSpec frozen.

Không đọc current Project output defaults để đổi:

- format;
- template;
- root policy;
- collision;
- required sidecars.

======================================================================
5013. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SELECTION SNAPSHOT AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Engine parameters dùng effective snapshot.

Current Voice/Variant/Style entities chỉ dùng:

- resolve required assets;
- validate checksum/current availability;
- runtime capability.

Không lấy mutable defaults mới.

======================================================================
5014. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENGINE SNAPSHOT AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Frozen Engine ID/capability fingerprint.

Current provider phải match policy.

Không tự chọn Engine khác.

======================================================================
5015. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESOURCE CURRENT AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Resource availability luôn current.

Session chỉ snapshot requirement/policy reference.

Không cố tái tạo old hardware state.

======================================================================
5016. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT CURRENT HEALTH AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Artifact current validation/availability quyết định health.

Historical Attempt success giữ nguyên.

======================================================================
5017. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MANIFEST HISTORICAL AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Final Manifest mô tả trạng thái lúc finalization.

Current health có thể khác.

Nếu product cần current Manifest:

- rebuild revision;
- không rewrite original final silently.

======================================================================
5018. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REGISTRY CACHE AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Registry chỉ list/cache.

Action service phải reload Session/current readiness.

Không quyết định Retry/Resume chỉ từ Registry.

======================================================================
5019. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SOURCE MAP AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Source map dùng diagnostics/traceability.

Không sửa source/Unit bằng source map.

======================================================================
5020. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RECONSTRUCTION AUTHORITY
======================================================================

No-loss validation phải dùng actual text/spans.

Không dựa tổng character count bằng nhau.

======================================================================
5021. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RECONSTRUCTION NORMALIZATION
======================================================================

Nếu outer separators intentionally excluded:

- define exact reconstruction function;
- persist policy/version;
- compare canonical reconstruction.

Không dùng `.strip()` tùy tiện che mất dữ liệu.

======================================================================
5022. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CHAPTER TITLE POLICY
======================================================================

Default phải giữ chapter title trong spoken Plan.

Nếu project có option không đọc title:

- explicit Request setting;
- title metadata vẫn giữ;
- no-loss comparison dùng declared exclusion;
- warning/display rõ.

======================================================================
5023. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION INTRO OUTRO POLICY
======================================================================

Intro/outro mặc định giữ.

Không semantic AI loại bỏ.

Nếu explicit exclusion option hiện có:

- snapshot;
- report;
- tests;
- không hidden.

======================================================================
5024. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ADVERTISEMENT POLICY
======================================================================

Không tự xóa quảng cáo/ghi chú tác giả/chèn nguồn.

Custom literal replacement chỉ khi người dùng cấu hình rõ.

======================================================================
5025. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LANGUAGE POLICY
======================================================================

Generate Pipeline không dịch.

Language field chỉ:

- Engine capability;
- pronunciation/model selection;
- metadata.

Text giữ nguyên sau deterministic normalization.

======================================================================
5026. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEXT ENCODING POLICY
======================================================================

Managed text UTF-8.

No lossy encoding.

Serializer/readers explicit.

======================================================================
5027. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LARGE TEXT POLICY
======================================================================

Large text:

- background planning;
- progress;
- cancellation;
- bounded preview;
- no full text API list;
- no UI main-thread split;
- no repeated copies retained.

======================================================================
5028. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UNIT SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Thousands Units:

- paginated query;
- no full child widgets;
- no Manifest full text;
- no Plan rewrite per progress;
- batch Job creation strategy;
- Registry summaries.

======================================================================
5029. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION JOB SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu Queue không phù hợp tạo hàng nghìn Jobs cùng lúc:

- use batched enqueue/coordinator through Queue;
- persistent cursor;
- idempotency;
- pause/cancel;
- no custom thread scheduler.

======================================================================
5030. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REPORT SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Large affected Unit lists:

- count;
- paginated query/report detail;
- bounded IDs preview;
- no huge Session metadata.

======================================================================
5031. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MANIFEST SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Manifest có thể:

- store compact Unit entries;
- shard/index;
- reference entity repositories.

Phải package/audit/rebuild được.

Không full Unit text.

======================================================================
5032. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REGISTRY SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Registry:

- one compact entry per Session;
- pagination/filter/search;
- atomic updates;
- rebuild.

Không store every Unit.

======================================================================
5033. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CHECKSUM SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Checksum Audio/file lớn streaming.

Cache immutable/check metadata.

No repeated checksum on every view refresh.

======================================================================
5034. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROBE SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Không FFprobe tất cả outputs khi mở page.

Use:

- latest report;
- light existence check;
- explicit/deep revalidation Job.

======================================================================
5035. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION STARTUP SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Startup/Project open:

- no all Sessions deep scan;
- no all output checksum;
- no Engine model load;
- no Reference full validation;
- no custom recovery inference.

======================================================================
5036. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Use:

- pagination;
- lazy details;
- row models;
- bounded snippets;
- throttled events.

Không one widget per Unit.

======================================================================
5037. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Every large collection:

- limit;
- max limit;
- stable sort;
- cursor/page;
- include flags false default.

======================================================================
5038. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PACKAGE SCALE POLICY
======================================================================

Package file enumeration through existing service.

Progress/cancellation.

No load Audio into memory.

======================================================================
5039. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY TRUST BOUNDARIES
======================================================================

Trust boundaries:

- API/client input untrusted.
- UI text fields untrusted.
- external source path/file untrusted.
- external output destination untrusted.
- persisted old/future JSON untrusted until validation.
- Engine provider output untrusted until OutputManager/Validator.
- package archive untrusted.
- Reference assets validated through Vault.

======================================================================
5040. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY ID VALIDATION
======================================================================

IDs:

- length bounded;
- allowed charset;
- no separators;
- no traversal;
- no control chars;
- no empty.

Repository still checks containment.

======================================================================
5041. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY METADATA VALIDATION
======================================================================

Arbitrary metadata:

- JSON-safe;
- depth/size bounded;
- no binary;
- no Path/process/object;
- no secrets;
- no full source.

======================================================================
5042. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY OUTPUT TEMPLATE
======================================================================

Template parser:

- whitelist placeholders;
- no expressions;
- no attribute traversal;
- no indexing;
- no format injection;
- no separators from rendered values without sanitization;
- bounded result.

======================================================================
5043. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY EXTERNAL PATH
======================================================================

External path support chỉ khi actual product có.

Validate:

- allowed type/root;
- no device paths;
- no unsafe system directories if policy;
- permission;
- symlink;
- no API leak.

======================================================================
5044. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY SUBPROCESS
======================================================================

Engine/probe/converter subprocess:

- argument array;
- shell false;
- timeout;
- bounded output;
- cancellation;
- explicit executable config;
- no arbitrary options from Request.

======================================================================
5045. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY PACKAGE
======================================================================

Package import:

- entry count/size limits;
- no traversal;
- no symlink escape;
- temp extraction;
- checksum;
- schema;
- remap;
- atomic finalization.

======================================================================
5046. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY DOCX
======================================================================

DOCX reader:

- existing trusted library;
- size limits;
- no unsafe manual XML/entity handling;
- no macro execution;
- no external network links.

======================================================================
5047. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY OPEN_PLAY
======================================================================

Open/play action:

- Artifact valid/available;
- resolved managed path;
- containment;
- supported format;
- platform helper;
- no arbitrary command.

======================================================================
5048. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY ERROR RESPONSE
======================================================================

Không đưa:

- traceback;
- source text;
- secret;
- external absolute path;
- command line;
- environment variables;
- model token/config.

======================================================================
5049. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY LOG FILE
======================================================================

Log file path/service theo project.

Không tạo log chứa full user novel/reference.

======================================================================
5050. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SECURITY TEST MATRIX
======================================================================

Phải có tests đại diện:

- malicious IDs;
- traversal;
- absolute path;
- UNC/device path;
- symlink escape;
- template injection;
- Engine option command injection;
- package traversal;
- future schema;
- cross-project IDs;
- source text privacy;
- path redaction.

======================================================================
5051. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION WINDOWS FILE LOCK
======================================================================

Handle Windows lock:

- PermissionError;
- retryable classification;
- preserve existing file;
- no delete;
- clear messaging.

Tests mock/safe isolated.

======================================================================
5052. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION WINDOWS PATH LENGTH
======================================================================

Output naming resolver phải budget full path.

Human title truncation deterministic.

Identity suffix/extension preserved.

======================================================================
5053. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION WINDOWS CASE FOLD
======================================================================

Collision comparison case-insensitive theo filesystem target policy.

Test:

- `Audio.wav`;
- `audio.wav`.

======================================================================
5054. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION WINDOWS RESERVED NAMES
======================================================================

Sanitize:

- CON;
- PRN;
- AUX;
- NUL;
- COM1–COM9;
- LPT1–LPT9;

kể cả có extension/trailing dots/spaces.

======================================================================
5055. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UNICODE PATH
======================================================================

Vietnamese Unicode titles được giữ khi safe.

Normalize for collision.

Không dùng lossy ASCII-only nếu source utility hỗ trợ Unicode.

======================================================================
5056. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION FILESYSTEM ATOMICITY
======================================================================

Atomicity thực tế phụ thuộc filesystem.

Use project utility.

Cross-filesystem external copy phải two-phase.

Không claim atomic rename khi không đúng.

======================================================================
5057. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION FILE CHANGE DETECTION
======================================================================

Khi validate file lớn:

- capture stat before;
- read/probe/checksum;
- capture stat after;
- mismatch → unstable/error.

Không mark valid file đang thay đổi.

======================================================================
5058. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Valid Artifact file không được modify in-place bởi pipeline.

New Retry/derived output tạo Artifact mới/supersession.

======================================================================
5059. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SIDECAR IMMUTABILITY
======================================================================

Sidecar thuộc Artifact/Attempt.

Không rewrite historical sidecar để phản ánh latest status.

Current Manifest/report separate.

======================================================================
5060. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MANIFEST CHECKSUM EXCLUSIONS
======================================================================

Định nghĩa fields loại khỏi core checksum nếu volatile:

- created/build timestamp;
- current health check timestamp;
- non-semantic display cache;
- own checksum.

Không loại bỏ identity/lineage/status/output data.

======================================================================
5061. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PLAN CHECKSUM EXCLUSIONS
======================================================================

Loại volatile:

- created operation progress;
- current readiness;
- current Job/resource state.

Bao gồm frozen semantic inputs.

======================================================================
5062. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SETTINGS CHECKSUM CANONICALIZATION
======================================================================

Canonical:

- stable key order;
- enum values;
- finite numbers;
- normalized strings;
- no timestamps;
- no display-only mutable names nếu không semantic.

======================================================================
5063. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SELECTION CHECKSUM CANONICALIZATION
======================================================================

Bao gồm:

- IDs;
- content fingerprints;
- asset checksums;
- effective params;
- Engine config fingerprint.

Không secret.

======================================================================
5064. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ARTIFACT LINEAGE CHECKSUM
======================================================================

Có thể lưu input fingerprint riêng:

- Unit text;
- selection;
- settings;
- Engine;
- OutputSpec.

Không thay file checksum.

======================================================================
5065. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REUSE OUTPUT POLICY
======================================================================

Reuse existing valid Artifact chỉ khi:

- exact lineage fingerprint;
- required format;
- current validation passes;
- Artifact belongs same/current Plan policy;
- no active conflict.

Không dùng filename-only cache.

======================================================================
5066. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CONTENT ADDRESSING
======================================================================

Không bắt buộc content-addressed storage.

Nếu source đã có:

- reuse;
- preserve reference counts/ownership.

Không tự thêm hệ cache phức tạp.

======================================================================
5067. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DERIVED OUTPUT POLICY
======================================================================

Derived output như MP3:

- source Artifact ID/checksum;
- converter ID/version/settings;
- own Artifact;
- validation;
- required/optional role;
- no extension rename.

======================================================================
5068. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MERGE OUTPUT POLICY
======================================================================

Chapter/session merge nếu implemented:

- ordered source Artifact IDs/checksums;
- merge provider/version/settings;
- own Job/Artifact;
- validation;
- required/optional;
- no direct concatenation giả.

Nếu absent, readiness NOT_IMPLEMENTED/UNAVAILABLE.

======================================================================
5069. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PREVIEW PLAN POLICY
======================================================================

Preview Plan có thể:

- dùng Request draft;
- materialize temp/managed source;
- chạy same text services;
- trả bounded structure/Units/output estimate;
- không claim Session production nếu ephemeral.

Ưu tiên reuse full Plan pipeline với preview Session nếu persistence architecture phù hợp.

======================================================================
5070. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PREVIEW AUDIO POLICY
======================================================================

Preview Audio:

- preview Session/Unit/Attempt;
- real handler;
- Resource Manager;
- OutputManager;
- Validator;
- preview Artifact root;
- no production output collision;
- cleanup policy explicit.

No fake silence.

======================================================================
5071. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PREVIEW EXPIRATION POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu preview storage có expiration:

- metadata;
- pinned;
- cleanup candidate;
- no automatic unknown deletion;
- cleanup service dry-run/test.

Không bắt buộc Sprint nếu source không có.

======================================================================
5072. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SESSION ARCHIVE POLICY
======================================================================

Archive:

- metadata state;
- Registry filter;
- no deletion/move;
- no execution;
- terminal/eligible only;
- restore action separate.

======================================================================
5073. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SESSION DELETE POLICY
======================================================================

Hard delete ngoài scope.

Không thêm DELETE API/UI.

======================================================================
5074. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT DELETE POLICY
======================================================================

Không thêm destructive output deletion trong Sprint.

Invalid/superseded/orphan files được report/retained.

======================================================================
5075. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CLEANUP POLICY
======================================================================

Cleanup foundation nếu existing:

- identify candidates;
- dry-run;
- ownership/evidence;
- no default auto delete.

Không required để hoàn thành Sprint.

======================================================================
5076. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT ARCHIVE POLICY
======================================================================

Project archive action phải kiểm tra:

- active Generate operations;
- active Jobs;
- pending writes;
- package/backup activity.

Block hoặc coordinate theo Project service.

Không silent archive rồi tiếp tục output.

======================================================================
5077. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT CLOSE POLICY
======================================================================

Closing Project UI:

- không tự cancel Jobs nếu global Queue design;
- Jobs vẫn có explicit Project ID;
- UI detaches;
- scoped services disposed safely.

App shutdown khác Project close.

======================================================================
5078. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT SWITCH POLICY
======================================================================

Switch:

- clear selected Request/Session IDs;
- cancel/ignore old UI queries;
- unsubscribe/rebind events;
- no path cache leakage;
- no current Project use in worker.

======================================================================
5079. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT BACKUP POLICY
======================================================================

Backup:

- consistent checkpoint;
- include metadata according mode;
- no temp treated valid;
- no Engine pause assumption;
- output omission explicit.

======================================================================
5080. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT IMPORT POLICY
======================================================================

Imported non-terminal Session:

- no original active Jobs/leases;
- safe status;
- current readiness;
- recovery/paused/read-only;
- no auto Resume.

======================================================================
5081. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT DUPLICATE POLICY
======================================================================

Ưu tiên verified source behavior.

Safe default nếu chưa định nghĩa:

- copy Project settings/Voice/Reference metadata theo Project service;
- không copy Generate execution history/outputs.

Không tự thêm mode phức tạp.

======================================================================
5082. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REFERENCE PACKAGE POLICY
======================================================================

Reference assets inclusion/remap thuộc Reference Vault/package service.

Generate chỉ:

- record IDs/checksums;
- consume remap table;
- update snapshots/provenance;
- revalidate current import.

======================================================================
5083. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION VOICE ARCHIVE POLICY
======================================================================

Voice archived sau Plan:

- history readable;
- execution policy block/warning theo project;
- no fallback;
- current display from snapshot.

======================================================================
5084. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION VARIANT DELETE POLICY
======================================================================

Frozen effective values giữ.

Nhưng Voice/model/reference dependency phải còn.

Execution không cần live Variant object nếu snapshot đủ, trừ asset resolution.

Document actual.

======================================================================
5085. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION STYLE DELETE POLICY
======================================================================

Frozen effective style/assets giữ IDs/checksums.

Nếu assets vẫn managed và valid, execution policy có thể cho phép.

Nếu Profile deletion removes assets, block.

Không tự tạo new Style.

======================================================================
5086. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REFERENCE ARCHIVE POLICY
======================================================================

Default block execution mới/Resume nếu asset archived, trừ project explicitly allows historical use.

No fallback.

======================================================================
5087. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENGINE UNREGISTER POLICY
======================================================================

Session remains planned/history.

Queue/Resume/Retry execution unavailable.

No automatic Engine replacement.

======================================================================
5088. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENGINE VERSION POLICY
======================================================================

Define policy classes:

- exact required;
- compatible warning;
- current allowed;
- unsupported.

Provider declares compatibility if architecture supports.

Core không tự đoán version compatibility.

======================================================================
5089. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MODEL FILE CHANGE POLICY
======================================================================

Model/reference fingerprint change:

- block or confirmation policy;
- no silent snapshot update;
- create new Session for reproducibility if different.

======================================================================
5090. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RANDOMNESS POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu Engine dùng seed:

- requested seed;
- effective seed;
- provider support;
- Attempt snapshot/result.

Nếu seed unsupported, warning/error.

No deterministic claim otherwise.

======================================================================
5091. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SPEED_PITCH_STYLE POLICY
======================================================================

Parameters:

- validated against provider capability;
- requested/effective snapshot;
- finite/range;
- no silent ignore/clamp;
- no current UI defaults during Resume.

======================================================================
5092. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION LANGUAGE_ENGINE POLICY
======================================================================

Language compatibility:

- selected language/source metadata;
- provider capability;
- Voice/reference compatibility if applicable;
- stable blocker.

Không detect language bằng AI trong Sprint.

======================================================================
5093. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESOURCE CONCURRENCY POLICY
======================================================================

Engine/provider concurrency limits declared.

Job/Resource infrastructure enforces:

- model singleton;
- GPU exclusivity;
- CPU concurrency;
- disk constraints.

Generate không tự tạo semaphore nếu authority đã có.

======================================================================
5094. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESOURCE WAIT TRANSITION
======================================================================

When waiting:

- Job remains queued/waiting;
- Attempt waiting_resource;
- Unit waiting_resource;
- Session summary waiting_resource nếu no running/higher state;
- no retry count;
- no failure event spam.

======================================================================
5095. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESOURCE READY TRANSITION
======================================================================

When granted:

- same Job/Attempt;
- Unit running only after handler starts;
- Session running;
- active lease recorded.

======================================================================
5096. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESOURCE UNSUPPORTED TRANSITION
======================================================================

Unsupported:

- no repeated queue retries;
- Unit/Session blocked;
- report/readiness;
- operation terminal or waiting for user repair.

======================================================================
5097. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESOURCE DISK FAILURE
======================================================================

Distinguish:

- estimated insufficient before Job;
- actual disk full during write;
- temp/final permission;
- external destination unavailable.

No data overwrite/delete.

======================================================================
5098. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENGINE CANCELLATION RESULT
======================================================================

Provider cancellation must not be mapped as generic failure.

Attempt cancelled/interrupted according source of cancellation.

Temp output untrusted.

======================================================================
5099. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENGINE TIMEOUT RESULT
======================================================================

Timeout:

- provider process cleanup;
- Attempt failed/interrupted;
- temp preserved/classified;
- retryability policy;
- no automatic output valid.

======================================================================
5100. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENGINE OOM RESULT
======================================================================

OOM:

- stable error;
- Resource metrics if available;
- no automatic setting/model/device change;
- Retry/new Session user decision/policy.

======================================================================
5101. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION ENGINE INVALID_RESPONSE RESULT
======================================================================

Examples:

- missing output role;
- path outside temp;
- non-JSON metadata;
- unsupported format;
- unexpected multiple files.

Map provider contract error.

No finalization.

======================================================================
5102. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT PROBE RESULT
======================================================================

Probe result phải validate:

- process success;
- JSON/schema;
- stream selection;
- finite values;
- format;
- duration;
- sample rate/channels.

No malformed response success.

======================================================================
5103. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT BASIC VALIDATION LIMIT
======================================================================

Basic validation readiness không được overclaim.

Ví dụ WAV standard library header có thể READY basic.

MP3 nếu không probe/parser thì basic có thể chỉ DEGRADED/UNAVAILABLE tùy required policy.

======================================================================
5104. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT FULL VALIDATION LIMIT
======================================================================

Full validation chỉ khi actual probe supports.

No “full” label nếu chỉ size/extension.

======================================================================
5105. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT HEALTH RECHECK
======================================================================

Recheck action modes:

- light existence/stat;
- standard checksum/basic;
- deep probe/full.

UI/API phải hiển thị mode.

======================================================================
5106. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT VALIDATION CANCELLATION
======================================================================

Deep validation cancellation:

- no valid update;
- existing prior valid report remains historical;
- current check cancelled/unavailable;
- Artifact health policy clear.

======================================================================
5107. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OUTPUT VALIDATION RACE
======================================================================

Nếu file thay đổi sau validation trước Artifact valid commit:

- final stat/checksum recheck;
- reject unstable.

======================================================================
5108. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION FINALIZER ERROR POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu finalizer lỗi:

- no false completed;
- Session recovery_required/failed as evidence;
- valid outputs preserved;
- Manifest draft/report;
- idempotent rerun.

======================================================================
5109. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MANIFEST REBUILD ERROR POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu entity graph corrupt:

- no new final Manifest;
- preserve old;
- report blocker;
- Session health recovery/corrupt.

======================================================================
5110. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REGISTRY ERROR POLICY
======================================================================

Registry failure:

- core entity remains;
- mark rebuild required if possible;
- event warning;
- next open rebuild/repair;
- no core rollback.

======================================================================
5111. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REPORT ERROR POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu optional report write fail:

- warning/degraded.

Nếu report required for authoritative validation/finalization:

- do not mark success;
- preserve physical output;
- recovery required.

======================================================================
5112. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION EVENT ERROR POLICY
======================================================================

Event failure không rollback persisted core state.

Log/report.

UI reload handles.

======================================================================
5113. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API TIMEOUT POLICY
======================================================================

Mutation API timeout không đồng nghĩa operation fail.

Return/lookup operation ID.

Client requery.

Idempotency key prevents duplicate.

======================================================================
5114. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI TIMEOUT POLICY
======================================================================

UI:

- show checking status;
- query operation/session;
- no automatic duplicate mutation;
- keep form/session context.

======================================================================
5115. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OPERATION ABANDONED POLICY
======================================================================

Operation running nhưng no Job/process/checkpoint stale:

- recovery inspect;
- mark interrupted/failed/recovery;
- no blind rerun;
- created entities preserved.

======================================================================
5116. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION OPERATION CLEANUP POLICY
======================================================================

Không xóa old operation records trong Sprint.

Can archive/prune future via existing retention.

======================================================================
5117. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REPORT RETENTION POLICY
======================================================================

Reports historical.

No unbounded inline Session array.

Repository/index/pagination.

======================================================================
5118. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION EVENT RETENTION POLICY
======================================================================

Event Bus không durable event store.

No new event log required unless existing.

======================================================================
5119. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TRANSITION HISTORY RETENTION
======================================================================

Use bounded/entity or separate audit according decision.

Không cần event sourcing.

======================================================================
5120. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API ROUTE READINESS
======================================================================

Action routes phải kiểm tra readiness/action availability bên trong service.

Không chỉ UI disable.

======================================================================
5121. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API HTTP SEMANTICS
======================================================================

Theo framework hiện có.

Conceptual:

- create success;
- accepted background;
- validation error;
- conflict/stale;
- not found;
- unavailable/blocker;
- internal sanitized.

Không ép status code nếu project convention khác, nhưng nhất quán.

======================================================================
5122. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API OPERATION IDEMPOTENCY
======================================================================

Idempotency key scope phải gồm authenticated/local client context nếu framework có.

Ít nhất:

- Project;
- operation type;
- entity;
- client key;
- payload fingerprint.

======================================================================
5123. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API REQUEST SIZE
======================================================================

Bound:

- pasted source;
- engine options;
- metadata;
- list filters;
- naming template;
- retry notes.

Use server/framework limits.

======================================================================
5124. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API RESPONSE SIZE
======================================================================

No full source/Plan/Manifest by default.

Dedicated detail/export.

Pagination.

======================================================================
5125. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API READ MODEL VERSION
======================================================================

Nếu API versioning hiện có, DTO changes backward-compatible.

Persisted schema version không nhất thiết bằng API version.

======================================================================
5126. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API LEGACY ROUTE
======================================================================

Existing route:

- retain;
- delegate;
- deprecate/document if needed;
- test.

Không remove silently.

======================================================================
5127. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION API MUTATION AUDIT
======================================================================

Mutation source actor `api`.

Operation/event/log record.

No auth system addition.

======================================================================
5128. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI MUTATION AUDIT
======================================================================

Mutation source actor `ui`/`user`.

Operation/event/log record.

======================================================================
5129. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION JOB MUTATION AUDIT
======================================================================

Worker source actor `job`.

======================================================================
5130. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RECOVERY MUTATION AUDIT
======================================================================

Source actor `recovery`.

======================================================================
5131. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION MIGRATION MUTATION AUDIT
======================================================================

Source actor `migration`.

Backup/report required.

======================================================================
5132. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI FORM UNSAVED POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu Request form dirty và chuyển Project/Session:

- follow existing prompt/save/discard UX;
- no silent loss if project architecture supports drafts;
- no auto materialize.

Không xây autosave phức tạp ngoài scope.

======================================================================
5133. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI DRAFT RESTORE POLICY
======================================================================

Persisted Request draft can reopen.

Form fields from Request.

Missing selected entities shown, no fallback.

======================================================================
5134. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI FROZEN SESSION POLICY
======================================================================

Session detail fields read-only.

Changes require clone/new Request.

No inline editing Plan/Unit text.

======================================================================
5135. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI SOURCE PREVIEW POLICY
======================================================================

Bounded snippet.

Show:

- source type;
- filename/display;
- chars;
- encoding;
- checksum short;
- health;
- truncated marker.

No full novel auto load.

======================================================================
5136. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI PLAN PREVIEW POLICY
======================================================================

Show:

- Documents;
- Chapters;
- Units;
- counts;
- split warnings;
- effective settings;
- reconstruction;
- output path samples;
- collision summary.

No execution claim.

======================================================================
5137. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI STATUS HEALTH POLICY
======================================================================

Always distinguish visually/textually:

- lifecycle status;
- current health;
- readiness;
- waiting resource.

Không combine into one ambiguous badge.

======================================================================
5138. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI ACTION GROUPING
======================================================================

Primary:

- Validate;
- Materialize/Plan;
- Queue;
- Pause/Resume;
- Cancel.

Secondary:

- Retry;
- Revalidate;
- Recovery;
- Manifest rebuild;
- Archive/restore;
- Clone.

Không hiển thị mọi action cùng lúc nếu unavailable.

======================================================================
5139. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI DESTRUCTIVE CONFIRMATION
======================================================================

Confirm:

- cancel;
- archive active if allowed;
- overwrite/version choice if explicit;
- ambiguous recovery action.

Không cần confirm harmless read/revalidate light.

======================================================================
5140. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI ACTION TOOLTIP
======================================================================

Disabled action tooltip lấy từ domain blocker.

Không hardcode khác API.

======================================================================
5141. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI OPERATION PROGRESS
======================================================================

Planning operation:

- stage;
- progress;
- cancellation.

Execution Session:

- Unit counts;
- Job current;
- waiting resource;
- ETA.

Không dùng same percent nếu semantics khác.

======================================================================
5142. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI FAILURE DETAIL
======================================================================

Main view summary.

Detail:

- error code;
- message;
- Attempt;
- Job;
- report;
- suggested action;
- copy safe diagnostic IDs.

No traceback/source/path.

======================================================================
5143. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI ARTIFACT ACTION
======================================================================

Open/play only if:

- valid or supported degraded according policy;
- available;
- path resolves safely.

Missing/invalid no action.

======================================================================
5144. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI EVENT REFRESH POLICY
======================================================================

Event triggers targeted query.

No event payload full state.

Progress refresh throttled.

Terminal/action refresh immediate.

======================================================================
5145. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI PROJECT CONTEXT POLICY
======================================================================

Controller stores Project ID generation token.

Async result/event mismatched Project ignored.

======================================================================
5146. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI SESSION CONTEXT POLICY
======================================================================

Detail refresh only matching selected Session.

List may update matching row.

======================================================================
5147. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION UI TESTABILITY POLICY
======================================================================

Business services injected/mocked at controller boundary.

UI smoke uses actual Application/Query with temp Project.

No Engine runtime.

======================================================================
5148. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DASHBOARD CAPABILITY POLICY
======================================================================

Dashboard only shows capabilities actual.

No “Audio ready” when only Plan ready.

======================================================================
5149. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SETTINGS UI POLICY
======================================================================

Settings page:

- global defaults;
- Project overrides;
- Engine-specific supported options;
- validation.

No current Session mutation.

======================================================================
5150. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION SETTINGS SECRET POLICY
======================================================================

Secrets stored through existing config/secret mechanism.

Never Session snapshot/Manifest/API.

======================================================================
5151. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION SOURCE POLICY
======================================================================

Docs phải được viết sau khi đọc implementation cuối.

Không copy tên/path hypothetical từ Prompt.

======================================================================
5152. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION EXAMPLE POLICY
======================================================================

Examples:

- synthetic IDs;
- temp Project names;
- short original Vietnamese text;
- no user path/content;
- no secret.

======================================================================
5153. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION STATUS POLICY
======================================================================

Mỗi capability ghi:

- what works;
- preconditions;
- limitations;
- unavailable reason;
- test evidence.

Không chỉ một câu “hoàn thành”.

======================================================================
5154. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION EXTENSION POLICY
