======================================================================

Engine integration docs phải chỉ exact:

- protocol/class;
- registration;
- capability metadata;
- ResourceRequirement;
- Reference resolution;
- temp output;
- error map;
- tests.

Không ghi chung chung “thêm Engine”.

======================================================================
5155. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION RECOVERY POLICY
======================================================================

Phải cảnh báo:

- không auto Resume;
- không auto delete;
- orphan không tự attach nếu ambiguous;
- restore exact reference/source required.

======================================================================
5156. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION MIGRATION POLICY
======================================================================

Chỉ document mappings actual.

Unknown legacy data preserved/read-only.

======================================================================
5157. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION PACKAGE POLICY
======================================================================

Mỗi package mode ghi rõ include/omit/resumability.

Metadata-only không claim Resume.

======================================================================
5158. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION DOCUMENTATION TEST PROVIDER POLICY
======================================================================

Test provider:

- path/module tests only;
- output synthetic;
- no production registration;
- proves orchestration, not voice quality.

======================================================================
5159. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST LAYER POLICY
======================================================================

Test layers:

1. Pure domain.
2. Repositories/filesystem.
3. Services.
4. Job/Resource adapters.
5. Application workflow.
6. API.
7. UI/controller/smoke.
8. package/migration.
9. full suite.

Không chỉ one giant integration test.

======================================================================
5160. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST FAILURE INJECTION
======================================================================

Use controlled failure injection cho:

- atomic write;
- Registry update;
- Event publish;
- Job creation;
- Resource decision;
- Engine execution;
- output move;
- probe;
- Manifest write;
- shutdown.

No random failure.

======================================================================
5161. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST RESTART
======================================================================

Restart tests phải:

- discard in-memory services;
- recreate AppContext/repositories;
- load persisted files;
- verify recovery/queries.

Không dùng same Python object làm bằng chứng persistence.

======================================================================
5162. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST CONCURRENCY
======================================================================

Concurrency tests quan trọng:

- materialize same Request;
- plan same Session;
- queue same Session;
- Retry same Unit;
- finalizer twice;
- Registry update/rebuild;
- Artifact reservation.

Deterministic synchronization.

======================================================================
5163. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST DATA GUARD
======================================================================

Test helper phải fail nếu root:

- không nằm dưới tmp/test directory;
- trùng production default;
- chứa marker real Project/workspace.

Không chỉ tin environment variable.

======================================================================
5164. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST ENGINE GUARD
======================================================================

Monkeypatch/assert production Engine runtime load/execute không được gọi trong full test suite.

Test provider explicit.

======================================================================
5165. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST NETWORK GUARD
======================================================================

Không external network.

Nếu provider/library tries network:

- mock/disable;
- test fails on unexpected call if infrastructure supports.

======================================================================
5166. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST GIT GUARD
======================================================================

Tests không gọi Git write.

Implementation process cũng không.

======================================================================
5167. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST FILE LEAK GUARD
======================================================================

Sau tests:

- no files outside tmp;
- no leftover worker process;
- no open temp locks;
- no Project Generate root in real default.

======================================================================
5168. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST UI GUARD
======================================================================

UI tests:

- offscreen;
- deterministic;
- no modal hang;
- close/delete widgets;
- stop async callbacks;
- no real Project.

======================================================================
5169. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST API GUARD
======================================================================

Use in-process client/temp context.

No external server port unless project standard requires and controlled.

======================================================================
5170. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST PACKAGE GUARD
======================================================================

Archive/extract temp.

No user backups/exports.

======================================================================
5171. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST MIGRATION GUARD
======================================================================

Legacy fixtures copied temp.

Original fixture immutable.

Backup/assert rollback.

======================================================================
5172. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST LOG PRIVACY
======================================================================

Capture logs.

Assert no full synthetic source/reference secret marker.

Use unique sentinel string to detect leakage.

======================================================================
5173. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST PATH PRIVACY
======================================================================

Use unique external absolute path sentinel.

Assert API/UI error response does not expose full path.

======================================================================
5174. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST SECRET PRIVACY
======================================================================

Use fake secret sentinel.

Assert no Snapshot/Manifest/report/log/API.

======================================================================
5175. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST FALSE SUCCESS
======================================================================

Parameterized evidence:

- Job success only;
- file exists only;
- Engine returns path only;
- Artifact created unvalidated;
- Manifest missing.

All must not produce Session completed.

======================================================================
5176. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST VALID SUCCESS
======================================================================

Only full chain:

- required outputs;
- final files;
- validation reports;
- Artifact valid;
- Attempt success;
- Unit success;
- final Manifest;
- Session terminal.

======================================================================
5177. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST HEALTH SEPARATION
======================================================================

After valid completed:

- output removed;
- health degraded;
- lifecycle completed;
- current action availability/recovery behavior correct.

======================================================================
5178. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST FUTURE SCHEMA
======================================================================

For every core persisted entity or common loader:

- higher schema;
- no write;
- no downgrade;
- list/read-only handling;
- clear error.

======================================================================
5179. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST LEGACY UNKNOWN
======================================================================

Unknown old field/entity:

- preserve/report;
- no silent drop;
- no crash entire Project.

======================================================================
5180. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST UNICODE
======================================================================

Use Vietnamese:

- accents;
- quotes;
- ellipsis;
- punctuation;
- filenames;
- duplicate normalized forms;
- JSON roundtrip.

======================================================================
5181. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST WINDOWS PATH
======================================================================

Even on non-Windows CI, pure sanitizer/collision tests cover Windows rules.

Platform-specific file lock tests conditionally controlled.

======================================================================
5182. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST LARGE DATA
======================================================================

Generated text/Units moderate enough CI.

Assert:

- no deep list load;
- no infinite loop;
- stable counts;
- no full text Manifest;
- pagination.

No brittle exact time threshold.

======================================================================
5183. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST FULL PYTEST
======================================================================

Full test command phải chạy không loại Generate/legacy tests.

Nếu environment-specific optional tests skipped:

- report exact skip/reason;
- critical acceptance vẫn pass.

======================================================================
5184. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION TEST COVERAGE REVIEW
======================================================================

Không cần đặt coverage target mới.

Phải manually verify critical branches:

- success;
- validation failure;
- persistence failure;
- cancellation;
- stale;
- recovery;
- unavailable handler;
- resource waiting;
- output invalid;
- finalizer failure.

======================================================================
5185. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW PUBLIC API
======================================================================

Search exported/public names.

Confirm:

- old imports;
- old methods;
- route keys;
- UI page keys;
- settings keys.

No accidental deletion.

======================================================================
5186. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW IMPORTS
======================================================================

Check:

- circular imports;
- import side effects;
- heavy Engine imports;
- Qt imported in domain/job;
- test helpers imported production.

======================================================================
5187. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW PATHS
======================================================================

Search:

- hardcoded root strings;
- direct join with user values;
- absolute persisted paths;
- `cwd`;
- temp outside Project/test policy.

======================================================================
5188. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW STATUS
======================================================================

Search direct status assignments.

Every legitimate occurrence classified.

No UI/API/Engine direct lifecycle write.

======================================================================
5189. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW CHECKSUMS
======================================================================

Search:

- `hash(`;
- duplicate SHA code;
- full-file `.read()` for large Audio;
- non-canonical JSON.

======================================================================
5190. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW TIME
======================================================================

Search naive:

- `datetime.now()` without timezone;
- local time serialization;
- timestamp strings inconsistent.

Use project utility.

======================================================================
5191. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW ERRORS
======================================================================

Search broad catches.

Every boundary catch must:

- classify;
- log;
- preserve;
- not swallow.

======================================================================
5192. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW PLACEHOLDERS
======================================================================

Search:

- TODO;
- FIXME;
- pass;
- NotImplementedError;
- dummy;
- fake;
- mock;
- silent;
- placeholder.

Test-only occurrences verified.

Required production path no placeholder.

======================================================================
5193. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW THREADS
======================================================================

Search:

- Thread;
- QRunnable;
- QThread;
- executor;
- timer polling.

Verify no new duplicate scheduler/leak.

======================================================================
5194. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW SUBPROCESS
======================================================================

Search:

- subprocess;
- os.system;
- shell;
- command strings.

Verify safe args/timeouts.

======================================================================
5195. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW SERIALIZATION
======================================================================

Search direct `json.dump/json.dumps`.

Ensure common serializer/atomic writer where persisted.

======================================================================
5196. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW DATA LOSS
======================================================================

Search:

- unlink;
- remove;
- rmtree;
- replace;
- overwrite;
- truncate;
- clean.

Every occurrence ownership/safety tested.

======================================================================
5197. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW PRODUCTION FAKE
======================================================================

Search registration/composition for:

- Fake;
- Test;
- Mock;
- Dummy;
- Silent;
- Sample Generate provider.

No production registration/import.

======================================================================
5198. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW TEXT MUTATION
======================================================================

Search:

- ad removal;
- title removal;
- translation;
- summarization;
- AI correction;
- automatic rewrite.

No hidden content transformation.

======================================================================
5199. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW UI BUSINESS LOGIC
======================================================================

Search widgets/controllers for:

- repository write;
- status assignment;
- Engine execute;
- path move;
- Job creation direct;
- retry eligibility conditions duplicated.

Move to services.

======================================================================
5200. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW API BUSINESS LOGIC
======================================================================

Search routers for:

- repository coordination;
- file I/O;
- status mutation;
- Engine call;
- direct Job graph creation.

Use application service.

======================================================================
5201. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW JOB BUSINESS AUTHORITY
======================================================================

Job handler may coordinate execution but must not bypass:

- state validation;
- OutputManager;
- Validator;
- repositories;
- finalizer.

======================================================================
5202. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION CODE REVIEW DOCUMENTATION CLAIM
======================================================================

Search Vietnamese/English claims:

- hoàn chỉnh;
- đầy đủ;
- production;
- ready;
- MP3;
- preview;
- batch;
- Resume;
- Retry;
- recovery;
- automatic.

Confirm evidence.

======================================================================
5203. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION FINAL COMMAND ORDER
======================================================================

Final commands theo actual repository:

1. Format/lint targeted nếu project dùng.
2. Compile/import check.
3. Domain/storage targeted tests.
4. Source/text/Plan targeted tests.
5. Output/Resume/Recovery tests.
6. Job/Resource/Project tests.
7. API/UI tests.
8. package/migration tests.
9. full test suite.
10. bootstrap smoke.
11. plan-only workflow.
12. test-provider workflow.
13. Git status/diff read-only.

Không bỏ full suite vì targeted pass.

======================================================================
5204. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION COMMAND FAILURE POLICY
======================================================================

Nếu command fail:

- inspect root cause;
- read latest files;
- fix;
- rerun targeted;
- rerun affected/full.

Không chỉ ghi failure rồi tiếp tục claim ready.

======================================================================
5205. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION PRE-EXISTING FAILURE POLICY
======================================================================

Pre-existing failure chỉ được ghi khi evidence baseline.

Sau changes:

- không được làm lỗi nặng hơn;
- Sprint-related failure phải fix;
- final full suite vẫn ideally pass.

Nếu required full suite còn fail:

- NOT_READY trừ project instruction có explicit baseline exception;
- report exact.

======================================================================
5206. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION WARNING POLICY
======================================================================

Review warnings:

- deprecation;
- unclosed file;
- pending task;
- thread;
- resource;
- Qt;
- schema;
- timezone;
- unknown fields.

Không coi all tests pass nếu warnings cho thấy leak/data risk.

======================================================================
5207. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION FINAL DIFF POLICY
======================================================================

Diff review phải kiểm tra:

- chỉ task-related;
- no accidental line-ending/format churn;
- no removed behavior;
- no data files;
- no test artifacts;
- no secrets;
- no large binary/model.

Không stage/commit.

======================================================================
5208. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION WORKTREE CLASSIFICATION
======================================================================

Classify each changed/untracked:

- Sprint source;
- Sprint tests;
- Sprint docs;
- pre-existing source change;
- real user data;
- runtime artifact;
- unknown.

Unknown giữ nguyên/report.

======================================================================
5209. FINAL IMPLEMENTATION REAL DATA CHECK METHOD
======================================================================

Check registered roots bằng read-only listing/status.

Không mở full private content.

Report:

- touched/not touched;

- unexpected changes.

5253. FINAL REPORT NOT_READY RULE
======================================================================

- compile fail;

- production fake còn đăng ký;
- data safety chưa xác định;
- Project isolation lỗi;
- Retry/Resume duplicate;
- recovery destructive/guessing;
- docs overclaim;
- core vertical slice incomplete.

- test skipped critical;

- UI chỉ import được nhưng action không chạy.

- source changes;

5259. MASTER IMPLEMENTATION FINAL GATE
======================================================================

Trước khi kết thúc, Codex phải trả lời nội bộ YES/NO:

1. Source đã được audit thực tế?
2. AGENTS/ROADMAP/Architecture đã đọc?
3. Baseline đã chạy an toàn?
4. File Plan actual?
5. Existing Generate API preserved?
6. IDs immutable?
7. Project scope explicit?
8. Source Snapshot managed?
9. External source deletion tested?
10. Normalization deterministic/versioned?
11. Structure no-loss?
12. Title/intro/outro preserved?
13. Splitter reconstruction pass?
14. Plan frozen/checksummed/read-back?
15. Selection/settings/output snapshots frozen?
16. Output paths safe/unique?
17. Artifact validation controls success?
18. Manifest draft/final/rebuild?
19. Retry creates new Attempt?
20. Resume skips valid Unit?
21. Recovery avoids inference/guess/delete?
22. Job Queue sole scheduler?
23. Resource Manager sole authority?
24. Production fake absent?
25. Engine readiness honest?
26. Reference IDs/checksums/no fallback?
27. Project switch/archive safe?
28. API/UI same services?
29. UI labels honest?
30. Targeted tests pass?
31. Full tests pass?
32. Bootstrap/UI/workflow pass?
33. No real data test mutation?
34. No Git write?
35. Docs accurate?
36. Final capability table actual?

Nếu critical câu trả lời NO:

- không claim READY;
- fix hoặc NOT_READY.

======================================================================
5274. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE
======================================================================

Sau khi toàn bộ PART 01–10 được dán thành một Master Prompt, Codex phải bắt đầu thực hiện ngay.

Không trả lời bằng cách:

- lặp lại yêu cầu;
- chỉ tóm tắt;
- chỉ tạo Plan;
- hỏi chia nhỏ Sprint;
- xin xác nhận từng PHASE;
- tạo code mẫu không tích hợp;
- trì hoãn implementation.

Codex phải:

- audit;
- implement;
- test;
- document;
- verify;
- report.

======================================================================
5275. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — BLOCKER
======================================================================

Chỉ dừng trước implementation tiếp theo khi blocker thật có nguy cơ:

- mất dữ liệu;
- phá compatibility nghiêm trọng;
- không thể xác định source architecture;
- thiếu file/dependency bắt buộc;
- production secret/model/runtime cần mà không có;
- test environment không thể chạy an toàn.

Trước khi dừng phải:

- bảo đảm source coherent;
- chạy targeted checks có thể;
- ghi exact blocker;
- không claim ready.

======================================================================
5276. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO INTERMEDIATE USER PROMPTS
======================================================================

Không hỏi người dùng:

- “có tiếp tục không?”;
- “có muốn sang Phase tiếp không?”;
- “có muốn tạo file không?”;
- “có muốn chạy test không?”.

Tiếp tục tự động theo PHASE nếu an toàn.

======================================================================
5277. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — SOURCE RE-READ
======================================================================

Mỗi lần sửa tiếp một file đã chỉnh:

- đọc lại bản mới nhất;
- không dùng trí nhớ cũ;
- giữ toàn bộ functionality không liên quan.

======================================================================
5278. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — TEST AFTER EDIT
======================================================================

Không chờ đến cuối mới test toàn bộ.

Sau mỗi responsibility:

- targeted tests;
- compile/import nếu liên quan;
- compatibility smoke.

======================================================================
5279. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO PARTIAL STUB
======================================================================

Không để required code path:

- stub;
- pass;
- placeholder;
- UI button không hoạt động;
- route chưa nối service;
- handler không thực thi;
- fake success.

Capability unavailable phải gated rõ, không stub giả.

======================================================================
5280. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO PRODUCTION FAKE
======================================================================

Test provider không được:

- import bởi production AppContext;
- auto-register;
- xuất hiện trong Engine selector production;
- tạo silent/dummy Audio cho người dùng;
- làm readiness production READY.

======================================================================
5281. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO REAL INFERENCE TEST
======================================================================

Không chạy:

- GPT-SoVITS inference;
- model load lớn;
- GPU inference;
- user Voice model;
- real reference processing nặng.

Mock adapter boundary/test provider.

======================================================================
5282. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO GIT WRITE
======================================================================

Không thực hiện bất kỳ Git write command nào.

Chỉ read-only inspection.

======================================================================
5283. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO REAL DATA MUTATION
======================================================================

Không sửa/xóa/move:

- user Projects;
- workspace;
- Voice folders;
- Reference assets;
- Audio outputs;
- backups;
- exports;
- model files;
- unknown runtime data.

Tests temp.

======================================================================
5284. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO SOURCE MUTATION
======================================================================

Input TXT/DOCX/external source:

- read-only;
- managed copy/snapshot;
- no rename;
- no write-back;
- no delete.

======================================================================
5285. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO SILENT OVERWRITE
======================================================================

Không overwrite:

- existing valid output;
- unknown file;
- user file;
- old Manifest;
- old Attempt;
- future schema;
- migration original.

Use versioning/preservation/conflict.

======================================================================
5286. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO SILENT DATA DROP
======================================================================

Không bỏ:

- title;
- intro;
- outro;
- chapter text;
- advertisements;
- unknown legacy fields;
- failed Attempt history;
- invalid/superseded Artifact evidence;
- package omissions.

Must report/explicit policy.

======================================================================
5287. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO IDENTITY BY DISPLAY
======================================================================

Không dùng display name/title/filename/index hiện tại làm persistent identity.

Use immutable IDs.

======================================================================
5288. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO CURRENT DEFAULT REPLAY
======================================================================

Resume/Retry/reopen dùng frozen snapshots.

Không current defaults.

======================================================================
5289. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO REPLAN
======================================================================

Frozen Session thay đổi input/settings:

- clone/new Request/Session.

Không sửa Plan hiện tại.

======================================================================
5290. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO REFERENCE FALLBACK
======================================================================

Reference missing/mismatch:

- block;
- repair exact;
- new Session.

Không first available asset.

======================================================================
5291. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO ENGINE FALLBACK
======================================================================

Engine unavailable:

- unavailable/blocker;
- no fallback Engine.

======================================================================
5292. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO OUTPUT FORMAT FALLBACK
======================================================================

Required MP3 unavailable:

- block/unavailable;
- no WAV renamed/substituted silently.

Optional derived format có warning theo frozen policy.

======================================================================
5293. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO RESUME
======================================================================

Restart:

- inspect/recovery;
- no automatic production execution mặc định.

======================================================================
5294. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO RETRY STORM
======================================================================

Retry only controlled policy/operation.

Waiting resource không failure/retry.

Unsupported không loop.

======================================================================
5295. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO RECOVERY GUESS
======================================================================

Không attach orphan output nếu lineage ambiguous.

Không reconstruct Plan từ filenames.

Không select current Voice/Reference để thay missing.

======================================================================
5296. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO AUTO CLEANUP
======================================================================

Unknown/temp/orphan/invalid files:

- classify/report;
- no delete default.

======================================================================
5297. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — NO DOC OVERCLAIM
======================================================================

README/ROADMAP/CHANGELOG/CURRENT_SPRINT/Architecture phải khớp actual capability table.

======================================================================
5298. FINAL EXECUTION DIRECTIVE — FINAL REPORT REQUIRED
======================================================================

Codex không kết thúc bằng một câu ngắn.

Phải trả Implementation Report có đầy đủ:

- source;
- files;
- phases;
- architecture;
- capabilities;
- tests;
- data safety;
- blockers;
- final status.

======================================================================
5299. FINAL MASTER PROMPT CONSISTENCY
======================================================================

PART 10 tiếp tục trực tiếp PART 01–09.

Tất cả PART là một Master Prompt duy nhất.

Không thay đổi bất kỳ invariant đã khóa:

- Sprint AVS-014.16;
- Generate Pipeline Foundation;
- PHASE 0–12;
- source-first;
- data-first;
- actual source naming adaptation;
- KEEP/NEW/REPLACE/DELETE;
- immutable IDs;
- Project-scoped entities;
- Request/Session separation;
- managed Source Snapshot;
- source file không bị sửa;
- deterministic/versioned normalization;
- no-loss structure/splitting;
- title/intro/outro preserved;
- frozen Plan;
- immutable snapshots;
- Unit/Attempt/Job separation;
- Retry tạo Attempt mới;
- Resume bỏ qua Unit hợp lệ;
- Recovery không inference/đoán/xóa;
- Artifact validation là authority;
- Engine/File/Job success alone không đủ;
- Manifest draft/final/rebuild;
- Registry chỉ cache/index;
- Job Queue là scheduler duy nhất;
- Resource Manager là resource authority duy nhất;
- EngineManager là Engine registry/runtime authority;
- Reference Vault dùng asset IDs/checksums;
- no display-name/path identity;
- no production fake;
- test provider isolated;
- no real inference tests;
- no Train;
- no Voice DNA Analyzer;
- no translation/AI rewrite/ad removal;
- no GPT-SoVITS runtime redesign;
- no advanced unrelated Audio features;
- no cloud/database/broker/framework rewrite;
- no real user data mutation;
- no Git write;
- no silent overwrite;
- no future schema downgrade;
- API/UI dùng chung Application/Query/Readiness;
- honest capability-specific readiness;
- targeted/full tests;
- bootstrap/UI/workflow tests;
- exact documentation;
- exact Final Status.

======================================================================
5300. FINAL MASTER PROMPT COMPLETION
======================================================================

Đây là PART cuối cùng của Master Prompt.

Sau mục này không cần PART tiếp theo.

Khi copy:

- giữ đúng thứ tự PART 01 → PART 10;
- dán toàn bộ vào cùng một yêu cầu cho Codex;
- các marker kết thúc PART ở giữa được xem là dấu phân đoạn;
- marker cuối dưới đây xác nhận toàn bộ Master Prompt đã hoàn tất.
